name: Jacky Rosen
subject: making sure you saw my earlier email
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Rosen for Nevada
body:
Friend, I needed to make sure you saw my email from earlier:
---
**To make a long story short, I gave my team the green light to launch new TV ads a week early, even though the money wasn’t in our budget.**
It was a risky decision, but having these ads live is _essential_ to fighting back against the MILLIONS pouring into Nevada from dark money groups, like the Koch Network, attempting to flip my seat red – and our Senate majority along with it.
I made this decision because I'm confident that supporters like you will step up to help us close this budget gap. But right now, we’re not on track to hit our goal, and I noticed that you haven't chipped in yet.
**[Can I count on you to rush a gift of $5 or more before midnight to get our new ads on the air?](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/82177928/464576917/-2085285190?amounts=250,100,50,25,5&refcode=jtk3654-fr-nd&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDAvMS84ODI5OCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIwMDEzNzhmMi04M2YwLWVlMTEtYWFmMC0wMDIyNDgyMjM3OTQiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=q4QldEUZMhi2X3YtQ4hqgjDcNHfJse_4BNvH9ZTkyXU=)**
Thank you,
Jacky
\---------- Forwarded message ----------
From: **Jacky Rosen**
Date: Mon, Apr 1, 2024
Subject: I took a major risk
| | |
---
Friend, I just made a bit of a risky decision:
**This morning, I authorized our new TV ads to launch _a week early_ ,** even though the money wasn’t in our budget. My finance director wasn’t exactly _thrilled_ with the idea at first, but she came around once I explained why. Let me fill you in:
I'm officially the most vulnerable woman in the Senate, and dark money groups like the Koch network are pouring _millions_ into Nevada to flip my seat red.

Right now, it’s critical we get our ads live ASAP – because having these ads up and running is the best way to counter the GOP's attacks.
**But now, we’re facing a $500,000 budget gap that we have to make up to get ****these new ads live.** We absolutely can’t afford to fall further behind right now, but I told my finance director that I trust top supporters like you to have my back.
[**_So please, can you chip in $5 or whatever you can spare right now to help us get these new ads on the air and reach voters?_**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/82177929/464576918/-2085285190?amounts=250,100,50,25,5&refcode=jtk3654-fr-nd&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDAvMS84ODI5OCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIwMDEzNzhmMi04M2YwLWVlMTEtYWFmMC0wMDIyNDgyMjM3OTQiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=q4QldEUZMhi2X3YtQ4hqgjDcNHfJse_4BNvH9ZTkyXU=)

But experts say I’m one of the most vulnerable senators up for reelection, and the GOP is zeroing in on me as a top target for defeat. name: Rusty Hicks
subject: I want to personally thank you
disclaimer_text: Paid for by the California Democratic Party | www
body:
https://secure.actblue.com/donate/cdp-footer?refcode=header&amount=5 [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/cdp-footer?refcode=header&amount=5]
Friends,
I’m Rusty Hicks, Chair of the California Democratic Party.
Over the past few months, we’ve asked you to volunteer, donate, and vote. I am honored and humbled that so many of you have stepped up to the plate.
Thank you.
Here’s something you should know about me: I am an organizer at heart. As a labor leader and political organizer for over ten years, I helped lead a successful campaign to raise the wages of nearly 1 million working people in Los Angeles to $15 an hour and passed a progressive ballot measure to build more affordable housing and create good union jobs.
Now, I am responsible for marshaling the resources of the California Democratic Party to flip critical swing seats from red to blue.
California is so close to leading the nation and helping flip the U.S. House back from red to blue.
But I can’t do it alone. And our candidates can’t do it alone either.
It takes a grassroots movement. It takes you.
That’s why I am so grateful for you.
Will you stay on our team through November 2024 and beyond? We’re counting on you.
More soon,
- Rusty

DONATE » [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/cdp-footer?refcode=&amount=20.24]
Our Democratic leaders are working hard to make California a better place to live. From fighting for good-paying jobs, combating climate change, to expanding healthcare access so all Californians can lead safe, healthy, prosperous lives — California’s Democratic leaders turn progressive ideas into meaningful action.

name: Eric Swalwell

body:
Democrat Eric Swalwell represents California's 14th Congressional District.
https://ericswalwell.com/ [https://ericswalwell.com/]
Friend,

Over the last few weeks, you've probably seen more emails from me and my team than you'd care to count. We've been in the trenches together, working tirelessly to meet our first major fundraising milestone of the year. Thanks to your unwavering support, we didn't just meet our goal: we crushed it.

I'm not just throwing around words when I say we couldn't do this without you. Every donation, no matter its size, is like fuel in our tank, empowering us to push back against the relentless assaults on our democracy and take back the House majority.

To the MAGA Republicans who dub our mission to reclaim the House in 2024 a fool's errand, I say this: underestimate us at your own peril. Because of you, friend, our mission is far from foolish. It's feasible, it's within reach, and it's absolutely critical.

From the bottom of my heart, thank you for standing beside me in this fight. Together, we are a force to be reckoned with and a testament to what we can achieve when we unite for the greater good.

Eric

name: Pramila Jayapal
subject: As I write to you, trans rights are under attack
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Pramila for Congress
body:
We will never stop fighting for trans rights everywhere, because trans rights are human rights.
# [](https://act.pramilaforcongress.com/go/892?refcode=em20240401-3703-footer&t=1&akid=3703%2E420207%2EGN2Zuw)
Peter,
Yesterday, we celebrated Transgender Day of Visibility to recognize the many contributions and achievements of the transgender and gender non-conforming communities — and affirm their human rights.
**But as I write this email, trans rights and trans people are under an unprecedented attack.** Donald Trump and MAGA Republicans took to Fox News all weekend long to spew hatred toward our trans neighbors. Hundreds of anti-trans bills have been introduced all across the country.
On the Trans Day of Visibility — and every day — I say to every single trans person: I see you, I hear you, and I will stand with you to ensure that you are protected and given the dignity and respect that all people should have. **We will never stop fighting for trans rights everywhere, because trans rights are human rights.**
Today, I joined my colleagues in the Congressional Equality Caucus and Transgender Equality Task Force to introduce bicameral legislation recognizing Transgender Day of Visibility. And we won’t stop there. The work for full equality, acceptance, and civil rights protections continues.

**I will do everything in my power to protect our trans communities from the hatred of MAGA extremists — but I need support from every corner of our movement.**[**So I must ask: Can I count on you to chip in $3 or more to help strengthen our movement to defeat the GOP and their hate-fueled, anti-trans legislation?**](https://act.pramilaforcongress.com/go/47393?c0=pj-email-20240401.qxQTiw&refcode=em20240401-3703&t=2&akid=3703%2E420207%2EGN2Zuw)
**[Contribute](https://act.pramilaforcongress.com/go/47393?c0=pj-email-20240401.qxQTiw&refcode=em20240401-3703&t=21&akid=3703%2E420207%2EGN2Zuw)**
Let’s send a clear message: **We stand with the trans community and we will never stop fighting for equal rights for all.**
In solidarity,
Pramila
**[Contribute](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/pj-email-footer?refcode=em20240401-3703-footer&t=22&refcode2=3703_420207_GN2Zuw&akid=3703%2E420207%2EGN2Zuw)**
---
[](https://www.facebook.com/pramila.jayapal) | [](https://twitter.com/pramilajayapal) | [](https://www.instagram.com/pramilajayapal/)
Email us: info@pramilaforcongress.com
This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is the most important way we keep in touch with people like you, and small-dollar contributions sustain our movement for transformative change. To contribute by check, please address to Pramila for Congress, PO Box 21912, Seattle, WA 98111.
* [Receive Fewer Emails](https://act.pramilaforcongress.com/signup/receive-fewer-emails/)
* [Update My Personal Information](https://act.pramilaforcongress.com/signup/did-your-info-change/?t=23&akid=3703%2E420207%2EGN2Zuw)
* [Unsubscribe](https://act.pramilaforcongress.com/unsubscribe/unsubscribe/?t=24&akid=3703%2E420207%2EGN2Zuw)

name: LCV Shop
subject: Celebrate like it's your B-Earth Day
body:
Learn more about our latest victory >>

Peter - I have big news to share. Our movement has just scored a HUGE win as the Senate has voted 50-47 to confirm President Biden's nominee Nicole Berner to the U.S. Court of Appeals for the Fourth Circuit.

In her career before becoming a judge, Berner has been a leading lawyer for workers? rights and reproductive rights, has worked to advance voting rights, civil rights, and immigrants' rights, and has worked pro bono for children in abuse and neglect cases. She has been a leader for LGBTQ+ rights, and she is now the first openly LGBTQ+ judge ever to serve on the Fourth Circuit.

We're reaching out today because we need you to know: victories like this only happen because of tireless advocacy from people like you, Peter. Thank you!

LCV members have sent thousands of messages to Capitol Hill urging senators to confirm pro-democracy, pro-environment judges like Nicole Berner. Those messages haven't gone unnoticed; the judges getting appointed are now the most diverse and most committed to the public interest ever. Your advocacy really makes a difference.

As I'm sure you understand, for our environmental laws to be effective, we need judges who will enforce them. And as a right-wing supermajority controls the Supreme Court, the stakes for our communities' clean air and clean water, and for all people and communities to have an equal say in our democracy and be treated with justice before the law, have never been higher.

To protect our environment and democracy, senators must continue to prioritize confirming highly qualified, personally and professionally diverse nominees to every lifetime vacancy on the federal bench.

You can help by taking action now. Tell your senators to move quickly to confirm pro-democracy, pro-environment judges like Nicole Berner. The future of our democracy and planet is at stake. https://links.messages.lcv.org/els/v2/G8bxcg7De~HV/TTJ4ekZjTnNxaTRUd1AvZzRSNU0rbUJ3YUxnWjJFcFh6Yng5OGZWQUJCWlNrSVcvK3h5Z09HNllEY0xibEl6T1R5T09iaGhaUUluQmhBRmFXcDkxa0twVWV1U2NRdTl6TDlIL0dmTVpqNDA9S0/b1FVQzg0YTBSVkYwWCsxMHNnazdDWDRBUmovSDlJSms4aTVhK1FwQ3g2MVA4a1hGWkF6ZHBNVkZUdjVxRDdEbnludjQ3OVVScFlzUEFNcXlNSTFRNkFpQzFLMEt5VEZJUDgvT1VuNGY4YUU9S0

Thanks for everything you do for our planet and our democracy, Peter.

Onward,

Doug Lindner
Senior Director of Judiciary & Democracy
League of Conservation Voters

P.S. To keep our campaigns for a stronger democracy going strong, I hope you'll consider making a gift today. If you give now, your donation will be TRIPLE MATCHED >> https://links.messages.lcv.org/els/v2/~

This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. clean_body: Learn more about our latest victory >> Peter - I have big news to share. Our movement has just scored a HUGE win as the Senate has voted 50-47 to confirm President Biden's nominee Nicole Berner to the U.S. Court of Appeals for the Fourth Circuit. In her career before becoming a judge, Berner has been a leading lawyer for workers? rights and reproductive rights, has worked to advance voting rights, civil rights, and immigrants' rights, and has worked pro bono for children in abuse and neglect cases. She has been a leader for LGBTQ+ rights, and she is now the first openly LGBTQ+ judge ever to serve on the Fourth Circuit. We're reaching out today because we need you to know: victories like this only happen because of tireless advocacy from people like you, Peter. Thank you! LCV members have sent thousands of messages to Capitol Hill urging senators to confirm pro-democracy, pro-environment judges like Nicole Berner. Those messages haven't gone unnoticed; the judges getting appointed are now the most diverse and most committed to the public interest ever. Your advocacy really makes a difference. As I'm sure you understand, for our environmental laws to be effective, we need judges who will enforce them. And as a right-wing supermajority controls the Supreme Court, the stakes for our communities' clean air and clean water, and for all people and communities to have an equal say in our democracy and be treated with justice before the law, have never been higher. To protect our environment and democracy, senators must continue to prioritize confirming highly qualified, personally and professionally diverse nominees to every lifetime vacancy on the federal bench. You can help by taking action now. Tell your senators to move quickly to confirm pro-democracy, pro-environment judges like Nicole Berner. The future of our democracy and planet is at stake. Thanks for everything you do for our planet and our democracy, Peter. Onward, Doug Lindner Senior Director of Judiciary & Democracy League of Conservation Voters P.S. To keep our campaigns for a stronger democracy going strong, I hope you'll consider making a gift today. If you give now, your donation will be TRIPLE MATCHED >>

Guyana is one of the poorest countries in the world and is[ emerging as a potential front in the US-China War, as I wrote last year](https://substack.com/redirect/d18df303-1593-4574-a3ca-e6a519297510?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg). The main reason for my concern about this potential conflict was a referendum held by the Government of Venezuela that called for declaring sovereignty over more than two-thirds of Guyana's land in a region known as the Essequibo.
* * *
[](https://substack.com/redirect/d18df303-1593-4574-a3ca-e6a519297510?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)| | |
#### [Is War Coming to South America?](https://substack.com/redirect/d18df303-1593-4574-a3ca-e6a519297510?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)
---
| | [Vikram Mansharamani](https://substack.com/profile/37278065-vikram-mansharamani)| | *
---|---|---
| December 4, 2023
| [| Read full story
---](https://substack.com/redirect/d18df303-1593-4574-a3ca-e6a519297510?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)
* * *
At the time of the referendum, I noted that South America's only English-speaking country was on the verge of a complete economic transformation due to the discovery of an enormous offshore oil field by a consortium led by ExxonMobil in 2015:
> Before production began in 2019, more than 40% of Guyana lived on less than $5.50 per day. Once the oil started flowing, so too did money, [transforming Guyana into the world's fastest growing economy](https://substack.com/redirect/b73f59ea-809b-40d1-b9f2-7e4f8fdb9593?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg): "[With $1.6 billion in oil revenue so far, the government has launched infrastructure projects including the construction of 12 hospitals, seven hotels, scores of schools, two main highways, its first deep-water port](https://substack.com/redirect/6760607b-1571-40cd-a4b0-73da6a0f154c?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg) and [a $1.9 billion gas-to-energy project](https://substack.com/redirect/3d0e5813-28c1-4ed0-8b38-3e7ab5a524b0?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg) [that... will double Guyana's energy output and slash high power bills by half](https://substack.com/redirect/6760607b-1571-40cd-a4b0-73da6a0f154c?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)."
> The oil field was a gigantic discovery, perhaps the largest ever in the Western Hemisphere. [ExxonMobil now believes it may be its most productive region within its portfolio of global assets and analysts believe Guyana will become the fourth largest producer of offshore oil in the world](https://substack.com/redirect/0170e192-9041-4ba8-ab55-199c32aee99a?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg). **[The Stabroek Block, about the size of Massachusetts, is reported to have more oil reserves than Kuwait or the United Arab Emirates](https://substack.com/redirect/b4859038-0ff8-432b-83a0-9eaf638456c3?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg).**
[Upgrade to paid](https://substack..oNYLjYo1XS85U3royChxOe-9d5y6ln7rLKwa6wHiYDM?&utm_medium=email&utm_source=subscribe-widget&utm_content=143162636)
The oil discovery has already begun to improve the lives of hundreds of thousands of Guyanese citizens and [transformed the nation from an undeveloped struggling society into the world's fast growing economies](https://substack.com/redirect/10990fc2-4344-4586-b9c0-1b0c113e6804?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg).
[Last week, Guyana's President, Mohamed Irfan Ali, sat down with the BBC's Stephen Sackur for an in-depth interview about the opportunities and challenges that accompany the massive wealth gains coming from oil](https://substack.com/redirect/3647f2f5-abff-44b5-bf6b-4e402803f1ec?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg). [Despite what many have called an unfair contract that gives disproportionate and inappropriately large returns to Exxon](https://substack.com/redirect/e71d7b4d-6e57-445b-a9f7-4be05e21c58a?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg), the President admirably responded to an interrogation that tried to publicly pit him against Exxon with a call for the protection of contracts and respect for rule of law. He went on to note that Exxon invested substantial risk capital to explore in an area where there was no known oil.
But perhaps the most interesting part of the interview, which I encourage you to watch, is the portion when President calls out the reporter for lecturing him and his country about climate change. Sackur highlights the enormous carbon that will be taken from the seabed oil reserves and released into the atmosphere before the President interjects that Guyana has a forest that is the size of Scotland and England combined. The BBC host then asks if it gives Guyana the right to "release all of this carbon."
The President's response puts climate hypocrisy on full display: "Does that give you the right to lecture us on climate change? **I 'm going to lecture you on climate change**, because we have kept this forest alive that stores 19.5 gigatons of carbon that you enjoy, that the world enjoys, that you don't pay us for, that you don't value, that you don't see a value in, that the people of Guyana has kept alive. Guess what? We have the lowest deforestation rate in the world. And guess what? Even with the greatest exploration of the oil and gas resources we have not, we will still be net zero. Guyana will still be net zero with all our exploration."
The BBC host again interrupts, but the President continues: "I'm just not finished... this is a hypocrisy that exists in the world. The world in the past 50 years has lost 65% of all its biodiversity...we have kept our biodiversity. Are you valuing it? Are you ready to pay for it?" before concluding with "There is no hypocrisy in our position."
[](https://substack.com/redirect/3189fa30-9407-495d-84e0-ea73f0ec65ac?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)
The BBC host then turns to a Greenpeace statement about the need to keep all remaining fossil fuels in the ground, further noting that most of Guyana's population is below sea level. The President's response captures the clarity of his message: ["Greenpeace and you can say that...but who is going to pay for the infrastructure? Who's going to pay for the drainage and irrigation? Who is going to pay for the development and advancement of our country? Are you going to pay? It's not coming from anywhere. it's not coming from Greenpeace or anyone else. Look at the adaptation budget that is required for the developing world. Where is the money coming from?"](https://substack.com/redirect/3647f2f5-abff-44b5-bf6b-4e402803f1ec?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)
Sackur then disdainfully notes that Guyana seems to be on path to aggressively develop the oil resources...to which the president responds: ["We are practical...we are going to aggressively pursue this natural resource...because we have to develop our country. We are committed to the development of this region. We have to create opportunity for our people because no one is bringing that for us, no one is paying for our agenda. "](https://substack.com/redirect/3647f2f5-abff-44b5-bf6b-4e402803f1ec?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)
The BBC host then ends the interview with a simple question: "Oil can still end up being more of a curse than a blessing to the Guyanese people. Are you sure that won't happen?" The President's response is as succinct as it is eloquent: "We intend for it not only to be a blessing, but for it to be an important tool in the transformation of our society and the building of a prosperous Guyana and a sustainable Guyana; for us this revenue this stream of revenue offers us the opportunity to diversify our economy and to create a country that can finally fulfill all of its potential."
| | POLL
---
Should the global community slow Guyana's development of oil and gas?
| [Yes, we need to save the world](https://substack.com/redirect/2/eyJlIjoiaHR0cHM6Ly9tYW5zaGFyYW1hbmkuc3Vic3RhY2suY29tL2FwaS92MS9wb2xsL3ZvdGUvZW1haWw_.Ba5yWOxthscAZmFCBm9Y1jV10BSUvw_iA4XjZTESosU?)
---
[No, Guyana needs to save itself](https://substack.com/redirect/2/eyJlIjoiaHR0cHM6Ly9tYW5zaGFyYW1hbmkuc3Vic3RhY2suY29tL2FwaS92MS9wb2xsL3ZvdGUvZW1haWw_.gs4On_6ofImzyOK8m7zLUe7u9ML7V4iR-Ej-1YOv0sU?)
[Global Community? No such thing](https://substack.com/redirect/2/eyJlIjoiaHR0cHM6Ly9tYW5zaGFyYW1hbmkuc3Vic3RhY2suY29tL2FwaS92MS9wb2xsL3ZvdGUvZW1haWw_.eJvqgfVuolPYHx946oD1Af5O0tnoPZlaymtsnZsbFdU?)
[LINK TO FULL VIDEO INTERVIEW](https://substack.com/redirect/3647f2f5-abff-44b5-bf6b-4e402803f1ec?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)

**VIKRAM MANSHARAMANI** is an entrepreneur, consultant, scholar, neighbor, husband, father, volunteer, and professional generalist who thinks in multiple-dimensions and looks beyond the short-term. Self-taught to think around corners and connect original dots, he spends his time speaking with global leaders in business, government, academia, and journalism. _LinkedIn_ has twice listed him as its #1 Top Voice in Money & Finance, and _Worth_ profiled him as one of the 100 Most Powerful People in Global Finance. Vikram earned a PhD From MIT, has taught at Yale and Harvard, and is the author of three books, _**[The Making of a Generalist: An Independent Thinker Finds Unconventional Success in an Uncertain World](https://substack.com/redirect/a5110e58-867c-4f8b-bd0c-6b3f4042272c?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)**_ , _**[Think for Yourself: Restoring Common Sense in an Age of Experts and Artificial Intelligence](https://substack.com/redirect/08364299-00f2-435f-8268-2d0897b9b622?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)**_ and _**[Boombustology: Spotting Financial Bubbles Before They Burst](https://substack.com/redirect/33705fbc-4662-4c4f-b90f-0237b0c76609?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)**_. Vikram lives in Lincoln, New Hampshire with his wife and two children, where they can usually be found hiking or skiing.

Today's FL Supreme Court decisions...

Hi there, friend, did you see me on _MSNBC_ earlier?
[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/82179554/464612411/849749119?amounts=5,25,50,100,250&refcode=jtk1014-fr-nd&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDYvMS8xMDc1MjUiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiODA5OGNhMzktOTFmMC1lZTExLWFhZjAtMDAyMjQ4MjIzNzk0IiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=kPqdiFdG4zGI0KwoHbD_7RRn7WC0cXKV0Wagsmmi5BI=)
The Florida Supreme Court just issued a decision to uphold our state's 15-week abortion ban. That means Ron DeSantis' brutal six-week ban with almost no exceptions for rape or incest will automatically take effect in just 30 days. But they also just ruled to officially put abortion rights on the ballot this November, which means that Florida voters could _overturn_ the GOP's extreme bans. This is a HUGE victory in the fight to defend reproductive freedom — but it's just the beginning. Now, we need to get this initiative across the finish line, defeat Rick Scott at the ballot box, and codify abortion rights.** **
The Sunshine State is ready to flip blue this fall. **I've seen it firsthand while talking to voters who are fed up with far-right radicals and in the polling data that shows my race for Senate is a statistical tie. Now, we're seeing this momentum for change materialize at the ballot box.**
There's huge momentum behind us right now, but Rick Scott has already spent $3 MILLION running attack ads to smear my campaign — that's more than any other GOP Senate candidate has spent so far! _And, as a mega-millionaire, he has plenty more where that came from._
**[The election year is now well under way, and we can't be caught empty-handed as we head into the second quarter. Please, will you rush $5 right now to help my campaign build a grassroots war chest capable of defeating Scott's massive fortune? clean_body: Today's FL Supreme Court decisions... | | | Hi there, friend, did you see me on MSNBC earlier? = The Florida Supreme Court just issued a decision to uphold our state's 15-week abortion ban. That means Ron DeSantis' brutal six-week ban with almost no exceptions for rape or incest will automatically take effect in just 30 days. But they also just ruled to officially put abortion rights on the ballot this November, which means that Florida voters could overturn the GOP's extreme bans. This is a HUGE victory in the fight to defend reproductive freedom — but it's just the beginning. Now, we need to get this initiative across the finish line, defeat Rick Scott at the ballot box, and codify abortion rights. The Sunshine State is ready to flip blue this fall. I've seen it firsthand while talking to voters who are fed up with far-right radicals and in the polling data that shows my race for Senate is a statistical tie. Now, we're seeing this momentum for change materialize at the ballot box. There's huge momentum behind us right now, but Rick Scott has already spent $3 MILLION running attack ads to smear my campaign — that's more than any other GOP Senate candidate has spent so far! And, as a mega-millionaire, he has plenty more where that came from. = If you've saved payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: | | | = | | = | | = | | = I'm so grateful for your support in this fight. — Debbie | * | | | = Debbie Mucarsel-Powell is a Floridian, South American immigrant, mother, and former Congresswoman. She’s dedicated her life to uplifting working families, ending gun violence, and fighting for her community. Now, she’s running to defeat Republican Senator Rick Scott and win a better, brighter future for Florida.

name: Lorinser for Congress
subject: 𝗖𝗼𝗿𝗿𝗲𝗰𝘁𝗶𝗼𝗻 Trump vs. rule of law
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY THE FRIENDS OF DR
body:
This text has been edited to correct a reference to the current administration. Thank you to those who flagged it.
[https://prod.cdn.everyaction.com/images/van/NGP/NGP12/1/92793/images/TOP.png]
Our country is built on the foundation of democracy and the rule of law. But now, our democracy is under threat from Trump 's blatant disregard for the independence of our judiciary.
Honoring the Rule of Law
[https://prod.cdn.everyaction.com/images/van/NGP/NGP12/1/92793/images/RoLs.jpeg]
Republicans, like my opponent, Rep. Jack Bergman, are intent on supporting a presidential candidate who is blatantly and publicly attacking judges, but your contributions help me defeat Trumpism in rural America.
CONTRIBUTE [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/about-bob]
https://linktr.ee/boblorinser [https://linktr.ee/boblorinser]
Friend
Recently, U.S. District Judge Reggie B. Walton, a Republican-appointed judge, condemned Trump's attacks on judges and their families hearing Trump's legal cases.
Judge Walton rightly stated that the rule of law can only be maintained if we have independent judicial officers who are able to do their job and ensure that the laws are enforced and applied equally to everyone who appears in our courthouse.
Agreed. Assaults on the rule of law by Trump are a real threat to our country and the beginning of tyranny.
I expect my Congressman, Jack Bergman, to stand up and say this is wrong, regardless of his support for Trump.
Our democracy and the institutions that it's based on are threatened.
That's why we're fighting so hard in my bid for Congress. I will fight to protect our democracy and uphold the rule of law. I will work tirelessly to ensure that our judiciary remains independent and free from political interference.
But I can't do it alone.
I need your support to make this a reality. Please make a donation to my campaign today and help me fight for the values we hold dear.
Together, we can ensure that our democracy continues to thrive and that the rule of law remains intact.
Thank you for your support.
Bob
Bob Lorinser
Candidate for US Congress
Northern Michigan / Upper Peninsula
Democrat, MI01
CONTRIBUTE [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/about-bob]
[https://prod.cdn.everyaction.com/images/van/NGP/NGP12/1/92793/images/dbsignature.png]

FRIENDS OF DR. BOB
PO BOX 936
Marquette, MI 49855
United States

Contributions will be used in connection with federal elections, may be spent on any activity as each committee determines in its sole discretion, and will not be earmarked for any particular candidate. Federal law requires us to use our best efforts to collect and report the name, mailing address, occupation, and name of employer of individuals whose contributions exceed $200 per election cycle. If we don’t put up MASSIVE NUMBERS, the LIARS in the FAKE NEWS will say our MAGA movement is _**DEAD & GONE.**_

Sign our petition to stand with Liz Cheney »_](https://act.fightforreform.org/survey/stand-w-cheney?source=FFR_20240401_EMPET_E2_T0_GM-14D-AC_RS&t=8&akid=21142%2E4449941%2ECBWd8-)** | [25,000 SUPPORTERS NEEDED: Add your name immediately to stand with Liz Cheney »](https://act.fightforreform.org/survey/stand-w-cheney?source=FFR_20240401_EMPET_E2_T0_GM-14D-AC_RS&t=9&akid=21142%2E4449941%2ECBWd8-)

name: Heidi Ganahl
subject: The Mountain Minute: 4/1/2024
body:
Your daily rundown of REAL news for REAL Coloradans.
Heidi Ganahl introduces the Rocky Mountain Voice, a new conservative news media platform for Coloradans to be the VOICE of your VALUES.
| |
---
**PRESENTED BY[ROCKYMOUNTAINVOICE.COM](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.)**
| Hello, This is the Mountain Minute for Monday, April 1, 2024.
– Heidi Ganahl
---
|
# TODAY'S TOP STORIES
---
[**BREAKING NEWS: Mayor of Georgetown, CO Throws Paw into Presidential Race**](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.) [BY RMV STAFF](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.), [ROCKY MOUNTAIN VOICE](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.)
| [ ](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.)
---
GEORGETOWN, Colo. (Rocky Mountain Voice) – In a surprising turn of events, the beloved Mayor of Georgetown, Parker The Snow Dog, has [announced his candidacy for the presidency of the United States](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.). Known for his fluffy charm and unwavering dedication to his constituents, Parker aims to bring a fresh perspective to the highest office in the land. At just 5-and-a-half years old, Parker boasts a youthful energy that rivals that of any seasoned politician. In dog years, he’s younger than either presidential candidate, signaling a shift towards a more [vibrant leadership style](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.). Unlike many politicians, Parker has a squeaky clean record. The only thing he did on [January 6th](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.) was eat treats. Additionally, he’s never fallen up a flight of stairs, demonstrating a level of grace and poise unmatched by his human counterparts. **[READ MORE](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.)**

[**Griswold certifies Presidential primary election, reports 38.7% turnout**](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.)
[ROCKY MOUNTAIN VOICE](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.)
* Colorado's Presidential primary election saw a [turnout of 38.67%](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.), with 1,464,836 ballots cast among 3,788,458 registered voters.

* Unaffiliated voters accounted for 38.4% of all ballots, with 562,699 ballots cast, while Republicans cast 498,666 ballots and Democrats cast 403,471.

* Overwhelmingly, [voters chose to mail in their ballots](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.), with 98.6% opting for mail-in voting, while 1.4% voted in-person, and more Democratic Party ballots were returned by mail (99.0%) than Republican Party ballots (98.3%).

[**READ MORE**](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.)
[**Minority whip’s report details long bill, ‘good and bad’ bill hearings on tap in House this week**](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.)
[ROCKY MOUNTAIN VOICE](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.)
* Final approval for the ["Long Appropriations Bill"](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.) in the Colorado House was imminent, facing opposition from Minority Whip Richard Holtorf due to a proposed spending [increase of over $2 billion](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.).

* Republicans passed several amendments to address constituent needs, including funding for various programs. Despite amendments, Holtorf remained opposed, and the bill passed on a[ party-line vote](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.).

* [Other legislative matters](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.) included upcoming hearings for bills addressing pretrial release bond requirements, background checks for massage facility staff, transparency in digital education materials, gender-affirming healthcare studies, and measures to reduce air pollution.

[**READ MORE**](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.)
[**No April fools, Monday’s gas price ranges from $2.94 in Broomfield to $4.82 in Pitkin County**](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.)
[ROCKY MOUNTAIN VOICE](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.)
* AAA projects a [rise in spring gasoline prices](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.) due to market conditions and Ukraine's targeting of Russian oil infrastructure.

* In Colorado, the average price for regular gasoline stands at [$3.07 per gallon](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.), with diesel at $3.69 per gallon. Nationally, the average price for regular gasoline is $3.53 per gallon, up by 24 cents from last month and 10 cents from last year.

* [Gas prices vary across Colorado](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.), with the lowest at $2.94 in Broomfield and the highest at $4.82 in Pitkin County.

[**READ MORE**](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.)
[**Denver considers $2M state grant to assist housing homeless**](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.)
[DENVER GAZETTE](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.)
* Denver City Council is considering accepting a [$2 million state grant](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.) to aid homeless individuals in transitioning to permanent housing.

* Mayor Mike Johnston's administration has moved over 1,400 homeless individuals into temporary housing since July, with plans to allocate [$50 million in 2024](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.) for further efforts.

[**READ MORE**](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.)
**ONLY ON ROCKY MOUNTAIN VOICE ⤵️** **[Devotional: Pursue ‘a good life’ to attain ‘the good life’](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.)** **BY DRAKE HUNTER | COMMENTARY | MARCH 30** _Have you observed the world and noticed its unraveling state? It’s undeniable; things are falling apart (Genesis 3:24)! What was familiar is now collapsing, and life is slipping away at an alarming pace. This disheartening reality goes against the notion life is meant to be good, very good (Genesis 1:31)!_ **[Auto accident prevents Fabbricatore from competing for nomination in special election](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.)** **BY BRIAN PORTER | STATE | MARCH 29** _The Republican Congressional Vacancy Committee convened here Thursday evening with nine candidates vying to be nominated to a place on the 4th District Congressional special election ballot.__But, there should have been 10 candidates._ [**Greg Lopez takes special election, but result of delegate convention may not mean much for primary**](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.) **BY BRIAN PORTER | STATE | MARCH 29** _Greg Lopez, who many years ago at age 27 became the mayor of Parker, was the last man standing here Thursday, as for the first time in 41 years Republicans’ Congressional Vacancy Committee met to nominate a single candidate in a special Congressional election._ **Feel like you have a unique story or commentary to share?** We'd love to talk with you about becoming an RMV Contributor. Reply to this email (or reach out to [brian](mailto:brian@rockymountainvoice.com)[@rockymountainvoice.com](mailto:brian@rockymountainvoice.com)) or send us a message on social media to chat!
# 🤣 DID YOU KNOW?

The **earliest recorded April Fool’s Day prank** was played on April 1st, 1698. It was a humorous story published in a London newspaper that stated that the moon was visible from the Earth.

(Rocky Mountain Voice) – In a surprising turn of events, the beloved Mayor of Georgetown, Parker The Snow Dog, has . Known for his fluffy charm and unwavering dedication to his constituents, Parker aims to bring a fresh perspective to the highest office in the land. At just 5-and-a-half years old, Parker boasts a youthful energy that rivals that of any seasoned politician. In dog years, he’s younger than either presidential candidate, signaling a shift towards a more . Unlike many politicians, Parker has a squeaky clean record. The only thing he did on was eat treats. Additionally, he’s never fallen up a flight of stairs, demonstrating a level of grace and poise unmatched by his human counterparts. Colorado's Presidential primary election saw a , with 1,464,836 ballots cast among 3,788,458 registered voters. Unaffiliated voters accounted for 38.4% of all ballots, with 562,699 ballots cast, while Republicans cast 498,666 ballots and Democrats cast 403,471. Overwhelmingly, , with 98.6% opting for mail-in voting, while 1.4% voted in-person, and more Democratic Party ballots were returned by mail (99.0%) than Republican Party ballots (98.3%). Final approval for the in the Colorado House was imminent, facing opposition from Minority Whip Richard Holtorf due to a proposed spending . Republicans passed several amendments to address constituent needs, including funding for various programs. Despite amendments, Holtorf remained opposed, and the bill passed on a. included upcoming hearings for bills addressing pretrial release bond requirements, background checks for massage facility staff, transparency in digital education materials, gender-affirming healthcare studies, and measures to reduce air pollution. AAA projects a due to market conditions and Ukraine's targeting of Russian oil infrastructure. In Colorado, the average price for regular gasoline stands at , with diesel at $3.69 per gallon. Nationally, the average price for regular gasoline is $3.53 per gallon, up by 24 cents from last month and 10 cents from last year. , with the lowest at $2.94 in Broomfield and the highest at $4.82 in Pitkin County. Denver City Council is considering accepting a to aid homeless individuals in transitioning to permanent housing. Mayor Mike Johnston's administration has moved over 1,400 homeless individuals into temporary housing since July, with plans to allocate for further efforts. name: 1600 Daily
subject: Justice, weaponized
body:
Please particpate in this survey on the Department of Justice.

This sponsored message from 1600 Daily is on behalf of Hillsdale College
[](http://e.1600daily.com/rd/9z2zq0ibt357ris4q929hhaqiemi2p9i8fidu8seqt8_rp22sh2s8i6ep32c1im0oj4cth2bs) Dear Fellow American, Before you move on to your next email—I would appreciate it if you would take a few moments to participate in Hillsdale College's **National Survey on the Department of Justice.** The survey will only take a few moments of your time, and its subject affects your liberty and the very survival of the rule of law in America. **The current administration's weaponization of the Department of Justice is unprecedented in American history.** Instead of protecting your God-given constitutional rights, the administration uses the Department of Justice to attack its political opponents... ...as well as Christians, parents, and anyone who dares to stand up for our constitutional liberties. At the same time, with the help of the media it...
* Covers up a two-tiered justice system that violates your constitutional rights

* Hides the corruption of the ruling class

* Attacks those with traditional viewpoints

**That's why I'm asking you to take the Hillsdale College National Survey on the Department of Justice.** By completing this survey, you will help us more clearly understand the views of mainstream Americans like you on this critical issue. Your responses will help Hillsdale strengthen its nationwide educational outreach efforts on behalf of liberty—including the importance of the rule of law and checks and balances, which the American Founders saw as essential safeguards against corruption. Friend, you can complete the National Survey on the Department of Justice by using the link below: **[https://lp.hillsdale.edu/department-of-justice-survey/](http://e.1600daily.com/rd/9z2z8hdesdsj97pmdtc282s4l2crra610clk7onpou8_rp22sh2s8i6ep32c1im0oj4cth2bs)** The **Declaration of Independence** argues that **the purpose of just government is to secure our natural rights** and that **just government is founded on the consent of the governed.** Yet today's ruling class regularly disregards the will of the American people, and our rights—to the freedoms of speech, assembly, and religion, to due process, to gun ownership, and more—are under constant attack. **You and I know that liberty in America is under serious threat. But as I travel around the country, I tell the audiences I speak to how we are engaging in the fight against this threat.** A vital part of our efforts in this fight—in which Hillsdale College is a leader—is **reaching** and **teaching** millions of citizens, with the TRUTH about America's great heritage of liberty. We are heavily invested in our educational outreach efforts through our **Project to Defend Liberty Nationwide by Reaching and Teaching Millions.** These efforts include:
* **Teaching bright and principled students** —on our campuses in Hillsdale, Michigan, and Washington, D.C.—who receive a rigorous, **classical liberal arts education, including** a required course on the Constitution

* **Distributing _Imprimis_** , America's leading digest of liberty, which is mailed to more than 6.4 million homes and businesses ten times per year; previous issues include “The Politicization of the Department of Justice” by Harmeet K. Dhillon

* **Producing and promoting free online courses** for any citizen who wishes to learn, on topics such as the Constitution, American history, and free market economics

* **Providing a classical K-12 curriculum** with a solid grounding in American history, constitutional government, and economics to schools that educate thousands of students nationwide

After everything we've seen over the past few years, the need for Hillsdale's educational outreach efforts is undeniable. So please share your views by completing our **National Survey on the Department of Justice** and returning it to me as soon as possible. It will only take a few minutes of your time. Your completed survey will help us form the most effective strategy to **reach** and **teach** millions of Americans on behalf of liberty. As you might know, Hillsdale College is almost unique in American higher education in its refusal to accept EVEN ONE PENNY of government funding—not even indirectly in the form of federal or state student grants or loans. **This independence frees the College from burdensome and corrupting government regulations. But it also means that our work depends entirely on the generous support of private citizens, like you, who understand the importance of education to liberty.** If you agree that we are now seeing an unprecedented assault on the American way of life, I hope you will partner with Hillsdale College by making a generous tax-deductible gift today. You can easily do so after completing the attached **National Survey on the Department of Justice** , which you can access at this secure link: **[https://lp.hillsdale.edu/department-of-justice-survey/](http://e.1600daily.com/rd/9z2z4fdqk7ou6sk4jue1cqmfnh4cch8bc72coq0t5l8_rp22sh2s8i6ep32c1im0oj4cth2bs)** Thank you for your time and attention. I look forward to receiving your completed survey, and I sincerely appreciate your support of Hillsdale's educational outreach efforts on behalf of liberty. Warm regards, Larry P. Arnn President, Hillsdale College Pursuing Truth and Defending Liberty Since 1844 |
---

1600 Daily
---
_PO Box 461 Fort Collins, CO 80522_
_[**unsubscribe**](http://e.1600daily.com/rd/9z2zeli9ivd1m9p8kb42o4lj5fgld4dsgbd1d5urcjo_rp22sh2s8i6ep32c1im0oj4cth238h5e8he485he5o75pt7kuo72ttle5pq8or0c1gj8d5hmjpqcdtlmuin7djle8r7ccjkm8qjf9v56ngj0trkm6or9djjctg1eddk6ior79hnmmpi9df4c9im1ob4cth2bs)_ | _[manage data preferences](http://e.1600daily.com/rd/9z2zpp1d0piu8plcjpkiu32nqit89g3juaeobucb8f8_rp22sh2s8i6ep32c1im0oj4cth2bs)_

[](http://e.1600daily.com/rd/9z2zsl9hicims1dfp6gkhn7g5ofs4thb8ah9ie1m8n0_rp2ash2s8j2ccdkmorb4dthe8gq48bi4bh28pr4c9g6ao32chjm49fg)

name: Hillsdale College via American Action News
subject: How often do you think about the Roman Republic?
body:
"The Rise and Fall of the Roman Republic."
%recipient.md5_hash%
| | | This sponsored message from American Action News is on behalf of Hillsdale College [](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2zcei6bgmq2stj4724vl0i2ol8ma12r7rfgs3j8n0_rp22sh2s8i6ep32c1im8p32cjh2bs)
---
| |
[](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2z6gb9c4ciqtegvqsipruip301me09eqr7ojf92og_rp22sh2s8i6ep32c1im8p32cjh2bs) Dear Friend,

The history of the Roman Republic is a captivating tale of achievement, political and military genius, and the perils of success. One that still impacts our world today.

To help tell this important story to Americans nationwide, we released our free online course, **" The Rise and Fall of the Roman Republic."**

**You can now receive your own DVD box set of "The Rise and Fall of the Roman Republic" when you make a tax-deductible gift of $100 or more in support of our educational outreach efforts on behalf of liberty.**

And, for a limited time, we'll also send you a **free color map** of the Roman world at the end of the Republic. This map is a helpful companion to the course DVD and will illustrate many of the topics discussed in the lectures. Simply use this secure link to reserve your DVD box set of **" The Rise and Fall of the Roman Republic," **along with the companion map today:

[**https://secured.hillsdale.edu/hillsdale/roman-republic-dvd**](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2zpuclku4issqid64e91iqnbdcqjq5gudg8okrk38_rp22sh2s8i6ep32c1im8p32cjh2bs)

By studying ancient Rome, you'll discover the conditions necessary to preserve a republic . . . and how a republic may lose its way.

That's why we produced **" The Rise and Fall of the Roman Republic"** and why I hope you'll watch and share the course on DVD.

Thank you for helping to preserve liberty for future generations of Americans through education with Hillsdale College!

Best regards,

Kyle Murnen, '09
Director of Online Learning
Hillsdale College

name: Hillsdale College via Your America News
subject: Reserve Your “Western Heritage” DVD Set
body:
“What is the good? What is the best way for man to live?”

Hillsdale College | | | This sponsored message from Your America News is on behalf of Hillsdale College [](https://click.youramerica.news/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=653%7c32518%7c920805%7c0%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=J9wNO8EKOZA2pZiAftK36w&sysid=1)
Dear Fellow American, _“What is the good? What is the best way for man to live?”_ _“Does God exist? Can we know God?”_ These questions are at the core of what it means to be human - both in our relationship with each other and with God. Our Western heritage, tracing back to the Hebrews and the ancient Greeks, to Jerusalem and Athens, was where these questions were first asked, and answered. [](https://click.youramerica.news/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=653%7c32518%7c920805%7c0%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=J9wNO8EKOZA2pZiAftK36w&sysid=1)Every Hillsdale College student is required to take a class on the Western heritage in order to graduate. And every academic year, I’m reminded of the joy it is to pursue the answers to such questions with my students. Today, I want to offer you that same experience... that same pursuit... that same joy... ... by sending you [**a limited-edition DVD box set of Hillsdale's popular online course, “Western Heritage - From the Book of Genesis to John Locke,”**](https://click.youramerica.news/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=653%7c32519%7c920805%7c0%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=uYmsGgiWFVj8OqpS8aWl%2bA&sysid=1) as a token of our thanks for a generous contribution in support of Hillsdale's efforts to educate America. This is your opportunity to deepen your understanding about the Golden Age of Greece, Early Christianity, the Renaissance, and the Scientific Revolution. It's your chance to plumb the depths of what makes Western civilization what it is today. And since we recently re-filmed and expanded this course - first offered in 2012 - to feature new lectures and professors, now is the perfect time to add it to your personal library, or give it as a gift. I invite you to study the history of the "big questions" with my colleagues and me. Reserve your DVD set now using this secure link, while they last: [**https://secure.hillsdale.edu/support-western-heritage-dvd**](https://click.youramerica.news/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=653%7c32510%7c920805%7c0%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=EgT3H6%2f3wgzOON3I2nybuQ&sysid=1) Warm regards, Larry P. Arnn President, Hillsdale College Pursuing Truth - Defending Liberty since 1844

name: American Briefing
subject: Justice, weaponized
body:
Please particpate in this survey on the Department of Justice.

This sponsored message from American Briefing is on behalf of Hillsdale College
[](http://e.americanbriefing.com/rd/9z2zlnbjopn554sfumo2rm7t9g7rl91nc9mvedgv5fo_rp22sh2s8i6ep32c1im4o34c3h2bs) Dear Fellow American, Before you move on to your next email—I would appreciate it if you would take a few moments to participate in Hillsdale College's **National Survey on the Department of Justice.** The survey will only take a few moments of your time, and its subject affects your liberty and the very survival of the rule of law in America. **The current administration's weaponization of the Department of Justice is unprecedented in American history.** Instead of protecting your God-given constitutional rights, the administration uses the Department of Justice to attack its political opponents... ...as well as Christians, parents, and anyone who dares to stand up for our constitutional liberties. At the same time, with the help of the media it...
* Covers up a two-tiered justice system that violates your constitutional rights

* Hides the corruption of the ruling class

* Attacks those with traditional viewpoints

**That's why I'm asking you to take the Hillsdale College National Survey on the Department of Justice.** By completing this survey, you will help us more clearly understand the views of mainstream Americans like you on this critical issue. Your responses will help Hillsdale strengthen its nationwide educational outreach efforts on behalf of liberty—including the importance of the rule of law and checks and balances, which the American Founders saw as essential safeguards against corruption. Friend, you can complete the National Survey on the Department of Justice by using the link below: **[https://lp.hillsdale.edu/department-of-justice-survey/](http://e.americanbriefing.com/rd/9z2zlmln1hok8fikgkqb4r0bjk86ieaeevqpt8gu1c8_rp22sh2s8i6ep32c1im4o34c3h2bs)** The **Declaration of Independence** argues that **the purpose of just government is to secure our natural rights** and that **just government is founded on the consent of the governed.** Yet today's ruling class regularly disregards the will of the American people, and our rights—to the freedoms of speech, assembly, and religion, to due process, to gun ownership, and more—are under constant attack. **You and I know that liberty in America is under serious threat. But as I travel around the country, I tell the audiences I speak to how we are engaging in the fight against this threat.** A vital part of our efforts in this fight—in which Hillsdale College is a leader—is **reaching** and **teaching** millions of citizens, with the TRUTH about America's great heritage of liberty. We are heavily invested in our educational outreach efforts through our **Project to Defend Liberty Nationwide by Reaching and Teaching Millions.** These efforts include:
* **Teaching bright and principled students** —on our campuses in Hillsdale, Michigan, and Washington, D.C.—who receive a rigorous, **classical liberal arts education, including** a required course on the Constitution

* **Distributing _Imprimis_** , America's leading digest of liberty, which is mailed to more than 6.4 million homes and businesses ten times per year; previous issues include “The Politicization of the Department of Justice” by Harmeet K. Dhillon

* **Producing and promoting free online courses** for any citizen who wishes to learn, on topics such as the Constitution, American history, and free market economics

* **Providing a classical K-12 curriculum** with a solid grounding in American history, constitutional government, and economics to schools that educate thousands of students nationwide

After everything we've seen over the past few years, the need for Hillsdale's educational outreach efforts is undeniable. So please share your views by completing our **National Survey on the Department of Justice** and returning it to me as soon as possible. It will only take a few minutes of your time. Your completed survey will help us form the most effective strategy to **reach** and **teach** millions of Americans on behalf of liberty. As you might know, Hillsdale College is almost unique in American higher education in its refusal to accept EVEN ONE PENNY of government funding—not even indirectly in the form of federal or state student grants or loans. **This independence frees the College from burdensome and corrupting government regulations. But it also means that our work depends entirely on the generous support of private citizens, like you, who understand the importance of education to liberty.** If you agree that we are now seeing an unprecedented assault on the American way of life, I hope you will partner with Hillsdale College by making a generous tax-deductible gift today. You can easily do so after completing the attached **National Survey on the Department of Justice** , which you can access at this secure link: **[https://lp.hillsdale.edu/department-of-justice-survey/](http://e.americanbriefing.com/rd/9z2z8tuc0fa2q8lll5vsdmkl9t51o4t6jkmi34u8f60_rp22sh2s8i6ep32c1im4o34c3h2bs)** Thank you for your time and attention. I look forward to receiving your completed survey, and I sincerely appreciate your support of Hillsdale's educational outreach efforts on behalf of liberty. Warm regards, Larry P. Arnn President, Hillsdale College Pursuing Truth and Defending Liberty Since 1844 |
---

---

clean_body: Please particpate in this survey on the Department of Justice. This sponsored message from Trump Train News is on behalf of Hillsdale College Dear Fellow American, Before you move on to your next email—I would appreciate it if you would take a few moments to participate in Hillsdale College's National Survey on the Department of Justice. The survey will only take a few moments of your time, and its subject affects your liberty and the very survival of the rule of law in America. The current administration's weaponization of the Department of Justice is unprecedented in American history. Instead of protecting your God-given constitutional rights, the administration uses the Department of Justice to attack its political opponents... ...as well as Christians, parents, and anyone who dares to stand up for our constitutional liberties. At the same time, with the help of the media it... Covers up a two-tiered justice system that violates your constitutional rights Hides the corruption of the ruling class Attacks those with traditional viewpoints That's why I'm asking you to take the Hillsdale College National Survey on the Department of Justice. By completing this survey, you will help us more clearly understand the views of mainstream Americans like you on this critical issue. Your responses will help Hillsdale strengthen its nationwide educational outreach efforts on behalf of liberty—including the importance of the rule of law and checks and balances, which the American Founders saw as essential safeguards against corruption. Friend, you can complete the National Survey on the Department of Justice by using the link below: The Declaration of Independence argues that the purpose of just government is to secure our natural rights and that just government is founded on the consent of the governed. Yet today's ruling class regularly disregards the will of the American people, and our rights—to the freedoms of speech, assembly, and religion, to due process, to gun ownership, and more—are under constant attack. You and I know that liberty in America is under serious threat. But as I travel around the country, I tell the audiences I speak to how we are engaging in the fight against this threat. A vital part of our efforts in this fight—in which Hillsdale College is a leader—is reaching and teaching millions of citizens, with the TRUTH about America's great heritage of liberty. We are heavily invested in our educational outreach efforts through our Project to Defend Liberty Nationwide by Reaching and Teaching Millions. These efforts include: Teaching bright and principled students —on our campuses in Hillsdale, Michigan, and Washington, D.C.—who receive a rigorous, classical liberal arts education, including a required course on the Constitution Distributing Imprimis , America's leading digest of liberty, which is mailed to more than 6.4 million homes and businesses ten times per year; previous issues include “The Politicization of the Department of Justice” by Harmeet K. Dhillon Producing and promoting free online courses for any citizen who wishes to learn, on topics such as the Constitution, American history, and free market economics Providing a classical K-12 curriculum with a solid grounding in American history, constitutional government, and economics to schools that educate thousands of students nationwide After everything we've seen over the past few years, the need for Hillsdale's educational outreach efforts is undeniable. So please share your views by completing our National Survey on the Department of Justice and returning it to me as soon as possible. It will only take a few minutes of your time. Your completed survey will help us form the most effective strategy to reach and teach millions of Americans on behalf of liberty. As you might know, Hillsdale College is almost unique in American higher education in its refusal to accept EVEN ONE PENNY of government funding—not even indirectly in the form of federal or state student grants or loans. This independence frees the College from burdensome and corrupting government regulations. But it also means that our work depends entirely on the generous support of private citizens, like you, who understand the importance of education to liberty. If you agree that we are now seeing an unprecedented assault on the American way of life, I hope you will partner with Hillsdale College by making a generous tax-deductible gift today. You can easily do so after completing the attached National Survey on the Department of Justice , which you can access at this secure link: ** Thank you for your time and attention. I look forward to receiving your completed survey, and I sincerely appreciate your support of Hillsdale's educational outreach efforts on behalf of liberty. Warm regards, Larry P. Arnn President, Hillsdale College Pursuing Truth and Defending Liberty Since 1844 | Trump Train News PO Box 461 Fort Collins, CO 80522 |

body:
Fantastic new election info website

| **** We would like to introduce a new and exciting resource for the American people to get accurate election information: [**ElectionBriefing.com**](https://qcgp-cmpzourl.maillist-manage.com/click/1edb979475f8299a/1edb979475f78752 "ElectionBriefing.com"), brought to you by the Federalist.
This is an aggregate news source that provides relevant 2024 election information from all over the country. This website lets you see top election news stories that are currently impacting Americans, and the links take you straight to the original articles.
This election is going to probably be one of the nastiest in our history. The mainstream media is probably going to use even more extreme measures to stop Donald Trump than they have already used. As a freedom-loving American, it is critical that you have accurate information to share with others, and a to have a place you can send them for more information. This is one of those places.
Be sure to visit, bookmark, and share [**ElectionBriefing.com**](https://qcgp-cmpzourl.maillist-manage.com/click/1edb979475f8299a/1edb979475f78754 "http://www.electionbriefing.com/")!
In liberty, Jenny Beth Martin ****[****](https://qcgp-cmpzourl.maillist-manage.com/click/1edb979475f8299a/1edb979475f78756) **** ************

name: Josh Randall
subject: Easter Newsletter - Josh Randall
body:
Good morning subscribers,

We hope you had a restful and refreshing Easter weekend.

“The message of Easter is one of hope and change. People can change. Hearts can change.

Our nation faces challenges. We need some course corrections. I want to assure you this Easter week that even the Senate can change, and I will give my all to help facilitate that change. We can convince our lawmakers to support living within a budget and to support a free nation where our laws will foster faith and strong families. People may say it would take a miracle to persuade Senators to change. And that's part of the great message of this Easter week. Miracles happen. I will never stop working for those miracles in the Senate.” -Josh Randall

As the convention draws near, we're busy at work contacting delegates and getting our message out. Thank you to everyone who is spreading the word and helping in this outreach, we are grateful and inspired by our volunteers. It IS making a difference.

I continue to hear messages like these; “You are still my top pick”, “This town hall was inspiring”, “I was impressed by your ideas and answers for the challenges our country faces”, “I’m so happy to hear from Josh”, “Thank you for Taking time to talk with me”, “You talk in a way that is clear and easy for me to understand. Thank you.” We are finding that people recognize the truth of our message and the need for it in DC.

Here are some upcoming events. We are continually adding more as locations become available for meetings. Please come say hi if you're at an event. Also, if you're able to host an event please let us know.

Upcoming events:
<https://www.electjoshrandall.com/events-1>

Tuesday 4/2 - Virtual Town Hall @ 6:30
Wednesday 4/3 - Meet and Greet at Ascent Academy in West Valley @ 6-8PM
Thursday 4/4 - Meet and Greet in Roy @ 6:30-9
Friday 4/5 - **Town Hall in Salt Lake Granite Library @ 5pm**
Tuesday 4/9 - Meet and Greet and Debate at Dixie in St George
Wednesday 4/10 - US Senate Candidate Forum in Provo @ 10am
Thursday 4/11 - Meet and Greet in Grantsville @ 5pm
Friday 4/12 - Meet and Greet in Murray Cottonwood High School @ 6-9

This week Josh was interviewed by PoliticIt. The interview isn't out yet but is something to look forward to. We'll post that interview and others as they become available on our website.

<https://www.facebook.com/profile.php?id=61552181581569>

<https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=149Zxl4gG6k>

Have a great day,

Brianna Randall

name: Hillsdale College via Freedom Liberty Report
subject: Justice, weaponized
body:
Please particpate in this survey on the Department of Justice.

This sponsored message from Freedom Liberty Report is on behalf of Hillsdale College

[](https://email.alert.freedomandlibertyreport.com/c/eJyMkcGO3CAMhp-G3IgcA5PZQw4jZXOa3VbdQ48RAWeGEQQEpNW-fZV2596rf_mzP_vn2_ymnXfb7V0HGlaf51zmTc935z238cGL9rzseUZAyUFywBkbO0D3YqVsaOj6DkEhoGjuQ9evnTLLGc6nxSh6UagE9gtZtSi79qpxw8EBCQhneUJol476vldkwNJ5pZVJ0J5ybddMZGPQm_VuoVw_M6WYa2tiaPxwrzUVJi4MJ4aTT-2xb7HaU0t2ZzhZSjrXQFvlceWPvVRn6BD5RZ9Hk5iKYWKEDiS8A0q8wmX8Nr6-fjA87TXMJe7ZEBNjyrEkMtVtt68okHV7YGKkoJ3_Khodkna3jYnRxsdz0L8obpW2ysT4cbnO3y98uv7gzzs0ebDpt_PelVPPJNwO5l_L-r_v-BMAAP__HoaSCQ) Dear Fellow American, Before you move on to your next email—I would appreciate it if you would take a few moments to participate in Hillsdale College's **National Survey on the Department of Justice.** The survey will only take a few moments of your time, and its subject affects your liberty and the very survival of the rule of law in America. **The current administration's weaponization of the Department of Justice is unprecedented in American history.** Instead of protecting your God-given constitutional rights, the administration uses the Department of Justice to attack its political opponents... ...as well as Christians, parents, and anyone who dares to stand up for our constitutional liberties. At the same time, with the help of the media it...
* Covers up a two-tiered justice system that violates your constitutional rights

* Hides the corruption of the ruling class

* Attacks those with traditional viewpoints

**That's why I'm asking you to take the Hillsdale College National Survey on the Department of Justice.** By completing this survey, you will help us more clearly understand the views of mainstream Americans like you on this critical issue. Your responses will help Hillsdale strengthen its nationwide educational outreach efforts on behalf of liberty—including the importance of the rule of law and checks and balances, which the American Founders saw as essential safeguards against corruption. Friend, you can complete the National Survey on the Department of Justice by using the link below: **[https://lp.hillsdale.edu/department-of-justice-survey/](https://email.alert.freedomandlibertyreport.com/c/eJyMkcGO3CAMhp-G3IgcA5PZQw4jZXOa3VbdQ48RAWeGEQQEpNW-fZV2596rf_mzP_vn2_ymnXfb7V0HGlaf51zmTc935z238cGL9rzseUZAyUFywBkbO0D3YqVsaOj6DkEhoGjuQ9evnTLLGc6nxSh6UagE9gtZtSi79qpxw8EBCQhneUJol476vldkwNJ5pZVJ0J5ybddMZGPQm_VuoVw_M6WYa2tiaPxwrzUVJi4MJ4aTT-2xb7HaU0t2ZzhZSjrXQFvlceWPvVRn6BD5RZ9Hk5iKYWKEDiS8A0q8wmX8Nr6-fjA87TXMJe7ZEBNjyrEkMtVtt68okHV7YGKkoJ3_Khodkna3jYnRxsdz0L8obpW2ysT4cbnO3y98uv7gzzs0ebDpt_PelVPPJNwO5l_L-r_v-BMAAP__HoaSCQ)** The **Declaration of Independence** argues that **the purpose of just government is to secure our natural rights** and that **just government is founded on the consent of the governed.** Yet today's ruling class regularly disregards the will of the American people, and our rights—to the freedoms of speech, assembly, and religion, to due process, to gun ownership, and more—are under constant attack. **You and I know that liberty in America is under serious threat. But as I travel around the country, I tell the audiences I speak to how we are engaging in the fight against this threat.** A vital part of our efforts in this fight—in which Hillsdale College is a leader—is **reaching** and **teaching** millions of citizens, with the TRUTH about America's great heritage of liberty. We are heavily invested in our educational outreach efforts through our **Project to Defend Liberty Nationwide by Reaching and Teaching Millions.** These efforts include:
* **Teaching bright and principled students** —on our campuses in Hillsdale, Michigan, and Washington, D.C.—who receive a rigorous, **classical liberal arts education, including** a required course on the Constitution

* **Distributing _Imprimis_** , America's leading digest of liberty, which is mailed to more than 6.4 million homes and businesses ten times per year; previous issues include “The Politicization of the Department of Justice” by Harmeet K. Dhillon

* **Producing and promoting free online courses** for any citizen who wishes to learn, on topics such as the Constitution, American history, and free market economics

* **Providing a classical K-12 curriculum** with a solid grounding in American history, constitutional government, and economics to schools that educate thousands of students nationwide

After everything we've seen over the past few years, the need for Hillsdale's educational outreach efforts is undeniable. So please share your views by completing our **National Survey on the Department of Justice** and returning it to me as soon as possible. It will only take a few minutes of your time. Your completed survey will help us form the most effective strategy to **reach** and **teach** millions of Americans on behalf of liberty. As you might know, Hillsdale College is almost unique in American higher education in its refusal to accept EVEN ONE PENNY of government funding—not even indirectly in the form of federal or state student grants or loans. **This independence frees the College from burdensome and corrupting government regulations. But it also means that our work depends entirely on the generous support of private citizens, like you, who understand the importance of education to liberty.** If you agree that we are now seeing an unprecedented assault on the American way of life, I hope you will partner with Hillsdale College by making a generous tax-deductible gift today. You can easily do so after completing the attached **National Survey on the Department of Justice** , which you can access at this secure link: **[https://lp.hillsdale.edu/department-of-justice-survey/](https://email.alert.freedomandlibertyreport.com/c/eJyMkcGO3CAMhp-G3IgcA5PZQw4jZXOa3VbdQ48RAWeGEQQEpNW-fZV2596rf_mzP_vn2_ymnXfb7V0HGlaf51zmTc935z238cGL9rzseUZAyUFywBkbO0D3YqVsaOj6DkEhoGjuQ9evnTLLGc6nxSh6UagE9gtZtSi79qpxw8EBCQhneUJol476vldkwNJ5pZVJ0J5ybddMZGPQm_VuoVw_M6WYa2tiaPxwrzUVJi4MJ4aTT-2xb7HaU0t2ZzhZSjrXQFvlceWPvVRn6BD5RZ9Hk5iKYWKEDiS8A0q8wmX8Nr6-fjA87TXMJe7ZEBNjyrEkMtVtt68okHV7YGKkoJ3_Khodkna3jYnRxsdz0L8obpW2ysT4cbnO3y98uv7gzzs0ebDpt_PelVPPJNwO5l_L-r_v-BMAAP__HoaSCQ)** Thank you for your time and attention. I look forward to receiving your completed survey, and I sincerely appreciate your support of Hillsdale's educational outreach efforts on behalf of liberty. Warm regards, Larry P. Arnn President, Hillsdale College Pursuing Truth and Defending Liberty Since 1844 |
---

Freedom Liberty Report
---
_PO Box 1188 Fort Collins, CO 80522_

Yet today's ruling class regularly disregards the will of the American people, and our rights—to the freedoms of speech, assembly, and religion, to due process, to gun ownership, and more—are under constant attack. You and I know that liberty in America is under serious threat. But as I travel around the country, I tell the audiences I speak to how we are engaging in the fight against this threat. A vital part of our efforts in this fight—in which Hillsdale College is a leader—is reaching and teaching millions of citizens, with the TRUTH about America's great heritage of liberty. We are heavily invested in our educational outreach efforts through our Project to Defend Liberty Nationwide by Reaching and Teaching Millions. These efforts include: Teaching bright and principled students —on our campuses in Hillsdale, Michigan, and Washington, D.C.—who receive a rigorous, classical liberal arts education, including a required course on the Constitution Distributing Imprimis , America's leading digest of liberty, which is mailed to more than 6.4 million homes and businesses ten times per year; previous issues include “The Politicization of the Department of Justice” by Harmeet K. Dhillon Producing and promoting free online courses for any citizen who wishes to learn, on topics such as the Constitution, American history, and free market economics Providing a classical K-12 curriculum with a solid grounding in American history, constitutional government, and economics to schools that educate thousands of students nationwide After everything we've seen over the past few years, the need for Hillsdale's educational outreach efforts is undeniable. So please share your views by completing our National Survey on the Department of Justice and returning it to me as soon as possible. It will only take a few minutes of your time. Your completed survey will help us form the most effective strategy to reach and teach millions of Americans on behalf of liberty. As you might know, Hillsdale College is almost unique in American higher education in its refusal to accept EVEN ONE PENNY of government funding—not even indirectly in the form of federal or state student grants or loans. This independence frees the College from burdensome and corrupting government regulations. But it also means that our work depends entirely on the generous support of private citizens, like you, who understand the importance of education to liberty. If you agree that we are now seeing an unprecedented assault on the American way of life, I hope you will partner with Hillsdale College by making a generous tax-deductible gift today. You can easily do so after completing the attached National Survey on the Department of Justice , which you can access at this secure link: ** Thank you for your time and attention. I look forward to receiving your completed survey, and I sincerely appreciate your support of Hillsdale's educational outreach efforts on behalf of liberty. Warm regards, Larry P. Arnn President, Hillsdale College Pursuing Truth and Defending Liberty Since 1844 | Freedom Liberty Report PO Box 1188 Fort Collins, CO 80522 | _

name: Hillsdale College via Conservative Broadcast
subject: How often do you think about the Roman Republic?
body:
"The Rise and Fall of the Roman Republic."
%recipient.md5_hash%
| | | This sponsored message from Conservative Broadcast is on behalf of Hillsdale College [](http://post.spmailtechnol.com/f/a/fqrMAiieX0yEV9mORQsBfg~~/AARclAA~~)
---
| |
[](http://post.spmailtechnol.com/f/a/fqrMAiieX0yEV9mORQsBfg~~/AARclAA~~) Dear Friend,

The history of the Roman Republic is a captivating tale of achievement, political and military genius, and the perils of success. One that still impacts our world today.

To help tell this important story to Americans nationwide, we released our free online course, **" The Rise and Fall of the Roman Republic."**

**You can now receive your own DVD box set of "The Rise and Fall of the Roman Republic" when you make a tax-deductible gift of $100 or more in support of our educational outreach efforts on behalf of liberty.**

And, for a limited time, we'll also send you a **free color map** of the Roman world at the end of the Republic. This map is a helpful companion to the course DVD and will illustrate many of the topics discussed in the lectures. Simply use this secure link to reserve your DVD box set of **" The Rise and Fall of the Roman Republic," **along with the companion map today:

[**https://secured.hillsdale.edu/hillsdale/roman-republic-dvd**](http://post.spmailtechnol.com/f/a/fqrMAiieX0yEV9mORQsBfg~~/AARclAA~~)

By studying ancient Rome, you'll discover the conditions necessary to preserve a republic . . . and how a republic may lose its way.

That's why we produced **" The Rise and Fall of the Roman Republic"** and why I hope you'll watch and share the course on DVD.

Thank you for helping to preserve liberty for future generations of Americans through education with Hillsdale College!

Best regards,

Kyle Murnen, '09
Director of Online Learning
Hillsdale College
---

Conservative Broadcast
---
_PO Box 2221 Fort Collins, CO 80522_
