name: Debbie Mucarsel-Powell
subject: We've got a tough fight ahead of us.
body:
| | | | |
---
| | |
---
| | |
---
| |
---
| _You're getting this message because you’ve supported good causes and Democratic candidates. We need your support to continue fighting for our democracy. We love having you in our network, but if you no longer wish to hear from us, you can[unsubscribe here](https://default.salsalabs.org/T4f95a1b1-31c9-4f34-a5e9-74fdba6834f3/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)._
---
|
---
| | | Peter — I've got some great news for you: The Florida Supreme Court just ruled to keep abortion rights on the ballot this November! But we can’t celebrate just yet — the court also UPHELD Ron DeSantis' unconstitutional 15-week abortion ban, which means his even more extreme six-week ban will take effect in 30 days. Now, we finally have the chance to overturn Ron DeSantis' extreme ban and restore our reproductive freedom at the polls. The tides are changing in Florida. And this ballot initiative has a very good chance of passing. Recent polling shows that 62% of voters, including a majority of Republicans, support passing it. And a massive 75% of voters oppose the extreme six-week ban that could take effect in a matter of weeks. This is what a powerful grassroots movement can accomplish. And that's exactly what we need to defeat Rick Scott and stop him from passing a nationwide ban on abortions. Listen, Rick Scott wants you to believe that our home is a red state. But that couldn't be further from the truth. More and more of us are rejecting his far-right agenda every day. And polling data shows that this race is neck and neck. But now, he’s spending millions to lie about his record and launch baseless attacks against me — and I can’t overcome his self-funded ads without the crucial resources to fight back. [So please, will you please chip in $10 or more — split between my campaign and Blue Amp Action’s — before 11:59 p.m. tonight to help me reach my rapid- response goal? With all eyes on Florida, we can’t stumble now.](https://default.salsalabs.org/T851f0eef-aa9a-4113-b42b-7e667e49370a/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)
---
| | | | [DONATE NOW!](https://default.salsalabs.org/T187b689f-79a1-4a05-a275-48d650575b88/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)
---
| Together, we will win a better future for our state and our families. Thank you for all that you do, Debbie
---
| | [DONATE](https://default.salsalabs.org/T37ca74ef-e8be-4152-b61c-b78da69fd59a/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)

1776 Mentor Ave. #411 | Norwood, Ohio 45212
513.438.0171 | info@blueampaction.com
---

---
| | |
---
| | | About BlueAmp Action: We cannot sugarcoat the current situation. Right-wing authoritarianism, defeated by a worldwide coalition during WWII, was only in hibernation. Over the past decade it has infected democratic societies--including ours. It is as simple as it is terrifying: What we do now will define the future of our country and world. We at Blue Amp Action are dedicated to liberal, open societies, where reason and science are applied to solve our problems; where civil rights--including voting rights!--are protected for all. We fight for these values every day. Speaking up on our platforms, raising the voices and the political prospects of liberal pols and pundits. **And savvy grassroots activists like you know, just like we do, that we can’t stop watching the people we help elect:_ after the elections, we have to keep organizing support for the policies we like and pushing back against the ones we don’t._** **__When the public tunes out between elections and the only people our elected officials hear from are the paid lobbyists of wealthy corporations, our government stops being accountable to the needs of ordinary families.__** **Democracy never sleeps, and neither can we.** So we ask that you support our work, so we can continue to engage in this fight every moment of every day. So our kids grow up in democracy, not dystopia. Thank you for your support for all we do! Please follow Cliff Schecter on Twitter @cliffschecter, or subscribe to The Takedown with Cliff Schecter on YouTube, to keep up to date with this battle for the heart and soul of our country. — _You're getting this message because you’ve supported good causes and Democratic candidates. We need your support to continue fighting for our democracy. We love having you in our network, but if you no longer wish to hear from us, you can[unsubscribe here](https://default.salsalabs.org/Tab542c83-60ef-40db-a357-c3e74d545280/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)._
---
| | [Unsubscribe](https://blueampstrategies.salsalabs.org/manage-your-subscription?eId=b6e7ca78-056b-4fb8-a8f0-f74c2ac38464&eType=EmailBlastContent&sId=368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9) or [Manage Your Preferences](https://blueampstrategies.salsalabs.org/manage-your-subscription?eId=b6e7ca78-056b-4fb8-a8f0-f74c2ac38464&eType=EmailBlastContent&sId=368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)

name: Zach Shrewsbury
subject: Vision for a good economy
body:
I'm ready to fight for an economy that measures success by how well and happy we all are.

| | | [ ](https://www.shrewsburyforsenate.com/r?u=j5fNBxs3a3N4qD2Ew7zDqIVf6g-l4FLVqwvq1vwG43XdtoRCV0vQBXLNTs-Z52oOCGJqlPF1Rt7Y4-fBqetktSSZ0o_P55Q5kKyhH3BULMceaCRyU6HsuTmOMys-xDxw&e=835c7faa13004566534194ac192acb50&utm_source=shrewsburyforsenate&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=040224_good_economy&n=1)
---
Hi Friend, Everywhere you look, you see headlines about sky-high corporate profits, a booming economy, and low jobless rates. But at the same time, life expectancy is on the decline, depression rates are through the roof, and more folks are feeling like they can't catch a financial break than ever before. Makes you wonder. Here's the deal: the folks at the top have twisted what it means to have a "good economy" to line their pockets, leaving the rest of us in the dust. To them, a good economy is all about the numbers—GDP, profits, you name it. But what about our well-being? Our happiness? A clean environment, a secure paycheck, and time to spend with our families and friends? "Economy" comes from the Greek word "oikos," meaning home. A good economy is about keeping our home—this planet—and its people thriving. It's about working together, caring for each other, and living in harmony. I'm stepping up to run for Senate in one of our country's toughest spots because I've had enough. We need to flip the script on our economic policies. **We need an economy that's got everyone's back, ensuring we all have access to healthcare, childcare, education, and a roof over our heads. We're talking about a community that lights up with creativity, freedom, and real belonging. It's about living life to the fullest, not just clocking in and out.** **[Join me. Let's make this dream a reality. I'm ready to fight for an economy that measures success by how well and happy we all are.](https://www.shrewsburyforsenate.com/r?u=j5fNBxs3a3N4qD2Ew7zDqIVf6g-l4FLVqwvq1vwG43XdtoRCV0vQBXLNTs-Z52oOCGJqlPF1Rt7Y4-fBqetktSSZ0o_P55Q5kKyhH3BULMceaCRyU6HsuTmOMys-xDxw&e=835c7faa13004566534194ac192acb50&utm_source=shrewsburyforsenate&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=040224_good_economy&n=2)**
---
| [](https://www.shrewsburyforsenate.com/r?u=j5fNBxs3a3N4qD2Ew7zDqIVf6g-l4FLVqwvq1vwG43XdtoRCV0vQBXLNTs-Z52oOCGJqlPF1Rt7Y4-fBqetktSSZ0o_P55Q5kKyhH3BULMceaCRyU6HsuTmOMys-xDxw&e=835c7faa13004566534194ac192acb50&utm_source=shrewsburyforsenate&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=040224_good_economy&n=3 "DONATE TODAY >>") [DONATE TODAY >>](https://www.shrewsburyforsenate.com/r?u=j5fNBxs3a3N4qD2Ew7zDqIVf6g-l4FLVqwvq1vwG43XdtoRCV0vQBXLNTs-Z52oOCGJqlPF1Rt7Y4-fBqetktSSZ0o_P55Q5kKyhH3BULMceaCRyU6HsuTmOMys-xDxw&e=835c7faa13004566534194ac192acb50&utm_source=shrewsburyforsenate&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=040224_good_economy&n=3)
---
We've gotta say "no more" to the same old story of cutthroat competition and endless growth that only benefits the bigwigs while leaving the rest of us with crumbs. **It's time for a world where we share the good stuff, look out for each other, and where happiness and community really count.** Our economy should boost our environment and strengthen our communities, focusing on local food and energy to keep us standing strong, no matter what the world throws our way. And the government? It's got to be there to ensure life is good for everyone and guide businesses to do right by people and the planet. **We're talking fair wages, justice for all, and taking care of the air we breathe and the water we drink.** Public money should be spent on things that make our lives better, plain and simple. **Imagine an economy where everyone's needs are met, and life is about more than just work. It's about connections, creativity, and playing an active part in our communities.** In the last six weeks, we doubled the number of supporters. **[But with 42 days to go to the primary election, we need your help more than ever. Can we count on your contribution of $15 or our average donation of $31.49 today?](https://www.shrewsburyforsenate.com/r?u=j5fNBxs3a3N4qD2Ew7zDqIVf6g-l4FLVqwvq1vwG43XdtoRCV0vQBXLNTs-Z52oOCGJqlPF1Rt7Y4-fBqetktSSZ0o_P55Q5kKyhH3BULMceaCRyU6HsuTmOMys-xDxw&e=835c7faa13004566534194ac192acb50&utm_source=shrewsburyforsenate&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=040224_good_economy&n=4)** Thank you for being part of this. Together, we can make it happen. Zach
---

clean_body: I'm ready to fight for an economy that measures success by how well and happy we all are. | | | Hi Friend, Everywhere you look, you see headlines about sky-high corporate profits, a booming economy, and low jobless rates. But at the same time, life expectancy is on the decline, depression rates are through the roof, and more folks are feeling like they can't catch a financial break than ever before. Makes you wonder. Here's the deal: the folks at the top have twisted what it means to have a "good economy" to line their pockets, leaving the rest of us in the dust. To them, a good economy is all about the numbers—GDP, profits, you name it. But what about our well-being? Our happiness? A clean environment, a secure paycheck, and time to spend with our families and friends? "Economy" comes from the Greek word "oikos," meaning home. A good economy is about keeping our home—this planet—and its people thriving. It's about working together, caring for each other, and living in harmony. I'm stepping up to run for Senate in one of our country's toughest spots because I've had enough. We need to flip the script on our economic policies. We need an economy that's got everyone's back, ensuring we all have access to healthcare, childcare, education, and a roof over our heads. We're talking about a community that lights up with creativity, freedom, and real belonging. It's about living life to the fullest, not just clocking in and out. | "DONATE TODAY >>" We've gotta say "no more" to the same old story of cutthroat competition and endless growth that only benefits the bigwigs while leaving the rest of us with crumbs. It's time for a world where we share the good stuff, look out for each other, and where happiness and community really count. Our economy should boost our environment and strengthen our communities, focusing on local food and energy to keep us standing strong, no matter what the world throws our way. And the government? It's got to be there to ensure life is good for everyone and guide businesses to do right by people and the planet. We're talking fair wages, justice for all, and taking care of the air we breathe and the water we drink. Public money should be spent on things that make our lives better, plain and simple. Imagine an economy where everyone's needs are met, and life is about more than just work. It's about connections, creativity, and playing an active part in our communities. In the last six weeks, we doubled the number of supporters. Thank you for being part of this. Together, we can make it happen. Zach | "DONATE $31.49 >>" | | Zach Shrewsbury (D-WV) is running for the U.S. Senate seat as the only electable Democrat in the race. A native West Virginian, a Marine Corps veteran, and a grandson of a coal miner, Zach has a passion for making a difference in his community. He has seen firsthand the struggles faced by working families who are just trying to get by. Zach's military service experiences and his work as a community and climate justice organizer shaped his commitment to fighting for social and economic justice, and he's dedicated his career to making a difference in people's lives. ## Airstrike Destroys Iranian Consulate in Syria
Israel reportedly killed seven Iranian officers, including a senior commander of its elite military intelligence, in an airstrike that destroyed Iran's consulate in Damascus, Syria. [Photos of the destruction are here.](https://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJxs0LGOqzAQheGnMZ2RGSYGChe3octtt0QDHpJZ2TiyvUF5-1VSb_uf5tP5ui5XkiDH7T9FdnVPC21VnrygBg24YOPdzgzcN-y6oQNjcRywubvd22mcxhEu1k6dt4A9rKbvrO14Gyw24sAAGjRgposF2-LOZkIP3TatPA5WoWEvNeX2O8lR77yHV3pybrcUm-DutT6K6v8pmBXM53m2mX8q5_Le3yXl4BXMUbwPrJlKVTBLycRBrymuRUumQ3NcqZSXLq8s9ElCh95SjHR4zkVTTMdNeyav32JtUJtOwdxk5x-nhCDFDgrNLZKED67-9dRvAAAA__9joGmm) Israel didn't comment on the reports, but it has acknowledged [bombing Iranian targets in Syria](https://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJxsj7FuwyAQQL8GNlvnyxnwwNDFW7p2tDAcMRU2kY2C-vdVOnd9T3rS-7ovd5dyOh6fbmdbY1mcr-nFC3XYIS0kg43MyDfJdtADgiKjSW52pcF4Tyt4B4AxaE00BjCj0yYa7WWyCEhAgDCNClVPkWGigIOfVjZaCQIOqZaz_y7pqBvH_FNefPa-7DLbrdbnJW4fAmeBc2utX1f_dgLng9v1huXModtTCJk7dlftlNFgJrzJ04ZnSzmnS2lB8Nhdyn_h-t_lbwAAAP__Y6JR0g) hundreds of times over the past few years. Syria's defense ministry said the Israelis used missiles to get through their air defenses. Military analysts say Israel is deliberately increasing pressure on Iran and testing to see how the country and its Hezbollah allies will respond. Destroying Iran's consulate represents a significant escalation.
## Crews Open Channel on Baltimore River
A temporary channel was opened in the Patapsco River Monday, [clearing the way](https://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJxs0D1vgzAQxvFPA5uj4zjbMHjoki1dOyK_nJOrTIzAStRvX9G546Nn-en_dVtuXoo8759-ZddyXXxs8uKFFCqkhfrkMjPy2LMb7IBgaLLUP1yOxjBypgwTahOC9jCGqPVIRHOyvTgEJCBAmLVBc6HMMFPCIc6BJ2s6Ak7S6n75rvJsD87lp754v8S69sU9WtuObvzo8Nrh1W9Pfh_ndY69SSzc4TX40mStO6uwS7qzirUUvx2sgBQM6iQoS2ynFCGHSOgZ7QRRT3aYEyDNGvvdpe0tpchhbEdwX72UP0X7L8lvAAAA___XrV7g) for vessels stuck in the Port of Baltimore to leave following the collapse of the Francis Scott Key Bridge. The U.S. Coast Guard [also announced plans](https://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJxs0LFuwyAQgOGngY2InA8TDwxdvKVrR-tiH4EKg2Vfk-btq3bu_A-_9H1cpyvlkuv9nVYOEttEs-QHT2jAAE6olxCZgTvN4ezPYHu8eNQpdJHQAg-OLHAkoGFgx9ZHP6MjiDoHsIAWLdjB9dCfMLIdcIHzPNz44nuFlpcsbT99tlwlcSyv9uD9NLdVl5BEtkN1bwpGBaMkTrmU36ZgTG3lys9DwXgICZsnyZwUjOh63zln6Os7l0z7y8yJauViblQkr21ns7VdTNu4mrXVhV4KRr2HZXvmUvLRe4X2vlL-e2n5D-UnAAD__-73ZCQ) to clear enough debris to open two more channels and slowly increase water traffic in the area. Efforts are part of a phased process to reopen the main channel that has been closed since the bridge's collapse last week. Officials also have instituted [a 2,000-yard safety zone](https://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJxskLGSrCAQRb8Gs7ag5aEGBC8xm003tBCbmd5FsIQZa_5-y403u7dOcup83uab48jp_uE2sjXk2fnKL5o1IKCedbPaQITUNWRVr1AaPfS6eVg1dN4tbqBgZDfq0SunFqS-U0oaSaZhixK11BLl-M-gaXUgOeoVlR8XGnojtKSVaz7ar8ypPijEd37R0fq8NdE-at2L6P4LnARO53m2fimJznJxgdM1BU4oJdScYGfyBDnAN71hOXi9Exy05Ret4Ar4SC49d6AQ8lHB51Q5PamAu06Mbi8EhSsJnJrDrvvJMXIxvdDyvjmOv1b1r0Q_AQAA__8-jWkv) around the bridge to protect workers, ships, and the environment, and permission is needed for any vessel or person entering the zone.
## List: Top Small Towns for Growth, Prosperity
Florida and Texas are the leaders in a new ranking of America's [top up-and-coming small cities for financial prosperity](https://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJxsj72O8yAQAJ8GOluwWUMoKL7GXb72Sosza7J3_EQ2ipW3P-Xqq2ek0XzcllvgzDX9D4V839oS1s5PWnCAAXBBGf1GBHSR5LXVoAxeLcq735S7WFBx0g6jxnBFa6fJEZGx2oKS7EEBKlSg3GTAjLiRchhBr-6TrtYIVBS5t338alz7nbb8ak_ax7UVmf2998chLv8EzALm8zzH0iq9EtH32xAwZ35yTQLmUEN-HXwImHt7DFRoT1zTcJSQ87ByZ3ozufv4ODlnPowVqFIJnH9r_a_1nwAAAP__YXNaRQ), with Florida boasting six of the top 10 nationally and Texas two. The MoneyGeek ranking looks at growth and prosperity, including population growth, unemployment rate, and median income. North Port, Fla., topped the list, followed by New Braunfels in Texas. The ranking includes regional breakouts for the Top 10 small cities in the South, Northeast, Midwest, and West, as well as the best towns for safety, entertainment and dining access, and economic growth factors. [The full rankings are here.](https://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJxsj72O8yAQAJ8GOluwWUMoKL7GXb72Sosza7J3_EQ2ipW3P-Xqq2ek0XzcllvgzDX9D4V839oS1s5PWnCAAXBBGf1GBHSR5LXVoAxeLcq735S7WFBx0g6jxnBFa6fJEZGx2oKS7EEBKlSg3GTAjLiRchhBr-6TrtYIVBS5t338alz7nbb8ak_ax7UVmf2998chLv8EzALm8zzH0iq9EtH32xAwZ35yTQLmUEN-HXwImHt7DFRoT1zTcJSQ87ByZ3ozufv4ODlnPowVqFIJnH9r_a_1nwAAAP__YXNaRQ)

clean_body: Severe storms will move across the Midwest, South, and mid-Atlantic today and tomorrow, potentially bringing strong thunderstorms, large hail, tornadoes, and high winds. . | | | | | | TUESDAY, APRIL 2, 2024 ---|--- Good Morning! On this date in 1877, a 14-year-old girl became the first human cannonball at a show at the Royal Aquarium. She shot 60 feet in the air via a system of springs hidden by a fake explosion. () If you miss the old West, check out our Et Cetera item from Albuquerque, where police on horseback chase down a Walgreens shoplifter. The bodycam video, of the chase, is worth watching. If you haven't subscribed to The Flyover yet, you can do that here . We're always interested in your feedback. Hit reply if you have thoughts for us. Our sponsor today is , offering a FREE financial report from economist Ben Stein. Check them out below in today's edition. | Airstrike Destroys Iranian Consulate in Syria Israel reportedly killed seven Iranian officers, including a senior commander of its elite military intelligence, in an airstrike that destroyed Iran's consulate in Damascus, Syria. Israel didn't comment on the reports, but it has acknowledged hundreds of times over the past few years. Syria's defense ministry said the Israelis used missiles to get through their air defenses. Military analysts say Israel is deliberately increasing pressure on Iran and testing to see how the country and its Hezbollah allies will respond. Destroying Iran's consulate represents a significant escalation. Crews Open Channel on Baltimore River A temporary channel was opened in the Patapsco River Monday, for vessels stuck in the Port of Baltimore to leave following the collapse of the Francis Scott Key Bridge. The U.S. Coast Guard to clear enough debris to open two more channels and slowly increase water traffic in the area. Efforts are part of a phased process to reopen the main channel that has been closed since the bridge's collapse last week. Officials also have instituted around the bridge to protect workers, ships, and the environment, and permission is needed for any vessel or person entering the zone. List: Top Small Towns for Growth, Prosperity Florida and Texas are the leaders in a new ranking of America's , with Florida boasting six of the top 10 nationally and Texas two. The MoneyGeek ranking looks at growth and prosperity, including population growth, unemployment rate, and median income. North Port, Fla., topped the list, followed by New Braunfels in Texas. The ranking includes regional breakouts for the Top 10 small cities in the South, Northeast, Midwest, and West, as well as the best towns for safety, entertainment and dining access, and economic growth factors. body:
"The Rise and Fall of the Roman Republic."

[](http://links.reclamingamericanfreedom.com/u/click?_t=5ec072595b1347f09b4bac0de82ea87d&_m=e3426365fbf74f6b87f64cc4f1c65793&_e=NghMHoGRMT0xUCvqSXfDSc9iUSKxW7_O6RfGAOxfIWAo-3Bnu2EFJMiC2Wvva3cMHbF0ETtCDQDju3PTa2vcC0jbSypyiL6soD6ydmzse3kG4Bby1w5pbCnWTY0DobMWhxltJCAnWbWcp3p6Ip4vIQ7tMPJn0RUAuaJ4zgGd1-_YOncP9iejo8c6OFww_E-sQT5052jqgeW1WWjGT1h3zjzBKIX2X_oY3woxoqr6N3coGCMiHtKKN2STsaoWDcthxGnXQP6zxo278HOIn37PPoBB36L1yUFyYEZ78eHAb2AOQqRDYr8UCiIxYvYbce0HYNwMLkctIDl6AdgqXhZCjn8sQ98nUicoonfp3GpwweWC3MVmA_za46FPRIuLNI4RPKGbTg1stPvuqjwyaxeP9YqnWmU59M7w7pwRoqyIrQo%3D) Dear Friend,

The history of the Roman Republic is a captivating tale of achievement, political and military genius, and the perils of success. One that still impacts our world today.

To help tell this important story to Americans nationwide, we released our free online course, **" The Rise and Fall of the Roman Republic."**

**You can now receive your own DVD box set of "The Rise and Fall of the Roman Republic" when you make a tax-deductible gift of $100 or more in support of our educational outreach efforts on behalf of liberty.**

And, for a limited time, we'll also send you a **free color map** of the Roman world at the end of the Republic. This map is a helpful companion to the course DVD and will illustrate many of the topics discussed in the lectures. Simply use this secure link to reserve your DVD box set of **" The Rise and Fall of the Roman Republic," **along with the companion map today:

[**https://secured.hillsdale.edu/hillsdale/roman-republic-dvd**](http://links.reclamingamericanfreedom.com/u/click?_t=5ec072595b1347f09b4bac0de82ea87d&_m=e3426365fbf74f6b87f64cc4f1c65793&_e=NghMHoGRMT0xUCvqSXfDSc9iUSKxW7_O6RfGAOxfIWAo-3Bnu2EFJMiC2Wvva3cMHbF0ETtCDQDju3PTa2vcC0jbSypyiL6soD6ydmzse3kG4Bby1w5pbCnWTY0DobMWhxltJCAnWbWcp3p6Ip4vIQ7tMPJn0RUAuaJ4zgGd1-_YOncP9iejo8c6OFww_E-sQT5052jqgeW1WWjGT1h3zjzBKIX2X_oY3woxoqr6N3coGCMiHtKKN2STsaoWDcthmbVw8Ny7p3YhmP6-vNal6bEN-fqC9bRG3ocoRe3H9E-zmHKdedmdLRI_FD-1sHTjOL3tMqPzEvNeDTN3DMaKSuSHkBmgHi3WPhpEOtTIOVJucmXiP-kF7AwW2WXqUOdnlFpHAj4SnTL6LzD5xtTY-DA8cQWPxShGoEd6YFZKHbQ%3D)

By studying ancient Rome, you'll discover the conditions necessary to preserve a republic . . . and how a republic may lose its way.

That's why we produced **" The Rise and Fall of the Roman Republic"** and why I hope you'll watch and share the course on DVD.

Thank you for helping to preserve liberty for future generations of Americans through education with Hillsdale College!

Best regards,

Kyle Murnen, '09

The history of the Roman Republic is a captivating tale of achievement, political and military genius, and the perils of success. One that still impacts our world today.

To help tell this important story to Americans nationwide, we released our free online course, **" The Rise and Fall of the Roman Republic."**

**You can now receive your own DVD box set of "The Rise and Fall of the Roman Republic" when you make a tax-deductible gift of $100 or more in support of our educational outreach efforts on behalf of liberty.**

And, for a limited time, we'll also send you a **free color map** of the Roman world at the end of the Republic. This map is a helpful companion to the course DVD and will illustrate many of the topics discussed in the lectures. Simply use this secure link to reserve your DVD box set of **" The Rise and Fall of the Roman Republic," **along with the companion map today:

[**https://secured.hillsdale.edu/hillsdale/roman-republic-dvd**](https://links.conservativelibertywire.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=21f824934b04426ebc4228b62c3e6018&_e=h7RPA7WHpoTjviqt_Lgh1qwLpkq1S7ETKkpM2zx1_HW3KxWgJGopy9fgitMlVKB5ySGT5c2vyKkTuOgVq-2NhAjZqH7hXILv7uF7iIxDLR-8CbJjc8xf_vDLqio6kslMvLO2PCCmPgyVbUdE4JbzkyWLhmfJdkW757B27EnxpoHwmMlga4nylZsffUOmPzJlJQVuqfVimmf4snx27FXyISYREew4zxfxs2nt_pNqVZHgotytJHpJSe3gUvJQDjMbD_pxd_eLuihTzdufrKSNLNoULjIVYSn4GcmwksckRkiSrUrkoWtqFvAVUTIyGGpFJtktQH9JDpvz1ohVFTox6albHiy6oiz01QHijj9nIKg8D_gNPpxg0bPwenCGz2oTWaI1DgGTAziJ4e7spgGvwN5QHN9UNMivz0ib-vu0_b8%3D)

By studying ancient Rome, you'll discover the conditions necessary to preserve a republic . . . and how a republic may lose its way.

That's why we produced **" The Rise and Fall of the Roman Republic"** and why I hope you'll watch and share the course on DVD.

Thank you for helping to preserve liberty for future generations of Americans through education with Hillsdale College!

Best regards,

Kyle Murnen, '09
Director of Online Learning
Hillsdale College

name: Lara Trump
subject: I’m doing everything in my power to Save America
disclaimer_text: Paid for by the Republican National Committee
body:
Will you step up to support your Party?

[](https://links.fullmagnews.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=5f2efcceba6f4ec0a153fdbd33e9f7e5&_e=yC7OxXUlD3yvPY0BVyco8_8ryjRZkC_QmelCGE3ftIFWnWs0D1uQp4Y0joI11ToKBD6C9gRUQRUeplpa_dTULzdnwWYBPRjRRajhrVXDRP3dYnYtVchPlqKKal8xSHOV04yZ7OKaXKATh_STS6LQLn3PwjDx5UdhIWVJ_DN4zIeVklvdmThxhQBXzl3h_sezos0lZ9TfJejsTyA92t8dSZFxDDB5pIIAuhBMC_xVX2cBn-XAiiL5LMab-OAtUnXc6H1anlHoSc6ILCB-TjsczAKABPO9U92vUjlszuMMEqCebxChhtVOv969s9WAn28vNAbfWhnTF1In9aDy6yTn6xMgKRKDgZ-fUPbYSa2u-yKKdZKNGjbSADE_HDzZGaskLPhDARXby6WqSY6lwxJ2A0gns5EwA98WwWMOaJL13DB7a0wNDphqMGI8HK_tcWJPhoGmdJm2c1P6xtmB9fglofIRQnwyy58YqtcjUY8v2aHLGtY5PECyKfHWp9HMTuTD)

Friend,

Before the RNC's first **[FEC End-of-Quarter Deadline Report](https://links.fullmagnews.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=5f2efcceba6f4ec0a153fdbd33e9f7e5&_e=yC7OxXUlD3yvPY0BVyco8_8ryjRZkC_QmelCGE3ftIFWnWs0D1uQp4Y0joI11ToKBD6C9gRUQRUeplpa_dTULzdnwWYBPRjRRajhrVXDRP3dYnYtVchPlqKKal8xSHOV04yZ7OKaXKATh_STS6LQLn3PwjDx5UdhIWVJ_DN4zIeVklvdmThxhQBXzl3h_sezos0lZ9TfJejsTyA92t8dSZFxDDB5pIIAuhBMC_xVX2cBn-XAiiL5LMab-OAtUnXc6H1anlHoSc6ILCB-TjsczAKABPO9U92vUjlszuMMEqCebxChhtVOv969s9WAn28vNAbfWhnTF1In9aDy6yTn6xMgKRKDgZ-fUPbYSa2u-yJEtP7QIRzF5gJwIxTF1efvNFoiE8qbs1zWsuWDty4NodshEKHbcDy3D0t9v-BkujIr_e-J0ge0ZDKNhqinPZGDsfH-AIrz54ifBEfMQGnqVQda4Be6yuo45RJEnzFIg28NQj0Hnd3zxIo5my-FasBw) **since I assumed the role of Co-Chair, I have an important favor to ask.

Will you help set the tone for incredible Republican victories up and down the ballot by contributing **[$25](https://links.fullmagnews.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=5f2efcceba6f4ec0a153fdbd33e9f7e5&_e=yC7OxXUlD3yvPY0BVyco8_8ryjRZkC_QmelCGE3ftIFWnWs0D1uQp4Y0joI11ToKBD6C9gRUQRUeplpa_dTULzdnwWYBPRjRRajhrVXDRP3dYnYtVchPlqKKal8xSHOV04yZ7OKaXKATh_STS6LQLn3PwjDx5UdhIWVJ_DN4zIeVklvdmThxhQBXzl3h_sezos0lZ9TfJejsTyA92t8dSZFxDDB5pIIAuhBMC_xVX2cBn-XAiiL5LMab-OAtUnXc6H1anlHoSc6ILCB-TjsczAKABPO9U92vUjlszuMMEqCebxChhtVOv969s9WAn28vNAbfWhnTF1In9aDy6yTn64WcusCeycjhx1zhoNTXHB-0MX_ASGTGTgnwceztdWb23jUz7o1JCT8L0RW2BbZaAi9sf7dS5_y1ySfXOFOIXS96yxUVlRxYTEsJcx0z6KRghyIIkpHuW68dsrS6ocweEpX7w9Lmvp3-m9xSyO8U8F9MKKeEnyMcLt3m64xvRE5R) **toward our End-of-Quarter Goal?

[](https://links.fullmagnews.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=5f2efcceba6f4ec0a153fdbd33e9f7e5&_e=yC7OxXUlD3yvPY0BVyco8_8ryjRZkC_QmelCGE3ftIFWnWs0D1uQp4Y0joI11ToKBD6C9gRUQRUeplpa_dTULzdnwWYBPRjRRajhrVXDRP3dYnYtVchPlqKKal8xSHOV04yZ7OKaXKATh_STS6LQLn3PwjDx5UdhIWVJ_DN4zIeVklvdmThxhQBXzl3h_sezos0lZ9TfJejsTyA92t8dSZFxDDB5pIIAuhBMC_xVX2cBn-XAiiL5LMab-OAtUnXc6H1anlHoSc6ILCB-TjsczAKABPO9U92vUjlszuMMEqCebxChhtVOv969s9WAn28vNAbfWhnTF1In9aDy6yTn6xMgKRKDgZ-fUPbYSa2u-yLKTqan8pN8URHOcfMkk70yz9bVrDLexEkqGftfeR2PnPGuXf-BXtFZwEJHUG5gr5AGvN_al6M15YmKajOFKeYILBPP9BHp0xYpXG7PzH2ZdS8dmASSUcEwXZbNW1DS7hbAM8qMyqIZMTC3APasAmqZ)

I promise you, Friend, your generous contribution will be well worth it when we elect President Trump back to the White House by historic margins.

Every cent you give will go DIRECTLY to turning out the vote, protecting the vote, and raising massive amounts of money for our mission to Save America.

name: Hillsdale College via Conservatives Give
subject: These questions are at the core of what it means to be human
body:
"What is the good? What is the best way for man to live?"

| | | This sponsored message from Conservatives Give is on behalf of Hillsdale College [](https://links.conservativesgive.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=d34c427ec14f42819bdf7d968b27b87c&_e=Uhi_JPOOBzyww77Y55KHRFv2Kz_mANWVXZKcznMjIIGK3ydAu7hN1FExJ-8Eo7nXghh6qdF_s8qodsMkL78_WSwXBMyV-Ok07FPyLC0nVEvWw-Of93iR3AoofsV1pApQ_nHnZ1iBnD9dbTJa71YWWTAExhI-h7skx8F1zj1ItMGVY6Xb7JJZwhgZfdfLUrdgbLTBDY8ZGs-nxy5YPc8M_JDrudwYYXvsVHkhC0l6KtOdbTpdNM2aGmnsBTfOPP3Kek65vXP9clhIxcwEnlpB6HAiaS5uI-DVFJJ9Sh2_pa9wG26irQL4mAHoTCe-9HDFRgrn-la1Tp0ikMHyVva_lYpxx9DW5VYmd50MW-RTyZI_35vy78TaC42zr4_qSyNh_HB3a0QK84X5HrNqn2tIT6574USaoKigJ8EaoX-6nb8%3D)
Dear Fellow American, _" What is the good? What is the best way for man to live?"_ _" Does God exist? Can we know God?"_ These questions are at the core of what it means to be human - both in our relationship with each other and with God. Our Western heritage, tracing back to the Hebrews and the ancient Greeks, to Jerusalem and Athens, was where these questions were first asked, and answered. [](https://links.conservativesgive.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=d34c427ec14f42819bdf7d968b27b87c&_e=Uhi_JPOOBzyww77Y55KHRFv2Kz_mANWVXZKcznMjIIGK3ydAu7hN1FExJ-8Eo7nXghh6qdF_s8qodsMkL78_WSwXBMyV-Ok07FPyLC0nVEvWw-Of93iR3AoofsV1pApQ_nHnZ1iBnD9dbTJa71YWWTAExhI-h7skx8F1zj1ItMGVY6Xb7JJZwhgZfdfLUrdgbLTBDY8ZGs-nxy5YPc8M_JDrudwYYXvsVHkhC0l6KtOdbTpdNM2aGmnsBTfOPP3Kek65vXP9clhIxcwEnlpB6O8jy22_T3MmNWDlox0DUXm1fss0h3-HhFS4sUp6L6j6fIBQZEK0fKlZxODNB1VUYAQbNpAgq9tNn5I9bRmPpLRXWGLRMcw7-ljzXtUNGckW-fb7ftERZxUEg9HHwhMsmg5c_UYR_67WjvUyo8Upxtg%3D)Every Hillsdale College student is required to take a class on the Western heritage in order to graduate. And every academic year, I'm reminded of the joy it is to pursue the answers to such questions with my students. Today, I want to offer you that same experience... that same pursuit... that same joy... ... by sending you [**a limited-edition DVD box set of Hillsdale's popular online course, "Western Heritage - From the Book of Genesis to John Locke,"**](https://links.conservativesgive.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=d34c427ec14f42819bdf7d968b27b87c&_e=Uhi_JPOOBzyww77Y55KHRFv2Kz_mANWVXZKcznMjIIGK3ydAu7hN1FExJ-8Eo7nXghh6qdF_s8qodsMkL78_WSwXBMyV-Ok07FPyLC0nVEvWw-Of93iR3AoofsV1pApQ_nHnZ1iBnD9dbTJa71YWWTAExhI-h7skx8F1zj1ItMGVY6Xb7JJZwhgZfdfLUrdgbLTBDY8ZGs-nxy5YPc8M_JDrudwYYXvsVHkhC0l6KtOdbTpdNM2aGmnsBTfOPP3Kek65vXP9clhIxcwEnlpB6P86p9DmJe0xEiecU73SCCiU7y55d8H3xQrObuzibj3b8TjjSBlKyPQe2C0tdas6BDV3wRk-w0ZgE-2RQTSSvLqEUFG9jaOzxqHE4wgvRkTONuilxtaW4DbgJsuhzOHZwJ40bxnhvAcPkygAZg1SCmw%3D) as a token of our thanks for a generous contribution in support of Hillsdale's efforts to educate America. This is your opportunity to deepen your understanding about the Golden Age of Greece, Early Christianity, the Renaissance, and the Scientific Revolution. It's your chance to plumb the depths of what makes Western civilization what it is today. And since we recently re-filmed and expanded this course - first offered in 2012 - to feature new lectures and professors, now is the perfect time to add it to your personal library, or give it as a gift. I invite you to study the history of the "big questions" with my colleagues and me. Reserve your DVD set now using this secure link, while they last: [**https://secure.hillsdale.edu/support-western-heritage-dvd**](https://links.conservativesgive.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=d34c427ec14f42819bdf7d968b27b87c&_e=Uhi_JPOOBzyww77Y55KHRFv2Kz_mANWVXZKcznMjIIGK3ydAu7hN1FExJ-8Eo7nXghh6qdF_s8qodsMkL78_WSwXBMyV-Ok07FPyLC0nVEvWw-Of93iR3AoofsV1pApQ_nHnZ1iBnD9dbTJa71YWWTAExhI-h7skx8F1zj1ItMGVY6Xb7JJZwhgZfdfLUrdgbLTBDY8ZGs-nxy5YPc8M_JDrudwYYXvsVHkhC0l6KtOdbTpdNM2aGmnsBTfOPP3Kek65vXP9clhIxcwEnlpB6EfBSgBpOI2GuUkH1jjwLTrK2_RY27XCGZCId9ngUvC98Wye76MtRUlxOD_0D03GzU9YNgwx7l-esRcHcwcbkGCrgt7fFuCdn31g-BTqCc5AlVo2GivInrzcufMhu3q4ycx_75KJtK5cA9wfYL7gVlk%3D) Warm regards, Larry P. name: Hillsdale College via Freedom Nation Today
subject: Survey on the Department of Justice
body:
Please particpate in this survey on the Department of Justice.

This sponsored message from Freedom Nation Today is on behalf of Hillsdale College

[](https://links.freedomnationtoday.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=be8a24493b13438a81a7074c92ed9f81&_e=HpqMT7iSrxnXJs3JqYY5sJcFv0r9-yO6tCtsA0JEo_1fEx5Aigt4i7Yc1gT-4N6ipX9KRifjSLRk6YbQDDXx6HdJs06NebdK4W5oUz3n09CMf19D5FN5l1QHoHX4lLY4GC44v9y5m5iMkOREtaM0Ou_0BFMwFDoyjdtvms0OWiR_Wm45f58fyCCZFl96kd-rgLYufZ62-8owIBaDTCoxkwfYdsA5S5Utf992A-aF8PSauZ3Z_7p1awxWf9VzD-XJQMiW2F-VSJDxNY1gamOqy8cyY-qYsZcTfKkaWWkIw0ASAyapArzFDGcFG56SrcDdgyqk1U8UkOwVoIep6YbV9fzkKzyHKfBAFiQagqiinz3W5kZlV_F_pyC7q7_dCJECHVPuEyKsQ_ar-lw8PvWv6Q%3D%3D) Dear Fellow American, Before you move on to your next email--I would appreciate it if you would take a few moments to participate in Hillsdale College's **National Survey on the Department of Justice.** The survey will only take a few moments of your time, and its subject affects your liberty and the very survival of the rule of law in America. **The current administration's weaponization of the Department of Justice is unprecedented in American history.** Instead of protecting your God-given constitutional rights, the administration uses the Department of Justice to attack its political opponents... ...as well as Christians, parents, and anyone who dares to stand up for our constitutional liberties. At the same time, with the help of the media it... Covers up a two-tiered justice system that violates your constitutional rights
Hides the corruption of the ruling class
Attacks those with traditional viewpoints **That's why I'm asking you to take the Hillsdale College National Survey on the Department of Justice.** By completing this survey, you will help us more clearly understand the views of mainstream Americans like you on this critical issue. Your responses will help Hillsdale strengthen its nationwide educational outreach efforts on behalf of liberty--including the importance of the rule of law and checks and balances, which the American Founders saw as essential safeguards against corruption. Friend, you can complete the National Survey on the Department of Justice by using the link below: **[https://lp.hillsdale.edu/department-of-justice-survey/](https://links.freedomnationtoday.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=be8a24493b13438a81a7074c92ed9f81&_e=HpqMT7iSrxnXJs3JqYY5sJcFv0r9-yO6tCtsA0JEo_1fEx5Aigt4i7Yc1gT-4N6ipX9KRifjSLRk6YbQDDXx6HdJs06NebdK4W5oUz3n09CMf19D5FN5l1QHoHX4lLY4GC44v9y5m5iMkOREtaM0Ou_0BFMwFDoyjdtvms0OWiR_Wm45f58fyCCZFl96kd-rgLYufZ62-8owIBaDTCoxkwfYdsA5S5Utf992A-aF8PSauZ3Z_7p1awxWf9VzD-XJbAkUTDn-9MYLbi7crmkN95qooiK-h7ucEl34da-57lTH495dFMpyY6Akk6GV9Q-8p9DD5nse5rD96rECz9MvWKW6akTnEGQ2-mXKNLE35UIVlglGLIuDNeQrco5ZiHXqjtreEBW-PMM9hmfnzHJDsQ%3D%3D)** The **Declaration of Independence** argues that **the purpose of just government is to secure our natural rights** and that **just government is founded on the consent of the governed.** Yet today's ruling class regularly disregards the will of the American people, and our rights--to the freedoms of speech, assembly, and religion, to due process, to gun ownership, and more--are under constant attack. **You and I know that liberty in America is under serious threat. But as I travel around the country, I tell the audiences I speak to how we are engaging in the fight against this threat.** A vital part of our efforts in this fight--in which Hillsdale College is a leader--is **reaching** and **teaching** millions of citizens, with the TRUTH about America's great heritage of liberty. We are heavily invested in our educational outreach efforts through our **Project to Defend Liberty Nationwide by Reaching and Teaching Millions.** These efforts include: **Teaching bright and principled students** --on our campuses in Hillsdale, Michigan, and Washington, D.C.--who receive a rigorous, **classical liberal arts education, including** a required course on the Constitution
**Distributing _Imprimis_** , America's leading digest of liberty, which is mailed to more than 6.4 million homes and businesses ten times per year; previous issues include "The Politicization of the Department of Justice" by Harmeet K. Dhillon
**Producing and promoting free online courses** for any citizen who wishes to learn, on topics such as the Constitution, American history, and free market economics
**Providing a classical K-12 curriculum** with a solid grounding in American history, constitutional government, and economics to schools that educate thousands of students nationwide After everything we've seen over the past few years, the need for Hillsdale's educational outreach efforts is undeniable. So please share your views by completing our **National Survey on the Department of Justice** and returning it to me as soon as possible. It will only take a few minutes of your time. Your completed survey will help us form the most effective strategy to **reach** and **teach** millions of Americans on behalf of liberty. As you might know, Hillsdale College is almost unique in American higher education in its refusal to accept EVEN ONE PENNY of government funding--not even indirectly in the form of federal or state student grants or loans. **This independence frees the College from burdensome and corrupting government regulations. But it also means that our work depends entirely on the generous support of private citizens, like you, who understand the importance of education to liberty.** If you agree that we are now seeing an unprecedented assault on the American way of life, I hope you will partner with Hillsdale College by making a generous tax-deductible gift today. You can easily do so after completing the attached **National Survey on the Department of Justice** , which you can access at this secure link: **[https://lp.hillsdale.edu/department-of-justice-survey/](https://links.freedomnationtoday.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=be8a24493b13438a81a7074c92ed9f81&_e=HpqMT7iSrxnXJs3JqYY5sJcFv0r9-yO6tCtsA0JEo_1fEx5Aigt4i7Yc1gT-4N6ipX9KRifjSLRk6YbQDDXx6HdJs06NebdK4W5oUz3n09CMf19D5FN5l1QHoHX4lLY4GC44v9y5m5iMkOREtaM0Ou_0BFMwFDoyjdtvms0OWiR_Wm45f58fyCCZFl96kd-rgLYufZ62-8owIBaDTCoxkwfYdsA5S5Utf992A-aF8PSauZ3Z_7p1awxWf9VzD-XJCycuZjxX5BhqflgCnQlbHO7qO0I2FJxCUmPDTvKA0f0EMMl8KOWuuvIBpQ6XVeE5X3BsUT9hXggcA7oUzU8NpT9sYLayxBbZuIfCFQ2uyq6iEgh0QjxHTDPvUWmcuXER-rxKy1XeuMAbFvRMpPPJwA%3D%3D)** Thank you for your time and attention. I look forward to receiving your completed survey, and I sincerely appreciate your support of Hillsdale's educational outreach efforts on behalf of liberty. Warm regards, Larry P. Arnn President, Hillsdale College Pursuing Truth and Defending Liberty Since 1844 |

clean_body: Please particpate in this survey on the Department of Justice. This sponsored message from Freedom Nation Today is on behalf of Hillsdale College Dear Fellow American, Before you move on to your next email--I would appreciate it if you would take a few moments to participate in Hillsdale College's National Survey on the Department of Justice. The survey will only take a few moments of your time, and its subject affects your liberty and the very survival of the rule of law in America. The current administration's weaponization of the Department of Justice is unprecedented in American history. Instead of protecting your God-given constitutional rights, the administration uses the Department of Justice to attack its political opponents... ...as well as Christians, parents, and anyone who dares to stand up for our constitutional liberties. At the same time, with the help of the media it... Covers up a two-tiered justice system that violates your constitutional rights Hides the corruption of the ruling class Attacks those with traditional viewpoints That's why I'm asking you to take the Hillsdale College National Survey on the Department of Justice. By completing this survey, you will help us more clearly understand the views of mainstream Americans like you on this critical issue. Your responses will help Hillsdale strengthen its nationwide educational outreach efforts on behalf of liberty--including the importance of the rule of law and checks and balances, which the American Founders saw as essential safeguards against corruption. Friend, you can complete the National Survey on the Department of Justice by using the link below: The Declaration of Independence argues that the purpose of just government is to secure our natural rights and that just government is founded on the consent of the governed. Yet today's ruling class regularly disregards the will of the American people, and our rights--to the freedoms of speech, assembly, and religion, to due process, to gun ownership, and more--are under constant attack. You and I know that liberty in America is under serious threat. But as I travel around the country, I tell the audiences I speak to how we are engaging in the fight against this threat. A vital part of our efforts in this fight--in which Hillsdale College is a leader--is reaching and teaching millions of citizens, with the TRUTH about America's great heritage of liberty. We are heavily invested in our educational outreach efforts through our Project to Defend Liberty Nationwide by Reaching and Teaching Millions. These efforts include: Teaching bright and principled students --on our campuses in Hillsdale, Michigan, and Washington, D.C.--who receive a rigorous, classical liberal arts education, including a required course on the Constitution Distributing Imprimis , America's leading digest of liberty, which is mailed to more than 6.4 million homes and businesses ten times per year; previous issues include "The Politicization of the Department of Justice" by Harmeet K. Dhillon Producing and promoting free online courses for any citizen who wishes to learn, on topics such as the Constitution, American history, and free market economics Providing a classical K-12 curriculum with a solid grounding in American history, constitutional government, and economics to schools that educate thousands of students nationwide After everything we've seen over the past few years, the need for Hillsdale's educational outreach efforts is undeniable. So please share your views by completing our National Survey on the Department of Justice and returning it to me as soon as possible. It will only take a few minutes of your time. Your completed survey will help us form the most effective strategy to reach and teach millions of Americans on behalf of liberty. As you might know, Hillsdale College is almost unique in American higher education in its refusal to accept EVEN ONE PENNY of government funding--not even indirectly in the form of federal or state student grants or loans. This independence frees the College from burdensome and corrupting government regulations. But it also means that our work depends entirely on the generous support of private citizens, like you, who understand the importance of education to liberty. If you agree that we are now seeing an unprecedented assault on the American way of life, I hope you will partner with Hillsdale College by making a generous tax-deductible gift today. You can easily do so after completing the attached National Survey on the Department of Justice , which you can access at this secure link: Thank you for your time and attention. I look forward to receiving your completed survey, and I sincerely appreciate your support of Hillsdale's educational outreach efforts on behalf of liberty. Warm regards, Larry P. Arnn President, Hillsdale College Pursuing Truth and Defending Liberty Since 1844 | Freedom Nation Today PO Box 2221 Fort Collins, CO 80522 | _

name: Open Letter to Joe Biden
subject: Declaring Easter trans day of visibility is a slap in the face to every Christian.
disclaimer_text: Paid for by the NRCC and not authorized by any candidate or candidate's committee
body:
We cannot sit silently. We must stand up for our faith!

|
---
| | |
Friend,

Joe Biden and the Radical Left’s latest attack on Christians and Easter Sunday cannot stand.

I can’t explain how grateful I am that you chose to read this email. Only about 30-40% of folks open these messages, and look I get it – there are a lot of political emails being sent these days.

| |
---
| | | Friend,

I can't explain how grateful I am that you chose to read this email. Only about 30-40% of folks open these messages, and look I get it - there are a lot of political emails being sent these days.

Unfortunately, I rely on emails, texts, mail, and phone calls to stay in touch with conservatives like you.

**With that being said, could you do me the simple favor of just reading this all the way through to the end?** If you get to the end and still don't think you have the power to make a difference, then I just want to thank you for your time.

While roughly 35% of supporters open these messages, only an average of 1% of supporters will step up to donate, which makes it difficult since I rely on Americans like you receiving this message to hit my fundraising goals.

I refuse to rely on billionaires and Wall Street executives for money. I want our conservative values fueled by the people who believe in them most - you and me.

**And you know what?** If everyone who opened this email gave just $1 - __one single dollar__ - we'd be able to hit all of our goals.

Growing up, my mom worked at a factory that made aluminum chairs and my father was a bartender. Their wages combined with their hard work allowed for them to buy a home and live in a good community.

**I 'm trying to restore America to the time when it wasn't unusual that a factory worker and a bartender could afford a home. I'd appreciate it if you could go above and beyond and donate the price of a roll of aluminum foil! [Democrats rely on billionaire megadonors who give thousands at a time. Dear Peter,
The Kennedy / Shanahan ticket is the Democrat Party's worst nightmare!
Not only does President Joe Biden continue to reject our requests for Secret Service protection, but the Democrat Political machine is pulling out every trick in the book to stop our huge momentum.
With endless resources, establishment Democrats want to stop a debate between Robert F. Kennedy, Jr. and Biden. They are using a vast network of shadowy dark money groups and vicious attorneys to keep Kennedy/Shanahan ticket off state ballots and spread malicious smears.
The old political guard is showing what it really thinks about the 52% of American voters who consider themselves “Independent.” Americans have seen how corrupt the two-party system has been.
No matter who is in the White House, they somehow support endless regime-change wars, pass mandates that restrict medical freedom, and the middle class continues to shrink.
_Because of Kennedy/Shanahan's incredible poll numbers_ , political entities are willing to spend millions of dollars on lawyers and ads to limit your choice for President. They want to silence your voice!
The Kennedy/Shanahan team is laser-focused on fixing the very real problems Americans face. Right now, more than half of all Americans can’t access $1,000 if faced with a crisis. And for younger generations, it is all but impossible to afford a home.
The unwavering generosity of friends like you has been invaluable to Team Kennedy. [Please stand with Robert F. Not only does President Joe Biden continue to reject our requests for Secret Service protection, but the Democrat Political machine is pulling out every trick in the book to stop our huge momentum. name: Donald Trump Jr.
subject: While there’s still time:
disclaimer_text: Paid for by TEAM SCALISE, a joint fundraising committee authorized by and to benefit SCALISE FOR CONGRESS and EYE OF THE TIGER PAC
body:
I’m blasting out this final message while there’s still time.

I’m blasting out this final email while there’s still time.

| |

---
| | | | [](http://e.americanbriefing.com/rd/9z2zmuupcqi1l4kvrmd8rtngf238gv45g3ld6s2tf9g_rp22sh2s8i6ep32c1jmaob2cth2bs "Donald Trump Jr.")
---

I'm blasting out this final message while there's still time.

**Let me make myself perfectly clear:** 11:59 PM (EST) on 04/30/2024 will be one of the single most important deadlines in the history of our country.

Why? Because it's the most important deadline since ** 1) ** my father officially became the GOP nominee for President, **2) ** my sister-in-law was voted in as the new RNC Co-Chair, and **3)** Joe Biden reported 150 million dollars to obliterate Conservatives up and down the ballot.

Every deadline between now and Election Day is critical, but NONE OF THEM are as important as this one.

_**[That's why I'm teaming up with my friend, Majority Leader Steve Scalise, to raise an emergency 50 thousand dollars between now and the end of the month. Do you think you could spare JUST a few bucks before then?](http://e.americanbriefing.com/rd/9z2zv1he6btmd9uv7vc3io1m05b9k2i9sb4v6p851a8_rp22sh2s8i6ep32c1jmaob2cth2bs "That’s why I’m teaming up with my friend, Majority Leader Steve Scalise, to raise an emergency 50 thousand dollars between now and the end of the month. Do you think you could spare JUST a few bucks before then?")**_
---
**[](http://e.americanbriefing.com/rd/9z2zk9v7flofes1b2dcqshp6v9emmjj7h88h4d2gqm8_rp22sh2s8i6ep32c1jmaob2cth2bs)[**YES**](http://e.americanbriefing.com/rd/9z2z9j4vtmqbif3r60uh3hfti4potnlccr06i4uak58_rp22sh2s8i6ep32c1jmaob2cth2bs) _[**NO**](http://e.americanbriefing.com/rd/9z2z9d2s6skvoccfi74ubit5omuks97qsimo2q9efrg_rp22sh2s8i6ep32c1jmaob2cth2bs)**
---
It really doesn't get more important than this. I mean it. That's why...

- Lara Trump emailed AND texted you
- Kristi Noem emailed AND texted you
- Mike Pompeo emailed AND texted you
- Mike Johnson emailed AND texted you
- Tim Scott emailed AND texted you
- Elise Stefanik emailed AND texted you

We only have a few precious days left before our all-important deadline.

**Not everyone opens these emails. Not everyone reads them through. And not everyone gets how important the next election is for our country ...****_[So we're all counting on those who understand what's at stake right now to pitch in.](http://e.americanbriefing.com/rd/9z2z0rafluavsrs21hdng5g44rq3v7o497lb8pu0qn8_rp22sh2s8i6ep32c1jmaob2cth2bs "So we’re all counting on those who understand what’s at stake right now to pitch in.")_ **

Can you help while there's still time?
---
**[](http://e.americanbriefing.com/rd/9z2z49ep7dtt3ffn2egf8ln546bd02qa0m26idn12vo_rp22sh2s8i6ep32c1jmaob2cth2bs)[**YES**](http://e.americanbriefing.com/rd/9z2z5th3atrkcgp6l0grps0mvmesjrpa7q1g4d5f8fo_rp22sh2s8i6ep32c1jmaob2cth2bs) _[**NO**](http://e.americanbriefing.com/rd/9z2zrhgi6k8g4tpkvcvoinqlop2k49n58vrt26rpm0o_rp22sh2s8i6ep32c1jmaob2cth2bs)**
---
Thanks for all you do for your country.

To victory,
Donald Trump Jr.

---
| |
* * *
---
| [](http://e.americanbriefing.com/rd/9z2zorgh4abs155lclkadtfd7bd2g47fap70inp7ot8_rp22sh2s8i6ep32c1jmaob2cth2bs "Please take my Election Year Check-In!")
---

This is Steve Scalise.

As your Majority Leader, I'm respectfully asking you to fill out my _**[ELECTION YEAR CHECK-IN](http://e.americanbriefing.com/rd/9z2z2jenfneenelu4lb52pfiles7vg4816ktkqivqsg_rp22sh2s8i6ep32c1jmaob2cth2bs "ELECTION YEAR CHECK-IN")**_ at your earliest convenience. It's important. I want to have your goals, your concerns, and your priorities in mind before I do anything else.

What would you like me to keep in mind when I'm taking on the Radical Democrats? | | [START MY ELECTION YEAR CHECK-IN >>](http://e.americanbriefing.com/rd/9z2z3kctgfn5bo8ahav86c6t5g86nu06ehtpsu27kl0_rp22sh2s8i6ep32c1jmaob2cth2bs "START MY ELECTION YEAR CHECK-IN")

name: Debbie Mucarsel-Powell
subject: breaking news from the Florida Supreme Court
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Debbie for Florida
body:
this ruling is not the end
| | |
---
Friend, the Florida Supreme Court just issued a ruling yesterday to uphold our state's 15-week abortion ban. **That means that in just 29 days, Ron DeSantis' 6-week ban will take effect — _with almost zero exceptions for rape or incest._**
This ruling is _**_not_**_ the end of our fight for reproductive rights. We can still defend our pro-choice Senate majority and codify reproductive freedom nationwide. Or things could go very differently:** We could lose our Senate majority, and Rick Scott could win enough votes to pass his nationwide ban on abortions, ending reproductive freedom across the country.**
**I'm fighting every day to defeat Rick Scott and save our Senate majority. But I need your help to win:**[Please, will you rush $5 before midnight tonight to help me flip Florida blue? The stakes are higher than ever now, so I've launched an emergency $100,000 goal, and I'm counting on your support to hit it.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/82189050/464626025/1820369458?amounts=5,25,50,100,250&amount=5&refcode=jtk853-fr-nd&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDYvMS8xMDc1MjUiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiOGY2OTAyODQtZWZmMC1lZTExLWFhZjItMDAyMjQ4MjIzMzUzIiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=H_s1FTlRXqny6gAFTOmVXF_GUlG7Oua2vScDTZd-g1o=)

| | [DONATE ANOTHER AMOUNT](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/82189054/464626029/1820369458?amounts=5,25,50,100,250&refcode=jtk853-fr-nd&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDYvMS8xMDc1MjUiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiOGY2OTAyODQtZWZmMC1lZTExLWFhZjItMDAyMjQ4MjIzMzUzIiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=H_s1FTlRXqny6gAFTOmVXF_GUlG7Oua2vScDTZd-g1o=)
---
Rick Scott is one of the most dangerous Senators in Washington. He co-sponsored a nationwide ban on abortions, and he proudly said that, were he governor of Florida, he would've signed that extreme 6-week ban.
Ya no más — _enough is enough._ I will always fight for our right to choose and defend our reproductive freedom. And polling shows that the majority of Florida voters are with me. Rick Scott has been living in a far-right extremism bubble — everyday families simply do not support his extreme, cruel, anti-choice agenda. That's why he's panicking and lying to voters about his horrible record.
Reproductive rights are a winning issue — we've seen it in almost every single election since Roe v. Wade was overturned. **That's why I'm working every single day to make sure that voters know the truth about Rick Scott and his extremist ideology.**

clean_body: this ruling is not the end | | | Friend, the Florida Supreme Court just issued a ruling yesterday to uphold our state's 15-week abortion ban. That means that in just 29 days, Ron DeSantis' 6-week ban will take effect — with almost zero exceptions for rape or incest. This ruling is not the end of our fight for reproductive rights. We can still defend our pro-choice Senate majority and codify reproductive freedom nationwide. Or things could go very differently: We could lose our Senate majority, and Rick Scott could win enough votes to pass his nationwide ban on abortions, ending reproductive freedom across the country. I'm fighting every day to defeat Rick Scott and save our Senate majority. But I need your help to win:= If you've saved payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: | | | = | | = | | = | | = Rick Scott is one of the most dangerous Senators in Washington. He co-sponsored a nationwide ban on abortions, and he proudly said that, were he governor of Florida, he would've signed that extreme 6-week ban. Ya no más — enough is enough. I will always fight for our right to choose and defend our reproductive freedom. And polling shows that the majority of Florida voters are with me. Rick Scott has been living in a far-right extremism bubble — everyday families simply do not support his extreme, cruel, anti-choice agenda. That's why he's panicking and lying to voters about his horrible record. Reproductive rights are a winning issue — we've seen it in almost every single election since Roe v. Wade was overturned. name: Steve Garvey
subject: Strike out Adam Schiff
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY STEVE GARVEY FOR U
body:
If you opened this email because you remember my playing days with the Dodgers and the Padres, thank you.

| |
---
| | [](https://click.americanupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=01%7c698466%7c210334%7c805%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=ZnofY72%2fX91s26yDyu8NEQ&sysid=1)
---
| | Dear Fellow Patriot, If you opened this email because you remember my playing days with the Dodgers and the Padres, thank you.
---
| | Having you and all of America’s baseball fans cheering for me and Davey Lopes, Bill Russell, Ron Cey and the rest of the guys as we battled Reggie Jackson, Thurman Munson and the Yankees... ...well, as they say, “Those were the days.” But this email isn’t about baseball. In fact, it’s a email I never thought I’d be writing to you.
---
| [](https://click.americanupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=01%7c698467%7c210334%7c805%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=mI864dkb1HJ2a3%2bYlpuDxQ&sysid=1)
---
| | **[Today, I’m asking you to help me defeat the radical Adam Schiff for a seat in the United States Senate.](https://click.americanupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=01%7c698468%7c210334%7c805%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=KSd6Ih4H%2bUgsNIBWIfCz3w&sysid=1)** As of March 5th, it’s official. I’m going head-to-head with Adam Schiff in November. Democrat policies have brought America to its knees. There’s fear of walking down the street because of rampant crime, homelessness, and drug addiction. The cost of living is exploding and for the first time causing more people to leave California. Joe Biden, Adam Schiff and the rest of the Democrats don’t care one bit that Americans are having a hard time. I’d go even further to say they welcome the misery so they can keep folks down and dependent. And that’s why I’m running for Senate. **_We Republicans_ pulled our country out of the 1970’s Democratic malaise by electing Ronald Reagan.** And I believe we can do it again by putting classic conservative values at the heart of everything we do. But there is no way I can pull it off without you. **[**Will you rush a contribution to my campaign of $35 or more today?**](https://click.americanupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=01%7c698469%7c210334%7c805%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=HiMYlzTgaPWAYXRvFnvGQg&sysid=1)** I’ve lived and worked in California for over 50 years, and I can tell you -\- voters here have had it with the Democrats like I’ve never seen before. They are hungry for change, and if you and I work together to reach voters in every neighborhood, on every beach, in every corner of California... I know we can turn this historic opportunity into a _**Republican win**_. I’m fighting for the soul of the state I love \-- but make no mistake -- I’m not just taking the field for Californians. When we win here... when we rip this seat out the hands of the radical Adam Schiff... **...we start the nationwide Republican Comeback Rally our country desperately needs.** Thank you and God Bless,
---
| | [](https://click.americanupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=01%7c698467%7c210334%7c805%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=mI864dkb1HJ2a3%2bYlpuDxQ&sysid=1)
---
Steve Garvey Republican for United States Senate
---
| [](https://click.americanupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=01%7c698460%7c210334%7c805%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=ItFC3eOwznGe0YzEGRuETw&sysid=1)
---
| | [**DONATE**](https://click.americanupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=01%7c698461%7c210334%7c805%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=TAgK0wiSzEDTQHrfEH%2bSAQ&sysid=1)
---
| | |
---
| | **PAID FOR BY STEVE GARVEY FOR U.S. SENATE**
---
PO Box 532389 Los Angeles, CA 90053-2389
---
| |
---
|
---

American Update
---
_PO Box 1188 Fort Collins, CO 80522_

name: Dana Criswell
subject: Civil Asset Forfeiture - Legal Theft
body:
Local government can take your stuff - Civil asset forfeiture is a controversial practice that allows law enforcement to seize property or assets from individuals suspected of being involved in criminal activity, even if they have not been charged or convicted of a crime.

---|---|---
civil asset Forfeiture
Civil asset forfeiture is an unconstitutional practice that allows law enforcement to seize property or assets from individuals **suspected** of being involved in criminal activity, **even if they have not been charged or convicted of a crime**. There are several reasons why civil asset forfeiture is bad:
**Violation of property rights:** Civil asset forfeiture can lead to the seizure of an individual's property without due process, which is a fundamental violation of property rights. This can result in innocent people losing their property without having the opportunity to defend themselves in court.
**Profit motive:** In many jurisdictions, law enforcement agencies are allowed to keep the proceeds from the sale of seized assets. This creates a profit motive for law enforcement to seize property, which can lead to abuse of the system and the targeting of individuals who may not be involved in criminal activity.
**Disproportionate impact on the poor:** Civil asset forfeiture disproportionately affects low-income individuals and minorities, who may not have the resources to fight the seizure of their property in court. This can exacerbate existing socioeconomic disparities and further erode trust in law enforcement.
**Lack of transparency and accountability:** The civil asset forfeiture process is often opaque, with limited public reporting on the number of seizures, the value of the assets seized, and how the proceeds are used. This lack of transparency can make it difficult to hold law enforcement agencies accountable for their actions.
**Burden of proof:** In civil asset forfeiture cases, the burden of proof is often on the property owner to prove that their property was not involved in criminal activity, rather than on the government to prove that it was. This reversal of the burden of proof can make it difficult for innocent property owners to recover their assets.
Overall, civil asset forfeiture has been criticized for violating property rights, creating a profit motive for law enforcement, disproportionately impacting the poor, lacking transparency and accountability, and placing an unfair burden of proof on property owners.
Don't think this can't happen in good ole' Mississippi? It happens every day, there are local police chiefs and sheriffs who assign an officer to review every traffic stop so they can determine if they want to seize the vehicle. They are stealing from citizens.

name: Conservative Intel
subject: Free eBook from Victor Davis Hanson: Dueling Populisms
body:
http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/p/vsHsINxiN_

Dear Friend, Populism is nothing new to world history. While it
can be easy to think about American politics as being divided
between the Left and the Right, the reality is much
different.

http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/p/osHsINxiN_

Dear
Friend,
Populism
is nothing new to world history. While it can be easy to think
about American politics as being divided between the Left and the
Right, the reality is much different. What we've really been
seeing is two sets of populist backlash against both the Democrat
and Republican establishment.

And
believe it or not, these tensions actually trace their roots back
to Roman times.

That's
why I'm sending you this email today.

I want to
make sure you get a free copy of one of our popular eBooks:
Dueling Populisms by Victor Davis Hanson.

Hanson is
a Hoover Senior Fellow and world-renowned historian, and I think
you'll get a lot out of his insights. Inside this important
eBook, you'll learn more about:

What
we can expect from a political climate ruled by movements that
rebel against both the establishment-and each other.
The
important parallels between these ancient movements and their
modern counterparts in both progressive and conservative
populism.
What
lies ahead for America as we revive these ancient tensions in our
culture.

You can
get your free copy of Dueling Populisms using this secure link:
https://resources.hoover.org/dueling-populisms-signup/.

And
please feel free to share this with your family and friends. It's
important that we recall the voices of experience and apply them
to contemporary conflicts and challenges.

You can
use this link to get access to your free eBook right now.

Thanks,
Greg

Greg
Stamps | Online Development
Hoover
Institution | Stanford University

With its
eminent scholars and world-renowned Library and Archives, the
Hoover Institution is a non-partisan, data-driven policy research
organization that seeks to improve the human condition by
advancing ideas that promote economic prosperity, national
security, and democratic governance. Over more than one hundred
years, Hoover's work has directly led to policies that have
produced greater freedom, democracy, and opportunity in the
United States and around the world.

name: Donald Trump Jr.
subject: While there’s still time:
disclaimer_text: Paid for by TEAM SCALISE, a joint fundraising committee authorized by and to benefit SCALISE FOR CONGRESS and EYE OF THE TIGER PAC
body:
I’m blasting out this final message while there’s still time.

I’m blasting out this final email while there’s still time.

| |

---
| | | | [](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2zp9l5f39c0ncng9v7hflt4dfhcciu9b28151brn0_rp22sh2s8i6ep32c1jmeoj2c5h2bs "Donald Trump Jr.")
---

I'm blasting out this final message while there's still time.

**Let me make myself perfectly clear:** 11:59 PM (EST) on 04/30/2024 will be one of the single most important deadlines in the history of our country.

Why? Because it's the most important deadline since ** 1) ** my father officially became the GOP nominee for President, **2) ** my sister-in-law was voted in as the new RNC Co-Chair, and **3)** Joe Biden reported 150 million dollars to obliterate Conservatives up and down the ballot.

Every deadline between now and Election Day is critical, but NONE OF THEM are as important as this one.

_**[That's why I'm teaming up with my friend, Majority Leader Steve Scalise, to raise an emergency 50 thousand dollars between now and the end of the month. Do you think you could spare JUST a few bucks before then?](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2zpgbkg6s7o69aaoirjj7ca6kd69584p0iua695po_rp22sh2s8i6ep32c1jmeoj2c5h2bs "That’s why I’m teaming up with my friend, Majority Leader Steve Scalise, to raise an emergency 50 thousand dollars between now and the end of the month. Do you think you could spare JUST a few bucks before then?")**_
---
**[](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2zbhn3rlja2rn9jsrmq9memlba52gtl5n0opek16g_rp22sh2s8i6ep32c1jmeoj2c5h2bs)[**YES**](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2z0pu0k8sufl3ocdb4qopvnodp6j4sn08cutph9tg_rp22sh2s8i6ep32c1jmeoj2c5h2bs) _[**NO**](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2zvc4aq6q79mtl6r9quefs9ru9nqab5javint5aio_rp22sh2s8i6ep32c1jmeoj2c5h2bs)**
---
It really doesn't get more important than this. I mean it. That's why...

- Lara Trump emailed AND texted you
- Kristi Noem emailed AND texted you
- Mike Pompeo emailed AND texted you
- Mike Johnson emailed AND texted you
- Tim Scott emailed AND texted you
- Elise Stefanik emailed AND texted you

We only have a few precious days left before our all-important deadline.

**Not everyone opens these emails. Not everyone reads them through. And not everyone gets how important the next election is for our country ...****_[So we're all counting on those who understand what's at stake right now to pitch in.](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2zba19sbfe0a0vdgopm8a19ul7nslo5o46g1jdp90_rp22sh2s8i6ep32c1jmeoj2c5h2bs "So we’re all counting on those who understand what’s at stake right now to pitch in.")_ **

Can you help while there's still time?
---
**[](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2zs3b2m0c72cng4369g4u0juu4l9qc9kolv2bgc10_rp22sh2s8i6ep32c1jmeoj2c5h2bs)[**YES**](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2zfisjtffmdlp4v03mvphcaga48ekf9jk77458mj0_rp22sh2s8i6ep32c1jmeoj2c5h2bs) _[**NO**](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2zcli3ol84sh8flkp1c775le5o5oem7ht62p1d380_rp22sh2s8i6ep32c1jmeoj2c5h2bs)**
---
Thanks for all you do for your country.

To victory,
Donald Trump Jr.

---
| |
* * *
---
| [](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2zvbsu1pspkqkgtsaveg6k5idafe2l1urr6mo67b0_rp22sh2s8i6ep32c1jmeoj2c5h2bs "Please take my Election Year Check-In!")
---

This is Steve Scalise.

As your Majority Leader, I'm respectfully asking you to fill out my _**[ELECTION YEAR CHECK-IN](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2zjt3e03vv6kb9bgv6klnht6traevoallfojv61sg_rp22sh2s8i6ep32c1jmeoj2c5h2bs "ELECTION YEAR CHECK-IN")**_ at your earliest convenience. It's important. I want to have your goals, your concerns, and your priorities in mind before I do anything else.

What would you like me to keep in mind when I'm taking on the Radical Democrats? | | [START MY ELECTION YEAR CHECK-IN >>](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2zphuci1fs56jcv70u4ereprjo7scca5g1bgk9ul0_rp22sh2s8i6ep32c1jmeoj2c5h2bs "START MY ELECTION YEAR CHECK-IN")
---

---

Team Scalise is committed to defending our Conservative House majority and electing Conservatives across the country. Thank you for being a part of our movement.

Contributions to TEAM SCALISE, or any participating committee, are not deductible as charitable contributions for federal income tax purposes. name: Jacky Rosen
subject: Brand-new TV ads
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Rosen for Nevada
body:
Can I count on your help as I fight to get my message out to voters?
| | |
---
I have big news, friend:** we are launching _brand-new_ TV ads to reach voters and defend my must-win seat here in Nevada!**
I'm officially the most vulnerable woman in the Senate, and Republicans are zeroing in on this race. So if we're going to keep this seat blue, we need to get our message out to as many people as possible. **That's why I'm urgently asking:[Will you rush $5 now to keep our new TV ads on the air?](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/82190847/464631235/-2085285190?amounts=250,100,50,25,5&amount=5&refcode=jtk3617-fr-nd&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDAvMS84ODI5OCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJlNmI5YTE5Yi1mMWYwLWVlMTEtYWFmMi0wMDIyNDgyMjMzNTMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=0_3k-aWXt_EYoz8ozrKTXi2UZbbOjY-7NuUnrP3WImw=)**

But experts say I’m one of the most vulnerable senators up for reelection, and the GOP is zeroing in on me as a top target for defeat.
