name: =?utf-8?Q?Chairman=20Eric=20Underwood?=
subject: ☕Coffee w/ the Chairman
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY THE REPUBLICAN PARTY of NEBRASKA ()
body:
Nebraska taxation has reached EPIC proportions

View this email in your browser (https://mailchi.mp/19d2800465b4/n41kepo7ku-12688945?e=25844e23a8)
https://ne.gop/?utm_source=Nebraska+Republican+Party&utm_campaign=ddf99cc1dc-EMAIL_CAMPAIGN_1_2_2024_7_59_COPY_01&utm_medium=email&utm_term=0_72fdf24cb0-ddf99cc1dc-21732365

** Good Morning Republicans,
------------------------------------------------------------
Over the last two years I have gained context and incite into the difference between traditional institutional politics and an ever increasing awareness to what I call Value & Solutions Driven politics. This is the difference between having objectives of just winning elections for the sake of winning OR seeking to make a difference as an elected representative of, by, and for the people.
Even more obvious now is the idea of being King-Makers versus Difference-Makers.
In my opinion the objective of running for political office by some, not all, had nothing to do with representing the interests of Nebraskans at large. Somewhere in the realm of herd mentality, echo chambers, or group think tanks comes the notion to present oneself (the candidate or incumbent) as "qualified" just to WIN an election. Once you've won said election, you've somehow become exponentially more informed and know what's BEST beyond the scope of what the general voter can fathom.
We have to think bigger than JUST to win ELECTIONS in 2024. We have to have objectives to achieve. Donations for the party must have a CLEAR and understood return on the investment! This is why I spend much of my time educating and communicating the objectives of the party. This is why fundraising for the State and county party's from THE PEOPLE will make a DIFFERENCE to achieve our objectives.
What is even the goal or objective of the state party?
To paraphrase, the NEGOP's constitutional objective is... "the maintenance of the government of, by, and for the people...and the furtherance of our principles (within the community)". We have to constantly communicate our Platform Values (https://ne.gop/issues/?utm_source=Nebraska+Republican+Party&utm_campaign=ddf99cc1dc-EMAIL_CAMPAIGN_1_2_2024_7_59_COPY_01&utm_medium=email&utm_term=0_72fdf24cb0-ddf99cc1dc-21732365) if we are to further our principles within the community. Because if we do not honor our platform and use it as a guiding document to the elected positions, then what makes a Republican a Republican?
Our Unicameral is in its waning days for this legislative cycle. 49 elected representatives of 1,960,000 Nebraskans of which, 1,227,000 are registered voters, of which 602,000 are registered Republicans. Each district represents roughly 40,000 Nebraskans and as I've stated in previous emails, almost 40 of the 49 Districts have a Republican voter advantage. By and large, when a candidate campaigns and communicates their party affiliation it is a representation of the principles of the party. Voters, by and large, will ask two types of questions...Are you Republican or Democrat? AND then they'll ask a PRINCIPLE based question...such as... Are you Pro-Life or Pro-2nd Amendment? Voters ask a PRINCIPLE based question because they want to know IF you represent THEIR values.
This week TAXATION will consume a vast majority of the conversations at the Unicameral. I'm deeply concerned about the outcome of this week. As a state we rely so much on property taxes for funding. We are taxed where live, how much we earn, and what we buy. Simply...the vast majority of Nebraskans are struggling. This is not a subjective truth or exaggeration... it is THE reality for most. I believe Nebraskans are inherently conservative in budgeting between Needs and Wants, but the needs of living in Nebraska, such as rent, food, gas, and basic life necessities are outweighing the INCOME of the people. And, unfortunately, the answer is NOT going to be easy to solve this problem BECAUSE...when there is money (YOUR money) involved, values (and the people) take a back seat. So, someone, somewhere, somehow is going to have to sacrifice if livability of the Good Life is to have a future.
In addition to the basics life struggles, I have mentioned in previous emails proactive preparation for the State of Nebraska as a whole. I referenced multiple global military actions and why there doesn't seem to be a larger, proactive approach to mitigating the effects. I believe there is very little being discussed for the State as a whole and most Nebraskans are not prepared economically for what will happen if certain Worldwide military actions play out.
We are an agricultural state and some of our Ag income comes from overseas purchases. We have global partners that are in the Billions of dollars. If military action occurs on an ever increasing world-wide scale, how Nebraskans are taxed will impact daily lives even more dramatically. Where the State of Nebraska finds its revenue for the multi-billion TAX PAYER funded "government" will become a pressure cooker. Reality, a financial reality, will be something we can't blame on President Biden or Democratic policies...we have to look in the mirror.
The #1 concern in this area is China and Taiwan. China is preparing itself LEGALLY, militarily, financially and if need be, securing years of food and energy for a lengthy invasion. This threat of invasion could be a catalyst for other military action around the world, comparable to WW2. There is not enough discussion and education on China's president Xi and again, the greatest concern to Nebraska is our partnership with Taiwan.
The discussion then on TAXATION has to return to common sense solutions and a grounding, foundational set of documents that we can hold each other accountable to. I attached some talking points that citizens can use to help guide conversations about Taxation. The Republican platform, both National and State give very clear GUIDELINES on how to govern, but Republicans lawmakers will have to determine if they will honor these Republican Principles.
>From the NEGOP Platform on Economic Development, Fiscal Responsibility, & State Government
Plank: Economic Development
The Nebraska Republican Party is dedicated to principles of full employment and the creation of economic opportunity for all citizens of Nebraska through the free enterprise system. We strongly support the free enterprise system as the best path to prosperity in the history of humanity. Burdensome taxes and regulations that unduly interfere with and impede free market economics because these government burdens decrease opportunity and increase suffering...We support the establishment of fair and equitable policies of taxation and the promotion of business expansion. We encourage the use of common sense in both the elimination and enforcement of governmental regulation.
Plank: Fiscal Responsibility
The Nebraska Republican Party believes less government is preferred. Government should make a dedicated effort to responsibly spend tax revenue. Public participation in every aspect of the budget process should be strongly encouraged and facilitated.
State Government
We encourage our state leaders to continue to pursue the reduction of taxes for the benefit of our state. Any state revenues above reasonable reserves should be returned to Nebraska taxpayers. We support the repeal of the state inheritance tax and commend the Legislature for repealing the estate tax...Nebraska remains a high-tax state, and we call upon the Governor and the Legislature to lower taxes and control spending in our state.
We urge the continual review of all tax entities in local and state government with the objective of eliminating unnecessary taxation and require all elected state officials to evaluate tax-spending policies to reduce property, sales and income tax and to reduce the size of state government when appropriate or necessary.
Our National Republican Platform is 67 pages and was last updated in 2016, yet the PRINCIPLES are even more relevant today than those documented after the 8 years of the Obama Presidency. See below a few simple ideas on Republican Taxation Principles that Republican representatives should be using as references towards taxation solutions.

I said something in my very first press conference back in July of 2022 that I guess was controversial...I referenced that I wanted "the people to be considered the special interest group lawmakers listen to". The push back was that...how dare I say that and what special interest group is he REALLY referencing. I will reiterate it again, I believe the PEOPLE of Nebraska and obviously, the membership which I represent (Republicans) should be one of the main "special interest" group that has the highest valued relationship with law makers, board members, and all elected officials.
The Government is the servant to the People and their voices and values should be listened to throughout the tenure of an elected officials term, not just when there is the need for donations or votes to get elected.
Our State Convention is May 18th and we have an awesome Featured Speaker - Lt. General Michael Flynn! We will be showing his movie "Flynn - Deliver the Truth. Whatever the Cost." on Friday night, May 17th including a Q&A session

FLYNN Movie Premiere Tour
Friday, May 17^th Lincoln, NE
5:00pm Doors open
5:00pm – 6:15pm Meet & Greet
6:30pm Movie starts
8:30pm Q&A session
9:00pm Event ends

name: Chuck Schumer
subject: You stood out to me... -
disclaimer_text: Paid for by the DSCC | PO Box 96047, Washington, DC 20090 | **[dscc
body:
| | | It's Sen. Schumer.

I'm between meetings, so I'll make this quick: Your name is on our list of inactive Democratic memberships for April, and I need to make sure you activate your membership before the midnight deadline.

If we want to save the Senate** _again_** this year, we need to begin laying the groundwork immediately. Voting rights, reproductive justice, President Biden's judicial nominees, and our ultra-slim Democratic majority are all on the line. We can't afford for anyone to sit on the sidelines!

**Your membership has never been more critical. Please, use this custom link to activate right now:**

Peter,

**We’re thrilled to announce our endorsement of Shomari Figures in Alabama’s 2nd newly reshaped congressional district!**

Figures is an Obama administration alum who previously worked for the Justice Department, and the son of two Alabama state senators. Just like his parents, he has dedicated his career to public service, helping to implement legislation like the Affordable Care Act and addressing issues that support students and teachers, expanded access to quality healthcare, increased job and workforce opportunities, and building stronger, safer communities.

A Democratic victory for AL-02 would mean the election of a _**SECOND**_ Black Alabama member of Congress — a monumental achievement for representation and progress. If elected, Figures would be serving a district that covers the state capital of Montgomery, Mobile, and parts of the Black Belt.

Listen, Peter, after battling Alabama Republicans at the Supreme Court to secure a second majority-Black congressional district, we cannot let this hard-fought victory go to waste. **We need a candidate who will bring real representation to the state and flip this district from red to blue.**

This is our chance to make sure Black voters in Alabama have their voices represented in Congress and finally have the political power they rightfully deserve. **[Pitch in $10 right now between The Collective PAC and Shomari Figures to help us flip AL-02 and bring real representation to Washington>>>](https://an.collectivepac.org/ss/c/u001.iIBo0N5fSFzEFL40Tn-vtbMETCUYClkOrOh9-SNJfqvfdh0fv4-ZWp0d2-eweRJuWHIJaUDCMm4X8jFuv2Q2tPptvYn7M5EI_6uZN9GB-VxriWECQ6WEIRua57j6uW5TwzbBI4SG_y5uoOisQKjqGGI1vcbO-9ms-68ZT0lfTgYSsYK6lI-qZ-4JyWVMQSAn5-TMcFxzdKQTI795vJStCRRCibOfJW_qin72FC6g4vtBlXYH0bjDUzR5zR9UyszHObKhquzQXxz3a0vLoyT1xyFgTgQP2lwk5AbOMkTXK4DWwtMSt5asgKVUg3h9B_oO8JiozJ6Td3zAuCzHT2AhMWrLGA7WusiuuJybNrRBBf4UgYeBqIbPkjePS3Clux9EekwMjllUZByyKBMS6pLTCLP9NwOs7669NwL_LnJA2O8vKgcjcxYlXPlmGC4X58yqQa8SMAqWdX9W36oLpCkb2A/456/ttrJCS9aTbObRQM928bNSA/h9/h001.S5Sr0QuL4qZjpLjJ5uT8LgM5O0EYwAHqP9wPYL8cFoc)**

clean_body: | | If you want to help The Collective PAC build Black political power up and down the ballot, and across the country, then you’re in the right place. If you'd like to unsubscribe | | | BIG NEWS, PETER! We’re endorsing Shomari Figures for Congress in AL-02! | If you've stored your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will be processed immediately and split between Shomari Figures and The Collective PAC. | | | | | | Peter, We’re thrilled to announce our endorsement of Shomari Figures in Alabama’s 2nd newly reshaped congressional district! Figures is an Obama administration alum who previously worked for the Justice Department, and the son of two Alabama state senators. Just like his parents, he has dedicated his career to public service, helping to implement legislation like the Affordable Care Act and addressing issues that support students and teachers, expanded access to quality healthcare, increased job and workforce opportunities, and building stronger, safer communities. A Democratic victory for AL-02 would mean the election of a SECOND Black Alabama member of Congress — a monumental achievement for representation and progress. If elected, Figures would be serving a district that covers the state capital of Montgomery, Mobile, and parts of the Black Belt. Listen, Peter, after battling Alabama Republicans at the Supreme Court to secure a second majority-Black congressional district, we cannot let this hard-fought victory go to waste. We need a candidate who will bring real representation to the state and flip this district from red to blue. This is our chance to make sure Black voters in Alabama have their voices represented in Congress and finally have the political power they rightfully deserve. If you've stored your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will be processed immediately and split between Shomari Figures and The Collective PAC. | | | | | | Thank you, The Collective PAC The Collective PAC is strategically focused on creating a truly equitable democracy where our nation’s local, state and federal governments have diverse and talented elected leadership and Black people are fully represented in positions of power to create the policies necessary to progress our communities forward. Since our inception in 2016, we have helped 110 candidates win general elections at the local, state and federal levels. name: Senator Kennedy
subject: I need someone to lend an ear
disclaimer_text: Paid for by John Kennedy for Us
body:
I'm up a creek without a paddle, and my pirogue just sprung a huge leak. I'm giving it all I got to stand up for you and our Conservative values, but

| [](https://click.gopactionalert.com/u/click?_t=093aa899b2bd42648f5b5caa6c6024d8&_m=15263d6e31094d0694d9d0c1eae3f87d&_e=uVlF5KQFiPZ4jVQs5yrTt4TH-y7ejawl45AdyURjZ5Uop-X2sKlfKcQQM52cCuOehOGJxGlWOCPUYht20UxiDVoLg1ASu_o1mHkLn6rF61j1Aw8dR8Ytsz_sijd0u_iEzp0dn6qqKr_xZrv1fHpJzmUDXINcX5w45iXjWULiZSyaQmAMSS6MrNNSGEvGnhZtuh0rjys5PKqNmNZ_571nVUA1RHslpl5xY9nMd9x7Cdz2NZimeatEiQEHxTd9SiyQJXFHYIHG0ccPPumNJir3W53_OyyaMhMWu7w70Ea5VJMIyr-JgLaiMgJFvAittIW587ivxF6kVnUj98PIBlth5hu0D4DXRTm_W-P93gA4wafZmrvl2Hh-wStWdbztMn7u3AJYdIzwcLfbEvlXAJHHrg%3D%3D)
---
Folks,

I'm up a creek without a paddle, and my pirogue just sprung a huge leak.

I'm giving it all I got to stand up for you and our Conservative values, but everywhere I turn, there are more and more of them woke loonies.

I can manage to hold down the front lines, but I won’t be able to much longer without the resources and support from strong, conservative patriots like yourself.

Friend, even if you can chip in $1, it’ll go a long way in eliminating woke ideologies from the halls of our government!

Chip in here: **[[Link]](https://click.gopactionalert.com/u/click?_t=093aa899b2bd42648f5b5caa6c6024d8&_m=15263d6e31094d0694d9d0c1eae3f87d&_e=uVlF5KQFiPZ4jVQs5yrTt4TH-y7ejawl45AdyURjZ5Uop-X2sKlfKcQQM52cCuOehOGJxGlWOCPUYht20UxiDVoLg1ASu_o1mHkLn6rF61j1Aw8dR8Ytsz_sijd0u_iEzp0dn6qqKr_xZrv1fHpJzmUDXINcX5w45iXjWULiZSyaQmAMSS6MrNNSGEvGnhZt2nmYvHFTSZqmIs6k1LDqsbRIVHjmekf8lhervKUzGKWK-6wrqrcF-rwB7fEEJdImTqGjIsC9PTAn6Q4DMPt2gX3dEvq6LdykgXDXajjFZQ82BGhU1ooAQJzOltmiQEHn8lXpGo6SJfa6tVa8aK8Sam8goT07R76PVPyNLyILTGMMabaXv3J0b2QAg6MM6l7L)**

I won’t take up any more of your precious time, but just know I rely on folks like you who are willing to do what it takes to preserve American Freedom!

God Bless,

$25. If you knew that making a $25 contribution would mean Donald Trump never set foot in the White House again, wouldn't it be the best $25 you ever spent? If you knew that contributing $25 meant continued progress in addressing climate change and lowering the cost of prescription drugs, wouldn't you pitch in? If you knew that $25 would defend our democracy from the MAGA extremists who work overtime to rig the game to protect their power, wouldn't it be worth it? Now, we know that $25 might not seem like it can do all of those things... But by the time you read this, a lot of folks have chipped in $25 of their own. And now they're counting on you to join them. Because there's only one way we'll reelect Joe Biden and keep Trump out of the White House -- and that's by working together. So, please: [**Can President Biden count on you to contribute $25 -- or whatever you can afford -- today? Josh Hawley has built his career on a control-obsessed crusade to outlaw reproductive healthcare. Now, it's a [threat to IVF](https://substack.com/redirect/bed23443-df47-482b-bd42-06d33f4958b3?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg) and to women across the country.
That's why we launched a new TV ad to hold Hawley accountable and get this message in front of voters: **Missouri can't risk giving Hawley's crusade against reproductive rights another six years in the U.S. Senate.**
Watch our latest ad today:
[](https://substack.com/redirect/e08d4b2d-7c93-4063-aadc-9630e341d3ee?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)
The stakes are too great to remain on the sidelines this year. As Missouri's next United States Senator, I will always fight for everyday people to have the power to make decisions about their own bodies, families, and lives.
###
Thank you for subscribing to my Substack! If you would like to further support my campaign to defeat Josh Hawley and flip Missouri's U.S. Senate seat, please consider chipping in $5 or whatever you can afford today:

subject: Reserve Your “Western Heritage” DVD Set
body:
And every academic year, I’m reminded of the joy it is to pursue the answers to questions like “Does God exist? Can we know God?” with my students.

| | | | _Please see a special message from our sponsor. If you would like to unsubscribe, visit this[link](http://links.newsletter.conservativedirect.com/e/encryptedUnsubscribe?_r=5b1853ae48754bee8f471363fe4933a9&_s=58cf6b76013646fd88da15de59a3542e&_t=xtlLCa8NCbYgdeY7itdd2QpTvD4lWs14KqU0ge8-mc6Ux2G-Nl3YxawoLFUWBoG9GHVHHsUjIc_X59Ny3DeAD-Z5CHD-Q47LV6Ge_IB36NI%3D)_
---
[](http://links.newsletter.conservativedirect.com/u/click?_t=5b1853ae48754bee8f471363fe4933a9&_m=58cf6b76013646fd88da15de59a3542e&_e=dYVEMZzCi66BWIld6eV-WsjJBuFcBQYvthZMfm10nxvI97ZW8aXI5IbcPdYCeS1tHMlP_Bseb5mpP4PoHq3iHJM3S5bfC-aKo3YUPtTsCKKEURzGg1ZtuOkDyeT6xCzH9PF05b0WnTbdeMp5rdt9QayCJ8413uG8nHuu7qiBHzoZfewu9H20qeDNimncgnhFYI-nI75kXul_N_zQL9RRtvyf_mqO2qw2Bo1x5vuFHRZySfRH9MFpdaAgIMXT2EKoVemgVVxPTqU582Xi94OiAr8OpvlpR7cZ_3elQfR78MDzx_jmJiX4bUmn5x6Jh_cmM5MsDqevzpNGfiI2qpMjk3BsNfiqB3krhZDJbP7TSr6uMPFcFDeSrAErrp54PrF_BMIVzH6Yo1FbSBOdf2tKrf1TF66Qu39POXB5-j-DXy4%3D)
| |
Dear Friend,

Every Hillsdale College student is required to take a class on the Western heritage in order to graduate. And every academic year, I'm reminded of the joy it is to pursue the answers to questions like "_Does God exist? Can we know God?_ " with my students.

These questions are at the core of what it means to be human - both in our relationship with each other and with God. [ ](http://links.newsletter.conservativedirect.com/u/click?_t=5b1853ae48754bee8f471363fe4933a9&_m=58cf6b76013646fd88da15de59a3542e&_e=dYVEMZzCi66BWIld6eV-WsjJBuFcBQYvthZMfm10nxvI97ZW8aXI5IbcPdYCeS1tHMlP_Bseb5mpP4PoHq3iHJM3S5bfC-aKo3YUPtTsCKKEURzGg1ZtuOkDyeT6xCzH9PF05b0WnTbdeMp5rdt9QayCJ8413uG8nHuu7qiBHzoZfewu9H20qeDNimncgnhFYI-nI75kXul_N_zQL9RRtvyf_mqO2qw2Bo1x5vuFHRZySfRH9MFpdaAgIMXT2EKoVemgVVxPTqU582Xi94OiAmu-Ft9LyESc-WiEPfAFKN1QpZUXJg9w_7Lap67PQTkurFKktRrglsRwLAzLpzGU7PNiWFiqRomSpwCqLW_bQWxYNUzqmJ_VGoCDVTfaCNIMq2qd2mmPKMjkGKeyW6HPiWLT0TQ_qIAuRPJLzzEI96M%3D)
Today, I want to offer you that same experience by sending you [**a limited-edition DVD box set of Hillsdale's popular online course, "Western Heritage - From the Book of Genesis to John Locke,"**](http://links.newsletter.conservativedirect.com/u/click?_t=5b1853ae48754bee8f471363fe4933a9&_m=58cf6b76013646fd88da15de59a3542e&_e=dYVEMZzCi66BWIld6eV-WsjJBuFcBQYvthZMfm10nxvI97ZW8aXI5IbcPdYCeS1tHMlP_Bseb5mpP4PoHq3iHJM3S5bfC-aKo3YUPtTsCKKEURzGg1ZtuOkDyeT6xCzH9PF05b0WnTbdeMp5rdt9QayCJ8413uG8nHuu7qiBHzoZfewu9H20qeDNimncgnhFYI-nI75kXul_N_zQL9RRtvyf_mqO2qw2Bo1x5vuFHRZySfRH9MFpdaAgIMXT2EKoVemgVVxPTqU582Xi94OiAsMS5FTjbTnk5k2bnaYGEhp-rsxbUwT94-odXIsFt0vceCmfpiF6t-Ey8MNeVdqu8inRCvLRWtFyeRePgwmXni9WKNoT3FBED1mTLcl6jbwou3p0KOqadMgE0-NV25r_wu6ASTaQKl7DmpuVCHOCY8Y%3D) as a token of our thanks for a generous contribution in support of Hillsdale's efforts to educate America.

I invite you to study the history of the "big questions" with my colleagues and me.

More than 2,000 people have already requested theirs, so make sure to get your set before they are all gone.

Reserve your DVD set now using this secure link: **[https://secure.hillsdale.edu/support-western-heritage-dvd](http://links.newsletter.conservativedirect.com/u/click?_t=5b1853ae48754bee8f471363fe4933a9&_m=58cf6b76013646fd88da15de59a3542e&_e=dYVEMZzCi66BWIld6eV-WsjJBuFcBQYvthZMfm10nxvI97ZW8aXI5IbcPdYCeS1tHMlP_Bseb5mpP4PoHq3iHJM3S5bfC-aKo3YUPtTsCKKEURzGg1ZtuOkDyeT6xCzH9PF05b0WnTbdeMp5rdt9QayCJ8413uG8nHuu7qiBHzoZfewu9H20qeDNimncgnhFYI-nI75kXul_N_zQL9RRtvyf_mqO2qw2Bo1x5vuFHRZySfRH9MFpdaAgIMXT2EKoVemgVVxPTqU582Xi94OiAvU_h2bW-CrcuRrRykXDriNYAyQ5rhbm9RCbadtsrLijwbZHTefyGc8txjU0mm_UO47mmwN6on57yMLB_qfXzJyw4-LshWpPnOjkTWwNzrP_ledimcRRC27WO2xYKXTtT57HzuqBWSh14FjOdegcdxg%3D)**

Warm regards,

Larry P. Arnn
President, Hillsdale College
---

name: Eddie Seay
subject: One last push!
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Freedom Virginia, Inc
body:
https://www.everyaction.com/ [https://www.everyaction.com/]
Friends-
We are in the final days before Governor Youngkins veto deadline. Our bills are still alive and waiting on the Governor's desk to be signed.
Less than one week to urge Youngkin to sign our bills, and we need your help to make this the loudest week yet. Can you help us flood the Governors inbox? [https://linktr.ee/freedomvaadvocacy]
We are advocating for three bills to be signed into law
*
The
Prescription
Drug
Affordability
Board
[https://lis.virginia.gov/cgi-bin/legp604.exe?241+sum+HB570]
*
Paid
Family
and
Medical
Leave
[https://lis.virginia.gov/cgi-bin/legp604.exe?241+sum+SB373]
The Prescription Drug Affordability Board would create an independent review board of health and medical experts that will investigate why certain prescription medications have such high costs. This bill will bring down the cost of living in VIrginia by bringing down the cost of medicine!
Paid Family and Medical Leave would create an opt-in insurance program for businesses so that they can provide all their employees with paid time off to care for their families. No one should have to make the choice between a necessary paycheck and caring for themselves or a loved one.
We want Virginians to tell Governor Youngkin what these bills mean to them and why they’re smart for our Commonwealth. We’ve made it easy by creating pre-filled emails [https://linktr.ee/freedomvaadvocacy] ! You can customize the language to fit your story or you can send it as-is, all you need to do is fill in your name and email address.
Tell Governor Youngkin to sign these bills into law! [https://linktr.ee/freedomvaadvocacy]
Thank you for your support!
Eddie Seay
Organizing Director
https://www.facebook.com/TeamFreedomVA [https://www.facebook.com/TeamFreedomVA] https://twitter.com/TeamFreedomVa [https://twitter.com/TeamFreedomVa] https://instagram.com/teamfreedomva [https://instagram.com/teamfreedomva]
Paid for by Freedom Virginia, Inc.
Freedom Virginia

Norfolk, VA 23513
United States

body:

Hey there team: I just got some really important news!!
A new poll shows this race is in a dead heat – this is HUGE!
But there's about 50% of folks that are undecided on how they will vote. And I intend to prove to them why I'm the best candidate for the job. But I need your help to do it.
Will you rush $10 (honestly, $20 would be amazing!) to split between my campaign and Seth Moulton? I've got to raise $50,000 so I can keep knocking on doors, placing yard signs, and hopefully launch some TV ads, and I've got to do it by midnight! [http://secure.actblue.com/donate/m24-dunn]
Donate [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/m24-dunn]
I'm not a tenured politician – but I am a tenured public servant.
I don't have some long history of being bought by this lobby or that lobby, but I do have a long history of protecting our democracy.
On January 6, I protected our democracy, our Capitol, and everyone inside of it with my own two hands.
And every day since then, I've been ringing the alarm bells. Our democracy will not survive if we don't put people who intend to protect it in power.
I'm ready to make my return to the Capitol and polls show that a lot of Marylanders agree. We can't slow down right now, not with an end-of-quarter deadline looming. Please, will you rush $10 right now to be split between my campaign and Seth Moulton? [http://secure.actblue.com/donate/m24-dunn]
💙,
Harry

body:

| | We’ve recently put together some new campaign ads, and I’m confident they’ll be a critical part of our success during the final 6 weeks before the primary. _But that’s the easy part, Peter —**the hard part is getting the ads in front of voters.**_ Since day 1, we’ve known that this would be an incredibly close race, and that success is inextricably tied to our ability to get our Maryland-first message out far and wide. **These ads are a big part of that game plan, which is why we’ve set a 24-Hour Fund Our Ads Goal![Will you please be one of the first supporters to chip in a quick $10 or $25 toward our $10,000 goal?](https://act.angelaalsobrooks.com/go/16972?t=12&amount=10&akid=1328%2E52803%2E7re3F_)** | | | [Donate $10](https://act.angelaalsobrooks.com/go/16972?t=13&amount=10&akid=1328%2E52803%2E7re3F_)
---
| | [Donate $25](https://act.angelaalsobrooks.com/go/16972?t=14&amount=25&akid=1328%2E52803%2E7re3F_)
---
| | [Other Amount](https://act.angelaalsobrooks.com/go/16972?t=15&amount=35&akid=1328%2E52803%2E7re3F_)
---
If you can believe it, Peter, we’re a matter of WEEKS away from the Maryland Democratic Primary.
I’m feeling good about where our campaign is headed, but I’m not one to leave things to chance, which is why my team set this 24-hour goal.
We’ve all seen my multi-millionaire opponent’s ads — _probably hundreds of times at this point_ — and we need to cut through the noise, reach voters in every corner of the state, and share our vision for a better Maryland.
_It’s going to take a sustained effort on our part, and it starts**TODAY** with this $10,000 goal._
**[So what do you say, Peter: Can I count on you to chip in a grassroots donation toward our 24-Hour Fund Our Ads Goal before midnight so we can boost our ads?](https://act.angelaalsobrooks.com/go/16972?t=16&amount=25&akid=1328%2E52803%2E7re3F_)**
_If you’ve saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately._
| | [Chip in $25](https://act.angelaalsobrooks.com/go/16972?t=17&express_lane=true&amount=25&akid=1328%2E52803%2E7re3F_)

Thanks!
—Angela Alsobrooks

name: Josh
subject: thank you for your dedication
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY JOSH GOTTHEIMER FOR CONGRESS
body:
# [#] Thank you for your incredible support ahead of our first FEC filing deadline of the election year.

Supporters like you allow me to continue the fight for Jersey Values and commonsense in Congress. With your help, we can keep this momentum going through the rest of the year, so I can hold my seat in November and keep making progress.

The NRCC is studying fundraising reports like these looking for any signs of weakness – but we have shown that we are not backing down from the fight ahead.

Thank you for your dedication to our mission. Supporters like you are truly the most important members of our team.

Thank you again for being on our team,

Josh
Josh Gottheimer represents New Jersey’s Fifth Congressional District. Josh is in Congress to fight for lower taxes and Jersey Values. He’s working across the aisle to find real solutions for New Jersey families and is actively fighting against the ideological gridlock in Washington. name: Steve Garvey #6
subject: Be careful what you wish for Mr. Schiff
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY STEVE GARVEY FOR U
body:
I can’t help but think how Adam Schiff and his team of high-priced DC consultants thought they were being savvy in trying to make sure I became their opponent in General Election. Reports are they even spent money running ads promoting me. | | | [](http://links.myfreedomnews.com/u/click?_t=e3c9a4cac7f248a39c2a3d920479a441&_m=9a19e426b81746c38586db8489f21f26&_e=VU0wX05FgJ-h70zCU5GsWwuiFk5PgBbrBQVb1krOEUarKV7G-4Y6uBCCMeGlo8bzRDteIs-Pqsl5_H-pAUOw3myT5IV5TX72SPofHuzuOMqzH7uBJSRewr8Rpu8-jG7_AE20vIYiACI3JalDMzIbSxGIbln_iW1jEFNNZDeC_NqJrbECh3sYHiI9_kM5okQwjMbQtr3Lcy7aVjgqKvVUuVmokQ-f9ZULLc3nSTmBgCwYz1rmXXIqHvqEV_CxcZIadc2wYMCA5zF-76_R-AKAtrVgHb_kZBxmtVJ2Cv2pBOOUjx9Wr3iE5uIvkl7lBt8euruQYATWDgzzmN9DSnum9APkTmVkYmLfEtBm4rQGa_qsmL3EQi5_QPHEH8b_QHKCZnUt54MfTu6DGynmm7Gt1g%3D%3D)

| | Fellow American, I've played in lots of double-headers. And that's exactly what you and I have on our hands here. A one-on-one matchup with Adam Schiff on November 5th. **[**Can I count on your contribution of $6 to help defeat Adam Schiff today?**](http://links.myfreedomnews.com/u/click?_t=e3c9a4cac7f248a39c2a3d920479a441&_m=9a19e426b81746c38586db8489f21f26&_e=VU0wX05FgJ-h70zCU5GsWwuiFk5PgBbrBQVb1krOEUarKV7G-4Y6uBCCMeGlo8bzRDteIs-Pqsl5_H-pAUOw3myT5IV5TX72SPofHuzuOMqzH7uBJSRewr8Rpu8-jG7_AE20vIYiACI3JalDMzIbSxGIbln_iW1jEFNNZDeC_NqJrbECh3sYHiI9_kM5okQwjMbQtr3Lcy7aVjgqKvVUuVmokQ-f9ZULLc3nSTmBgCyT7RcDfIAkbaABiZ0efTTKtBAiUcVnRWE7OQaVKLJpeq6HR_MgVkyVuQ4-neYyeE0niDf3WEnIWIaNFc95EhwSRNXmZEFlh0bVSO7uAOwcy-gcJdipG1e36RuMlZQPQiQ1c2zW9sQqJMLt4bNoeRp4dNuMHlnApapvDPG89d3Q8g%3D%3D)** You see, Adam Schiff's enablers in the corporate media are already spreading the lie that this race is over. They're saying you and I don't have a chance (just like they did when I entered the race back in October). They're saying that Adam Schiff notched a double victory by advancing to the General Election and drawing me as his opponent. In other words, they're ready, willing and able to cut California voters entirely out of the picture again. My response to Schiff's allies saying they'd rather face me: **_Be careful what you wish for._** I'd liken this to my playing days when a cocky opposing pitcher throws a 94mph fastball right over the plate. I'll tell you, the ball would look as big as a grapefruit before I'd smash it over the fence and touch all the bases on the way home. And look how far we've already made it. I'm in first place in the primary and gaining momentum headed towards the November election. Look, I'm not saying this will be easy. Quite the opposite. It's going to be a nonstop, 58-county fight between now and November 5th. **[That said, I must ask: will you rush a contribution to my senate campaign today?](http://links.myfreedomnews.com/u/click?_t=e3c9a4cac7f248a39c2a3d920479a441&_m=9a19e426b81746c38586db8489f21f26&_e=VU0wX05FgJ-h70zCU5GsWwuiFk5PgBbrBQVb1krOEUarKV7G-4Y6uBCCMeGlo8bzRDteIs-Pqsl5_H-pAUOw3myT5IV5TX72SPofHuzuOMqzH7uBJSRewr8Rpu8-jG7_AE20vIYiACI3JalDMzIbSxGIbln_iW1jEFNNZDeC_NqJrbECh3sYHiI9_kM5okQwjMbQtr3Lcy7aVjgqKvVUuVmokQ-f9ZULLc3nSTmBgCx_0OOj43KUbW5ZSZEK81UoES4elURYXWMJGXDWbW-K3BlgqVazIdEifzqLjQ1HsZutDnh1zpDzY06rhSclv9wqBsFRNNRbqU0MLmEdmSCGv831c57Zk3ivtsKWvjBFkvuu0Sk9K12Ua0f6mPnXiIZ2Zm4XdgPBVnCX7eXLQgsaKg%3D%3D) ** This is going to be an expensive fight. Hiring staff, recruiting and training volunteers, equipping them with the very best technology to identify our voter and secure their vote by November 5th. There's no time to lose. In closing, I can't help but think how Adam Schiff and his team of high-priced DC consultants thought they were being savvy in trying to make sure I became their opponent in General Election. Reports are they even spent money running ads promoting me. But what they've really done is awaken a sleeping giant here. Remember, before it became a wasteland of crime, homelessness, and sky-high taxes, California was a land of dreamers, a land of opportunity. It was a place where a scrawny little kid could start as a bat boy for his heroes, work hard, win a World Series, and land on a Topps baseball card. California can be that place again. America can be that place again. And it starts with throwing out political liars and connivers like Adam Schiff and reclaiming our freedom roots. Time is the most important factor. Thank you!
---
| |

P.S. Adam Schiff had $35 million in the bank. Well, reports are now coming out that he spent upwards of _**$25 million**_ in the primary and is down to $10 million in the bank. Make no mistake, while his cash advantage is greatly diminished, as I write these words, Adam Schiff, Nancy Pelosi, and Chuck Schumer are quickly reloading. The ActBlue political machine has the capacity to pump millions into his race in the blink of an eye. You and I cannot give them any daylight. **[**Your prompt support is critical.**](http://links.myfreedomnews.com/u/click?_t=e3c9a4cac7f248a39c2a3d920479a441&_m=9a19e426b81746c38586db8489f21f26&_e=VU0wX05FgJ-h70zCU5GsWwuiFk5PgBbrBQVb1krOEUarKV7G-4Y6uBCCMeGlo8bzRDteIs-Pqsl5_H-pAUOw3myT5IV5TX72SPofHuzuOMqzH7uBJSRewr8Rpu8-jG7_AE20vIYiACI3JalDMzIbSxGIbln_iW1jEFNNZDeC_NqJrbECh3sYHiI9_kM5okQwjMbQtr3Lcy7aVjgqKvVUuVmokQ-f9ZULLc3nSTmBgCxAuUbt2JLNSd1VdnihW2jnX9jVkgNF3-kOK_ZxmwoXZKexTHeRBuru-utVRHoVy8T-7V2OThOHMZtrD6D_IVrffnfU0ploZ42KnGr_gms71h9b3ZNExl3SigXJ_l6ATB2H-veC0v13myVlSZ6bNjLMfkbfxwnVeK0VYxQh5MM7aw%3D%3D)** Please don't delay.

clean_body: I can’t help but think how Adam Schiff and his team of high-priced DC consultants thought they were being savvy in trying to make sure I became their opponent in General Election. Reports are they even spent money running ads promoting me. | | | | | Fellow American, I've played in lots of double-headers. And that's exactly what you and I have on our hands here. A one-on-one matchup with Adam Schiff on November 5th. You see, Adam Schiff's enablers in the corporate media are already spreading the lie that this race is over. They're saying you and I don't have a chance (just like they did when I entered the race back in October). They're saying that Adam Schiff notched a double victory by advancing to the General Election and drawing me as his opponent. In other words, they're ready, willing and able to cut California voters entirely out of the picture again. My response to Schiff's allies saying they'd rather face me: Be careful what you wish for. I'd liken this to my playing days when a cocky opposing pitcher throws a 94mph fastball right over the plate. I'll tell you, the ball would look as big as a grapefruit before I'd smash it over the fence and touch all the bases on the way home. And look how far we've already made it. I'm in first place in the primary and gaining momentum headed towards the November election. Look, I'm not saying this will be easy. Quite the opposite. It's going to be a nonstop, 58-county fight between now and November 5th. This is going to be an expensive fight. Hiring staff, recruiting and training volunteers, equipping them with the very best technology to identify our voter and secure their vote by November 5th. There's no time to lose. In closing, I can't help but think how Adam Schiff and his team of high-priced DC consultants thought they were being savvy in trying to make sure I became their opponent in General Election. Reports are they even spent money running ads promoting me. But what they've really done is awaken a sleeping giant here. Remember, before it became a wasteland of crime, homelessness, and sky-high taxes, California was a land of dreamers, a land of opportunity. It was a place where a scrawny little kid could start as a bat boy for his heroes, work hard, win a World Series, and land on a Topps baseball card. California can be that place again. America can be that place again. And it starts with throwing out political liars and connivers like Adam Schiff and reclaiming our freedom roots. Time is the most important factor. Thank you! | | | | Steve Garvey #6 | | | P.S. Adam Schiff had $35 million in the bank. Well, reports are now coming out that he spent upwards of $25 million in the primary and is down to $10 million in the bank. Make no mistake, while his cash advantage is greatly diminished, as I write these words, Adam Schiff, Nancy Pelosi, and Chuck Schumer are quickly reloading. The ActBlue political machine has the capacity to pump millions into his race in the blink of an eye. You and I cannot give them any daylight. Please don't delay. | | PAID FOR BY STEVE GARVEY FOR U.S. SENATE PO Box 532389 Los Angeles, CA 90053-2389 |

name: Elissa Slotkin
subject: Before Trump takes the stage in MI today...
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY ELISSA SLOTKIN FOR MICHIGAN
body:
# [](https://act.elissaslotkin.org/go/188?t=1&akid=1302%2E135344%2E2rYR2e)

Friends --
Trump will be at the DeVos Convention Center in Grand Rapids, Michigan today and it would mean A LOT to me if you would chip in today.
I am asking for a contribution -- $3 or whatever you can afford -- before Donald Trump takes the stage. If that's all you need to hear, please use this link to donate today:
**[https://act.elissaslotkin.org/go/Trump-Visit](https://act.elissaslotkin.org/go/9?c0=ebs-em-apr24.UpsRlZ&refcode=em240402-1-30&t=2&akid=1302%2E135344%2E2rYR2e)**
Here's how former President Trump's visit plays in our race:
Recent polls show that President Biden and former President Trump are just about tied in a head-to-head race here in Michigan -- along with our race being a dead-heat.
Given that the Senate race is the top of the ticket in the state, it’s just a matter of time until Trump turns his attacks toward us. He also already weighed in on our race -- giving Republican Mike Rogers his total endorsement.
He knows that in order to win Michigan, the Republican nominee needs to win the Senate race -- and he’s going to do whatever he can to make that happen.
That means we can likely expect to see Trump in Michigan a lot – this is his 4th visit in 10 months. And National Republicans will be doing everything they can to flip our state red and boost our ultimate GOP opponent in the Senate race.
So we need to continue building up our reserves if we are going to be able to fight back against the attack ads and outside spending and keep this seat blue in November.
[**Trump will be here today. It would be a huge boon to our campaign if you would chip in and show your support before he gets here. Our goal is to send a message that we are NOT letting them win back Michigan! Even a single $5 or $10 contribution goes a long way when lots of folks are chipping in.](https://act.elissaslotkin.org/go/9?c0=ebs-em-apr24.UpsRlZ&refcode=em240402-1-30&t=3&akid=1302%2E135344%2E2rYR2e)**

name: Ben Wikler, WisDems Chair
subject: Empathy, decency, freedom, and democracy
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Defeat Republicans PAC (www
body:
We have a clear path to victory and a winning message. |
---
Peter,

In an election year like this, it’s easy to get caught up in the horse race, in the polls, in the news cycles. But today (before I ask you to [chip in a $15 split donation between WisDems and Defeat Republicans,](https://click.everyaction.com/k/82203515/464662063/232868767?refcode=DR_SPLIT_FR_90DO_240402_1_1&amount=15&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAwNi8xLzg1ODM1IiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogIjA3Y2M5MDJkLWZlZjAtZWUxMS1hYWYyLTAwMjI0ODIyMzM1MyIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=MfqJnAmKy2O9SGDKTr77jzETK9M2-tPT8CubY5lega8=) I want to take a step back and look at the big picture.

Here at WisDems HQ, we’re in the thick of the 2024 election. But for the people who will ultimately decide this election, it’s still incredibly early.

In all likelihood, swing voters haven’t tuned in yet. They’ve probably forgotten what life was like under Donald Trump, and haven’t heard much about President Biden’s accomplishments and his plan to build a brighter future for our communities.

And I don’t see that as a problem, Peter; I see it as an opportunity.

Most people don’t know yet that Donald Trump has promised to be a dictator on “day one,” that he’s proposed an extreme agenda to gut Social Security and Medicare, attack rights for LGBTQ+ Americans, and impose a new national ban on abortion.

They also don’t know that President Biden has achieved historic success in his first term – lowering costs for working families, rebuilding the middle class, and fighting to restore freedom and democracy after the disastrous Trump years.

Don’t get me wrong – this is going to be a close race, and Wisconsin will probably come down to a handful of votes per precinct. But whatever the results are, they’ll fall within the margin of effort.

**We have a clear path to victory. We have a winning message of empathy, decency, freedom, and democracy. But it’s up to this team to step up and put in the work we’ll need to win historic victories up and down the ballot this November.**

[So today, I’m asking you to invest in our vision not just for Wisconsin, but for our country, and chip in a split $15 split donation between WisDems and Defeat Republicans to support our work reaching undecided voters, fighting for decency and democracy, and winning critical races in 2024. Can you help us make it happen, Peter?](https://click.everyaction.com/k/82203516/464662066/232868767?refcode=DR_SPLIT_FR_90DO_240402_1_1&amount=15&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAwNi8xLzg1ODM1IiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogIjA3Y2M5MDJkLWZlZjAtZWUxMS1hYWYyLTAwMjI0ODIyMzM1MyIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=MfqJnAmKy2O9SGDKTr77jzETK9M2-tPT8CubY5lega8=)

---

What we do here matters, Peter. And I’m positive that if this team stands together like we did in 2020, 2022, and 2023, we can secure a brighter future for our communities, our state, and our country.

Thank you for being a part of this team.

Ben Wikler, WisDems Chair

body:
|
# [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/82203925/464662515/-1397648958?refcode=AU_AZD_EG_GEN_GEN_AC90_20240402_AM1_V1_S1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjUvMS8xMDU1MTYiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiYWZmMTE3NzctZmVmMC1lZTExLWFhZjItMDAyMjQ4MjIzMzUzIiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=kJ-RSdNCSJonOvEI1IMxnX5Ie2fkSmWY0mertu9bU4o=)

| | **Team — Grocery store mega-chains Kroger and Albertsons are proposing the LARGEST supermarket merger in history, threatening jobs and could raise grocery prices for millions of Americans.[Will you sign on and stand AGAINST this merger? ](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/82203927/464662516/-1018165107?refcode=AU_AZD_EG_GEN_GEN_AC90_20240402_AM1_V1_S1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjUvMS8xMDU1MTYiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiYWZmMTE3NzctZmVmMC1lZTExLWFhZjItMDAyMjQ4MjIzMzUzIiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=kJ-RSdNCSJonOvEI1IMxnX5Ie2fkSmWY0mertu9bU4o=&emci=16cb431f-47f0-ee11-aaf0-002248223794&emdi=aff11777-fef0-ee11-aaf2-002248223353&ceid=9307116)** | [ADD YOUR NAME](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/82203928/464662517/-1018165107?refcode=AU_AZD_EG_GEN_GEN_AC90_20240402_AM1_V1_S1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjUvMS8xMDU1MTYiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiYWZmMTE3NzctZmVmMC1lZTExLWFhZjItMDAyMjQ4MjIzMzUzIiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=kJ-RSdNCSJonOvEI1IMxnX5Ie2fkSmWY0mertu9bU4o=&emci=16cb431f-47f0-ee11-aaf0-002248223794&emdi=aff11777-fef0-ee11-aaf2-002248223353&ceid=9307116)
---
In late February, the FTC sued to block the biggest supermarket merger in U.S. history because the move would eliminate competition, threaten the jobs of employees at both companies, and could make the already high grocery store prices skyrocket through the roof.
This merger would affect stores in over half of the country, over 5,000 stores, 4,000 pharmacies, and nearly 700,000 employees, including 35,000 Arizonans. This move could easily exacerbate current food deserts in rural Arizona as well as put thousands of jobs at risk.
**[So please, will you add your name right now and stand against this merger?](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/82203929/464662518/-1018165107?refcode=AU_AZD_EG_GEN_GEN_AC90_20240402_AM1_V1_S1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjUvMS8xMDU1MTYiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiYWZmMTE3NzctZmVmMC1lZTExLWFhZjItMDAyMjQ4MjIzMzUzIiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=kJ-RSdNCSJonOvEI1IMxnX5Ie2fkSmWY0mertu9bU4o=&emci=16cb431f-47f0-ee11-aaf0-002248223794&emdi=aff11777-fef0-ee11-aaf2-002248223353&ceid=9307116)**

body:
I’m so grateful you opened this email.

| [](https://click.historyoftheday.com/u/click?_t=930f96a60371422687dbefcfca24c32b&_m=b98a44091e774b8fb62db97a5ed827fe&_e=TWQV1vXEaoNtP-OR-8Auq8Ldb3oqk-dCHQjmm322Q7ITblfW9gW6gj5qkE56Og8_6P5_P0MR9DU49s671wu1a7OWOZvjus01t3W5E8CicjFx3amvsqsIbiA2e5EoFZQEtyx_3ZDUK_cPJIvxQBxHdjuRf9MyKMxAp161z2nlH_rr_8MVZrmNQDcvgrOtMyNU2qstM_QBPJQkSuujJLXwbgCIhSuXqeG4NdBWerlh0YA8o4CauISPCzyMA8SHRmPxDzJTJAqQDuLbNg_QVi_1E6oCfgbpOuwuV68yj-gD6OLT6PLeAA-lQ5eteTQiezJt50I6v0jCSLB5PHS111W9QIoWOqB8b08RSjDZSbMIkakwhQUCcEuilCqVOjfCoKObX0u7Gc1Yazed2MWhf62upg%3D%3D)
---
Fellow American,

I’m so incredibly grateful that you chose to open and read this email. Only about 30-40% of people open these emails - and with all the political emails being sent these days, I’m so happy you opened this one.

Unfortunately, in order to stay in touch with conservatives like you, I rely on emails, texts, mail, and phone calls.

**With that said, can you please do me the simple favor of reading this all the way to the end?** If you reach the end and still don’t think you can make a difference, then I want to thank you for your time.

With an average of 35% of supporters opening these messages, only 1% of supporters step up and donate. This makes it difficult for my campaign since I depend on Americans like you receiving this email to help me hit my fundraising goal.

I refuse to rely on Hollywood Elites and Dark Money for fundraising goals. I want our conservative values and fight to be fueled by those who believe in them the most - you and me.

**And you know what?** If everyone who opened this email donated just $1 - _**one singular dollar**_ \- we’d blow all of our goals out of the water.

| [**DONATE $1**](https://click.historyoftheday.com/u/click?_t=930f96a60371422687dbefcfca24c32b&_m=b98a44091e774b8fb62db97a5ed827fe&_e=TWQV1vXEaoNtP-OR-8Auq8Ldb3oqk-dCHQjmm322Q7ITblfW9gW6gj5qkE56Og8_6P5_P0MR9DU49s671wu1a7OWOZvjus01t3W5E8CicjFx3amvsqsIbiA2e5EoFZQEtyx_3ZDUK_cPJIvxQBxHdjuRf9MyKMxAp161z2nlH_rr_8MVZrmNQDcvgrOtMyNUVTYiVL4CM0e1o9wS7kwqY6SFj7mwz6qXB2EKH3jxcLlX5MaX9z7u3AYscpxYJT4R2rwfvEM3HcPxvRvRlvgV9jk-udwqvJr_X92-Yd9g70bsyJrpP3mVUd9tM0w_NyA66hw-eevE4JtlUOcKTp5Vo-2-gzDQNfyr9dos2j8zP8ekln1oaA62ZFG-f-f6_kmla2Y4gtpM0f8mCoYpfOj1iQ%3D%3D)
---
[**CHIP IN ANYTHING**](https://click.historyoftheday.com/u/click?_t=930f96a60371422687dbefcfca24c32b&_m=b98a44091e774b8fb62db97a5ed827fe&_e=TWQV1vXEaoNtP-OR-8Auq8Ldb3oqk-dCHQjmm322Q7ITblfW9gW6gj5qkE56Og8_6P5_P0MR9DU49s671wu1a7OWOZvjus01t3W5E8CicjFx3amvsqsIbiA2e5EoFZQEtyx_3ZDUK_cPJIvxQBxHdjuRf9MyKMxAp161z2nlH_rr_8MVZrmNQDcvgrOtMyNUVTYiVL4CM0e1o9wS7kwqY6SFj7mwz6qXB2EKH3jxcLn3A-53Q0OCDkI-HSx5FnKBBn9RKJIAz0poEYRjWC4Y5fOtDyp0wbj5BoY1X1HLrNImto5EUu0-AAJTLw27IpKKInYbPAw3X-XiDxVCyLQuCm_ZHvuAnxSFjNj0knT_ELOeYa7DlJPQvJb_LlJHiC4zOUK2eXicCVqm_08Fv2ft_A%3D%3D)
---

Growing up, hard-working Americans were able to buy homes and live in good and safe communities. Now, with inflation on the rise, it is becoming harder for Americans who make an honest living to be able to live comfortably and see the American dream come to life.

I want to restore America to a time when Americans could afford homes, groceries, cars, and living expenses. These essential costs are growing beyond what many Americans can afford. No one should have to choose between food and shelter.

**[Democrats rely on Hollywood and New York Elites who are billionaires - I rely on people like you, who can give $1, $3, $9, or even $20 to reach my goals.](https://click.historyoftheday.com/u/click?_t=930f96a60371422687dbefcfca24c32b&_m=b98a44091e774b8fb62db97a5ed827fe&_e=TWQV1vXEaoNtP-OR-8Auq8Ldb3oqk-dCHQjmm322Q7ITblfW9gW6gj5qkE56Og8_6P5_P0MR9DU49s671wu1a7OWOZvjus01t3W5E8CicjFx3amvsqsIbiA2e5EoFZQEtyx_3ZDUK_cPJIvxQBxHdjuRf9MyKMxAp161z2nlH_rr_8MVZrmNQDcvgrOtMyNU2qstM_QBPJQkSuujJLXwbgCIhSuXqeG4NdBWerlh0YAFYd-2sFgzCyxFrDHUoGmcgADqmn2sor7ERPrsOxEfkj_W5KdNJM-gQqc8ossaJACMYnqBUqmoqjH53rS9YyLsdhtNms28wHhmeAZztekewJssOimFT467yDE-7We4-1A4GMgqbjGuDLZ2TbsQlzRQWApaLidAGkvxOiU_Swl5lw%3D%3D)**

**I’m humbly asking if you could go above and beyond and donate the cost of a pack of gum - $1.**

[**CHIP IN THE PRICE OF A PACK OF GUM**](https://click.historyoftheday.com/u/click?_t=930f96a60371422687dbefcfca24c32b&_m=b98a44091e774b8fb62db97a5ed827fe&_e=TWQV1vXEaoNtP-OR-8Auq8Ldb3oqk-dCHQjmm322Q7ITblfW9gW6gj5qkE56Og8_6P5_P0MR9DU49s671wu1a7OWOZvjus01t3W5E8CicjFx3amvsqsIbiA2e5EoFZQEtyx_3ZDUK_cPJIvxQBxHdjuRf9MyKMxAp161z2nlH_rr_8MVZrmNQDcvgrOtMyNUVTYiVL4CM0e1o9wS7kwqY6SFj7mwz6qXB2EKH3jxcLnCzR8qgXZ21AQhDLwKga9uuiKetg40r9YEtUBHESWt4D0-lZ08z4T8PgchsM02iDsnR6q-EmOQrSYHQxu-9RlAiFhFAyPr8UmhLhfkCkujCZdB4SxSPXUazEDIHwP_gLVVVkcTFeU1ub5sjDX2YNhzqTwP3DFyf0hmqHdOWuRaSA%3D%3D)
---

_The Left hopes I give up and stop sending you these emails.

They also hope you stop reading these emails.

It’d be their dream come true if we both gave up on our Conservative values._

_**I won’t give up on you, and I hope you won’t give up on me or our Conservative values.**_ I know most people will ignore this, but I need patriots like you to see what we’re fighting for. If you think you’re better off than you were 4 years ago, then I understand why you don’t want to donate today.

But if you’re like me, and believe we must get America back on track and make the American Dream possible again, please donate whatever you can before midnight.

[**DONATE TODAY**](https://click.historyoftheday.com/u/click?_t=930f96a60371422687dbefcfca24c32b&_m=b98a44091e774b8fb62db97a5ed827fe&_e=TWQV1vXEaoNtP-OR-8Auq8Ldb3oqk-dCHQjmm322Q7ITblfW9gW6gj5qkE56Og8_6P5_P0MR9DU49s671wu1a7OWOZvjus01t3W5E8CicjFx3amvsqsIbiA2e5EoFZQEtyx_3ZDUK_cPJIvxQBxHdjuRf9MyKMxAp161z2nlH_rr_8MVZrmNQDcvgrOtMyNUVTYiVL4CM0e1o9wS7kwqY6SFj7mwz6qXB2EKH3jxcLkW5KpNNM6ObtNl_F-jd5EX0rE1vsDhfPHa3kHTdRJNJETUL_kg_JxgdWDlN_jct8_3b34sJZcTsxIOoUlsvcFQFCQuoov82pbbRmomFkoFOhxc_jZrId0nGr9d2Gd31foi1bxHX4yplov3Wi70Z3sleuiTWtaoMf7DS740K4bDhA%3D%3D)
---

_God Bless,

Riley_

| **RILEY MOORE: CONSERVATIVE FOR CONGRESS.**

* * *
Washington is all tied up in putting politics over principle.
It’s time to put a stop to it and start putting PRINCIPLES OVER POLITICS - starting with YOU!

name: =?utf-8?Q?Kevin=20Dellicker?=
subject: Dellicker Campaign Update
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY KEVIN DELLICKER FOR CONGRESS
body:
Soap and Hope |
---
| | [ ](https://dellickerforcongress.us20.list-manage.com/track/click?u=2bced6f51ed1caf3f5b731ec5&id=c73cbb71e0&e=1090c5c412)
---
|
---
| Dear Friends and Neighbors,

I spent Saturday afternoon at Bucky Boyle Park in Allentown, where dozens of children and families played games, hunted Easter Eggs, and enjoyed the beautiful weather.

One of the sponsors was S & E Natural Soaps, LLC, a family-owned business that makes handmade skincare products right here in the Lehigh Valley. Besides supporting their own family, Tamiko and her husband Curtis use their profits to help local community organizations and working families in the West African nation of Ghana, which supplies raw materials for their soaps and moisturizers. It’s a classic American success story, and it was a pleasure talking to them about their hopes and dreams for their business and their family.

When I’m out in the community, I meet people from all political persuasions. I love to get into friendly debates about policy and often try to change people's minds. Occasionally, I do, and sometimes, they change my mind.

But regardless of policy differences, I’ve noticed that almost everyone wants the same things from their elected officials: authenticity and experience. And you can’t buy that with all the campaign donations in the world.

Authenticity is just being yourself. I’m comfortable with who I am and don’t pretend to be somebody I’m not. What you see is what you get.

Experience is trial by fire. I’ve spent 28 years in a military uniform providing safe communities, 19 years in business creating good jobs, and 24 years of marriage raising three sons. It wasn’t always easy. But when things get hard in Washington, I won’t have to rely on young staffers or congressional bosses to tell me what to do. I’ll be able to draw upon my own real-life experiences to make wise decisions that put the people of Pennsylvania’s 7th District first.

I don’t know if Tamiko and Curtis are registered Republican, Democrat, or Independent. I didn’t ask. But I do know they love God, Family, and Country. And they know I do too.

Remember, it’s not just GOP voters that value authentic candidates with relevant experience. It’s all voters. And that's why, with your support, I'm going to win this election.

**Keep America Free.**

_Kevin Dellicker is a Republican from Heidelberg Township, Lehigh County, running for U.S. House of Representatives in Pa.’s 7th District. He is a 28-year military veteran, technology company owner, husband and father. He’s not a career politician. He’s a proven leader with the experience and courage to Keep America Free. Learn more at[www.dellickerforcongress.com](https://dellickerforcongress.us20.list-manage.com/track/click?u=2bced6f51ed1caf3f5b731ec5&id=356152052e&e=1090c5c412)._

name: Kamala Harris
subject: This decision puts women’s lives at risk
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Biden for President
body:
Yesterday’s decision from the Florida Supreme Court likely triggers a near-total ban that will impact the entire Southeast United States -- and it’s all because of Donald Trump. | | |
---
Peter, I’m reaching out following the Florida Supreme Court’s decision to allow the state’s abortion ban to remain in effect. Yesterday’s decision from the Florida Supreme Court likely triggers a near-total ban that will impact the entire Southeast United States -- and the fault for this situation falls squarely on Donald Trump. This means women are facing an even more cruel reality where they could choose between putting their lives at risk or traveling hundreds or thousands of miles to get care. Doctors will continue to be threatened with criminal prosecution for doing their jobs, and women may be barred from getting the health care they need in the event of rape or incest. Donald Trump created this health care crisis, and he has no plans to stop now. Right now, Trump and his allies are ripping away access to reproductive health care across the country, inserting themselves into the most personal decisions women can make, even including contraception and IVF. But it’s not enough for Trump and MAGA Republicans that more than 1 in 3 women of reproductive age live in a state with a ban, having fewer rights than their mothers and grandmothers did. If Donald Trump has his way, he’ll gut abortion care in every state across the country -- and he and his allies have the plans to do it, _with or without Congress or the courts._ Trump and his allies just continue to double down on their plans to enact a federal abortion ban. **President Biden and I will do everything in our power to stop him and restore women's reproductive freedom.** Reproductive freedom is at stake this November, and President Biden and I are the only candidates who will stand up for a woman’s right to make her own health care decisions. We are fighting to protect women’s access to medication abortion and emergency care. We are working to protect patient privacy and defend the right of women to travel for abortion care. We are strengthening access to contraception. And we are fighting to restore the protections of _Roe_ into federal law so that women in all 50 states have the freedom to make deeply personal health care decisions. With your support, the President and I will continue to fight for a future where women -- in Florida, the Southeastern United States, and across the entire country -- will have access to the health care they need. But it is going to take all of us. Thank you for being part of this team. In solidarity, Kamala Kamala Harris

name: American Update
subject: Immigrants Can Now Select ‘Third Gender’ On Citizenship Form, Biden Admin Says
body:
And Florida Supreme Court Upholds 6-Week Abortion Ban

https://click.americanupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=01%7c698484%7c210334%7c805%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=ME06hbC6SFmjMt9y0NV0Yg&sysid=1 Immigrants Can Now Select ‘Third Gender’ On Citizenship Form, Biden Admin Says

name: Rep. Lauren Underwood
subject: An important request
disclaimer_text: Paid for by EMILYs List [www
body:
Will you split a donation between my campaign and EMILYs List? |
---
[](https://click.everyaction.com/k/82206369/464670193/850321586?refcode=WTEFHP02_20240402_UnderwoodSplit_ND_v1s2&sourceid=1053298&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9UU00vVFNNRUwvMS84NzA2OSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJiM2RlYTBhZC0wMWYxLWVlMTEtYWFmMi0wMDIyNDgyMjMzNTMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=r_AHPaw4f3WXHf1LiExoVrsV1dBYL5AJCKNodsEVqa0=) Peter,

As a team, we have achieved so much together over the past five years.

In 2018, we did what many said was impossible and made history by electing the youngest Black woman to ever serve in Congress.

Then, this team overcame staggering political odds in 2020 by propelling me to my second term by just 5,374 votes in one of the top 10 closest House races of the election cycle.

Fast forward to the 2022 midterms: We rallied together to face a significant hurdle following Illinois' redistricting process that made 70% of IL-14 brand-new territory with voters who had never seen my name on their ballot before. And that brings us to today, as I am proudly serving my third term in Congress and my first in House leadership.

With your support, I've been able to champion critical legislation improving health care access and lowering premiums for a record 21.3 million Americans, reducing the cost of insulin for seniors, rebuilding our nation's infrastructure with a once-in-a-generation investment, addressing the climate crisis, making our communities safer, and so much more.

_Over the last five years, I've had 14 pieces of legislation signed into law under two different administrations._

Looking back at our many accomplishments has me feeling hopeful and eager to show that, once again, we have what it takes to defend this seat.

We have proven time and again that our team is capable of accomplishing anything that we set our mind to.

As you know, our work is far from over. With election season in full swing, we find ourselves facing new challenges and new opponents.

I'm running for reelection this November to build on our work to reclaim and protect reproductive rights, reform our nation's deeply unequal health care system, make life better for our working families, and so much more. But I can't do any of it without you.

_I don't take a single supporter on this team for granted, and know that I must continue the hard work for our district to earn your trust and vote each election._

**That's why I am humbly asking for your support on my reelection campaign this year. Peter, this grassroots team has been an invaluable part of our success from the very beginning, and I would be honored to have you continue alongside me on this journey.** **If you want to support our work and ensure we have the resources to continue making progress, please split a contribution between me and EMILYs List >>>** _If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue, your donation will go through immediately:_ | [DONATE $15](https://click.everyaction.com/k/82206370/464670194/850321586?expresslane=true&amount=15&refcode=WTEFHP02_20240402_UnderwoodSplit_ND_v1s2&sourceid=1053298&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9UU00vVFNNRUwvMS84NzA2OSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJiM2RlYTBhZC0wMWYxLWVlMTEtYWFmMi0wMDIyNDgyMjMzNTMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=r_AHPaw4f3WXHf1LiExoVrsV1dBYL5AJCKNodsEVqa0=) | [DONATE $35](https://click.everyaction.com/k/82206373/464670195/850321586?expresslane=true&amount=35&refcode=WTEFHP02_20240402_UnderwoodSplit_ND_v1s2&sourceid=1053298&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9UU00vVFNNRUwvMS84NzA2OSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJiM2RlYTBhZC0wMWYxLWVlMTEtYWFmMi0wMDIyNDgyMjMzNTMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=r_AHPaw4f3WXHf1LiExoVrsV1dBYL5AJCKNodsEVqa0=)

name: dpwillis67@gmail.com, Nancy Pelosi
subject: Trump announcement BACKFIRES
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Nancy Pelosi for Congress
body:
---

name: Bill Spadea
subject: Are you joining our luncheon?
body:
Dear Peter, Are you joining our upcoming Women for Common Sense Luncheon? Join us next Friday, April 12th, at 1PM at Tacos e
|
---
| Dear Peter, **Are you joining our upcoming Women for Common Sense Luncheon?** Join us next Friday, April 12th, at 1PM at Tacos el Tio (200 Tuckerton Road, Medford, NJ 08055), as we celebrate the brilliant women of New Jersey who constantly champion common sense solutions for our great state.
This isn't just another gathering. It's an opportunity for like-minded folks to unite under the banner of common sense, sharing insights and forging paths toward a brighter future for New Jersey. **And I'm excited to say, I'll be there too, eager to dive into discussions and celebrate the power of our collective voice.** Our previous luncheons sold out, so **[click here to save your spot now.](https://xtz223.keap-link012.com/v2/click/c3349b596ddcec916ced46d2ce9b4f56/eJyNkE0LgkAURf_LW4vmR1HuRCwGzUVUizYx6aOGahzGZ2Thf2-yaFXQ-p17LvfdgVBySayEEK508zwfLNBYCCVQUlxJ4kV_9YaB67sWnIQ8znTVKAjvX8MfoE8NxoEF1Co0yHIRxSnLZ9uM5akhFdem40-PP_p4knnEMui6n2I8C0ouxl1DSLrB56JSmFW00ifDH4hUHTrOrmntmrRQaBfV2Rkeo3Gbunw_WW_4lAf72ri4UijL9yNSbF_G7gE6oWWY)**
---
|
---
Women for Common Sense luncheons are nothing short of inspirational, selling out fast due to the vibrant atmosphere and the compelling dialogues they foster. It's where New Jersey's trailblazers – women leading the charge for positive change, supported by men who stand with them – come together to make a real difference.
The issues we face are significant, but together, we can tackle them head-on, fueled by our shared commitment to common sense and community. Don't miss out on what promises to be an unforgettable afternoon of empowerment, discussion, and networking.
---
| **[Secure your spot now](https://xtz223.keap-link012.com/v2/click/51fbfa608c156e59f7fabfbfb43f0ad1/eJyNkEsLgkAUhf_LXUvmozB3IhWD5iKqRZuY9FKDNQ7jNTLxvzc9aFXQ-n7nO5zbAaHkklgBIVzp5roeWKAxF0qgpLiSxPPn1R35judYcBKynOuqURB2X8Mf4JkaBq4F1Co0yGoZxQnL5ruUZYkhFdem40-PN_54pouIpdD3P8V4FjS9GHcNIekGH4sKYVbRWp8MfyRSdWjb-6Yd1KSFwkFene1RGQVt4vDDZLPlM-4fauPiSqEs3o9IsH0Z-zs49WWW) **and be a part of this pivotal movement sweeping across our state. Looking forward to seeing you there, where we'll stand united in our passion for New Jersey and the values that make our state great. See you soon,
Bill
---

name: Jackson Lahmeyer
subject: I Did NOT Say That... So Dishonest + Despicable! | Context, Context + Context
body:
Very Dishonest Last night, an online Leftist Influencer w/112k followers on X (aka Twitter) did a truly despicable and dishonorable thing. Jim Stew
| | [](https://email.cloud2.secureclick.net/c/5961?id=8753126.3447.1.62edce5320c827e81cd3ee33ca529d15) |
---
## Very Dishonest
---
Last night, an _online Leftist Influencer_ w/112k followers on **X** (aka Twitter) did a truly _despicable_ and _dishonorable_ thing. **Jim Stewartson** , took a sermon I preached on **Good Friday** at [Sheridan.Church](https://email.cloud2.secureclick.net/c/5961?id=8753126.3448.1.bfa8667403262c94504fad4c84de3fa0) over the Blood of Jesus and _deliberately_ edited what I said to make it appear that I am advocating for violence and bloodshed. **So let me clear things up since the accusation has exploded online...** I am NOT advocating for bloodshed here in America but **I am not ashamed of the Gospel** and I am beyond thankful for the blood that was shed 2000 years on a Cross at Calvary. If you want to watch the message in its' FULL context you can watch it here:[https://youtube.com/live/iyid6tJ8XCM?feature=share](https://email.cloud2.secureclick.net/c/5961?id=8753126.3449.1.6d3b86e9439b09c77d3d50119fdbf53b)

---

Recently, [**Roger Stone**](https://email.cloud2.secureclick.net/c/5961?id=8753126.3453.1.47379cd41cda46412ba2ee26ff124e83) joined me in Tulsa, OK for a special event in which he discussed the facts behind **the assassination of JFK** and took LIVE questions from the audience.
_That event was a HIT!_ Watch it here: [https://youtu.be/ZphwDct5Mio](https://email.cloud2.secureclick.net/c/5961?id=8753126.3454.1.48a95bad843b1628ecc673b3d70016c2)
I want to invite you to join me for another special _ONE NIGHT_ event with **America's Mayor, Rudy Giuliani!**
Come here stories of how **Mayor Giuliani** _took down the Mafia_ , _cleaned up the streets of NYC_ , _handled 9/11 as Mayor_ and _served with President Trump_.
There will be a LIVE Q&A as well plus a VIP Meet & Greet.

name: Andy Kim
subject: Thank you for everything
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Andy Kim for New Jersey
body:
I am still simply in awe of what we’ve seen grow over these past few months.
| | [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/82208116/464674584/41798106?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjEvMS84Nzk3MCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI2NGNmM2YwZC0wM2YxLWVlMTEtYWFmMi0wMDIyNDgyMjMzNTMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=avaVV1Njs3vWYZASyYk9uf5YRFKw4hX8HT-_VGPyTzA=&emci=7e0b5710-62f0-ee11-aaf0-002248223794&emdi=64cf3f0d-03f1-ee11-aaf2-002248223353&ceid=26261389)
---

| | I want to start off by saying thank you for everything you've helped accomplish. I am still simply in awe of what we've seen grow over these past few months. People have made it so clear how ready they are for a different kind of politics, and it's our energy and work that will carry our momentum through Election Day to deliver for New Jersey. I'm running a different kind of campaign because that's what the people of New Jersey want right now. Our campaign is about bringing in regular New Jerseyans, engaging with them about what's on their minds, and earning their support. The energy across New Jersey is infectious. The crowds have been amazing. Our events have been absolutely packed. Conventions have been electrifying. **There is a hunger in New Jersey and across the country for new leadership.** People are tired of corrupt politics as usual that only benefit the well-off and well-connected. In fact, 84% of people surveyed in New Jersey believe that the elite political leaders in our state are corrupt. We have a chance to change the broken politics of New Jersey, and your grassroots support is what makes it possible. I decided to step up and fight this corruption because I'm ready to bring change, and I can see that the people of New Jersey are with me in this fight. **That's why we have strong momentum in this race right now.** The next few months will challenge our movement, but I know that we're up for anything thrown at us. We've done what some thought was impossible, and we're not backing down now. Thank you again, for everything you've done to get us to where we are today. I look forward to winning this race with you by my side. More soon, _Andy_ | Express Donate: If you've stored your info with ActBlue Express, we'll process your contribution instantly:

clean_body: I am still simply in awe of what we’ve seen grow over these past few months. | | | | I want to start off by saying thank you for everything you've helped accomplish. I am still simply in awe of what we've seen grow over these past few months. People have made it so clear how ready they are for a different kind of politics, and it's our energy and work that will carry our momentum through Election Day to deliver for New Jersey. I'm running a different kind of campaign because that's what the people of New Jersey want right now. Our campaign is about bringing in regular New Jerseyans, engaging with them about what's on their minds, and earning their support. The energy across New Jersey is infectious. The crowds have been amazing. Our events have been absolutely packed. Conventions have been electrifying. There is a hunger in New Jersey and across the country for new leadership. People are tired of corrupt politics as usual that only benefit the well-off and well-connected. In fact, 84% of people surveyed in New Jersey believe that the elite political leaders in our state are corrupt. We have a chance to change the broken politics of New Jersey, and your grassroots support is what makes it possible. I decided to step up and fight this corruption because I'm ready to bring change, and I can see that the people of New Jersey are with me in this fight. That's why we have strong momentum in this race right now. The next few months will challenge our movement, but I know that we're up for anything thrown at us. We've done what some thought was impossible, and we're not backing down now. Thank you again, for everything you've done to get us to where we are today. I look forward to winning this race with you by my side. name: Debbie Mucarsel-Powell
subject: major victory here in Florida:
disclaimer_text: Paid For By Gallego for Arizona
body:
#

Hey, it's Ruben Gallego. My friend Debbie Mucarsel-Powell is running for the U.S. Senate in Florida, and I wanted to share an important email from her with you.

**BREAKING NEWS:_Florida Supreme Court rules to keep abortion rights on the ballot this November, giving voters the chance to overturn GOP’s extreme new 6-week abortion ban!**_
Peter, did you see the news? This is AMAZING! After months of gathering signatures, rallying support, and fighting against far-right lawsuits, activists have overcome the final hurdle: **Florida voters will have the chance to codify abortion rights in our state constitution this fall!**
This is a HUGE victory in the fight to defend reproductive freedom — but it's just the beginning. Now, we need to get this initiative across the finish line, defeat Rick Scott at the ballot box, and codify abortion rights.
And truthfully, we've got a tough fight ahead of us. Rick Scott is already attacking my campaign, calling me a "radical extremist" for supporting the right to choose. He can lie and attack me as much as he wants, but Rick Scott can't run from the truth: **He's the extremist in this race. He's the one with a far-right, anti-choice record. He's the one whose approval rating is tanking._He's the one who's going to lose this November._**
Peter, Florida is NOT a red state. We're ready for new leadership — and the GOP knows it. That's why Rick Scott and his extremist allies are ready to spend MILLIONS to destroy our campaign. To defeat them, we need to build unstoppable momentum headed into the election. [**Please, with all eyes on Florida, will you split $3 between my campaign and Ruben Gallego's to help me hit my Emergency $100,000 Goal before midnight tonight? Every dollar gets us closer to restoring reproductive rights in Florida and nationwide.**](https://act.gallegoforarizona.com/go/1000?c0=ruben-em-dmp.k71Akv&refcode=em240402-1-90&t=1&akid=2162%2E734936%2ExqnSxe)

****
Thank you so much for standing with me,
Debbie

name: Curtis Bashaw
subject: More government ≠ more freedom
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY CURTIS BASHAW FOR US SENATE, INC
body:
I’m proudly running for the United States Senate because I believe more government equals less freedom. | [](http://links.g4yamerica.com/u/click?_t=cc7dda5c2cc64061900678c88bd3a18a&_m=7ca97eebc80e4accaa48735c81b1b356&_e=9QIEPTIx-tbXVHk9ZaTuHPOtD87qyrhCchXrCk7OXLGpXzrEtJEZeiKvTwzoTamIt-rmpOjFk-6RVv_Xrr_B7Q8UaiQEVmeBLTL72IdzeHaGZgx76YfMV7JqvTILmeBmVH5YrTBiuqzFA1tdy8M4RXiZh_zV-FrTLpItl60RbP3kHVcqYL6WkYA8kx2mxzHSec9JMC_KvhZvrwF5kdLryy25joZzS6S8huT9S5xv1QKa6-W6kNABvhWSa5GQncZvbN2Rtki14keZl8mEtR_FvouFE-XepZ4mpEBRDrXq7NWMz2M7wxFXiWxM8mWekjDwKmAhUr1nk41IyBER2Bw8c5DChVGWONaGFzXAdH_qEYZKJzu4h4a7bh-RE8WjzqFd_B_Ks4pN2swysWNgzDzxA7ETYMBsslQ35xMbhdAWRQ0%3D)
---
Fellow American, my name is Curtis Bashaw.

I’m a lifelong New Jersey resident. In high school, I started working as a bellhop and waiting tables at Congress Hall in Cape May. And I’ve been working nonstop since then.

I started a business and I’m a proud job creator, employing more than 1,000 hard-working people. It’s never been easy, but it’s always been worth it.

As an entrepreneur, I have the responsibility of making a payroll every two weeks and know that people’s car payments, rent, and mortgages depend on me effectively doing my job. And I’ve been successfully doing that for 35 years.

But the pandemic changed our business and our American way of life, Fellow American. Working in the tourism and hospitality industry, I saw firsthand how quickly the government can take away our freedoms - our livelihoods.

The entire industry was shut down. We lost most of our income and there was no end in sight. Hundreds of small businesses and families stood on the brink of financial disaster. When the business community and government leaders in the county wrote a plan and demanded the Governor to let us reopen, _**we were ignored.**_

**As a business owner and a product of the American dream, I’m a lifelong Republican.** [**But now I’ve decided to stand up and do something about it. I’m proudly running for the United States Senate because I believe more government equals less freedom.**](http://links.g4yamerica.com/u/click?_t=cc7dda5c2cc64061900678c88bd3a18a&_m=7ca97eebc80e4accaa48735c81b1b356&_e=9QIEPTIx-tbXVHk9ZaTuHPOtD87qyrhCchXrCk7OXLGpXzrEtJEZeiKvTwzoTamIt-rmpOjFk-6RVv_Xrr_B7Q8UaiQEVmeBLTL72IdzeHaGZgx76YfMV7JqvTILmeBmVH5YrTBiuqzFA1tdy8M4RXiZh_zV-FrTLpItl60RbP3kHVcqYL6WkYA8kx2mxzHSec9JMC_KvhZvrwF5kdLryy25joZzS6S8huT9S5xv1QKa6-W6kNABvhWSa5GQncZvbN2Rtki14keZl8mEtR_FvrCtbPrmkPHlnkBsKDJvkylz3uZWk4Pbh2k4Kc_iMVGGpdmKaD5DmfhO2-FdnBAx6bIl4-NkUEmYEk85AdgCaIXsNGxjVrIP11QLmG0SDL_WeJS2kl5OumeIkW57RN5DxdGzxNpxnhRzZLg3jS9z9Os%3D)

[**I believe we can’t keep sending the same corrupt politicians to Washington and expecting different results. America is the land of opportunity, and that starts with a strong economy. The best social program is a job.

Yet too many families are struggling to pay their mortgages, buy groceries, and put gas in their cars. In New Jersey, we pay the highest taxes in the nation yet receive only 75 cents back on the dollar from the federal government.

Our families cannot afford to elect another selfish, so-called _"leader"_ who cares more about their own political ambitions than coming up with sensible solutions that actually help law-abiding American citizens. **_We deserve better than this._**

I am running for the United States Senate because I believe we need to restore freedom, security, and opportunity for all Americans. I am running to restore the American dream. | **_GET TO KNOW CURTIS_**

**Curtis Bashaw is a hotel entrepreneur, job creator, and preservationist. He’s running for United States Senate to provide greater freedom and opportunities for all New Jerseyans.**

A lifelong New Jersey resident, Curtis grew up in Camden County and spent his summers at the Jersey Shore working as a bellhop and waiting tables at Congress Hall in Cape May. He has spent his life in the real estate and hospitality industries, and is the Founder and Managing Partner of Cape Resorts, a hotel company focusing on the restoration and operation of classic American resort properties in New Jersey and New York.

Throughout his career, Curtis has worked to build communities and bring people together. He is widely recognized for leading the landmark restorations of Congress Hall and the Virginia Hotel in Cape May, and for launching creative programming to dramatically extend Cape May’s season, a catalyst for the economic rebirth of one of the Jersey Shore’s most beautiful communities.

Curtis is a successful businessman and job creator, employing more than 1,000 people in New Jersey and New York. Curtis’ company owns and operates eight hotels, ten cottages, six restaurants, four retail outlets and a working farm, all on the Jersey Shore and Long Island’s East End. Curtis lives in Cape May with his husband, Will.

I started a business and I’m a proud job creator, employing more than 1,000 hard-working people. It’s never been easy, but it’s always been worth it. As an entrepreneur, I have the responsibility of making a payroll every two weeks and know that people’s car payments, rent, and mortgages depend on me effectively doing my job. And I’ve been successfully doing that for 35 years. But the pandemic changed our business and our American way of life, Fellow American. Working in the tourism and hospitality industry, I saw firsthand how quickly the government can take away our freedoms - our livelihoods. The entire industry was shut down. We lost most of our income and there was no end in sight. Hundreds of small businesses and families stood on the brink of financial disaster. When the business community and government leaders in the county wrote a plan and demanded the Governor to let us reopen, we were ignored. As a business owner and a product of the American dream, I’m a lifelong Republican. Fellow American, like you, I’m fed up with Washington's dysfunction. subject: Sign: Demand Trump be investigated for securities fraud for the Truth Social stock crash
body:
| | | | |
