| | |
# [Sign: Investigate whether Trump should be charged with securities fraud for the Truth Social stock crash](https://default.salsalabs.org/Tcc10db1c-55be-4293-99d2-8ee3027646cd/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)
---
| | [](https://default.salsalabs.org/T1bd28980-8e64-416f-a320-bafbab430bdf/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)
---
| | | Just days after it went public, and its stock price placed its value in the billions, Donald Trump's "Truth Social" crashed back to Earth, with that same stock dropping like a rock. Why? Because the $50 million profit it said it made in 2022 had turned into a [loss of $58 million](https://default.salsalabs.org/T996a5c0d-bb59-44be-9b83-3fc7d25136cd/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9) in 2023 -- with only $4 million in total revenue. In short, it was a disastrous performance -- but the numbers weren't revealed until after the stock went public, meaning those buying the stock were left in the dark until it was too late -- and their investments had collapsed in value. [**Add your name, and demand and that Trump be investigated for securities fraud.**](https://default.salsalabs.org/Tc90bb803-70ef-4aa2-afe3-c772f9ff0f8b/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9) Maybe this is all legit, and maybe it was simply a case of the most dazzlingly fortunate timing one could hope for. Or maybe critical information was withheld in order to keep the true state of the company out of the spotlight. No doubt, anyone foolish enough to buy into Trump's promises was probably someone who would lose their money on some idiotic venture soon enough. But fraud is fraud, and there are laws, and Donald Trump is not above them. [**Add your name: Investigate whether Trump should be charged with securities fraud for the Truth Social stock crash**](https://default.salsalabs.org/T1876f6fd-106b-4793-9a44-02a3452f9c21/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)

name: Sean Feucht
subject: Read my latest on Substack: Christians can take back America
body:
| | | [](https://links.iterable.com/u/click?_t=dcac8242330e4c15a55d3b915d5debd3&_m=456e7fa84e5c403fafc0aca90c18b5ed&_e=RwxlbDKt4bV2WgZ3C4TN4HXHH6wrl-3SUMm5rRbUBwg9VoCQbBBufHi7fOVESoHW5WSu1OSBAqpIGwzzKKQe2pmbA21YLoQ3QTkcGnvOhXb5euXlIkdQcHMbndYFdPEnlIINTFXV3h3IG3X1NyqTil6SdJfwuQbSHe79RndYhLxJEnP3EqGMmUhThqzqVRfjrtzissylWiiudIRNx8lPosE9LffnqlTjx7PASKDpzICbbmiJiqfDmZoiRo-u4gDnOdRE8mUIlW--Iq-LuvxyEXqqTO4BI3PbuB3-1N-6ga6jFm9djpAFAmDDXyGQOLlt)
---
| | _**Christians can take back America
**_ By Sean Feucht
---
| | What’s the current cultural adage— the two things you aren’t supposed to talk about are politics and religion. No way! The fabric of civilization seems to be tearing from both ends, and we as Believers must engage in the shaping of the public discourse.

We are called to “let our light SHINE before men” (Matthew 5:16) and no sphere of society is off limits.

For too long, many Believers have operated as if we must follow God in a way that the government allows; that the institution of the government takes precedence over the institution of the Church. Living in America, we are blessed to avoid most of the friction Believers across the globe face. clean_body: | | | | | Christians can take back America By Sean Feucht | | What’s the current cultural adage— the two things you aren’t supposed to talk about are politics and religion. No way! The fabric of civilization seems to be tearing from both ends, and we as Believers must engage in the shaping of the public discourse. We are called to “let our light SHINE before men” (Matthew 5:16) and no sphere of society is off limits. For too long, many Believers have operated as if we must follow God in a way that the government allows; that the institution of the government takes precedence over the institution of the Church. Living in America, we are blessed to avoid most of the friction Believers across the globe face. | | | | | International Donors— donate Donate by Check or Money Order Sean Feucht Ministries310 Third Street NEWashington, DC 20002 Contributions are tax-deductible. | | | | | ---|---|--- Email sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com by Hold The Line. name: Jim Banks
subject: My Heart Is In My Throat
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Banks for Senate
body:
|
---
Friend, I'm afraid I have _BAD news_. Before I reach out to Trump and J.D. Vance can you step in?

**Here's the situation:** Yesterday was my first major fundraising deadline, and my finance team just broke the news to me: **we were 19 donations short.**

This would have been a huge blow, but we've found a way to [**extend the deadline by 24 hours through this special donation link.**](http://links.banksforsenate.com/u/click?_t=588630feb05642bf856633600a62821b&_m=5455625f15fc4a0ab2cccb7fb05f2337&_e=hvZPeDNXEntqjRRVmRuQz3caeajKEk93M_3GTM0T-lthP7cH6ppkf4qioBShmOUfznKG3tMCuq6KNkgAldlRnDDKi_O-y4X8eV9CDUXOf9yX58LPHzJHiyamScje6zVECVgJjta1LSM-h52oow6IhVkRUUhrrDdLcwdKe3xjQUcIDjZBdM3HwufhwDKeHYI86CKLJIdEJ6-lrOhVp44G5QmtHpuIBW-3Z1WpmWC2NHdw8G0lVE24aAZbtmI-uEVScCLbtNFoR_UGDYpM5C3Jvs6n35Ge5IGd07Dow5kp-ignhwJUAD2t7gajw2Z1buXH)

While it's impossible to add anything more to my federally mandated report...we have one more chance to make our internal goal and get back on track.

So, as a personal favor to me — [**will you stop what you're doing and make a special, one-time donation?**](http://links.banksforsenate.com/u/click?_t=588630feb05642bf856633600a62821b&_m=5455625f15fc4a0ab2cccb7fb05f2337&_e=hvZPeDNXEntqjRRVmRuQz3caeajKEk93M_3GTM0T-lthP7cH6ppkf4qioBShmOUfznKG3tMCuq6KNkgAldlRnDDKi_O-y4X8eV9CDUXOf9yX58LPHzJHiyamScje6zVECVgJjta1LSM-h52oow6IhVkRUUhrrDdLcwdKe3xjQUcqK0J4fQaHRX22ieoYXYwI1JfHrPFt30Aec_AL0mb4svMvcCFsG6XTbv4g812h3H4gcus8JE54bZt99zyvOA7qm4efhpXn-sMMS7CqibGqbPwrc5e2ojC1spfBiROsZM9K2SW5K0KlkJFV-r1SRyDR) Even it it's only $5...it will be the difference between completing our mission and surrendering.

I know firsthand from my time on the ground in Afghanistan: **getting the seemingly little things right matters when you're up against a determined enemy.**

My campaign, though under most people's radar right now, will be pivotal in determining who has the Senate majority, and our country is depending on your help to deliver us a victory. The Democrats know this and are already preparing to spend millions to defeat me.

[**Please, stand with me before 11:59PM.**](http://links.banksforsenate.com/u/click?_t=588630feb05642bf856633600a62821b&_m=5455625f15fc4a0ab2cccb7fb05f2337&_e=hvZPeDNXEntqjRRVmRuQz3caeajKEk93M_3GTM0T-lthP7cH6ppkf4qioBShmOUfznKG3tMCuq6KNkgAldlRnDDKi_O-y4X8eV9CDUXOf9yX58LPHzJHiyamScje6zVECVgJjta1LSM-h52oow6IhVkRUUhrrDdLcwdKe3xjQUd66G1Kk78zlmiXJSKnK66HGu48tCgA7kLxiH39Q_jVdsUd7Hazeo7mhTGjGc24eV8sVfxl2a7-FtySA-cvBiYW7NqHSJqVXtG6DHkDcP-C7aDyscxdyA2ApLU4gzMN2QbpieFeXdcsiX9JH4sGW3-a)

-Jim Banks

Eugene is the ONLY Democrat in this race who has won statewide, twice — he’s defeated extremists and delivered for PA communities before, and he’s the right choice to defend our rights as AG. 3. Our Attorney General is the last line of defense against MAGA extremism — that’s why Eugene will always fight to defend democracy, abortion rights, voting rights, and go after anyone who tries to take advantage of Pennsylvanians. = | | = | = Thank you for powering this grassroots campaign. – DePasquale HQ | | | = Make sure this email goes to your inbox. Hi there, When I get out on the campaign trail, there’s nothing more rewarding than talking to folks about what _really_ matters: how I can help. Elected leaders have a duty to the people we serve — to do everything we can to make our communities work better. That starts by listening to your needs and priorities, and then taking action to deliver results. That’s why I’d like to hear directly from you: What are the issues you’re most concerned about right now? **_[My team put together a Spring Priorities Survey, and I’d really appreciate it if you could take just a few minutes to fill it out.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/82214210/464691873/-362712357?refcode=ea.42d07f0c-0af1-ee11-aaf2-002248223353&ms=ea.42d07f0c-0af1-ee11-aaf2-002248223353&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTAvMS84MDYxOSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI0MmQwN2YwYy0wYWYxLWVlMTEtYWFmMi0wMDIyNDgyMjMzNTMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=LtZhfuvUO7WyscTrPNnXRfGlpJw0uXB4Cj9ytjsXz5c=&emci=5bba25d0-73f0-ee11-aaf0-002248223794&emdi=42d07f0c-0af1-ee11-aaf2-002248223353&ceid=46764483)_** | [**TAKE THE SURVEY**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/82214211/464691874/-362712357?refcode=ea.42d07f0c-0af1-ee11-aaf2-002248223353&ms=ea.42d07f0c-0af1-ee11-aaf2-002248223353&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTAvMS84MDYxOSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI0MmQwN2YwYy0wYWYxLWVlMTEtYWFmMi0wMDIyNDgyMjMzNTMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=LtZhfuvUO7WyscTrPNnXRfGlpJw0uXB4Cj9ytjsXz5c=&emci=5bba25d0-73f0-ee11-aaf0-002248223794&emdi=42d07f0c-0af1-ee11-aaf2-002248223353&ceid=46764483)

It’s that time of year again, hotties! Hot Girls Vote is back and hotter than ever! ❤️🔥
“But wait,” we hear you cry. “**Who gets to be a hot girl?** ”
You, obviously! Anyone from any background — including sexualities and gender identities! — can be a hot girl. But what really separates the hotties from the haters is our commitment to being progressive, pro-democracy, and pissed off at the status quo.
Election Day 2024 is rapidly approaching, and we’re fired up to get as many hot girls registered to vote as possible.
[There’s nothing hotter than making your voice heard at the ballot box. Here’s the deal, hotties: Young Americans came out in WAVES to make a difference in the 2020 election. But in 2024, voter apathy is running rampant.
More than 70 million young Americans are eligible to vote, more than any other age group in the nation. If we show up, _we can turn the tide in any election._
So let’s get registered and committed to voting this November. [Are you in?](https://click.everyaction.com/k/82215044/464694515/-67878755?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9UU00vVFNNTkcvMS81NjE1OSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJmYzc0NmQ3NC0wYmYxLWVlMTEtYWFmMi0wMDIyNDgyMjMzNTMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=mBb5b4s2AjsXtXlVBwY9Jf3tWEeXd910XATL4x0HqzQ=&emci=ddc2e942-02eb-ee11-aaf0-002248223794&emdi=fc746d74-0bf1-ee11-aaf2-002248223353&ceid=6787172)

Anyone from any background — including sexualities and gender identities! — can be a hot girl. But what really separates the hotties from the haters is our commitment to being progressive, pro-democracy, and pissed off at the status quo. Election Day 2024 is rapidly approaching, and we’re fired up to get as many hot girls registered to vote as possible. | Already registered? We LOVE a prepared hottie. Now’s the perfect time to add your name to pledge to vote and stay updated on all the election news between now and November. | Here’s the deal, hotties: Young Americans came out in WAVES to make a difference in the 2020 election. But in 2024, voter apathy is running rampant. More than 70 million young Americans are eligible to vote, more than any other age group in the nation. If we show up, we can turn the tide in any election. So let’s get registered and committed to voting this November. Love ya 💋 NextGen America | | = |

body:
This is make-or-break. | | |
---
| | [](https://click.everyaction.com/k/82215146/464694880/1498473125?refcode=EM_F_240402ban_N_HBMFL_90DO_9_G_N_Logo&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAwNy8xLzg4NDk1IiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogImI3Y2VlOTk5LTBiZjEtZWUxMS1hYWYyLTAwMjI0ODIyMzM1MyIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=DUf2cymAh8HRC3xupiQwNVJcLrc-qSOwf0x7hyUUz9E=)
---
We have good news and bad news, Peter.

**The bad news:** Yesterday, it was announced that the Florida Supreme Court ruled that “the State Constitution’s privacy protections do not extend to abortion,” effectively **banning abortion after six weeks of pregnancy – before most women know they are pregnant.**

As stated by _The New York Times, “In paving the way for the six-week ban, the court cemented the rapid transformation of Florida, once a destination for women seeking abortions in the American South, into a place with restrictive policies akin to those in surrounding states.”_

**Florida’s new abortion ban will go into effect on May 1st.**

**But here’s the good news:** The Florida Supreme Court also ruled that a proposed constitutional amendment, which would guarantee the right to an abortion, can appear on the ballot in November.
---
[](https://click.everyaction.com/k/82215147/464694881/1498473125?refcode=EM_F_240402ban_N_HBMFL_90DO_9_G_N_P1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAwNy8xLzg4NDk1IiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogImI3Y2VlOTk5LTBiZjEtZWUxMS1hYWYyLTAwMjI0ODIyMzM1MyIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=DUf2cymAh8HRC3xupiQwNVJcLrc-qSOwf0x7hyUUz9E=)
---
**This is our chance, Peter:** In November, **our partners will need 60% of the vote** to secure a passage of this amendment. This is a make-or-break moment for Florida. This vote gives the power back to the VOTERS instead of anti-choice lawmakers and judges.

We are an official partner organization working with the Florida Women's Freedom Coalition. This committee has been raising the necessary dollars to (successfully!) fund the petition drive and is now working to fund voter outreach efforts + the legal fees associated with defending the amendment against the Florida GOP. [**_Every dollar_ we raise for Her Bold Move Florida is sent directly to FWFC and is used to fund this fight.**](https://click.everyaction.com/k/82215148/464694882/1498473125?refcode=EM_F_240402ban_N_HBMFL_90DO_9_G_N_L1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAwNy8xLzg4NDk1IiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogImI3Y2VlOTk5LTBiZjEtZWUxMS1hYWYyLTAwMjI0ODIyMzM1MyIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=DUf2cymAh8HRC3xupiQwNVJcLrc-qSOwf0x7hyUUz9E=)

**We know Floridians want to protect the right to full reproductive healthcare, not restrict it. They’ll have a chance to make their voices heard in November – but our partners in Florida need our immediate support to get voter turnout high enough to break the 60% threshold needed to get this measure passed. That part will be a challenge.**

[**It is critical that we help get voters OUT TO VOTE for their reproductive healthcare. Please rush $20.24 to fund Her Bold Move Florida today so we can fight back against this draconian law and restore abortion access in Florida →**](https://click.everyaction.com/k/82215149/464694883/1498473125?refcode=EM_F_240402ban_N_HBMFL_90DO_9_G_N_L2&amount=20.24&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAwNy8xLzg4NDk1IiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogImI3Y2VlOTk5LTBiZjEtZWUxMS1hYWYyLTAwMjI0ODIyMzM1MyIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=DUf2cymAh8HRC3xupiQwNVJcLrc-qSOwf0x7hyUUz9E=) _If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately:_ | | [**$20.24 »**](https://click.everyaction.com/k/82215150/464694884/1498473125?refcode=EM_F_240402ban_N_HBMFL_90DO_9_G_N_EB20.24&express_lane=true&amount=20.24&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAwNy8xLzg4NDk1IiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogImI3Y2VlOTk5LTBiZjEtZWUxMS1hYWYyLTAwMjI0ODIyMzM1MyIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=DUf2cymAh8HRC3xupiQwNVJcLrc-qSOwf0x7hyUUz9E=)

name: Nancy Dahlstrom
subject: This makes absolutely no sense
body:
| | | [Click here to unsubscribe.](https://links.iterable.com/e/encryptedUnsubscribe?_r=a8e41c2a970b44d0a291e2cbf8512a7f&_s=9b1f2625350744c6a3a318669c69113e&_t=o5n4Qn8cFZfm-umsiHE2KT_hE_to4PZQeyrrFNgzTNaOn2UOkO6Qf0HrzdNagSHtAunrO8NvqIL5_b-Bp9rdBVLE4vXXZXHcDK0UFcB-PpI%3D)
---
| | Peter,
In 2020, President Trump won Alaska by [_**_**TEN POINTS**_**_](https://links.iterable.com/u/click?_t=a8e41c2a970b44d0a291e2cbf8512a7f&_m=9b1f2625350744c6a3a318669c69113e&_e=gI9_Pxu67pGZrQ1lplJMS4IiAy2wsZUtofyd7EW8wqKBMPw6iSvX-vHpwKQ34ZNbzcL0qXlp9-H-YqakevbhR7efmFmjEd6W-5dMZbArwBLJ1WzXSDgOqfuymA6Ecdx8mHVYdGiJ1mH3fyn_R9qnf_95s24DiS163B1mAXNUmbmZYeqAcbxvpFB6ov4fQ1KCNuHCwsDZY2xtAC9d7i5cRW37dAmNsTfAHtmjqPRe682mQAFWIe9kY7DV-suVx5z-9nwFKaKeIEOobc-_F9Bw_ZbTH_eu5ci0Q7oLsgvOt0bJ69Scw3oPKQQZZ0B3FrLWrMur4invvFdv5JWl78Zc3g%3D%3D) ____– so why in the world is a far-Left Democrat representing the[ _**_**ENTIRE**_**_](https://links.iterable.com/u/click?_t=a8e41c2a970b44d0a291e2cbf8512a7f&_m=9b1f2625350744c6a3a318669c69113e&_e=gI9_Pxu67pGZrQ1lplJMS4IiAy2wsZUtofyd7EW8wqKBMPw6iSvX-vHpwKQ34ZNbzcL0qXlp9-H-YqakevbhR7efmFmjEd6W-5dMZbArwBLJ1WzXSDgOqfuymA6Ecdx8mHVYdGiJ1mH3fyn_R9qnf_95s24DiS163B1mAXNUmbmZYeqAcbxvpFB6ov4fQ1KCiNPOGVa1K7BJSqWmCyqeqvEWXjRzyrEhqFm-i7w_AEh1YZLA2nFJkeQ_p24NDjKdW5sa-sz4aEnacl0FO-f-nrcOZygt2lwmgsZkoA_bCvvwJpjCD3T94f9hCTnDxYbIHst_QAxq8bNX1sC1JlwFQQ%3D%3D) ____state in Congress?

It’s time to fix that.

Because just imagine this scenario – President Trump boots Biden from the Oval Office and yet, he then runs into a brick wall of opposition and crooked witch hunts led by Chuck Schumer and Nancy Pelosi’s hand-picked successor, Speaker Hakeem Jeffries.

_**[It’s not impossible. In fact, it’s what will happen if conservatives don’t start taking back ground from the Democrats.](https://links.iterable.com/u/click?_t=a8e41c2a970b44d0a291e2cbf8512a7f&_m=9b1f2625350744c6a3a318669c69113e&_e=gI9_Pxu67pGZrQ1lplJMS4IiAy2wsZUtofyd7EW8wqKBMPw6iSvX-vHpwKQ34ZNbzcL0qXlp9-H-YqakevbhR7efmFmjEd6W-5dMZbArwBLJ1WzXSDgOqfuymA6Ecdx8mHVYdGiJ1mH3fyn_R9qnf_95s24DiS163B1mAXNUmbmZYeqAcbxvpFB6ov4fQ1KCDX3e7lP-FgbMFMpw22J2z9_tEXcU4yYAR9P7DUN5ZgKjj15gg9b6v7Quodxe2J_jiRVqYM9iGn0QSEcFkTRXH3bLR0E8Qn18N8nbByZ5f2vfX8u6fluv6wqhz_eODmfkQyipEXlAd9pZh3jVWPrBNg%3D%3D)**_

My name is Nancy Dahlstrom. A longtime champion for public safety, American energy and our brave men and women in uniform, I’m running to retake Alaska’s lone congressional seat for conservatism and the America First movement.

clean_body: | | | | | Peter, In 2020, President Trump won Alaska by – so why in the world is a far-Left Democrat representing the state in Congress? It’s time to fix that. Because just imagine this scenario – President Trump boots Biden from the Oval Office and yet, he then runs into a brick wall of opposition and crooked witch hunts led by Chuck Schumer and Nancy Pelosi’s hand-picked successor, Speaker Hakeem Jeffries. My name is Nancy Dahlstrom. A longtime champion for public safety, American energy and our brave men and women in uniform, I’m running to retake Alaska’s lone congressional seat for conservatism and the America First movement. | | | | I know you don’t often hear about Alaska, so let me emphasize even more why it matters this year. With the Republican House majority now down to just , every race matters, and the first step to getting back on track is by actually winning in Trump Country. What motivates me to serve other than supporting President Trump? I’ve got four kids and nine grandkids, and I refuse to sit back and watch the country they will inherit be destroyed by failed liberal policies and morally bankrupt left-wing ideology. I’ve personally fought to keep violent felons in jail, secure our borders – including the U.S.-Canada border, which criminals are using more and more to bring drugs into our country – and end the unlawful overreach of the federal government. Democrats are hoping national Republicans will forget about Alaska. Will you endorse my candidacy today to put the entire Democrat Party on notice and let the Republican establishment know that they pay attention to this race? This could very well be what decides control of Congress this November... Warm Regards, Nancy Dahlstrom | | | | | | | | ---|--- | | | |

Friend,

Joe Biden and the Radical Left's latest attack on Christians and Easter Sunday cannot stand.

Joe Biden declared Easter Sunday trans day of visibility and banned religious designs from the annual White House Easter contest.

House Republicans are outraged, and we need you to join us in condemning this disgusting attack on faith.

We need 10 Million signatures, and we don't have much time. That's why we're urgently reaching out now for your help.

_**So Friend, will you co-sign this open letter to President Biden and share your outrage?**_

| | **To: President Joseph R. Biden
From: Friend,

We, the American people of faith, are outraged.

Your attack on Easter Sunday, the holiest day of the year for Christians, is a slap in the face to all God-fearing Americans.

You claim to be a devout Catholic, but your actions tell a very different story.

Your decision to declare Easter Sunday trans day of visibility while banning religious themed designs from your Easter contest is disgusting.

It is unChristian.

It is unAmerican.

It is unacceptable.

We, Americans of faith, will not be silent while you blatantly attack our faith.

I, the undersigned, add my name to this open letter as an American of faith who has had enough of your attacks on and disrespect for Christianity.

And further, I will do everything in my power to defeat you in November and elect God-fearing Americans who understand the importance of religious liberty and respect people of faith. **
---

name: Open Letter to Joe Biden
subject: This attack on Easter and Christians is DISGRACEFUL.
disclaimer_text: Paid for by the NRCC and not authorized by any candidate or candidate's committee
body:
We cannot sit silently. We must stand up for our faith!

|
---
| | |
Friend,

Joe Biden and the Radical Left's latest attack on Christians and Easter Sunday cannot stand.

Joe Biden declared Easter Sunday trans day of visibility and banned religious designs from the annual White House Easter contest.

House Republicans are outraged, and we need you to join us in condemning this disgusting attack on faith.

We need 10 Million signatures, and we don't have much time. That's why we're urgently reaching out now for your help.

_**So Friend, will you co-sign this open letter to President Biden and share your outrage?**_

---
| | | [CO-SIGN THE OPEN LETTER](http://post.spmailtechnol.com/f/a/-EEJ7y0IXgNLYMk_e_o01g~~/AARclAA~~ "Generic Button")
---
| |
---
| | **To: President Joseph R. Biden
From: Friend,

We, the American people of faith, are outraged.

Your attack on Easter Sunday, the holiest day of the year for Christians, is a slap in the face to all God-fearing Americans.

You claim to be a devout Catholic, but your actions tell a very different story.

Your decision to declare Easter Sunday trans day of visibility while banning religious themed designs from your Easter contest is disgusting.

It is unChristian.

It is unAmerican.

It is unacceptable.

We, Americans of faith, will not be silent while you blatantly attack our faith.

I, the undersigned, add my name to this open letter as an American of faith who has had enough of your attacks on and disrespect for Christianity.

And further, I will do everything in my power to defeat you in November and elect God-fearing Americans who understand the importance of religious liberty and respect people of faith. **
---

Let's not forget - the stakes of this election have never been higher!

We are going to need every grassroots patriot to step up this election cycle. That is why I’m reaching out to YOU to ask for your support!

subject: Declaring Easter trans day of visibility is a slap in the face to every Christian.
disclaimer_text: Paid for by the NRCC and not authorized by any candidate or candidate's committee
body:
We cannot sit silently. We must stand up for our faith!

|
---
| | |
Friend,

Joe Biden and the Radical Left's latest attack on Christians and Easter Sunday cannot stand.

Joe Biden declared Easter Sunday trans day of visibility and banned religious designs from the annual White House Easter contest.

House Republicans are outraged, and we need you to join us in condemning this disgusting attack on faith.

We need 10 Million signatures, and we don't have much time. That's why we're urgently reaching out now for your help.

_**So Friend, will you co-sign this open letter to President Biden and share your outrage?**_

---
| | | [CO-SIGN THE OPEN LETTER](https://links.defend-the-constitution.org/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=5b87c8635f8248e692a5837a16fc3c3f&_e=f0LeH0VGXOiGJHrjOYiC5aBaOT7Hk5ZZGo1QCk5ihMZrgSL3n9nYzQ4HJWatKlyYWLTWy9q570T5gq_QF1RL9ZsCKtgrrUp6HKvI_uZJKpV9ndnEqdEG9_z-uW-wp-TpVDOJSgogFhnzhgfPN0yJPhVt1Wqiuh7WoQc7UywH8cMJ9HMBZUW4oN8DljO-RSrYnJEsJa9krCUAN99TM0hsTepj20W7wR0zCBso_N7_P6W6N31FHApO7NBg5EW7Mb_yUHZooUWV4GkGSXMKhtlkj5NWVhvqMbegNPI4H4pu-9Ho0rbY9GH7OwGbJNrgP2adPTRklWnbsTcj50O5IQHUgE4loSirlyI4Xy2dmbtYVl1LKObCn8lxVp5kL09FVBGRFzz-SPMCgbgxd5EUiIpu8LEKDmw6hZceWyfkoW5yn4EnO1AQltHNq-P3ZQNDOcgrJD8qYt06xlZG-8AHEpNEDg%3D%3D "Generic Button")

| | **To: President Joseph R. Biden
From: Friend,

We, the American people of faith, are outraged.

Your attack on Easter Sunday, the holiest day of the year for Christians, is a slap in the face to all God-fearing Americans.

You claim to be a devout Catholic, but your actions tell a very different story.

Your decision to declare Easter Sunday trans day of visibility while banning religious themed designs from your Easter contest is disgusting.

It is unChristian.

It is unAmerican.

It is unacceptable.

We, Americans of faith, will not be silent while you blatantly attack our faith.

I, the undersigned, add my name to this open letter as an American of faith who has had enough of your attacks on and disrespect for Christianity.

And further, I will do everything in my power to defeat you in November and elect God-fearing Americans who understand the importance of religious liberty and respect people of faith. **
---

name: Madeleine Dean
subject: Thank you for your help
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Mad4PA PAC
body:
**** Peter, thank you so much to those of you who chipped in to our end-of-quarter deadline. Your support lifts me, and it helped to lay a strong foundation for the pre-primary public filing deadline (more on that below).

_Now, I know what you’re thinking – wasn’t yesterday April Fools’ Day? Another deadline?_ **Yes, tomorrow is our public Pre-Primary Federal Election Commission deadline.**

We’ve been asking a lot (as have others, I know), but it’s important that we be ready for whatever comes our way. National Republicans are looking for targets as they refine their swing state strategies, so I’m doing all that I can to defend the Philadelphia suburbs with wide margins.

**[I wouldn’t ask if it weren’t important. Only if you’re able, will you consider supporting us as we work to raise an additional $8,500 for our Pre-Primary FEC deadline tomorrow?](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/82216830/464700377/-1186622517?amount=25&refcode=04022024_md_pre-primary_fr_1&refcode2=6f5c7e40-0ef1-ee11-aaf2-002248223353&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS85MDQ1OSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI2ZjVjN2U0MC0wZWYxLWVlMTEtYWFmMi0wMDIyNDgyMjMzNTMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=NyOncAAohBMrsxmOSJw7Mi7lh0EDXYXm3RhifUEbFfQ=)**

All eyes are on Pennsylvania this year, and the NRCC and national Republicans are desperate to make up ground in the suburbs. They’re looking for any weaknesses they might be able to exploit to help pick up critical votes, but with both your help and the strength of this team, we’ll show them that PA-04 and the Philly suburbs aren’t part of their equation. **[Only if you’re able, donate today to show the NRCC that Pennsylvania will stay blue this November.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/82216831/464700378/-1186622517?amount=25&refcode=04022024_md_pre-primary_fr_1&refcode2=6f5c7e40-0ef1-ee11-aaf2-002248223353&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS85MDQ1OSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI2ZjVjN2U0MC0wZWYxLWVlMTEtYWFmMi0wMDIyNDgyMjMzNTMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=NyOncAAohBMrsxmOSJw7Mi7lh0EDXYXm3RhifUEbFfQ=)**

Thanks for everything,

Madeleine [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/82216832/464700406/-1186622517?amount=25&refcode=04022024_md_pre-primary_fr_1&refcode2=6f5c7e40-0ef1-ee11-aaf2-002248223353&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS85MDQ1OSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI2ZjVjN2U0MC0wZWYxLWVlMTEtYWFmMi0wMDIyNDgyMjMzNTMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=NyOncAAohBMrsxmOSJw7Mi7lh0EDXYXm3RhifUEbFfQ=)
* * *
_Madeleine is an attorney, professor, mother, grandmother, and Member of Congress, representing Pennsylvania’s 4th Congressional District of Berks and Montgomery Counties. She is an outspoken leader who champions progressive priorities such as education, universal access to healthcare, gun safety, and ethical government.**Madeleine Dean has built a reputation for getting things done, and we need her to continue to be our voice to serve us in Congress.**_ _We are excited to have you on Team Dean! Our campaign is funded by people who care about our democracy and want to see continued progress in our community and in our country. If you'd like to donate,[**click here.**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/82216834/464700408/-850630802?amount=25&refcode=04022024_md_pre-primary_fr_1&refcode2=6f5c7e40-0ef1-ee11-aaf2-002248223353&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS85MDQ1OSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI2ZjVjN2U0MC0wZWYxLWVlMTEtYWFmMi0wMDIyNDgyMjMzNTMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=NyOncAAohBMrsxmOSJw7Mi7lh0EDXYXm3RhifUEbFfQ=) If you’d like to volunteer, [**click here.**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/82216836/464700410/-410778297?refcode=04022024_md_pre-primary_fr_1&refcode2=6f5c7e40-0ef1-ee11-aaf2-002248223353&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS85MDQ1OSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI2ZjVjN2U0MC0wZWYxLWVlMTEtYWFmMi0wMDIyNDgyMjMzNTMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=NyOncAAohBMrsxmOSJw7Mi7lh0EDXYXm3RhifUEbFfQ=&emci=86649bb2-79f0-ee11-aaf0-002248223794&emdi=6f5c7e40-0ef1-ee11-aaf2-002248223353&ceid=36373569)_ [DONATE](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/82216838/464700416/-850630802?amount=25&refcode=04022024_md_pre-primary_fr_1&refcode2=6f5c7e40-0ef1-ee11-aaf2-002248223353&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS85MDQ1OSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI2ZjVjN2U0MC0wZWYxLWVlMTEtYWFmMi0wMDIyNDgyMjMzNTMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=NyOncAAohBMrsxmOSJw7Mi7lh0EDXYXm3RhifUEbFfQ=) | Paid for by Mad4PA PAC

House Republicans are outraged, and we need you to join us in condemning this disgusting attack on faith.

We need 10 Million signatures, and we don't have much time. That's why we're urgently reaching out now for your help.

_**So Friend, will you co-sign this open letter to President Biden and share your outrage?**_

---
| | | [CO-SIGN THE OPEN LETTER](http://post.spmailtechnol.com/f/a/_0LLhtSuqdWrFVyK4eFD3Q~~/AARclAA~~~ "Generic Button")
---
| |
---
| | **To: President Joseph R. Biden
From: Friend,

We, the American people of faith, are outraged.

Your attack on Easter Sunday, the holiest day of the year for Christians, is a slap in the face to all God-fearing Americans.

You claim to be a devout Catholic, but your actions tell a very different story.

Your decision to declare Easter Sunday trans day of visibility while banning religious themed designs from your Easter contest is disgusting.

It is unChristian.

It is unAmerican.

It is unacceptable.

We, Americans of faith, will not be silent while you blatantly attack our faith.

I, the undersigned, add my name to this open letter as an American of faith who has had enough of your attacks on and disrespect for Christianity.

And further, I will do everything in my power to defeat you in November and elect God-fearing Americans who understand the importance of religious liberty and respect people of faith. **
---

name: Debbie Mucarsel-Powell
subject: I need to know that you'll vote this fall
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Debbie for Florida
body:
Friend, I've got some big news for you:
| | |
---
Friend, I've got good news and bad news: The Florida Supreme Court just ruled to keep abortion rights on the ballot this November, but they also ruled to uphold Ron DeSantis' 6-week ban. **That means that this ballot initiative is our chance to overturn DeSantis' extreme ban and restore our reproductive freedom.**
The tides are changing in Florida. And this ballot initiative has a _very_ good chance of passing. Recent polling shows that 62% of voters, including a majority of Republicans, support passing it. And a massive 75% of voters oppose the extreme six-week ban that will take effect in 29 days.
This is what a powerful grassroots movement can accomplish._And that's exactly what we need to defeat Rick Scott and stop him from passing a nationwide ban on abortions._
Listen, Rick Scott wants you to believe that our home is a red state. But that couldn't be further from the truth. More and more of us are rejecting his far-right agenda every day. And polling data shows that this race is neck and neck.
But now, Rick Scott is spending millions to lie about his record and launch baseless attacks against me.******I need to know that I can count on reliable voters like you to have my back this fall.[ So please, with all eyes on Florida, will you commit to voting this fall? I'm counting on 25,000 people to sign on before 11:59 p.m. tonight, so please add your name now:](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/82217373/464702268/2023482468?email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=34223&ask=5&amounts=5,25,50,100&code=jtk855-su-nd&refcode=jtk855-su-nd&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDYvMS8xMDc1MjUiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiZjhmOTQ2ZjEtMGVmMS1lZTExLWFhZjItMDAyMjQ4MjIzMzUzIiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=ZzQo69g8vuQebKZewVHiiNCehmEwWpKEpXXpq0iBnHo=&emci=04d7cde4-60d0-ee11-85f9-002248223794&emdi=f8f946f1-0ef1-ee11-aaf2-002248223353&ceid=3969733)**
| | [Commit to Vote >>](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/82217374/464702269/2023482468?email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=34223&ask=5&amounts=5,25,50,100&code=jtk855-su-nd&refcode=jtk855-su-nd&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDYvMS8xMDc1MjUiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiZjhmOTQ2ZjEtMGVmMS1lZTExLWFhZjItMDAyMjQ4MjIzMzUzIiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=ZzQo69g8vuQebKZewVHiiNCehmEwWpKEpXXpq0iBnHo=&emci=04d7cde4-60d0-ee11-85f9-002248223794&emdi=f8f946f1-0ef1-ee11-aaf2-002248223353&ceid=3969733)
---
Together, we will win a better future for our state and our families.

Thank you for all that you do,

Debbie
|
* * *
| | | [Contribute](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/82217375/464702270/-31196584?code=jtk855-su-nd&refcode=jtk855-su-nd&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDYvMS8xMDc1MjUiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiZjhmOTQ2ZjEtMGVmMS1lZTExLWFhZjItMDAyMjQ4MjIzMzUzIiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=ZzQo69g8vuQebKZewVHiiNCehmEwWpKEpXXpq0iBnHo=)

She’s dedicated her life to uplifting working families, ending gun violence, and fighting for her community. Now, she’s running to defeat Republican Senator Rick Scott and win a better, brighter future for Florida.

name: Hill Harper
subject: I can’t thank you enough, Peter
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY HILL HARPER FOR MICHIGAN
body:
We’re one step closer to building a better future in Michigan.
# [](https://act.hillharper.com/go/421?t=1&akid=1131%2E62735%2EkuCJ0U)
[](https://act.hillharper.com/go/1029?t=2&akid=1131%2E62735%2EkuCJ0U)
I have some incredible news to share, Peter —
My team just updated me on our campaign finances, and because of your generosity last month, **we hit our end-of-quarter online fundraising goal.** I cannot thank you enough!
As we look ahead to the August Primary, hitting every campaign goal from today forward is _critical_ to our victory at the ballot box. Every grassroots dollar we receive will help us hire more field organizers, meet more voters where they’re at, and ultimately, build a campaign that can win.
**And we do need to win, Peter:**
👉🏾 Republicans have a radical agenda planned for our country, including passing a national abortion ban and cutting Social Security funding. We _cannot_ let them flip Michigan’s open Senate seat and take the majority.
👉🏾 In the Senate, I’ll be a vote to end the filibuster threatening women’s rights, voting rights, and progress on nearly every issue facing our nation.
👉🏾 In Donald Trump’s own words: “If we win Michigan, we win the election.” It’s up to us Michiganders to save our nation from his dangerous, right-wing extremism.
No matter how you slice it, all signs point to this: For Democrats to turn up the energy and rally voters to victory on Election Day, **we need fresh and inspiring leadership in the U.S. Senate — not more of the same, tried-and-failed career politicians.**
Thank you again for standing with us.
Hill Harper
Democrat for U.S. Senate
P.S. If you didn’t get a chance to chip in before the deadline, don’t worry — we have a lot of ground to cover this month, too! **[Please, click here to chip in and kick our field team’s voter outreach into high gear>>>](https://act.hillharper.com/go/1029?t=3&akid=1131%2E62735%2EkuCJ0U)**
* * *
**[DONATE »](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/bax_hh_email?refcode=bax_hh_emailfooter&t=4&refcode2=1131_62735_kuCJ0U&akid=1131%2E62735%2EkuCJ0U)**
This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is a critical way we communicate with grassroots supporters like you. However, if you would like to change your subscription preferences, here are some options:
* [Receive Fewer Emails](https://act.hillharper.com/signup/receive-fewer-emails/?t=5&akid=1131%2E62735%2EkuCJ0U)
* [Update Your Information](https://act.hillharper.com/signup/update-your-information/)
* [Unsubscribe](https://act.hillharper.com/unsubscribe/unsubscribe/?t=6&akid=1131%2E62735%2EkuCJ0U)

To give by check:
Hill Harper for Michigan
PO Box 13195
Lansing, MI 48901
Email us: [info@hillharper.com](mailto:info@hillharper.com)
PAID FOR BY HILL HARPER FOR MICHIGAN

name: Kirk Clay
subject: A Time for Action: Support Marquita Bradshaw for U.S. Senate #BeThe1st
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Marquita Bradshaw for US Senate
body:
As heirs to the legacy of Dr. King and the movement for civil rights and labor, we carry..
| | |
---
| | [](https://l5vsmw.fg98.fdske.com/ec/gAAAAABmDDRWdwah_q3B3oa4Kwde-fomrm48VQLN1Vye5ZpmSxAzYrbSxFUTGUefcUGPeVRdWZaiVJoZghVtr2XBsXEBcHPjHoxVRwqvax6uw5QHPHyrDGdzHlMoxm_kG_lGfhJn9yxXAdko-ck0aBK7Jr7TXJGadjhxPcXVGGMwIouN32J6Tv2_A-PEYSd3wzcLjTcWNWXcw2oVc-bhrRvXaH25UmeksBhagNnYg8aJzXRqIx61PVM91rXaWSgke4HIBtC-C-9CQljCeL5zsFhaHQ3yCrtNqqg1PdCWNrwTxY3ZNfzmhS38EmL-v5J7jFT_bDZ685oY6Zhx8ix1XN25pzqQ6z8rlcXQp5fiaGcHNH99wHGHAmelBEAROOZKQUc0BA9cIE91)
---
| _**A Time for Action:** Support Marquita Bradshaw for U.S. Senate _[_#BeThe1st_](https://l5vsmw.fg98.fdske.com/ec/gAAAAABmDDRWKZT5vybLvyDAbsdJaYMm6PXS-d96GaAZCCVvOnEvGkdlnppwsymf4p0HE32D4OEe7ux17fa3K63DyYQSSpVSkNJ8MwEalhBW0R9Q5rM_R2K2Q3EumBk46ssXNchBD2O0KZouwsi--vYxskug9QyKNQnDzUEm_ScI0K_Ac8tka0x_xC-HTxYy9S4GfuIyadcvH6nzFx0Sjm8gnxwF1cCITjoSN02nVdsvRZvTWpTY-ZP-6LghQSf-lrp71TH1lmRHKZry9ZYsCjVo1ImUGWAS2XwJPah27ovll9Z2_gM7FjD_uEIBVK5JrOw9kaDrRMAd_Horgp9hAxxkTObcAlF2s8pJ_rkYa2FbIczko2nNTtoGeqSG_HL68Lbn4kF_Z_K-oAOqg1gc9DVoPReR1xAcDWfbFhzYQcDwSOoN9VNLkTc=)
---
| Peter
---
| On this solemn anniversary of Dr. Martin Luther King Jr.'s assassination, we are reminded of the profound impact his life and legacy have had on our nation's history. [As we reflect on this moment, it's clear that we stand at a defining juncture. It's a time to remember the indispensable role that unions have played and continue to play in the shaping of America. ](https://l5vsmw.fg98.fdske.com/ec/gAAAAABmDDRWIGP-LfuH7UYanC3ezWZxY8uyEyCSgXJNy_V2fjPj220pd6SUH9nx9AiCQypIZb31cr-RHN6GFP2FTzsOvqkgDDLIPgR5xG6IWTbeO5r7zB4jbRJoiA1khDzR2w45oG7BRrDZCZ3TtHmfDN-mH9DeQN64BllOLDpEF0NiB1in5kG2GvD4qQc1dAcaDt1plhfFZ7HRRualTysYARi-18f995t1r71rP9KRVl9WFQ8ajHzt4--thRbVmnpzhuDAl1mwm26xU9CcWnzZIeYehN50CFSQamcZmmE1dJAGD4wInFbTRaI-zyjlk9fJX3TM5vWFmIxtweQo3IvcKG3QEw2k9WXo-bzLrpLpdA1A2hAZbOQy6B9zzKUlNDvJ3OtkupLn)This moment is about far more than organizing—it's about elevating the voices of working Americans, advocating for quality employment, championing policies that support our workforce, and nurturing a culture of solidarity and collective action. As heirs to the legacy of Dr. King and the movement for civil rights and labor, we carry a deep responsibility to the 64 million workers across our nation who seek a voice in their workplace, a voice to which they are fundamentally entitled. In honoring Dr. King's memory, we continue to fight for the dignity and respect of every American worker. It is in this spirit that I write to you today about a candidate who embodies these values and commitments: Marquita Bradshaw. [In the race for the U.S. Senate seat from Tennessee, no one matches Marquita Bradshaw's enduring and fervent commitment to the causes of civil rights, workers' rights, and environmental justice. Marquita's conviction is clear: we must adopt policies that reshape our country into one that truly honors the dignity of its women, its working class, and its communities of color.](https://l5vsmw.fg98.fdske.com/ec/gAAAAABmDDRWpgy6ZeEqyJAUcKMdgDnv-DjQTi_Gs7BZ2E7_DFz4I1HS8DsehjgcMb4eEZYV40chwpxajXfNfbd8i_x9t-6Q4KsLCohcVkvxutnwvJv-mSDK7M1JWBWbrCupVxlLGdCEr3WxgL261xGJBQIFr2Anf7raVamdVuEK8HFQyuHVB6d0kwQ6BfyR6NPLjH8wPvzVQN3KuYZMsG0LbQfhIAgRKUFZD05-0pCpfpm44FZxsK5OXL8Qysa3WqDWmoNnaqRIdd30AieW7n8HVt5tpIU9DNewcusiTz1hiIXb3EqFs6E5zOHub8JxaYksJ9gG3Mn3xhwFg0u5TOeXGcZnSaC8g2puCQ0yCijsGCglsOVHiHKIxmBZi1hBmRRRS4zozeJE) Marquita's life is a testament to her advocacy for social justice, workers' rights, and the protection of our environment. From an early age, following in the footsteps of her parents and grandparents, she has walked the path of protest and advocacy. Whether it's her work with the Sierra Club or the AFL-CIO, Marquita has been at the forefront of the fight for environmental justice and labor rights. [When it comes to addressing the injustices faced by working communities in America, Marquita Bradshaw presents the most thorough and thoughtful plan among all candidates vying for Tennessee's Senate seat. Her commitment to demilitarizing our police forces, restoring voting rights, ending the era of for-profit prisons, and ensuring that higher education is accessible to all underscores a bold and transformative vision for racial justice.](https://l5vsmw.fg98.fdske.com/ec/gAAAAABmDDRWiADOlhiEtZ9Vrd4k51EluNh2vMtYi-aZUnFEtOdy49v76HWqBrrXMCKUV_6B8b39jPeyzGvLMlaxt259vlzZykGcnpz9vjesF4xvBbH4olQ1gfS4IJde16QkvWvLzBcukyFoz5dAtjO4JX9m3Q_17xvUpjez5hpKRmlqZfNRgYUnnSbBi6lQ9w5kQmZB3bCPOurNGwG_K36O4jvYg86dKtPhdGFYeA1iKi5VDFur-xBZRthUvulBxBztSANcXFKWLsxekFnh6jkwYdiLlyYrsuUYt4ErGrBgtZXn4RJ-SyiLeprzH3c6sIBFqRsk07TcgYjjOj5D9xPwzJhcY2aWFPAA5KhXMctihgVzTlnEIg2KoLKAngGBaWBbfpTuDuR-) We are at a critical moment in our nation's history, and the stakes could not be higher. As we honor the memory of Dr. King and continue his legacy of justice and equality, let us come together to support a candidate who truly represents these values. Marquita Bradshaw's dedication to civil rights activism and her bold vision for a more just and equitable society make her the clear choice for the U.S. Senate. Your support can make a difference. We invite you to join us in this important campaign, not just as donors, but as partners in the ongoing fight for justice and equality. Together, we can ensure that Marquita Bradshaw's voice—a voice for the people—is heard in the U.S. Senate. Thank you for standing with us. Let us honor Dr. King's legacy by supporting a candidate who is committed to the dignity and respect of every American worker, to the fight for civil rights, and to the pursuit of environmental justice. clean_body: As heirs to the legacy of Dr. King and the movement for civil rights and labor, we carry.. | | | | | | A Time for Action: Support Marquita Bradshaw for U.S. Senate = | Peter | On this solemn anniversary of Dr. Martin Luther King Jr.'s assassination, we are reminded of the profound impact his life and legacy have had on our nation's history. moment is about far more than organizing—it's about elevating the voices of working Americans, advocating for quality employment, championing policies that support our workforce, and nurturing a culture of solidarity and collective action. As heirs to the legacy of Dr. King and the movement for civil rights and labor, we carry a deep responsibility to the 64 million workers across our nation who seek a voice in their workplace, a voice to which they are fundamentally entitled. In honoring Dr. King's memory, we continue to fight for the dignity and respect of every American worker. It is in this spirit that I write to you today about a candidate who embodies these values and commitments: Marquita Bradshaw. Marquita's life is a testament to her advocacy for social justice, workers' rights, and the protection of our environment. From an early age, following in the footsteps of her parents and grandparents, she has walked the path of protest and advocacy. Whether it's her work with the Sierra Club or the AFL-CIO, Marquita has been at the forefront of the fight for environmental justice and labor rights. - We are at a critical moment in our nation's history, and the stakes could not be higher. As we honor the memory of Dr. King and continue his legacy of justice and equality, let us come together to support a candidate who truly represents these values. Marquita Bradshaw's dedication to civil rights activism and her bold vision for a more just and equitable society make her the clear choice for the U.S. Senate. Your support can make a difference. We invite you to join us in this important campaign, not just as donors, but as partners in the ongoing fight for justice and equality. Together, we can ensure that Marquita Bradshaw's voice—a voice for the people—is heard in the U.S. Senate. Thank you for standing with us. Let us honor Dr. King's legacy by supporting a candidate who is committed to the dignity and respect of every American worker, to the fight for civil rights, and to the pursuit of environmental justice. In solidarity = , Kirk | | Campaign Manager | | | | | == | == | == | = | == | == | == | | You can or all you want, but you'll always be in our heart. | Paid for by Marquita Bradshaw for US Senate.Marquita Bradshaw for U S Senate | | 1498 Union #901 Memphis, TN 38104 , United States

name: Wes Moore
subject: To the people of Maryland
body:
Friend,

Last week, a cargo ship collided with the Francis Scott Key Bridge in Baltimore, resulting in its collapse.

Within minutes, first responders were on the scene — and in the hours and days since the collapse, everyone has stepped up to serve. Maryland has risen to meet this moment.

We have spoken to the families, prayed with them, and assured them that our state will mobilize every resource to bring them closure. We are moving in close coordination with leaders at all levels of government and all parts of society to support those who have been touched by this tragedy. And we are moving with urgency to clear the channel, open the Port, and rebuild the bridge.

The President has voiced his full support for our work, and Maryland will continue to move in close contact with our federal partners until we get the job done. We’ve been standing together every step of the way alongside our county, city, and state leadership to respond to this ongoing crisis.
There is a long road ahead of us. The task before us is daunting. But our resolve is unshaken.

This work will take time. But we are going to make sure that we leave no one behind.

To all of the people of Maryland: In the face of danger, we hold out. That is what we’ve always done. That’s what we will continue to do.
We are Maryland tough. We are Baltimore strong. We will get through this together.

[https://prod.cdn.everyaction.com/images/van/NGP/NGP30/1/90457/images/IMG_0081.jpg]

Elevate,

Wes

---
This message was sent to: dpwillis67@gmail.com.

The road to the Senate majority and the White House run right through Wisconsin. We know it, and Republicans know it, too. That’s why Trump’s back for the first time in two years to drum up GOP support that will boost Republicans like Eric Hovde up-and-down the ticket in Wisconsin.

name: Maxwell Frost
subject: Gen Z vs. MAGA
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY MAXWELL FROST FOR CONGRESS
body:
| [](http://clicksp.frostforcongress.com/f/a/9ilAhXv28aanO7dRjpXgHQ~~/AAPPAAA~/RgRn7r4EP0TPaHR0cHM6Ly9zZWN1cmUuYWN0Ymx1ZS5jb20vZG9uYXRlL21hZi1lbS1wZ2U_cmVmY29kZT0yMDI0MDQwMl9lbV9mcl9iMV9nZW56X2JpZGVuX2VuX1JTJmFtb3VudD0yNyZjZG1jPTJlWUJsUDhEV215TkJJNzZ6SXBKeEVGNEc1ayZyZWZjb2RlMj0yZVlCbFA4RFdteU5CSTc2eklwSnhFRjRHNWsmcmVmY29kZWNkbWM9MmVZQmxQOERXbXlOQkk3NnpJcEp4RUY0RzVrVwNzcGNCCmYEBDkMZkcbQs9SFGRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tWAQAAABp) Peter – As the first member of Gen Z elected to Congress, I know the power my generation holds in securing a better future for our country.

But if Trump wins reelection, that future will be turned upside down. **That’s why I’m traveling to battleground states across the country to engage with Gen Z voters and turn them out to the polls this year for President Biden.**

We NEED to fire up young voters to prevent another Trump presidency. My generation deserves a say in our future, so I’m taking this youth-powered movement to new heights and making sure our voices are heard this November.

_But that makes me a top target for attacks from MAGA Republicans who want to shut out our generation at the polls._

So I’m counting on your support, Peter. Because when we all come together, we can create an unstoppable movement that MAGA Republicans won’t stand a chance against.

[**_I need 250 supporters to step up with a donation today to ensure we have the resources to grow our youth-powered movement and engage young voters across the country. Can you rush a few dollar now? >>_**](http://clicksp.frostforcongress.com/f/a/9ilAhXv28aanO7dRjpXgHQ~~/AAPPAAA~/RgRn7r4EP0TPaHR0cHM6Ly9zZWN1cmUuYWN0Ymx1ZS5jb20vZG9uYXRlL21hZi1lbS1wZ2U_cmVmY29kZT0yMDI0MDQwMl9lbV9mcl9iMV9nZW56X2JpZGVuX2VuX1JTJmFtb3VudD0yNyZjZG1jPTJlWUJsUDhEV215TkJJNzZ6SXBKeEVGNEc1ayZyZWZjb2RlMj0yZVlCbFA4RFdteU5CSTc2eklwSnhFRjRHNWsmcmVmY29kZWNkbWM9MmVZQmxQOERXbXlOQkk3NnpJcEp4RUY0RzVrVwNzcGNCCmYEBDkMZkcbQs9SFGRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tWAQAAABp)

Peter, young people are the driving force for change. We’ve already seen what happens when my generation turns out to the polls: **Democrats win._Democracy wins._**

With so much on the line – like taking action on gun violence, protecting abortion access, and ensuring our democracy stays intact – young people are paying more attention than ever before. But these risks alone won’t guarantee that they’ll head to the ballot box.

We need to reach young people where they are and _genuinely engage_ with them to bring them into this movement. That’s how we beat Trump and re-elect President Biden. That’s how we save the future of our democracy.

**But now, MAGA Republicans are TERRIFIED and desperate to stop young people from rising up in the next election, so I need your help.**

[**_To keep our youth-powered movement strong in the face of MAGA attacks, I’ll need an unstoppable grassroots movement behind me. Can you rush any amount right now to power my work to turn out young voters against Trump this November? >>_**](http://clicksp.frostforcongress.com/f/a/9ilAhXv28aanO7dRjpXgHQ~~/AAPPAAA~/RgRn7r4EP0TPaHR0cHM6Ly9zZWN1cmUuYWN0Ymx1ZS5jb20vZG9uYXRlL21hZi1lbS1wZ2U_cmVmY29kZT0yMDI0MDQwMl9lbV9mcl9iMV9nZW56X2JpZGVuX2VuX1JTJmFtb3VudD0yNyZjZG1jPTJlWUJsUDhEV215TkJJNzZ6SXBKeEVGNEc1ayZyZWZjb2RlMj0yZVlCbFA4RFdteU5CSTc2eklwSnhFRjRHNWsmcmVmY29kZWNkbWM9MmVZQmxQOERXbXlOQkk3NnpJcEp4RUY0RzVrVwNzcGNCCmYEBDkMZkcbQs9SFGRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tWAQAAABp) | | | [Donate $10](http://clicksp.frostforcongress.com/f/a/1MiS8TM0B3ANwQrHf9p5aw~~/AAPPAAA~/RgRn7r4EP0TPaHR0cHM6Ly9zZWN1cmUuYWN0Ymx1ZS5jb20vZG9uYXRlL21hZi1lbS1wZ2U_cmVmY29kZT0yMDI0MDQwMl9lbV9mcl9iMV9nZW56X2JpZGVuX2VuX1JTJmFtb3VudD0xMCZjZG1jPTJlWUJsUDhEV215TkJJNzZ6SXBKeEVGNEc1ayZyZWZjb2RlMj0yZVlCbFA4RFdteU5CSTc2eklwSnhFRjRHNWsmcmVmY29kZWNkbWM9MmVZQmxQOERXbXlOQkk3NnpJcEp4RUY0RzVrVwNzcGNCCmYEBDkMZkcbQs9SFGRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tWAQAAABp)

name: Forward Party
subject: Have you ever thought about running for office?
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Forward Party and not authorized by any candidate or candidate's committee
body:
We announced two candidates - you could be next

| | [ ](https://home.forwardparty.com/r?u=JgyyvCfQwldlSeD7KJl_Ih7269o_4hwqOhPs1_PHvgI&e=61868e7acdd36ae0ddf3e39aa8429171&utm_source=forwardparty&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=a_fast_forward_39&n=1)
---
Tuesday, April 02, 2024 | Peter -- The Forward Party is growing, and we're always looking for new candidates for office who want to approach politics trying to solve problems, not stoke partisan flames. There are over 500,000 offices across this country, and many of them are unfilled! If you've ever thought of serving your community, this is a great way to do so. Please, sign up below and someone from Forward will reach out to discuss race selection and what to expect. With our expertise and partnerships, running for local office has never been easier. | [](https://home.forwardparty.com/r?u=JgyyvCfQwldlSeD7KJl_Ipe3fy_4OIcq1ThxZlRv1ZNHhgIhjtcwq7JumKAA_Rh8&e=61868e7acdd36ae0ddf3e39aa8429171&utm_source=forwardparty&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=a_fast_forward_39&n=2 "Run For Office!") **Two members of our Pennsylvania Party have already taken the plunge! Last week, two Forward candidates announced for statewide office:**
**Eric Settle**
Eric Settle is running for Attorney General because that office needs someone who isn’t beholden to the two legacy parties. Attorney General is a role that needs to make deeply consequential nonpartisan decisions every day—they could even be called upon to ensure that our next election is free and fair. Eric has spent his entire career as an attorney before serving on Governor Josh Shapiro’s transition team. He worked in Gov. Ridge's office, helped usher in one of the strongest laws ensuring health care coverage for children with autism, and has served as counsel to a health care company. His wealth of knowledge and variety of experiences will ensure he can carry out the varied work of the AG's office.
**Chris Foster**
Chris Foster is a business owner and tennis professional who’s running for State Treasurer in Pennsylvania. A problem solver at heart, Chris looks to bring a nonpartisan eye to the role of treasurer, a position that needs to be impartial. “This independent branch of government should make informed and objective decisions that maximize return on investments, minimize risks, and safeguard taxpayer dollars, party and politics free,” Chris said during his announcement speech.

Sign Up To Run For Office As A** **Forwardist!**](https://home.forwardparty.com/r?u=JgyyvCfQwldlSeD7KJl_Ipe3fy_4OIcq1ThxZlRv1ZNHhgIhjtcwq7JumKAA_Rh8&e=61868e7acdd36ae0ddf3e39aa8429171&utm_source=forwardparty&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=a_fast_forward_39&n=3 "Run for Office")

Eric Settle and Chris Foster will be running under the FWD banner for Attorney General and State Treasurer, respectively. “People are sick of the polarization, of the blame game, and of things falling apart," said Yang, who is the Forward Party co-chair. "That's why this is such an important opportunity for Pennsylvanian voters to say, 'we get it. We want better for ourselves.'" [**Forward Party Announces Candidates For State Attorney General, Treasurer in 2024**](https://home.forwardparty.com/r?u=vkWvGfur6S3-2EDDjl2jC_L9nqYKO_SQAr2fHxj2mAKUilbQbijEJMnesKcZngJdHq-TvdoTxe4QiosJvc5ShXb82WF-cKRtqw56cC4Un-pQL0UT-yi0LG3oLJhD3AJ9dau2MuYoqW5u5PqqCeWZgshjGh6ZuAnD0LUAPszrCEjA9W5xN0EHjVEK4SCHoVWX&e=61868e7acdd36ae0ddf3e39aa8429171&utm_source=forwardparty&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=a_fast_forward_39&n=5) | _City & State Pennsylvania_ “I truly believe that the Forward Party is focused on solving our greatest problems and in the best position to be the fulcrum for change,” Settle said Tuesday, adding that as a Forward Party candidate, he seeks to “use this office not as a stepping stone for higher office, but as a platform to use the laws and the constitution of Pennsylvania to make our commonwealth a safer, cleaner, healthier and fairer place for us, our children and grandchildren.”

body:
If you opened this email because you remember my playing days with the Dodgers and the Padres, thank you.

| |
---
| | [](https://links.freedomnationtoday.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=8ed452b292854ca98b2178557d13dcf8&_e=oWu9ryYH6N9Boh8Qgf4sHbGlNhI2L1EdJK7S5jeXaX7w3ESUhh9RWSmSQfLUsYdliQ4gz3Zsh2PL0Ei3szif0mNPuPTsL_VgH0ToR2jAbGp9wmsfsI4CSwbD-63DyekUaRnSZFO1SpAxMC1otI-u_j4aJPP8K6PM-pZbs1nLVZjlv96B_xjpDkAdltToE554AdDdCONXBYcbyVl2oHK6MJLxRCG9gAs7gGX-O18ptbO7vjRbXU25oHmz_muFXXlWOiBrCgyULfHpVmiy4CIsPqVUqKE92okA2JhR_xGTt8vHCB3JDE0-yH6XjbKK5g3Vtpg1CCPJOVi838XVkPG3EqW7oAj59oTDbAWhX9m70dDOwcBunQ_6fsqyFTvxnxRUxzILcWnKZ7QJsH0vAPxMRw%3D%3D)
---
| | Dear Fellow Patriot, If you opened this email because you remember my playing days with the Dodgers and the Padres, thank you.
---
| | Having you and all of America's baseball fans cheering for me and Davey Lopes, Bill Russell, Ron Cey and the rest of the guys as we battled Reggie Jackson, Thurman Munson and the Yankees... ...well, as they say, "Those were the days." But this email isn't about baseball. In fact, it's a email I never thought I'd be writing to you.
---
| [](https://links.freedomnationtoday.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=8ed452b292854ca98b2178557d13dcf8&_e=oWu9ryYH6N9Boh8Qgf4sHbGlNhI2L1EdJK7S5jeXaX7w3ESUhh9RWSmSQfLUsYdliQ4gz3Zsh2PL0Ei3szif0mNPuPTsL_VgH0ToR2jAbGp9wmsfsI4CSwbD-63DyekUaRnSZFO1SpAxMC1otI-u_j4aJPP8K6PM-pZbs1nLVZjlv96B_xjpDkAdltToE554AdDdCONXBYcbyVl2oHK6MJLxRCG9gAs7gGX-O18ptbO7vjRbXU25oHmz_muFXXlWqfbEEsXhhRqkTMBme1vURAKJ8SreRVsYDRxsPyznHiubgIRCTHEUiqqo39jBgnyM_dqrCWvpfEDbpqUYYHClmQ85T_92QKLIO_upUkG-Cpni-NgfHsjQUjrm-DZHA3xeyFFshlOb9FHuHof58rodiA%3D%3D)
---
| | **[Today, I'm asking you to help me defeat the radical Adam Schiff for a seat in the United States Senate.](https://links.freedomnationtoday.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=8ed452b292854ca98b2178557d13dcf8&_e=oWu9ryYH6N9Boh8Qgf4sHbGlNhI2L1EdJK7S5jeXaX7w3ESUhh9RWSmSQfLUsYdliQ4gz3Zsh2PL0Ei3szif0mNPuPTsL_VgH0ToR2jAbGp9wmsfsI4CSwbD-63DyekUaRnSZFO1SpAxMC1otI-u_j4aJPP8K6PM-pZbs1nLVZjlv96B_xjpDkAdltToE554AdDdCONXBYcbyVl2oHK6MJLxRCG9gAs7gGX-O18ptbO7vjRbXU25oHmz_muFXXlWIM7ib8PwYiLMtBr1I5HFFVDYiDFDcAUM1HSbrsaTqJxRchrcHqxRpq5xyxG8qTlz-WpTZkn1KXEx6lKi1X4Mn_2akMjJD5vrIh6_YpNTv8ppDN0KIcM7F7hW1My1rIuJX8TF-xZriU_LVng_NCZeBQ%3D%3D)** As of March 5th, it's official. I'm going head-to-head with Adam Schiff in November. Democrat policies have brought America to its knees. There's fear of walking down the street because of rampant crime, homelessness, and drug addiction. The cost of living is exploding and for the first time causing more people to leave California. Joe Biden, Adam Schiff and the rest of the Democrats don't care one bit that Americans are having a hard time. I'd go even further to say they welcome the misery so they can keep folks down and dependent. And that's why I'm running for Senate. **_We Republicans_ pulled our country out of the 1970's Democratic malaise by electing Ronald Reagan.** And I believe we can do it again by putting classic conservative values at the heart of everything we do. But there is no way I can pull it off without you. **[**Will you rush a contribution to my campaign of $35 or more today?**](https://links.freedomnationtoday.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=8ed452b292854ca98b2178557d13dcf8&_e=oWu9ryYH6N9Boh8Qgf4sHbGlNhI2L1EdJK7S5jeXaX7w3ESUhh9RWSmSQfLUsYdliQ4gz3Zsh2PL0Ei3szif0mNPuPTsL_VgH0ToR2jAbGp9wmsfsI4CSwbD-63DyekUaRnSZFO1SpAxMC1otI-u_j4aJPP8K6PM-pZbs1nLVZjlv96B_xjpDkAdltToE554AdDdCONXBYcbyVl2oHK6MJLxRCG9gAs7gGX-O18ptbO7vjRbXU25oHmz_muFXXlWJMo_QPqRvFdkjk8s0HYHbCZDeCP9JnUQxa3qRJcLbLdoJasjLMDA3ePotCi8M6Bi44DpWxALIkkupziHOqcTD_AkCqgA2XN1rSaWG6824fUcr4RpZDRMbwbkN5zXquQRE5-ENZ7hrDwuwwUm2sPP3w%3D%3D)** I've lived and worked in California for over 50 years, and I can tell you -\- voters here have had it with the Democrats like I've never seen before. They are hungry for change, and if you and I work together to reach voters in every neighborhood, on every beach, in every corner of California... I know we can turn this historic opportunity into a _**Republican win**_. I'm fighting for the soul of the state I love -- but make no mistake -- I'm not just taking the field for Californians. When we win here... when we rip this seat out the hands of the radical Adam Schiff... **...we start the nationwide Republican Comeback Rally our country desperately needs.** Thank you and God Bless,
---
| | [](https://links.freedomnationtoday.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=8ed452b292854ca98b2178557d13dcf8&_e=oWu9ryYH6N9Boh8Qgf4sHbGlNhI2L1EdJK7S5jeXaX7w3ESUhh9RWSmSQfLUsYdliQ4gz3Zsh2PL0Ei3szif0mNPuPTsL_VgH0ToR2jAbGp9wmsfsI4CSwbD-63DyekUaRnSZFO1SpAxMC1otI-u_j4aJPP8K6PM-pZbs1nLVZjlv96B_xjpDkAdltToE554AdDdCONXBYcbyVl2oHK6MJLxRCG9gAs7gGX-O18ptbO7vjRbXU25oHmz_muFXXlWALUUjU9FaVzo-1FYDAz_g2wZIzFx1BG_k9-Pz1YSkMl6QNShr8xEWBPBhLhqO7FoYeJU9an8cfXoUXvPv3qIUENTS9JmvNtRx8EN7oNshkPkvsarpfIPtD3vAzmaxfoKb6u-hDEAUGejUesNW1EtTA%3D%3D)

clean_body: If you opened this email because you remember my playing days with the Dodgers and the Padres, thank you. | | | | | | Dear Fellow Patriot, If you opened this email because you remember my playing days with the Dodgers and the Padres, thank you. | | Having you and all of America's baseball fans cheering for me and Davey Lopes, Bill Russell, Ron Cey and the rest of the guys as we battled Reggie Jackson, Thurman Munson and the Yankees... ...well, as they say, "Those were the days." But this email isn't about baseball. In fact, it's a email I never thought I'd be writing to you. | | | As of March 5th, it's official. I'm going head-to-head with Adam Schiff in November. Democrat policies have brought America to its knees. There's fear of walking down the street because of rampant crime, homelessness, and drug addiction. The cost of living is exploding and for the first time causing more people to leave California. Joe Biden, Adam Schiff and the rest of the Democrats don't care one bit that Americans are having a hard time. I'd go even further to say they welcome the misery so they can keep folks down and dependent. And that's why I'm running for Senate. We Republicans pulled our country out of the 1970's Democratic malaise by electing Ronald Reagan. And I believe we can do it again by putting classic conservative values at the heart of everything we do. But there is no way I can pull it off without you. I've lived and worked in California for over 50 years, and I can tell you -\- voters here have had it with the Democrats like I've never seen before. They are hungry for change, and if you and I work together to reach voters in every neighborhood, on every beach, in every corner of California... I know we can turn this historic opportunity into a Republican win. I'm fighting for the soul of the state I love -- but make no mistake -- I'm not just taking the field for Californians. When we win here... when we rip this seat out the hands of the radical Adam Schiff... ...we start the nationwide Republican Comeback Rally our country desperately needs. Thank you and God Bless, | | Steve Garvey Republican for United States Senate | | | | | | | | PAID FOR BY STEVE GARVEY FOR U.S. SENATE PO Box 532389 Los Angeles, CA 90053-2389 | | | Freedom Nation Today PO Box 2221 Fort Collins, CO 80522 | _

name: Jon Lovett
subject: Great sandwiches and mean people
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY BOB CASEY FOR SENATE INC
body:
Nowhere is more important than PA.
Hi Peter, it’s Jon Lovett. I love Pennsylvania.
It’s home to Philly, the city that dares to ask the question: do you want an enemy in Pennsylvania?
One thing I learned about myself by visiting the Commonwealth is that I don’t care how you treat me, as long as the sandwiches are good, and you’ve got the best sandwiches in the country. (Cry about it, Chicago.)
Pennsylvania is also home to Bob Casey, who’s facing a tough re-election.
The senior Senator is up against David McCormick, an out-of-towner rich guy (PA Republicans sure do have a type) who supports extreme abortion bans with no exceptions for rape or incest.
This guy could self-fund this race and has a bunch of right-wing money hanging over the race like a piano on a fraying string. Republicans could spend _hundreds of millions of dollars_ in PA to flip this seat red.
[**That’s why I’m doing one of these classic emails asking you to chip in a few dollars to support Senator Bob Casey’s re-election campaign, because we need to do everything we can to help him win.**](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/casey-em-20240402-1?refcode=em20240402-1&refcode2=2548_552475_g5r7yO&akid=2548%2E552475%2Eg5r7yO)
We all know that Pennsylvania will be a top presidential battleground in 2024. It’s part of both Democrats’ and Republicans’ path to victories.
**That puts an even bigger spotlight on this Senate race, where Mitch McConnell and national Republicans are all in for the mega-millionaire hedge fund exec (that’s McCormick, who I mentioned earlier).**
[**This is going to be a tough race, and we just can’t afford to lose this seat. Can you chip in to Bob’s campaign today? Every dollar counts!**](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/casey-em-20240402-1?refcode=em20240402-1&refcode2=2548_552475_g5r7yO&akid=2548%2E552475%2Eg5r7yO)
**[Donate to help re-elect Bob Casey ››](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/casey-em-20240402-1?refcode=em20240402-1&refcode2=2548_552475_g5r7yO&akid=2548%2E552475%2Eg5r7yO)**
This race could determine the Senate majority. _We have to win._
Thanks for the sandwiches,
Jon Lovett
[](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/casey-em-20240402-1?refcode=em20240402-1&refcode2=2548_552475_g5r7yO&akid=2548%2E552475%2Eg5r7yO)
Co-host of Pod Save America
Former Speechwriter to President Obama

* * *
This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is a critical way we communicate with grassroots supporters like you. However, if you would like to change your subscription preferences, here are some options:
* [Receive Fewer Emails](https://go.bobcasey.com/signup/receive-fewer-emails/?t=1&akid=2548%2E552475%2Eg5r7yO)
* [Update Your Information](https://go.bobcasey.com/signup/update-your-information/)
* [Unsubscribe](https://go.bobcasey.com/unsubscribe/unsubscribe/?t=2&akid=2548%2E552475%2Eg5r7yO)

To give by check:
Bob Casey for Senate
PO Box 58746
Philadelphia, PA 19102
Email us: [info@bobcasey.com](mailto:info@bobcasey.com)
PAID FOR BY BOB CASEY FOR SENATE INC.

Republicans could spend hundreds of millions of dollars in PA to flip this seat red. We all know that Pennsylvania will be a top presidential battleground in 2024. It’s part of both Democrats’ and Republicans’ path to victories. That puts an even bigger spotlight on this Senate race, where Mitch McConnell and national Republicans are all in for the mega-millionaire hedge fund exec (that’s McCormick, who I mentioned earlier). This race could determine the Senate majority. We have to win. Thanks for the sandwiches, Jon Lovett Co-host of Pod Save America Former Speechwriter to President Obama

name: Sara Jacobs
subject: The MAGA Republican mission to end all abortions in our country
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Sara Jacobs for Congress
body:
https://secure.actblue.com/donate/sjj-em [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/sjj-em]
Friends,
I want to share a new op-ed [https://www.elle.com/culture/career-politics/a60296973/supreme-court-abortion-pill-mifepristone-sara-jacobs/] that I wrote for Elle Magazine last week as the Supreme Court heard arguments from the groups pushing to limit access to mifepristone, a commonly used abortion pill that’s been FDA-approved for decades.
In it, I talk about the need for comprehensive data privacy legislation to protect our personal health data, particularly when it comes to reproductive tracking and health care. Click here to read the whole thing. [https://www.elle.com/culture/career-politics/a60296973/supreme-court-abortion-pill-mifepristone-sara-jacobs/]
Right now, most state laws target abortion providers or people assisting people seeking abortion. But with the MAGA mission to end all abortions in our country, it’s only a matter of time until laws start targeting abortion-seekers themselves.
Our vulnerable consumer data will be one of the best ways MAGA Republicans have to investigate and prosecute people seeking abortions – as well as those trying to help them. And that’s because there are almost no federal protections for reproductive health data in the consumer marketplace. It’s not even protected by HIPAA!
Our data – whether it’s from period and fertility tracking apps, ride-sharing apps, search and browsing history, or simply location data – can be sold and shared without our consent, and used against us.
I introduced the My Body, My Data Act to create a new national standard to protect our reproductive and sexual health data. Under my bill, companies can only collect and retain information that is strictly needed to provide their services, they can’t sell or share it, and a user can ask for their data to be deleted at any time.
Just like we shop online, buy groceries online, and communicate with friends and family online, the next generation of abortion battles will be fought online . We need to get ahead of it, so I’m taking proactive steps to protect reproductive freedoms for the future.
My opponent envisions a different future. He wants to ban abortion in all circumstances – even here in California.
Like any good Trump acolyte, he’s running on a true MAGA platform, from denying the reality of climate change to opposing LGBTQ+ rights to – of course – limiting any and all control we have over our own reproductive decisions.
I’m doing everything I can to defeat my anti-abortion MAGA opponent. But if we’re going to stop Trumpism in its tracks, we need to deliver resounding victories for pro-choice Democrats all around the country – and we need to flip the House so we can pass legislation that protects abortion access and secures data privacy.
If you’re with me, I hope you’ll consider pitching in $5 or more today to help get this done. [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/sjj-em]
Thank you for your support!
-Sara
https://secure.actblue.com/donate/sjj-em [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/sjj-em]
Congresswoman Sara Jacobs
California’s 51st District

I'm blasting out this final message while there's still time.

**Let me make myself perfectly clear:** 11:59 PM (EST) on 04/30/2024 will be one of the single most important deadlines in the history of our country.

Why? Because it's the most important deadline since ** 1) ** my father officially became the GOP nominee for President, **2) ** my sister-in-law was voted in as the new RNC Co-Chair, and **3)** Joe Biden reported 150 million dollars to obliterate Conservatives up and down the ballot.

Let me make myself perfectly clear: 11:59 PM (EST) on 04/30/2024 will be one of the single most important deadlines in the history of our country. Why? Because it's the most important deadline since 1) my father officially became the GOP nominee for President, 2) my sister-in-law was voted in as the new RNC Co-Chair, and 3) Joe Biden reported 150 million dollars to obliterate Conservatives up and down the ballot. Every deadline between now and Election Day is critical, but NONE OF THEM are as important as this one. "That’s why I’m teaming up with my friend, Majority Leader Steve Scalise, to raise an emergency 50 thousand dollars between now and the end of the month. Do you think you could spare JUST a few bucks before then?" It really doesn't get more important than this. I mean it. **⚠️PETITION ALERT: SAVE THE WEST COAST⚠️**

body:
You’re making a difference.

| [](https://click.everyaction.com/k/82222514/464716316/1328794144?refcode=ea.f252a4c5-16f1-ee11-aaf2-002248223353&ms=ea.f252a4c5-16f1-ee11-aaf2-002248223353&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAxNi8xLzk2NzgyIiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogImYyNTJhNGM1LTE2ZjEtZWUxMS1hYWYyLTAwMjI0ODIyMzM1MyIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=t9gHIGzL1TWNAsAoPtdxRPWSMcWJTGk0XlkaPPgECfg=&emci=ef52a4c5-16f1-ee11-aaf2-002248223353&emdi=f252a4c5-16f1-ee11-aaf2-002248223353&ceid=4823105)
---
[](https://click.everyaction.com/k/82222516/464716318/2105508926?refcode=ea.f252a4c5-16f1-ee11-aaf2-002248223353&ms=ea.f252a4c5-16f1-ee11-aaf2-002248223353&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAxNi8xLzk2NzgyIiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogImYyNTJhNGM1LTE2ZjEtZWUxMS1hYWYyLTAwMjI0ODIyMzM1MyIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=t9gHIGzL1TWNAsAoPtdxRPWSMcWJTGk0XlkaPPgECfg=) I want to take this moment to simply say thank you for your continued support of this movement. I know that reading headlines about yet another devastating climate disaster, or report after report from scientists warning that our planet is on the brink can feel extremely daunting. I get it; I’ve been there, too. But I want you to know that your support is making a tangible difference in this fight — and the evidence is clear. In the last quarter alone, we raised a whopping $396,994 from thousands of dedicated grassroots supporters like you. Supporters filled with hope and eager for real change in our government. Your help enables us to endorse climate champions in key races around the country — from city councils to county supervisors, school boards, and beyond. These leaders are bravely stepping up to hold the fossil fuel industry accountable. For instance, Mayor Brandon Johnson in Chicago is suing major oil and gas companies to hold them accountable for misleading the public and causing climate-related damages. And Rep. Greg Casar in Texas has introduced the Connect the Grid Act, aiming to integrate Texas's power grid with the nation's major electric grids to prevent disasters like what the state experienced during Winter Storm Uri and promote the use of clean energy. This year alone, the Jane Fonda Climate PAC endorsed more than a dozen candidates in critical races in Texas, California, Arizona, Pennsylvania, and Oregon. And believe me, we're just getting started. **This month, we're preparing to announce another wave of endorsements in crucial down-ballot races. None of this would be possible without you!** I know it's easy to doubt the impact of individual support. You may even ask, _What can my support really do?_ But believe me, it does a lot. There is no action too small in our fight for a sustainable future. Whether it's through donating, spreading the word, volunteering, or any other form of support, every action matters. Even one small step could change attitudes and behaviors. Don’t get me wrong. There’s a lot of work ahead of us. It won’t be easy, but I have never been more hopeful. Together, we will break free from the greedy clutches of the fossil fuel industry and create a sustainable future for our children and grandchildren. Thank you for reading this. Now, let's keep fighting like hell. Jane Fonda
| [](https://click.everyaction.com/k/82222518/464716320/2105508926?refcode=ea.f252a4c5-16f1-ee11-aaf2-002248223353&ms=ea.f252a4c5-16f1-ee11-aaf2-002248223353&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAxNi8xLzk2NzgyIiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogImYyNTJhNGM1LTE2ZjEtZWUxMS1hYWYyLTAwMjI0ODIyMzM1MyIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=t9gHIGzL1TWNAsAoPtdxRPWSMcWJTGk0XlkaPPgECfg=) | [**DONATE TODAY**](https://click.everyaction.com/k/82222520/464716322/2105508926?refcode=ea.f252a4c5-16f1-ee11-aaf2-002248223353&ms=ea.f252a4c5-16f1-ee11-aaf2-002248223353&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAxNi8xLzk2NzgyIiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogImYyNTJhNGM1LTE2ZjEtZWUxMS1hYWYyLTAwMjI0ODIyMzM1MyIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=t9gHIGzL1TWNAsAoPtdxRPWSMcWJTGk0XlkaPPgECfg=)
