clean_body: You’re making a difference. | = I want to take this moment to simply say thank you for your continued support of this movement. I know that reading headlines about yet another devastating climate disaster, or report after report from scientists warning that our planet is on the brink can feel extremely daunting. I get it; I’ve been there, too. But I want you to know that your support is making a tangible difference in this fight — and the evidence is clear. In the last quarter alone, we raised a whopping $396,994 from thousands of dedicated grassroots supporters like you. Supporters filled with hope and eager for real change in our government. Your help enables us to endorse climate champions in key races around the country — from city councils to county supervisors, school boards, and beyond. These leaders are bravely stepping up to hold the fossil fuel industry accountable. For instance, Mayor Brandon Johnson in Chicago is suing major oil and gas companies to hold them accountable for misleading the public and causing climate-related damages. And Rep. Greg Casar in Texas has introduced the Connect the Grid Act, aiming to integrate Texas's power grid with the nation's major electric grids to prevent disasters like what the state experienced during Winter Storm Uri and promote the use of clean energy. This year alone, the Jane Fonda Climate PAC endorsed more than a dozen candidates in critical races in Texas, California, Arizona, Pennsylvania, and Oregon. And believe me, we're just getting started. This month, we're preparing to announce another wave of endorsements in crucial down-ballot races. None of this would be possible without you! I know it's easy to doubt the impact of individual support. You may even ask, What can my support really do? But believe me, it does a lot. There is no action too small in our fight for a sustainable future. Whether it's through donating, spreading the word, volunteering, or any other form of support, every action matters. Even one small step could change attitudes and behaviors. Don’t get me wrong. There’s a lot of work ahead of us. It won’t be easy, but I have never been more hopeful. Together, we will break free from the greedy clutches of the fossil fuel industry and create a sustainable future for our children and grandchildren. Thank you for reading this. Now, let's keep fighting like hell. Jane Fonda | = | = = Follow along: | | ---|---|--- Paid for by Jane Fonda Climate PAC, not authorized by any candidate or candidate’s committee. Jane Fonda Climate PAC 600 Pennsylvania Ave SE #15180 Washington, DC 20003 United States

name: Texans for Vaccine Choice
subject: Have we met?
body:
| |
---
| [View in browser](https://click.mlflow.com/link/c/YT0yNDQ5NDg2ODQyODk5MjA4MzU2JmM9czdyMiZlPTAmYj0xMTI3MjcyNDYyJmQ9ajdvOHA1aQ==._4bPXlzPiYI9ObUO_rdZ3kriqMBliDOIFxkEJJ0-uJ0)
| | |
---
|
---
---
| |
---
| Peter, Welcome to the largest vaccine choice and medical liberty movement in Texas! Texans for Vaccine Choice (TFVC) started when a Dallas-based state representative decided Texans need vaccine mandates. _A few moms caught wind of his plans, and we sounded the alarm._ Before we knew it, dozens of Texans joined us, rallying at the capitol to stand up **against** vaccine mandates. Thankfully this horrible bill failed to pass - but it woke the sleeping giant. The government has NO right to force vaccines on Texans or our kids. YOU are the best person to make decisions about your own health care! We know you believe this. Some of you have been fighting with us from the beginning. For others, the COVID vaccine mandates introduced you to this movement. **No matter how you first got involved, we are proud to fight alongside thousands of you.**

---
---
| | |
---
| |
---
| TFVC is dedicated to protecting medical freedom and vaccine choice. We do this in several ways:

* Ensure the issue remains at the forefront of political discourse
* Draft legislation to further solidify these rights
* Promote incumbents and candidates who strongly support our values

Since 2015, our army has grown to more than 100,00 proud citizens fighting for medical privacy and informed consent.
**We’re just getting started!** Thank you for your commitment to vaccine choice and medical freedom. With you, Team TFVC
---

name: Tina Smith
subject: Rolling up my sleeves
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Tina Smith for Minnesota
body:
|
#
Folks, I wanted to take a moment to thank you for all your support this year. I don’t know about you, but 2024 is flying by for me. And it’s only going to get busier from here! Whether it’s continuing our fight to defend reproductive healthcare access for women across the country, supporting President Biden’s reelection campaign, or working to improve postal service in Minnesota, we have some big plans ahead of us. **I’m rolling up my sleeves and getting to work — and I’m grateful to have you alongside me as we take on these big projects.** My work in the Senate and on the campaign trail is powered by folks like you chipping in, responding to petitions and surveys, volunteering for campaigns across the country, and reading messages like this one. Thank you! I’m looking forward to what’s ahead for us all. — Tina | [DONATE](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/82223797/464718931/-1723741421?refcode=AU_TSM_CL_GEN_TYE_AC_20240402_PM1_V1_S3&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTAvMS83OTU1NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI2M2M4MDNiZi0xOGYxLWVlMTEtYWFmMi0wMDIyNDgyMjMzNTMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=TdyTmX7Dwb-E9rGXvdmdLywj9vySzZfhx766iKuBzCM=)

I’m looking forward to what’s ahead for us all. — Tina | = Paid for by Tina Smith for Minnesota Tina Smith for Minnesota PO Box 14362 St. Paul, MN 55114 United States | | Contributions or gifts to Tina Smith for Minnesota are not tax-deductible.

[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/82224364/464720482/1433120897?refcode=email-header&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzMvMS85NjAyNCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJjZTQ4NmU4Yi0xOWYxLWVlMTEtYWFmMi0wMDIyNDgyMjMzNTMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=I87VXIqRXoBqEVl0KlqoZSovA3jJdJC_2bfy7zY1vT0=) I’m so proud to share this news with you: At midnight on March 31, we hit our first public fundraising goal of this campaign. Friend, Trump has rallies today in Michigan and Wisconsin, two of the most critical swing states that will determine the outcome of the election. Midwest voters rejected Trump in 2020, and need to do it again in 2024.

**That’s why we’re reminding them just how dangerous Trump is.** **
**We’re taking over Fox News during Trump's events, running[this ad](https://cQ0qs04.na1.hubspotlinks.com/Ctc/2L+113/cQ0qs04/VVwsgb3ZDLH5W1T3pdP66n_DCV1-ywc5cqw46N9cd5H23m2ndW6N1vHY6lZ3pzW1ZD6-57vrpzCW49FDSv8h6fJXV5y3v450wWJsW7_HsPc1fx740W2-DWYS8RkbbfN5RGbvHksy_4VlDNxy9kXhwnW3yJqH171d3MLVSW_1M5c3bCBN88FC-jlr5xtW8kM3dd5ZzsH1W7XR6bs2dQFs6W2JhQ9q7LtPv1W65bF2k127qZSW5774sj6s3mVzW7qsmxD5_w6SVW12FPkl2VGg0rW40Jr2q7HwsgTW10G34P5Y45X9W1Pz8n01T5H6NW1t44Cn2GBCKNVrvBj1512Vkrf42H09v04) in the Grand Rapids and Green Bay areas. | | Peter, I need to extend a profound and heartfelt thank you for your unwavering support these first three months of 2024. Your involvement is what fortifies this campaign heading into this November. The stakes are manifestly high, and with Wisconsin poised as the pivotal battleground in 2024, your support is what will position us to tackle Trump and his GOP cronies head-on. The extremist MAGA GOP’s relentless crusade against working families, access to healthcare—including vital reproductive rights, and the pillars of Social Security and Medicare, have underscored the urgency of Gwen NATION’s mission. You are not just part of this campaign; you are integral to the fabric of change we are stitching across Milwaukee and all throughout Wisconsin. Once again, thank you from the bottom of my heart.
---

The first African-American woman in Wisconsin history to serve in the U.S. House of Representatives, Congresswoman Gwen Moore, took her official oath of office on January 4, 2005. She served in the Wisconsin State Senate from 1993-2004. Before her election to the Senate, Congresswoman Moore served two consecutive terms in the Wisconsin State Assembly from 1989-92.

clean_body: I need to extend a profound and heartfelt thank you.| | | | | Peter, I need to extend a profound and heartfelt thank you for your unwavering support these first three months of 2024. Your involvement is what fortifies this campaign heading into this November. The stakes are manifestly high, and with Wisconsin poised as the pivotal battleground in 2024, your support is what will position us to tackle Trump and his GOP cronies head-on. The extremist MAGA GOP’s relentless crusade against working families, access to healthcare—including vital reproductive rights, and the pillars of Social Security and Medicare, have underscored the urgency of Gwen NATION’s mission. You are not just part of this campaign; you are integral to the fabric of change we are stitching across Milwaukee and all throughout Wisconsin. Once again, thank you from the bottom of my heart. = Together, #WeRepresent! | | Proudly representing Wisconsin's 4th Congressional District Proud Co-Leader of the Violence Against Women Act 100% Pro-Choice 100% Democracy Defender | The first African-American woman in Wisconsin history to serve in the U.S. House of Representatives, Congresswoman Gwen Moore, took her official oath of office on January 4, 2005. She served in the Wisconsin State Senate from 1993-2004. Before her election to the Senate, Congresswoman Moore served two consecutive terms in the Wisconsin State Assembly from 1989-92. = | | | = | =| = ---|---|--- Paid for and Authorized by Gwen Moore for Congress Gwen Moore for Congress P.O. name: Open Letter to Joe Biden
subject: Declaring Easter trans day of visibility is a slap in the face to every Christian.
disclaimer_text: Paid for by the NRCC and not authorized by any candidate or candidate's committee
body:
We cannot sit silently. We must stand up for our faith!

|
---
| | |
Friend,

Joe Biden and the Radical Left's latest attack on Christians and Easter Sunday cannot stand.

Joe Biden declared Easter Sunday trans day of visibility and banned religious designs from the annual White House Easter contest.

House Republicans are outraged, and we need you to join us in condemning this disgusting attack on faith.

We need 10 Million signatures, and we don't have much time. That's why we're urgently reaching out now for your help.

_**So Friend, will you co-sign this open letter to President Biden and share your outrage?**_

---
| | | [CO-SIGN THE OPEN LETTER](http://links.reclamingamericanfreedom.com/u/click?_t=5ec072595b1347f09b4bac0de82ea87d&_m=4a91febe79224e5c91e93f5504cd8f3a&_e=gFw6t3tJh5m4iegHgp3TcuLg_tA9XqqZZC88qJYV3vKxwY52NvQALM45Z3054EuozERTb4EV2_iQB4CPAt9h5meG9euuwShfsTGu9xR2vHfd4RyaEoOiTlBkSjFisRN7sd6tM3kYLDJFez5bIihnj0eGbSQfQ31ek4doGXQCwy3ezStrfaIMFAPL4ZmHX1eALvrOmZZiPVFhxMScPZMBrroNZ5VAa6uj0dY3qloNxBFELCMCVQkGSj1gG_5gN8Qs3LUADElsQS_YJY6TWPkp8KajeRjrPntsZB4naqLOXka7xupmkeSHPZwrwG7aZErIry0UsvOOzwG8HI93AsxSPM7bYIWsZDSMKO1EkRBTiyxYQDHXWJTG2UjUircZNejfVfaCPySkGINKPWVORgEK1Aym2BZA34BNGfkTefHCuCSSzrhXx0LEKGWeav8yjs7OhOoQC2oekTPU9ecxglBoDw%3D%3D "Generic Button")
---
| |
---
| | **To: President Joseph R. Biden
From: Friend,

We, the American people of faith, are outraged.

Your attack on Easter Sunday, the holiest day of the year for Christians, is a slap in the face to all God-fearing Americans.

You claim to be a devout Catholic, but your actions tell a very different story.

Your decision to declare Easter Sunday trans day of visibility while banning religious themed designs from your Easter contest is disgusting.

It is unChristian.

It is unAmerican.

It is unacceptable.

We, Americans of faith, will not be silent while you blatantly attack our faith.

I, the undersigned, add my name to this open letter as an American of faith who has had enough of your attacks on and disrespect for Christianity.

And further, I will do everything in my power to defeat you in November and elect God-fearing Americans who understand the importance of religious liberty and respect people of faith. **
---

Team, I’ll be honest: I didn’t think we’d be able to pull it off.
Fundraising this early in the year can be difficult, and there’s really no telling how many folks are in a position to donate thanks to rampant corporate greed.
**But thanks to this incredible network of grassroots supporters, we hit our end-of-quarter goal,_AND THEN SOME!_**
I’m more confident than ever in NextGen's impact on young voters nationwide and the difference we’ll be able to make in November.
_But the job isn’t done yet._

clean_body: | Team, I’ll be honest: I didn’t think we’d be able to pull it off. Fundraising this early in the year can be difficult, and there’s really no telling how many folks are in a position to donate thanks to rampant corporate greed. But thanks to this incredible network of grassroots supporters, we hit our end-of-quarter goal,AND THEN SOME! I’m more confident than ever in NextGen's impact on young voters nationwide and the difference we’ll be able to make in November. But the job isn’t done yet. There’s a long time between now and November, and we still need all hands on deck to make progress a reality for 2024 and beyond. | | | | | Together, Cristina Tzintzún Ramirez President & Executive Director NextGen PAC | Paid for by NextGen Climate Action Committee; ; not authorized by any candidate or candidate's committee. | = |

name: Andrei Cherny
subject: I’m grateful to have you on my team
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Andrei for Arizona** | Andrei Cherny is a former member of the U
body:
I’m not in this fight to raise the most money. I’m running because I want to do my part in helping build a better future for my children and your children. |
# [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/82226964/464724833/41388607?refcode=AU_AHC_FR_GEN_TYE_AC_20240402_AM1_V1_S2&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNTAvMS8xMDUwMDAiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiOWEwNTdlMzUtMWJmMS1lZTExLWFhZjItMDAyMjQ4MjIzMzUzIiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=_arsZWBN5EfPYOV6IfL2i_p-ZHxugD9vG61RQf-XuTg=)
---
Peter, Let me first start by saying, “Thank you!” We’re still tabulating all the numbers and will share them with you as soon as we can, but this much is clear: this people-powered campaign continues to make history. Since the beginning of this race, we’ve been blown away by the grassroots support, and thanks to you, we’re running a record-breaking campaign to take back the House. I sometimes worry that in the seemingly endless flurry of emails, especially right before the FEC deadline, it is easy to forget what this is all about. This campaign is not about who can raise the most money. This campaign is about fighting for the future of our democracy. The coming months will be a sprint as we race to defeat my extremist opponent, David Schweikert. As we’ve said from the start, no district in the country is more consequential than AZ-01. This is the battleground district in the battleground state of 2024, and it’s our job to ensure we keep this district out of the hands of Donald Trump and David Schweikert. I’m proud that my campaign is powered by thousands of grassroots supporters across the country. With your continued support, we’ll take our movement to Congress to defend our democracy, our freedoms, and our planet. Peter, your support means the world to me. Thank you! Andrei | [DONATE](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/82226966/464724840/-1061249283?refcode=AU_AHC_FR_GEN_TYE_AC_20240402_AM1_V1_S2&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNTAvMS8xMDUwMDAiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiOWEwNTdlMzUtMWJmMS1lZTExLWFhZjItMDAyMjQ4MjIzMzUzIiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=_arsZWBN5EfPYOV6IfL2i_p-ZHxugD9vG61RQf-XuTg=)
---

Phoenix, AZ 85068

name: Letitia James
subject: thanks to you, I can keep on fighting
disclaimer_text: Paid for by James for NY 2026
body:
Peter, thanks to generous donations from fearless fighters like you, we were able to meet our end-of-quarter goal of $15,000.

Peter, thanks to generous donations from fearless fighters like you, we were able to meet our end-of-quarter goal of $15,000. With your support, I’ll continue to take on big and powerful forces that take advantage of everyday New Yorkers.
There’s still a lot of work that needs to be done. Mega corporations are still cutting corners to increase their bottom line. Well-connected individuals are still using their influence to try and evade the rules that everyone must play by.
Time and time again, I’ve held these powerful organizations and individuals accountable. And together, we will keep fighting to even the playing field. We will bring justice and equality to Americans everywhere, holding those accountable who put profits over people. [So please, will you chip in $5 right now to reaffirm your commitment and help me continue in this fight?](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/82227425/464726220/-2022193277?amounts=5,25,50,100,250&amount=5&refcode=jtk1395-fr-nd&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS84OTg0OSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJiMzcxY2Q3Zi0xYmYxLWVlMTEtYWFmMi0wMDIyNDgyMjMzNTMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=aehbgUpwvggw5rPzgNsS1xIEi2U_UEb3UO2D5KGqn88=)

**Thank you on behalf of all of us here at COURIER.** Your support is fundamental to our success. I’m very happy to report that this March was our best grassroots fundraising month ever.
Thank you again, Peter!
You know how important our mission is right now. clean_body: The Wall Street Journal just released an article spotlighting my campaign’s advocacy for reproductive rights. | Did you see this, Peter? The Wall Street Journal just released an article spotlighting my campaign’s advocacy for reproductive rights. We’re fighting to protect reproductive rights from in vitro fertilization (IVF) to a woman’s right to choose whether to start a family. I’m determined to fight back against anti-choice extremists like Mariannette Miller-Meeks and take back the House to create a pro-choice majority. = = \---------- Forwarded message --------- From: Team Bohannan <info@bohannanforcongress.com> Date: Mon, Apr 1, 2024 Subject: National media is paying attention: = BREAKING NEWS: The Wall Street Journal just published an article spotlighting Christina’s fight to protect reproductive rights in this race. Take a look: = = The article highlights the recent alarming developments in reproductive rights, from the Alabama Supreme Court ruling on frozen embryos to the ongoing battles here in Iowa over abortion restrictions and fertility treatment regulations. As Christina has emphasized time and time again, Mariannette Miller-Meeks has proven herself out of touch with the needs of everyday Iowans. By endorsing extreme "life-at-conception" bills, she has once again abandoned the interests of her own constituents. This race is gaining national attention, and we must harness this momentum to secure a victory in November. = If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately. = = = = = Thank you, Team Bohannan P.S. A huge shoutout to our incredible grassroots team! Thanks to your dedication, we reached our first end-of-quarter fundraising goal of the election year. Your support means the world to us! P.P.S. You can read the Wall Street Journal article on Christina’s activism ! = Christina Bohannan is a mom, law professor, former engineer, and state representative. She's running to represent Iowa's 1st Congressional District in Congress because she believes everyone deserves a fair shot. = | = | Paid for by Christina Bohannan for Congress Christina Bohannan for Congress PO Box 722 Iowa City, IA 52244 United States If you believe you received this message in error or wish to no longer receive email from us, please .

In fact, it’s a email I never thought I’d be writing to you.

| | **[Today, I’m asking you to help me defeat the radical Adam Schiff for a seat in the United States Senate.](http://post.spmailtechnol.com/f/a/ubQqrc_vK7phIEV1BqqshQ~~/AARclAA~/RgRn7t_2P0SpaHR0cHM6Ly9zZWN1cmUud2lucmVkLmNvbS9zdGV2ZS1nYXJ2ZXktZm9yLXVzLXNlbmF0ZS81ZWI0ZjAyODY1NjI5MGMwP3V0bV9zb3VyY2U9QkRHLVJFViZ1dG1fbWVkaXVtPUVNJnV0bV9jYW1wYWlnbj0yMDI0MDMwNl9CREdfU0dDQV9EQVMyX1JFVl9QQS1VQ04mdXRtX3RjPVVDTi0yMDI0MDQwMlcDc3BjQgpmBF1LDGZaNTTAUhRkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbVgEAAAAAA~~)** As of March 5th, it’s official. I’m going head-to-head with Adam Schiff in November.Democrat policies have brought America to its knees.There’s fear of walking down the street because of rampant crime, homelessness, and drug addiction. The cost of living is exploding and for the first time causing more people to leave California.Joe Biden, Adam Schiff and the rest of the Democrats don’t care one bit that Americans are having a hard time. I’d go even further to say they welcome the misery so they can keep folks down and dependent.And that’s why I’m running for Senate.**_We Republicans_ pulled our country out of the 1970’s Democratic malaise by electing Ronald Reagan.**And I believe we can do it again by putting classic conservative values at the heart of everything we do.But there is no way I can pull it off without you.**[**Will you rush a contribution to my campaign of $35 or more today?**](http://post.spmailtechnol.com/f/a/ubQqrc_vK7phIEV1BqqshQ~~/AARclAA~/RgRn7t_2P0SpaHR0cHM6Ly9zZWN1cmUud2lucmVkLmNvbS9zdGV2ZS1nYXJ2ZXktZm9yLXVzLXNlbmF0ZS81ZWI0ZjAyODY1NjI5MGMwP3V0bV9zb3VyY2U9QkRHLVJFViZ1dG1fbWVkaXVtPUVNJnV0bV9jYW1wYWlnbj0yMDI0MDMwNl9CREdfU0dDQV9EQVMyX1JFVl9QQS1VQ04mdXRtX3RjPVVDTi0yMDI0MDQwMlcDc3BjQgpmBF1LDGZaNTTAUhRkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbVgEAAAAAA~~)** I’ve lived and worked in California for over 50 years, and I can tell you –- voters here have had it with the Democrats like I’ve never seen before.They are hungry for change, and if you and I work together to reach voters in every neighborhood, on every beach, in every corner of California...I know we can turn this historic opportunity into a _**Republican win**_.I’m fighting for the soul of the state I love -- but make no mistake -- I’m not just taking the field for Californians.When we win here... when we rip this seat out the hands of the radical Adam Schiff...**...we start the nationwide Republican Comeback Rally our country desperately needs.** Thank you and God Bless,

| [ ]() | [Elizabeth Warren just made an AMAZING call to action to ABOLISH the Electoral College — and she needs 10,000 Democrats to stand with her RIGHT NOW and sign our urgent petition. Sign on now to abolish the Electoral College »](https://act.fightforreform.org/survey/abolish_electoral_college?source=FFR_20240402_EMPET_E1_T0_GM-14D-AC_RS&t=7&akid=21146%2E4449941%2EWSlZOJ)
---
**Elizabeth Warren is 100% right** — the Electoral College is eroding our Democracy election by election!

_Donald Trump would NEVER have been President if it wasn’t for the Electoral College._

**Republicans have only won the popular vote ONCE since 1988.**

But they’ve won the Presidency three times during that period thanks to the Electoral College – it’s SO UNFAIR and COMPLETELY undemocratic!!

**[__So we’re launching a MASSIVE petition to stand with Elizabeth Warren & demand Congress to pass a Constitutional Amendment to ABOLISH the Electoral College IMMEDIATELY! Add your name right away! »__](https://act.fightforreform.org/survey/abolish_electoral_college?source=FFR_20240402_EMPET_E1_T0_GM-14D-AC_RS&t=8&akid=21146%2E4449941%2EWSlZOJ)**

name: Sarah McBride
subject: Thank you!
disclaimer_text: Paid for by McBride for Delaware
body:
Thanks to grassroots donors like you, we shattered records and exceeded our fundraising goal for the first quarter of 2024. |
---

Thank you! Thanks to grassroots donors like you, not only did we exceed our fundraising goal for the first quarter of 2024, but **we had our best quarter yet!** We showed the strength of this movement by raising more money in a quarter than any candidate for an open House seat in Delaware history. We couldn’t have done it without you. In the Delaware Senate, we’ve shown that small states can do big things when we do them together. Now it’s time to prove it to the entire country by winning this race this Fall. And, I’m so grateful to have you with me along the way. But while we met our goal for the first quarter, **there are another 2 and a half quarters to go before Election Day** — and we’ll need to meet our fundraising goals in all of them in order to compete with big money from Republican donors. **[So if you want to help us get a head start on Q2 and put us in the strongest position possible to win this November, pitch in $5 or any amount that works for you today.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/82230851/464732514/1830548922?refcode=em20240402&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDcvMS83NjI0OCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI0MWY3MTEwMC0xZmYxLWVlMTEtYWFmMi0wMDIyNDgyMjMzNTMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=GO4J6QpP7lDIwvI_rFFgN0F5HaEwR33m-Osdy-gfZpQ=)** | [Donate](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/82230854/464732516/-1613957767?refcode=em20240402&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDcvMS83NjI0OCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI0MWY3MTEwMC0xZmYxLWVlMTEtYWFmMi0wMDIyNDgyMjMzNTMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=GO4J6QpP7lDIwvI_rFFgN0F5HaEwR33m-Osdy-gfZpQ=)

Easter Week on the Campaign Trail | | | | | |
---
[View this email in your browser](https://mailchi.mp/5b764d172dd5/rob-for-pa-weekly-update?e=131e83a3c2)
Dear friend,
We hope you enjoyed your Easter holiday! Rob was out on the campaign trail last week leading up to Easter, attending the Lackawanna GOP Women’s Event, the West End Republican Meeting in Monroe County, and a Wayne County Veterans Meet and Greet in Waymart that Congressman Cartwright has refused to attend. Rob is proving that he will not be outworked in this election!
[](https://robforpa.us21.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4aaa9665caa590d8638bb435d&id=a1a890ff43&e=131e83a3c2)
|
---
We are proud to announce that **U.S. House Majority Leader Steve Scalise** will be in Wilkes Barre at the Westmoreland Club, on Monday, April 8th! Please RSVP to join us for this exciting event with Leader Scalise. [Sign up here](https://robforpa.us21.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4aaa9665caa590d8638bb435d&id=da6d8e7c47&e=131e83a3c2).
|
---
Rob believes that trust in our politicians is at an all time low. We must right the ship and take these common sense steps to rebuild trust between our elected officials and "We the People."
Check out Rob’s Article, in The Citizens’ Voice [here](https://robforpa.us21.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4aaa9665caa590d8638bb435d&id=f51fca8faf&e=131e83a3c2).
|
---
We have **YARD SIGNS!** The local GOP offices will all have them by the end of the week for pickup. You may also reach out to Frank at [frank@robforpa.com](mailto:frank@robforpa.com?subject=Yard%20Sign%20Pick-up%20%2F%20Drop-off&body=) to coordinate a pick up time. The GOP office info & Facebook links are below.

* [**Lackawanna**](https://robforpa.us21.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4aaa9665caa590d8638bb435d&id=8fd1081665&e=131e83a3c2)**:** 101 Pittston Ave, Scranton, PA 18505
* Tues - 5 PM to 7 PM, Sat 10 AM to 2 PM
* [**Luzerne**](https://robforpa.us21.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4aaa9665caa590d8638bb435d&id=b16291404d&e=131e83a3c2): 212 Wyoming Ave, Kingston, PA 18704
* Mon & Wed - 12 PM to 4 PM, Sat 10 AM to 2 PM
* [**Monroe**](https://robforpa.us21.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4aaa9665caa590d8638bb435d&id=ba04ee9ee7&e=131e83a3c2)**:** 2398 PA-611, Scotrun, PA 18335
* Mon & Fri - 10 AM to 3 PM, Wed 10 AM to 6 PM
* [**Pike**](https://robforpa.us21.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4aaa9665caa590d8638bb435d&id=25fc694cf4&e=131e83a3c2)**:** Office Opening Soon!
* More Details to Come
* [**Wayne**](https://robforpa.us21.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4aaa9665caa590d8638bb435d&id=ab3d106a0e&e=131e83a3c2)**:** 627 Main St, Honesdale, PA 18431
* More Details to Come

|
---
In order to ensure that Rob’s mission to bring New Leadership to Northeastern PA gets hits all corners of PA-08, we need to keep up with California liberal money.
You can donate online. Please give any amount you are able, every penny counts! Click the logo below to donate now!
[Click Here to Donate ](https://robforpa.us21.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4aaa9665caa590d8638bb435d&id=17d44f898b&e=131e83a3c2)
If you would like to join the team that **retires Matt Cartwright from Congress** , please reach out to our Political Director Frank Wojtash at (570) 793-1487 or at frank@robforpa.com to join us!
Best Regards,Team Rob
P.S. Please take our survey below to let us know which Biden Disaster Impacted the U.S. most.
[What has Biden Ruined for You?](https://robforpa.us21.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4aaa9665caa590d8638bb435d&id=69be7949ec&e=131e83a3c2)

**Thanks to your support in these first few months of 2024, we met our first end-of-quarter fundraising goal of the year.**

This couldn’t come at a more important time. Now that it’s officially us against MAGA Mike Garcia, every benchmark is critical to keeping our strong momentum – and your donations help us do just that.

We’re locked in a battle to flip CA-27 blue. This is a must-win for control of the House majority, and Garcia has never been more vulnerable. It’s up to us to take advantage of his weak approval in the district and replace him with a community-centered leader.

It’s thanks to you that we have the tools to beat Garcia and give our communities the representation they deserve. For that, I thank you.

Let’s keep it going,

George

name: INDEMS
subject: Our opportunity
disclaimer_text: Paid for by the Indiana Democratic Party, www
body:
|
---
Peter, This year marks twenty straight years of Republican administrations in Indiana. The results have been disastrous – lower wages, fewer freedoms, and constant attacks on local control.

**But right now is our opportunity to change that.** [**Republicans are locked in a multi-million dollar primary race, and running to be the most extreme. That’s why we need your support today – it helps us build for the fall, and prepare Jennifer McCormick for whoever their candidate is.**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/82231594/464733961/1643342139?refcode=240402opportunity&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDMvMS82NzYzNSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIzODI1MmE0My0yMGYxLWVlMTEtYWFmMi0wMDIyNDgyMjMzNTMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogIkRQV0lMTElTNjdAR01BSUwuQ09NIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=Ye9k_qnm3AdFc7BIA1_mtlBz5jXQoXBQYdAu9MrJOAY=)

In addition, every one of the Republican candidates for governor supported the 2022 law to ban abortion with almost no exceptions in Indiana.

Jennifer McCormick knows that is a dangerous path for our state to keep going down. This is our opportunity for more balance, and more results at the Statehouse.

clean_body: Background on FBI investigating social media posts [NEWSLINK] BREAKING NEWS... [600x300] [] Agent says FBI interrogates Americans about social media posts ‘every day, all day long’ [] Source: The Washington Times [] FBI agents recently told an Oklahoma woman that the bureau sends agents to question Americans about their social media posts “all day long” in an “effort to keep everybody safe.” A video shows them telling her that Facebook submitted screenshots of her posts to the agency. [13x13x1] [] READ MORE [] Background Notes from Judicial Watch [180x150x1] [] 2023-01-24 Judicial Watch Files Lawsuit for FBI Documents on Big Tech Censorship of Hunter Biden Laptop Story [] Source: Judicail Watch [] Judicial Watch filed a FOIA lawsuit against the U.S. Department of Justice for communications between the Federal Bureau of Investigation and social media sites regarding foreign influence in elections, as well as the Hunter Biden laptop story. [13x13x1] [] READ MORE [] [180x150x2] [] 2023-08-25 Judicial Watch Sues DOJ, Other Agencies for Records on Efforts to Censor Content on Social Media Platforms [] Source: Judicial Watch [] Judicial Watch filed two FOIA lawsuits against the U.S. Department of Justice, the FBI and other federal agencies for communications between the agencies and Facebook and Twitter regarding the government’s involvement in content moderation and censorship on the social media platforms. [13x13x1] [] READ MORE [] [180x150x3] [] 2023-10-19 Judicial Watch Sues Director of National Intelligence for Records on Social Media Censorship [] Source: Judicial Watch [] “The Biden administration apparently believes it can resurrect its domestic thought police deep inside the heart of America’s spy agencies, and no one would notice,” said Judicial Watch President Tom Fitton. subject: We can’t stumble from here until November

body:
https://secure.actblue.com/donate/2404-wn-q2-dmp?refcode=240402-email-dmp [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/2404-wn-q2-dmp?refcode=240402-email-dmp]Peter, I've got some great news for you: The Florida Supreme Court just ruled to keep abortion rights on the ballot this November!
But we can’t celebrate just yet — the court also UPHELD Ron DeSantis' unconstitutional 15-week abortion ban, which means his even more extreme six-week ban will take effect in 30 days.
Now, we finally have the chance to overturn Ron DeSantis' extreme ban and restore our reproductive freedom at the polls.
The tides are changing in Florida. And this ballot initiative has a very good chance of passing. Recent polling shows that 62% of voters, including a majority of Republicans, support passing it. And a massive 75% of voters oppose the extreme six-week ban that could take effect in a matter of weeks.
This is what a powerful grassroots movement can accomplish. And that's exactly what we need to defeat Rick Scott and stop him from passing a nationwide ban on abortions.
Listen, Rick Scott wants you to believe that our home is a red state. But that couldn't be further from the truth. More and more of us are rejecting his far-right agenda every day. And polling data shows that this race is neck and neck.
But now, he’s spending millions to lie about his record and launch baseless attacks against me — and I can’t overcome his self-funded ads without the crucial resources to fight back. So please, will you please chip in $25 or more — split between my campaign and Wiley Nickel — before 11:59 p.m. tonight to help me reach my rapid- response goal? With all eyes on Florida, we can’t stumble now. [http://secure.actblue.com/donate/2404-wn-q2-dmp?refcode=240402-email-dmp&amount=25]
If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately:

clean_body: [, I've got some great news for you: The Florida Supreme Court just ruled to keep abortion rights on the ballot this November! But we can’t celebrate just yet — the court also UPHELD Ron DeSantis' unconstitutional 15-week abortion ban, which means his even more extreme six-week ban will take effect in 30 days. Now, we finally have the chance to overturn Ron DeSantis' extreme ban and restore our reproductive freedom at the polls. The tides are changing in Florida. And this ballot initiative has a very good chance of passing. Recent polling shows that 62% of voters, including a majority of Republicans, support passing it. And a massive 75% of voters oppose the extreme six-week ban that could take effect in a matter of weeks. This is what a powerful grassroots movement can accomplish. And that's exactly what we need to defeat Rick Scott and stop him from passing a nationwide ban on abortions. Listen, Rick Scott wants you to believe that our home is a red state. But that couldn't be further from the truth. More and more of us are rejecting his far-right agenda every day. And polling data shows that this race is neck and neck. But now, he’s spending millions to lie about his record and launch baseless attacks against me — and I can’t overcome his self-funded ads without the crucial resources to fight back. So please, will you please chip in $25 or more — split between my campaign and Wiley Nickel — before 11:59 p.m. tonight to help me reach my rapid- response goal? With all eyes on Florida, we can’t stumble now. name: Rick Coplen
subject: Nothing Less Than a Constitutional Amendment Will Do.
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Friends of Rick Coplen
body:
|
---
> _“Every individual has the fundamental right to exercise personal reproductive liberty and make and effectuate decisions regarding the individual's own reproduction, including the ability to choose or refuse to prevent, continue or end the individual's pregnancy, the right to choose or refuse contraceptives and the right to choose or refuse fertility care, all without discrimination on the basis of race, age, disability, sex, sexual orientation, gender identity, religion or relationship status. The government of the United States may not, nor may any state, deny, burden, infringe upon or abridge this right unless justified by a compelling national interest achieved by the least restrictive means.”_
This language is modeled on a proposed Constitutional amendment for Pennsylvania’s women. Something like it must be in our national Constitution.

Republicans nationally and in Pennsylvania are pretending to moderate their goal of banning all abortions with “compromises.”

The trauma Texas inflicted on Kate Cox happened despite claims of “compromise.” Backlash against the Alabama Supreme Court’s decision about in vitro fertilization forced their legislature to “compromise.” Donald Trump is proposing a “compromise” 15-week abortion ban.

We must not be fooled, and the reproductive freedom and bodily autonomy of women must not be compromised. Period.

Today, as voters in state after state pass constitutional amendments protecting reproductive freedom, Republicans are plotting a national strategy that will overturn state constitutions. Only a federal constitutional amendment will stop the madness.

Yes, it will take time. Yes, it will evoke lots of conversations, some unpleasant. But we cannot as a nation allow this freedom to be whittled away one “compromise” at a time.

It took 141 years to amend the Constitution so that women could exercise their right to vote. It won’t take nearly that long to achieve, for all time, reproductive freedom.

**In Congress, I will have no higher priority than leading the United States down this path to freedom. Please join me.**

P.S. Thank you for the incredible outpouring of support during our FEC fundraising push last week! Your dedication to our shared values is critical to the success of our campaign. Let's keep fighting!

| | | | clean_body: | “Every individual has the fundamental right to exercise personal reproductive liberty and make and effectuate decisions regarding the individual's own reproduction, including the ability to choose or refuse to prevent, continue or end the individual's pregnancy, the right to choose or refuse contraceptives and the right to choose or refuse fertility care, all without discrimination on the basis of race, age, disability, sex, sexual orientation, gender identity, religion or relationship status. The government of the United States may not, nor may any state, deny, burden, infringe upon or abridge this right unless justified by a compelling national interest achieved by the least restrictive means.” This language is modeled on a proposed Constitutional amendment for Pennsylvania’s women. Something like it must be in our national Constitution. Republicans nationally and in Pennsylvania are pretending to moderate their goal of banning all abortions with “compromises.” The trauma Texas inflicted on Kate Cox happened despite claims of “compromise.” Backlash against the Alabama Supreme Court’s decision about in vitro fertilization forced their legislature to “compromise.” Donald Trump is proposing a “compromise” 15-week abortion ban. We must not be fooled, and the reproductive freedom and bodily autonomy of women must not be compromised. Period. Today, as voters in state after state pass constitutional amendments protecting reproductive freedom, Republicans are plotting a national strategy that will overturn state constitutions. Only a federal constitutional amendment will stop the madness. Yes, it will take time. Yes, it will evoke lots of conversations, some unpleasant. But we cannot as a nation allow this freedom to be whittled away one “compromise” at a time. It took 141 years to amend the Constitution so that women could exercise their right to vote. It won’t take nearly that long to achieve, for all time, reproductive freedom. In Congress, I will have no higher priority than leading the United States down this path to freedom. Please join me. P.S. Thank you for the incredible outpouring of support during our FEC fundraising push last week! Your dedication to our shared values is critical to the success of our campaign. Let's keep fighting! | | | | | | | | ---|---|---|---|--- Paid for by Friends of Rick Coplen | =

[](https://chicago2024.us14.list-manage.com/track/click?u=b2032775a03190d822e2a0e73&id=942294f108&e=e789b9d47e)
# Host Committee Happenings
A Newsletter by the Chicago 2024 Host Committee
|
---
| | | | | | | | |
---
|
---
## Note from the Host Committee
Welcome back to Host Committee Happenings, our biweekly newsletter! We are only 139 days away from this summer’s Democratic National Convention.
| | | | | | | | | Read more about the women-led, local enterprises selected to execute the largest official hospitality events of the convention and the first vendor summit held by the Host Committee and Democratic National Convention Committee (DNCC).
---
|
---
_Credit:_[_Zuno Photo_](https://chicago2024.us14.list-manage.com/track/click?u=b2032775a03190d822e2a0e73&id=953df3148c&e=e789b9d47e)
You can always send us your questions, comments, or concerns at [info@chicago2024.com](mailto:info@chicago2024.com?subject=null&body=null).
|
---
## Women-Led Local, Diverse-Owned Enterprises Selected for Official Hospitality Events
Following a rigorous search and selection process, the Chicago 2024 Host Committee and the DNCC selected two local, diverse-owned teams with extensive large-scale event planning and execution experience to produce the largest official hospitality events for the 2024 Democratic National Convention.
Chicago-based event production company **Juan and Only Events** has partnered with local firms **elemento L2** and **All Terrain** to produce events welcoming convention attendees.
Chicago’s **Revel Global Events** and **5423 Productions** have also teamed to execute other official convention events that will showcase local enterprises.
| | | | | | | | | |
---
[](https://chicago2024.us14.list-manage.com/track/click?u=b2032775a03190d822e2a0e73&id=89c5635c1c&e=e789b9d47e)
[](https://chicago2024.us14.list-manage.com/track/click?u=b2032775a03190d822e2a0e73&id=dfffe63b07&e=e789b9d47e)
| [](https://chicago2024.us14.list-manage.com/track/click?u=b2032775a03190d822e2a0e73&id=8eb25f26fd&e=e789b9d47e)
---
[](https://chicago2024.us14.list-manage.com/track/click?u=b2032775a03190d822e2a0e73&id=ea03dc924e&e=e789b9d47e)
| [](https://chicago2024.us14.list-manage.com/track/click?u=b2032775a03190d822e2a0e73&id=9f5b146104&e=e789b9d47e)
---
[](https://chicago2024.us14.list-manage.com/track/click?u=b2032775a03190d822e2a0e73&id=34c93c1796&e=e789b9d47e)
| | | | | | | | | [](https://chicago2024.us14.list-manage.com/track/click?u=b2032775a03190d822e2a0e73&id=137f82c2aa&e=e789b9d47e)
---
|
---
|
---
## Contract Awards
To date, the Host Committee and DNCC have released the following requests for proposals. Read more about the contracts that have been awarded below:
* Owner's Representative: [K + P Advisory, LLC](https://chicago2024.us14.list-manage.com/track/click?u=b2032775a03190d822e2a0e73&id=71a3137c93&e=e789b9d47e) (November 2023)
* Event Architect: [Populous](https://chicago2024.us14.list-manage.com/track/click?u=b2032775a03190d822e2a0e73&id=917bcbcbf4&e=e789b9d47e) (January 2024)
* Event Manager: [Hargrove + Show Strategy](https://chicago2024.us14.list-manage.com/track/click?u=b2032775a03190d822e2a0e73&id=a29fbcf6f6&e=e789b9d47e) (January 2024)
* Exposition Services: [Show Strategy](https://chicago2024.us14.list-manage.com/track/click?u=b2032775a03190d822e2a0e73&id=336f5cae0b&e=e789b9d47e) (January 2024)
* Construction Manager: [McHugh-Powers UC](https://chicago2024.us14.list-manage.com/track/click?u=b2032775a03190d822e2a0e73&id=285fd58bb4&e=e789b9d47e) (January 2024)
* Hospitality Events: [Juan and Only, LLC, Elemento L2, and All Terrain Collective + Revel Global Events and 5423 Productions](https://chicago2024.us14.list-manage.com/track/click?u=b2032775a03190d822e2a0e73&id=0aabd441ec&e=e789b9d47e) (March 2024)
* Under Review: Sustainability, Transportation, Credentials

|
---
## Vendor Summit on Arena Operations
| | | | | | | | |
---
|
---
|
---
|
---
_Credit:_[_Zuno Photo_](https://chicago2024.us14.list-manage.com/track/click?u=b2032775a03190d822e2a0e73&id=d6c9d92a2a&e=e789b9d47e)
Last week, the Host Committee and DNCC hosted over 250 vendors at the United Center and virtually for an exposition services and construction vendor summit!
| | | | | | | | | Participants were given a first look at upcoming [arena operations subcontracting opportunities](https://chicago2024.us14.list-manage.com/track/click?u=b2032775a03190d822e2a0e73&id=e84113f6ee&e=e789b9d47e) and had the chance to network with fellow industry professionals.
---
[Read About The Event](https://chicago2024.us14.list-manage.com/track/click?u=b2032775a03190d822e2a0e73&id=7bce7e9f3a&e=e789b9d47e)
|
---
|
---
## DNC Vendor Directory and Venue Map
| | | | | | | | | Make sure you include your business in the [Vendor Directory](https://chicago2024.us14.list-manage.com/track/click?u=b2032775a03190d822e2a0e73&id=0885ff17c7&e=e789b9d47e) and [Venue Map.](https://chicago2024.us14.list-manage.com/track/click?u=b2032775a03190d822e2a0e73&id=efd83d2719&e=e789b9d47e) All you need to do is complete the [Vendor Interest Form](https://chicago2024.us14.list-manage.com/track/click?u=b2032775a03190d822e2a0e73&id=08bbd9ac86&e=e789b9d47e) to be included!
Our team reviews submissions on a rolling basis. We appreciate your patience as we carefully review every submission.
---
| [](https://chicago2024.us14.list-manage.com/track/click?u=b2032775a03190d822e2a0e73&id=e72f84887c&e=e789b9d47e)
---
Please note that inclusion in the vendor directory and venue map does not mean the Host Committee, Democratic National Convention Committee, or Democratic National Convention endorse or approve any of the listed vendors. The Directory is offered as a resource to groups and businesses who may need to procure services, facilities, or supplies for their events in Chicago in connection with the 2024 Democratic National Convention, and to encourage the use of local and diverse vendors for those needs.
For questions about vendors, please email [vendors@chicago2024.com](mailto:vendor@chicago2024.com). For questions about venues, please email [venues@chicago2024.com](mailto:venues@chicago2024.com).
|
---
## Volunteer Opportunities
If you’re interested in volunteering for the Democratic National Convention this August, be sure to complete the [Volunteer Interest Form](https://chicago2024.us14.list-manage.com/track/click?u=b2032775a03190d822e2a0e73&id=72650ddef3&e=e789b9d47e). The form only needs to be completed one time.
If you missed any of our volunteer information sessions, you can watch a replay [here](https://chicago2024.us14.list-manage.com/track/click?u=b2032775a03190d822e2a0e73&id=927656b37f&e=e789b9d47e).
| | | | | | | | | [](https://chicago2024.us14.list-manage.com/track/click?u=b2032775a03190d822e2a0e73&id=2bc1d2080d&e=e789b9d47e)
---
| In the coming months, individuals who completed the volunteer interest form will be invited to complete a volunteer application. Only volunteers that complete the application and pass a screening and background check will receive assignments.
---
Additional questions regarding volunteering can be directed to [volunteers@chicago2024.com](mailto:volunteers@chicago2024.com?subject=Question&body=null).
|
---
| | | | | | | | |
## Sponsorship Opportunities
---
Is your business or organization looking for additional ways to get involved with the Democratic National Convention? Consider becoming a Convention sponsor or partner! Inquiries regarding sponsorships and partnerships should be sent to [development@chicago2024.com](mailto:development@chicago2024.com?subject=Sponsorships%20and%20Partnerships&body=null).
|
---
## 77 Spotlight
| | | | | | | | | Next up on the 77 spotlight is **Englewood** ...a community on the southwest side of Chicago! It is best known as a historical hub for Black music and culture. Jennifer Hudson, Derrick Rose, Mavis Staples, and Bernie Mac have all called the neighborhood home. This large residential area has two beautiful parks, Hamilton Park and Sherman Park, designed by legendary landscape architects, the Olmsted Brothers.
---
|
---
_Picture Credit: Steve Geer_
**Check out** the [Englewood Jazz Festival](https://chicago2024.us14.list-manage.com/track/click?u=b2032775a03190d822e2a0e73&id=b0281a9fb6&e=e789b9d47e) or the [Englewood Music Festival](https://chicago2024.us14.list-manage.com/track/click?u=b2032775a03190d822e2a0e73&id=e5a45bc3d1&e=e789b9d47e), which takes place every September.
**Explore** the [Growing Home Farm Stand](https://chicago2024.us14.list-manage.com/track/click?u=b2032775a03190d822e2a0e73&id=4b18e3fb47&e=e789b9d47e), an urban farm that offers free meals, cooking demos, healthy recipes, family-friendly activities and farm tours.
**Eat** unique food options at [Peace of Mine Dessert and Specialty Shop](https://chicago2024.us14.list-manage.com/track/click?u=b2032775a03190d822e2a0e73&id=aa7d6d07c1&e=e789b9d47e) or indulge in barbecue at [Taylormade Que](https://chicago2024.us14.list-manage.com/track/click?u=b2032775a03190d822e2a0e73&id=0f13eb50f2&e=e789b9d47e).
| | | | | | | | |
---
_Picture Credit: Steve Geer_
|
---
**Belmont Cragin** is located on the northwest side of Chicago. This neighborhood is well-known for its welcoming Latino community and flourishing small businesses. Enjoy cultural events, international cuisine, local theater, or a night out in the neighborhood!
**Explore** [Riis Park](https://chicago2024.us14.list-manage.com/track/click?u=b2032775a03190d822e2a0e73&id=d8dc21a3c2&e=e789b9d47e), a 100-year-old green space that offers plenty of outdoor activities for everyone. You can enjoy a duck-filled lagoon, picnic areas, a running track, a soccer field, a large pool, and an ice rink in the winter.
**Admire** the vintage cars at the [Klairmont Kollections Automotive Museum](https://chicago2024.us14.list-manage.com/track/click?u=b2032775a03190d822e2a0e73&id=96092fcad5&e=e789b9d47e).
**Check out** [Dock 6 Collective](https://chicago2024.us14.list-manage.com/track/click?u=b2032775a03190d822e2a0e73&id=2721c3489f&e=e789b9d47e). This group of independent designers, furniture makers, and fabricators have set up shop in a repurposed warehouse and offer public showcases and events
**Shop** at [Crecer Business Incubator](https://chicago2024.us14.list-manage.com/track/click?u=b2032775a03190d822e2a0e73&id=1e589ecf7a&e=e789b9d47e), a must-visit storefront. It features items from up-and-coming entrepreneurs and small businesses within the community.
**Watch** a show at [Aguijon Theater](https://chicago2024.us14.list-manage.com/track/click?u=b2032775a03190d822e2a0e73&id=385e40076d&e=e789b9d47e), the city’s oldest Latino theater.
**Eat** seafood at [La Costa](https://chicago2024.us14.list-manage.com/track/click?u=b2032775a03190d822e2a0e73&id=941fc9517d&e=e789b9d47e).
|
---
## Vendor Spotlights
Chicago is home to a wealth of small businesses and vendors. Check out the latest spotlights from our vendor directory:
| | | | | | | | | [](https://chicago2024.us14.list-manage.com/track/click?u=b2032775a03190d822e2a0e73&id=3f7c3075a3&e=e789b9d47e)
---
| [Haire’s Gulf Shrimp](https://chicago2024.us14.list-manage.com/track/click?u=b2032775a03190d822e2a0e73&id=f3c2526ec7&e=e789b9d47e) began out of a caboose on the South Side of Chicago (Greater Grand Crossing). The founder Finnie Haire’s mother who was from the Louisiana/ Texas area, affectionately called “Big Mama” by family, passed down her delicious seafood marinade recipe to her son Finnie Haire. 20 years later this family ran business is a [staple on the South side](https://chicago2024.us14.list-manage.com/track/click?u=b2032775a03190d822e2a0e73&id=b9ddb6750e&e=e789b9d47e) of Chicago.
---
|
---
| | | | | | | | | [](https://chicago2024.us14.list-manage.com/track/click?u=b2032775a03190d822e2a0e73&id=9e3578b16f&e=e789b9d47e)
---
[Park West](https://chicago2024.us14.list-manage.com/track/click?u=b2032775a03190d822e2a0e73&id=1436b650a9&e=e789b9d47e) is one of Chicago’s most established performance and special events spaces, operating continually since 1977.
| [](https://chicago2024.us14.list-manage.com/track/click?u=b2032775a03190d822e2a0e73&id=312a22b02a&e=e789b9d47e)
---
_If you’d like to be featured in our newsletter or social media channels, please email us with your business name, logo, description, and a picture or video that best describes your business._
|
---
## Staff Spotlight
| | | | | | | | | This week we are spotlighting our Operations Director, **Jake Mikva.**
Jake grew up in the Hyde Park and North Shore neighborhood, and moved to New York, before finally making his way back to Chicago where he now resides in Logan Square. He believes the convention is a once-in-a-generation opportunity for Chicago: the economic impact, the spotlight on our best assets, and the ability to showcase our deeply ingrained civic spirit.
---
|
---
Jake is a huge fan of Taqueria Chingon in Logan Square and recommends the duck carnitas. Outside of work, he enjoys cooking for friends, family, and coworkers, as well as practicing yoga, playing golf, tennis, or pick-up basketball whenever he can find the time. Jake also loves exploring Chicago's diverse neighborhoods and trying out new restaurants and bars. Whether he's traveling by bike, foot, bus, or L, he's always on the lookout for what the city has to offer.

clean_body: Host Committee Happenings | A Newsletter by the Chicago 2024 Host Committee | | | | | | Host Committee Happenings A Newsletter by the Chicago 2024 Host Committee | | | | | | | | | | | Note from the Host Committee Welcome back to Host Committee Happenings, our biweekly newsletter! We are only 139 days away from this summer’s Democratic National Convention. | | | | | | | | | Read more about the women-led, local enterprises selected to execute the largest official hospitality events of the convention and the first vendor summit held by the Host Committee and Democratic National Convention Committee (DNCC). | Credit: You can always send us your questions, comments, or concerns at mailto:info@chicago2024.com?subject=null&body=null. | Women-Led Local, Diverse-Owned Enterprises Selected for Official Hospitality Events Following a rigorous search and selection process, the Chicago 2024 Host Committee and the DNCC selected two local, diverse-owned teams with extensive large-scale event planning and execution experience to produce the largest official hospitality events for the 2024 Democratic National Convention. Chicago-based event production company Juan and Only Events has partnered with local firms elemento L2 and All Terrain to produce events welcoming convention attendees. Chicago’s Revel Global Events and 5423 Productions have also teamed to execute other official convention events that will showcase local enterprises. | | | | | | | | | | | | | | | | | | | | | | | Contract Awards To date, the Host Committee and DNCC have released the following requests for proposals. Read more about the contracts that have been awarded below: Owner's Representative: (November 2023) Event Architect: (January 2024) Event Manager: (January 2024) Exposition Services: (January 2024) Construction Manager: (January 2024) Hospitality Events: (March 2024) Under Review: Sustainability, Transportation, Credentials | Vendor Summit on Arena Operations | | | | | | | | | | | | Credit: Last week, the Host Committee and DNCC hosted over 250 vendors at the United Center and virtually for an exposition services and construction vendor summit! | | | | | | | | | Participants were given a first look at upcoming and had the chance to network with fellow industry professionals. | | DNC Vendor Directory and Venue Map | | | | | | | | | Make sure you include your business in the and All you need to do is complete the to be included! Our team reviews submissions on a rolling basis. We appreciate your patience as we carefully review every submission. | Please note that inclusion in the vendor directory and venue map does not mean the Host Committee, Democratic National Convention Committee, or Democratic National Convention endorse or approve any of the listed vendors. The Directory is offered as a resource to groups and businesses who may need to procure services, facilities, or supplies for their events in Chicago in connection with the 2024 Democratic National Convention, and to encourage the use of local and diverse vendors for those needs. For questions about vendors, please email mailto:vendor@chicago2024.com. For questions about venues, please email mailto:venues@chicago2024.com. | Volunteer Opportunities If you’re interested in volunteering for the Democratic National Convention this August, be sure to complete the . The form only needs to be completed one time. If you missed any of our volunteer information sessions, you can watch a replay . | | | | | | | | | | In the coming months, individuals who completed the volunteer interest form will be invited to complete a volunteer application. Only volunteers that complete the application and pass a screening and background check will receive assignments. Additional questions regarding volunteering can be directed to mailto:volunteers@chicago2024.com?subject=Question&body=null. | | | | | | | | | | Sponsorship Opportunities Is your business or organization looking for additional ways to get involved with the Democratic National Convention? Consider becoming a Convention sponsor or partner! Inquiries regarding sponsorships and partnerships should be sent to mailto:development@chicago2024.com?subject=Sponsorships%20and%20Partnerships&body=null. | 77 Spotlight | | | | | | | | | Next up on the 77 spotlight is Englewood ...a community on the southwest side of Chicago! It is best known as a historical hub for Black music and culture. Jennifer Hudson, Derrick Rose, Mavis Staples, and Bernie Mac have all called the neighborhood home. This large residential area has two beautiful parks, Hamilton Park and Sherman Park, designed by legendary landscape architects, the Olmsted Brothers. | Picture Credit: Steve Geer Check out the or the , which takes place every September. Explore the , an urban farm that offers free meals, cooking demos, healthy recipes, family-friendly activities and farm tours. Eat unique food options at or indulge in barbecue at . | | | | | | | | | Picture Credit: Steve Geer | Belmont Cragin is located on the northwest side of Chicago. This neighborhood is well-known for its welcoming Latino community and flourishing small businesses. Enjoy cultural events, international cuisine, local theater, or a night out in the neighborhood! Explore , a 100-year-old green space that offers plenty of outdoor activities for everyone. You can enjoy a duck-filled lagoon, picnic areas, a running track, a soccer field, a large pool, and an ice rink in the winter. Admire the vintage cars at the . Check out . This group of independent designers, furniture makers, and fabricators have set up shop in a repurposed warehouse and offer public showcases and events Shop at , a must-visit storefront. It features items from up-and-coming entrepreneurs and small businesses within the community. Watch a show at , the city’s oldest Latino theater. Eat seafood at . | Vendor Spotlights Chicago is home to a wealth of small businesses and vendors. Check out the latest spotlights from our vendor directory: | | | | | | | | | | began out of a caboose on the South Side of Chicago (Greater Grand Crossing). The founder Finnie Haire’s mother who was from the Louisiana/ Texas area, affectionately called “Big Mama” by family, passed down her delicious seafood marinade recipe to her son Finnie Haire. 20 years later this family ran business is a of Chicago. | | | | | | | | | | is one of Chicago’s most established performance and special events spaces, operating continually since 1977. | If you’d like to be featured in our newsletter or social media channels, please email us with your business name, logo, description, and a picture or video that best describes your business. | Staff Spotlight | | | | | | | | | This week we are spotlighting our Operations Director, Jake Mikva.** Jake grew up in the Hyde Park and North Shore neighborhood, and moved to New York, before finally making his way back to Chicago where he now resides in Logan Square. He believes the convention is a once-in-a-generation opportunity for Chicago: the economic impact, the spotlight on our best assets, and the ability to showcase our deeply ingrained civic spirit. | Jake is a huge fan of Taqueria Chingon in Logan Square and recommends the duck carnitas. Outside of work, he enjoys cooking for friends, family, and coworkers, as well as practicing yoga, playing golf, tennis, or pick-up basketball whenever he can find the time. Jake also loves exploring Chicago's diverse neighborhoods and trying out new restaurants and bars. I was blessed to spend Easter Sunday with my beautiful wife and sons. (I couldn’t help but include this photo we took at our boys’ First Communion the night before.) I wanted to touch base because I believe a huge thank you is in order. Thanks to supporters like you, I not only met my end-of-quarter fundraising goal, but **I also made the ballot**! That means we gathered over 5,000 signatures from voters in AZ-01 so that come July — I’ll officially be on the ballot in the Democratic primary. When we win this primary we’ll be on track to defeat MAGA insurrectionist David Schweikert once and for all. Sound like something you want to be a part of? **[Chip in $10 or $25 today to join the movement:](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/82232935/464737396/867942456?amount=25&source=SBD_CO_EM_FR_040224_Ballot&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNTkvMS8xMDc0NDIiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiMTA2NjE5ODctMjJmMS1lZTExLWFhZjItMDAyMjQ4MjIzMzUzIiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=Eg_ELWqEMuEpVcE20dSVeW6WbQMbUf-bAh3Bg4Yb1SY=)** | If you've stored your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will process now.

For too long (over a decade, in fact), David Schweikert has been sitting in his big office in Washington D.C. strategizing how to serve — not the people of Arizona — but himself. From voting to throw out our ballots following the 2020 election results to agreeing to vote for a national abortion ban (that 90% of Arizonans oppose), it’s pretty clear _**he’s got his priorities all wrong.**_
I really don’t like asking for donations, but the fact of the matter is that unlike Schweikert, I don’t have millions of NRCC dollars at my disposal. I’m relying on grassroots support from generous folks like you, Peter.
**[Will you help me make it to the finish line with a donation of any amount right now?](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/82232942/464737430/867942456?amount=10&source=SBD_CO_EM_FR_040224_Ballot&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNTkvMS8xMDc0NDIiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiMTA2NjE5ODctMjJmMS1lZTExLWFhZjItMDAyMjQ4MjIzMzUzIiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=Eg_ELWqEMuEpVcE20dSVeW6WbQMbUf-bAh3Bg4Yb1SY=)**
I’m so grateful you’re on my team.
—Conor
* * *

As a proud Arizonan and lifelong Democrat, Conor O'Callaghan is wholeheartedly committed to enshrining _Roe v. Wade_ into law, safeguarding our communities against gun violence, addressing the urgent challenges posed by climate change and our water crisis, and ensuring that everyone contributes their equitable share in taxes. **It's time for a new, forward-thinking direction.**

clean_body: A proud Arizonan and lifelong Democrat, Conor O'Callaghan is running to represent Arizona's 1st Congressional District and unseat MAGA Republican David Schweikert. If you’d like to unsubscribe, | | = Peter, I hope you had a restful Easter weekend with your loved ones. I was blessed to spend Easter Sunday with my beautiful wife and sons. (I couldn’t help but include this photo we took at our boys’ First Communion the night before.) I wanted to touch base because I believe a huge thank you is in order. Thanks to supporters like you, I not only met my end-of-quarter fundraising goal, but I also made the ballot! That means we gathered over 5,000 signatures from voters in AZ-01 so that come July — I’ll officially be on the ballot in the Democratic primary. When we win this primary we’ll be on track to defeat MAGA insurrectionist David Schweikert once and for all. Sound like something you want to be a part of? = | If you've stored your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will process now. | = | = | = | = | = | = For too long (over a decade, in fact), David Schweikert has been sitting in his big office in Washington D.C. strategizing how to serve — not the people of Arizona — but himself. From voting to throw out our ballots following the 2020 election results to agreeing to vote for a national abortion ban (that 90% of Arizonans oppose), it’s pretty clear he’s got his priorities all wrong. I really don’t like asking for donations, but the fact of the matter is that unlike Schweikert, I don’t have millions of NRCC dollars at my disposal. I’m relying on grassroots support from generous folks like you, Peter. = I’m so grateful you’re on my team. —Conor | | | ---|---|--- = As a proud Arizonan and lifelong Democrat, Conor O'Callaghan is wholeheartedly committed to enshrining Roe v. Wade into law, safeguarding our communities against gun violence, addressing the urgent challenges posed by climate change and our water crisis, and ensuring that everyone contributes their equitable share in taxes. It's time for a new, forward-thinking direction.** | = = Paid for by Conor for AZ Conor for AZ P.O. Box 13304 Scottsdale, AZ 85267-3304 United States If you would like to unsubscribe, click here: You can also =.

| While much of our energy is spent working on legislative policy and with candidates and officials at that level of government, we cannot overlook the importance of municipal elections! On Saturday, May 4, voters across the state will be casting ballots in local elections - everything from school board to city council to bonds will be on the ballot!
One thing we learned from the COVID era is that these local elected officials play a pivotal role in shaping and enforcing policies that impact you the most. So, we implore you to research candidates in your area and ask them to fill out our [local candidate survey](https://click.mlsend.com/link/c/YT0yNDQ5NTI5OTg4NjA1NTQ4OTk0JmM9eTFvOCZlPTAmYj0xMzAzMjkwNDE1JmQ9azNyMmI5ZA==.MKQevNIUNcFcERZjEe5pKzAw-vGeQpHf1sKOtjOYk0I) for the opportunity to be included in our upcoming Voter Guide. Also, make sure you and your loved ones are registered to vote! The deadline to register to vote in the May 4 election is this Thursday, April 4! Click **_[HERE](https://click.mlsend.com/link/c/YT0yNDQ5NTI5OTg4NjA1NTQ4OTk0JmM9eTFvOCZlPTAmYj0xMzAzMjkwNDE4JmQ9aDdlMXk2aQ==.8aKzDSnMXf6UYyMRElORfLhlPucdN2U1oyVKicrySMc)_** for answers to your most pressing questions regarding voting in Texas.

Vaccine choice is **not a partisan issue**. All Texans should be able to make their own vaccine decisions without outside pressure. TFVC has always thought that these issues are something everyone can champion, regardless of party lines. **The Texas Democrat Party seems to disagree**. **Read more[HERE](https://click.mlsend.com/link/c/YT0yNDQ5NTI5OTg4NjA1NTQ4OTk0JmM9eTFvOCZlPTAmYj0xMzAzMjkwNDQxJmQ9ZDduN2wybA==.EA-tV9wGZs0FBEkpAgoXX27_xn0hXyyL-m9XgtL7muw).**

| MOCO Tea Party
---

clean_body: | | | | | | | | | | While much of our energy is spent working on legislative policy and with candidates and officials at that level of government, we cannot overlook the importance of municipal elections! On Saturday, May 4, voters across the state will be casting ballots in local elections - everything from school board to city council to bonds will be on the ballot! One thing we learned from the COVID era is that these local elected officials play a pivotal role in shaping and enforcing policies that impact you the most. So, we implore you to research candidates in your area and ask them to fill out our for the opportunity to be included in our upcoming Voter Guide. Also, make sure you and your loved ones are registered to vote! The deadline to register to vote in the May 4 election is this Thursday, April 4! Click for answers to your most pressing questions regarding voting in Texas. | | | News | | | | | , SD 11 SREC Committeewoman Gaylyn Devine shared everything you need to know about what to expect at the RPT Convention in May. **** this Thursday for our next exciting episode!** | | | | | Vaccine choice is not a partisan issue. All Texans should be able to make their own vaccine decisions without outside pressure. TFVC has always thought that these issues are something everyone can champion, regardless of party lines. The Texas Democrat Party seems to disagree. the patient’s healthcare provider,” and was submitted by Floridians
Protecting Freedom (FPF).

[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/82234896/464743689/1364887459?refcode=BLU_EM_HSC_2024-04-02_1&amount=25&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzMvMS85NTY0MCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI1M2U2MGI0ZC0yNWYxLWVlMTEtYWFmMi0wMDIyNDgyMjMzNTMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=zNzy9RF6SPEVciCwnKSD4N9sANizcC4fJEQgCh7kX_c=)
Donald Trump is campaigning in Grand Rapids as we speak. Trump is calling this his "Biden Border Bloodbath" stop after killing a bipartisan border deal that would have added 1,500 agents to the Southern border. It’s clear that Trump is coming to town with nothing more than empty promises & political theater.

He wants to fan the flames of division at a time when we need unity & working together more than ever.

His presence in our district is not just a reminder of his divisive rhetoric but a clear signal of the importance of West Michigan in November. Because here’s the thing–Trump won Michigan in 2016. And he knows he can win again if we’re not fighting back.

Our state and district will be instrumental in deciding the fate of the Presidency, Senate, and the House. The work we put in now will be crucial to preventing a second Trump term, but we need to be loud and clear.

Trump is calling this his "Biden Border Bloodbath" stop after killing a bipartisan border deal that would have added 1,500 agents to the Southern border. It’s clear that Trump is coming to town with nothing more than empty promises & political theater. He wants to fan the flames of division at a time when we need unity & working together more than ever. His presence in our district is not just a reminder of his divisive rhetoric but a clear signal of the importance of West Michigan in November. Because here’s the thing–Trump won Michigan in 2016. And he knows he can win again if we’re not fighting back. Our state and district will be instrumental in deciding the fate of the Presidency, Senate, and the House. body:
We created the Living Wage for Musicians Act in partnership with artists and United Musicians and Allied Workers. | | | [](https://click.actionnetwork.org/ss/c/u001.X6XUC7u8ppFLNtMO_55SZlNseb7gEYIOhm_EWnhzEOZKmTtnV3k2h4V2x_O3H7rdW2az5rgktBwzxQ8Ml9Wgkmv85qW-UsBonL4KRa0bcNqdICU6T3NBDdNIZG7w7wEW-X_mVWKxsGqK2iuQEcMimWNnTanfQhLvP4toO2QojXJeZZAEITQZil4-kP7oqjrnDErPxoQMsY_xsOAIaWphNFY_rXnWOCbrJkGq_1FpsPkCdKjgpJIjicljXhmX-EZDamqaAbNAwTnUCqCCaT3yk8rKCZ3W0pd1gHc4GK9BIIdZqx7KVMdZX10Ej5L2bXSN_L4N8Q-14sHuGeiwxEZoku_sH1Ktc07RvmYvUoFIRIHbNE8T7wWaOYG35IzGWyfa_MM3DlwFK7uEXdXw6N7Qxg/456/mdo6wVGZQ-K2L9nHVVFePQ/h0/h001.A9Npwr6kao2a-3yxHmLUBvmMGl_bs1_pr5YA_WCOSl0)
---
Friend, Detroit is one of the music capitals of the world, the birthplace of Motown and techno and so much more music that has changed our culture. **My city and my district are home to thousands of musicians and artists who deserve fair compensation for their labor.** Across the country, musicians and artists are struggling to make ends meet while streaming services and record labels are seeing record profits. Currently, Spotify pays artists an average per-stream royalty of $0.003, which means it takes artists more than 800,000 monthly streams to equal a full-time $15/hour job. **As part of our push for economic justice, Rep. Jamaal Bowman and I introduced new legislation to ensure streaming services compensate musicians more fairly—creating a new fund that would aim to pay artists at least one penny per stream.** In partnership with United Musicians and Allied Workers and local and national artists, we created the _Living Wage for Musicians Act_ to help more artists achieve a living wage from music, enabling them to pay rent, raise a family, buy a home, and invest in their future—including by making more music and touring. [**Please sign on as a grassroots co-sponsor in support of our new bill, the**** _Living Wage for Musicians Act_****.**](https://click.actionnetwork.org/ss/c/u001.qUXRBnqZ7T8nxbpAcIVwoUsWLkUMWlo_0JmZttSlm381rcfdHkIQD_K7aziRYYN5ANMwo5Wp8jtgM-bpyeXEkv70oV5ZXh9SC90AWBhDspwGhGR8RXtq4yvsUyVshTiVwOwWmkKQNuzF0ZvSSz1_8PrtOC77GdYGmZkn4nRoGE2PfZXLZ6BjDV34syTXosMawbZKTo26u7bREyjjji1vcpFaSOg7ZWu_u4f0d0oJAAPo-1YSNYjxp9jVwiJ9zxsR7f8_TAOQHFkMEln6K3KNUvDxUAICrE_ubbkSRpAPBDy_T7cKlc2fbM9vH0MSFuf_7H1IytYM-hX11PRL-xH763pmzWvGwrHiAPz6fjzYRcSuR7PotyK3FhF7YtrmBGW-hGEcYt2_DUfmciXoPIBgRk07J5IdOphEqcF_mwDmD9d7McJS90Bis9vWM9UPUdcNlwmN-aPGQe-tS5A7bCeuMaN0LVLyI7971ylMTPUWfRE/456/mdo6wVGZQ-K2L9nHVVFePQ/h1/h001.g6rzUPymYJIcXBerH7LVK3JDiPPKLjcZfB5TYhGFryw) | [SIGN ON](https://click.actionnetwork.org/ss/c/u001.qUXRBnqZ7T8nxbpAcIVwoUsWLkUMWlo_0JmZttSlm381rcfdHkIQD_K7aziRYYN5ANMwo5Wp8jtgM-bpyeXEkv70oV5ZXh9SC90AWBhDspwGhGR8RXtq4yvsUyVshTiVBehmQFnwvA_Cd2OgDOriFHcn9VCZ6GXxAv3C1R48mMKii0rOz59Vh5TruT7tQR438yfHpo3U2K1zhJHcHuNICqeFdO-3-f3pJkUO6Drzf8CIhD-S2gv871fYpxZoEHBmdl-yhKaGHvjVqkg-92NU_ktXaguuwVFZ2dSfXE28zjMncfE5NE4ok8cSq5dgyVvqom6Wa_Umq2IV4O5KEjfb9WH03OyLSQDMgrSVzScxQ_OaN24oYtXekgK_6EXT-LCMVUZhulMMwe4aLr0A8yliK__AQCs5xYnFc3KBvldOejtTFhQxCpMLQf1PnLqzr3YYfNMikB9l0nenHnbYumpmSedqBhUtnnMrXx8U6_ddC_I/456/mdo6wVGZQ-K2L9nHVVFePQ/h2/h001.otHTCTP-CaBpGelXsRLFh5zHluvCQQquTGR2N1oSfao)
---
It’s only right that the people who create the music we love get their fair share, so that they can thrive, not just survive.
Throughout my life I’ve joined striking workers on countless picket lines, and I know that workers’ rights change lives. When my father joined a union, our family was able to get healthcare for the first time.
We all deserve to make a wage that truly values the work we put in for ourselves and our families.
Streaming now represents 84% of recorded music industry’s revenue in the US, but most of the artists who bring joy to our lives and culture aren’t seeing any of it. Instead of under-compensating artists for their art and labor, it’s time to pay artists a living wage.
[**Sign on to support my new bill demanding the fair pay that musicians deserve.**](https://click.actionnetwork.org/ss/c/u001.qUXRBnqZ7T8nxbpAcIVwoUsWLkUMWlo_0JmZttSlm381rcfdHkIQD_K7aziRYYN5ANMwo5Wp8jtgM-bpyeXEkv70oV5ZXh9SC90AWBhDspwGhGR8RXtq4yvsUyVshTiVjFNFVX2BH7fg6XRnpOR8q7HMBbyqoYnUuHzlY9TAcg-rXh5nAkT4ireYqpGCUXgRt4UwH6zmIaNSSKTd37jmls8zjIln-hhkQKqunoUxjZjBP4h3yJfsZZ4qBtDg8yfDTj5dnqbEC7-_YWgy_CYBM2sV8UC2V-N5kAdyP8lUyxY-yvRXAVYhY161hOXX6VcaybE8WI8ptzW_NfBUmVbtlDHUpVn8wsqVLhPVBhHX88kY4nS0VzoW7EZMDmtBFib8YCK1nAeCkHoJYPojVyo6xYF8qAsbwmpGFQ2gsFEK3fVl6CRlYBtsOPLd4xVzZ1Vdgggvk5DC1NzLl_jblGFo---BtXyMFoyrlcbKA7zValk/456/mdo6wVGZQ-K2L9nHVVFePQ/h3/h001.99Zz6paCtfNzpXfdH1GZnYrAXJhEl15_SNSmiAksVLE)
Thank you for continuing to push for justice and dignity for all people.
In solidarity,
Rashida

name: Justice Democrats
subject: Donate to UNRWA to aid Palestinians →
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY JUSTICE DEMOCRATS
body:
[1]Justice Democrats

Peter,

Disturbing news continues to come out of Gaza: while reports indicate the
Israeli military obliterated Al-Shifa Hospital and killed more than 300
Palestinians in its siege of the medical complex, 7 international aid
workers with Chef Jose Andres’ World Central Kitchen were killed by an
Israeli strike yesterday.

After Congress and President Biden defunded UNRWA, the largest source of
aid for Gaza, groups like World Central Kitchen and ANERA have continued
to step in to provide desperately needed food and water to starving
Palestinians.

In light of these attacks by Israel’s military, these two organizations
just announced they’re suspending their critical work in Gaza out of fear
for their workers’ own safety, leaving Palestinians with even fewer
options for aid.

Israel is using mass starvation as a weapon of war. Famine is imminent in
Gaza, with more than 1 million people at risk of man-made starvation.
Israel’s far-right government is manufacturing this by blocking aid trucks
and targeting critical aid organizations through violent means.

We cannot sit idly by. An estimated 33,000 Palestinians have now been
killed since last October, and more than a million are at grave risk of
malnutrition and starvation.

[ https://donate.unrwa.org/one-time/~my-donation ]As we keep up the pressure for a permanent ceasefire in Gaza and an end
to weapons transfers to Israel, will you help deliver aid to Palestinians
in need by contributing directly to UNRWA today? Any amount you can give
right now will help save lives in Gaza.

[ https://donate.unrwa.org/one-time/~my-donation ]Donate to UNRWA

In solidarity,

Justice Democrats

Contribute to Justice Democrats: https://secure.actblue.com/donate/justicedemocrats?refcode=em20240402-34114-footer&t=1001&refcode2=34114_1203867_7RM5-s&akid=34114%2E1203867%2E7RM5-s

This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is the most important way for us to reach you about opportunities to get involved. If you need to remove yourself from our email list, click here to unsubscribe: https://go.justicedemocrats.com/unsubscribe/unsubscribe/?t=1002&akid=34114%2E1203867%2E7RM5-s

PAID FOR BY JUSTICE DEMOCRATS. Not authorized by any candidate or candidate’s committee.
Justice Democrats
1390 Columbia Ave #261
Lancaster PA 17603
Email us: us@justicedemocrats.com
