it's Harry Dunn – former Capitol police officer and current Democrat for Congress.
_Harry Dunn is running for Congress in Maryland’s Third District, and we’re working to support him.[Click here to stop receiving emails about Harry Dunn's campaign in Maryland from us.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/82235193/464744800/-1054241163?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzMvMS85NjIxNiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIyYTViOWZjMy0yNWYxLWVlMTEtYWFmMi0wMDIyNDgyMjMzNTMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=pBHUwRiUrCSjw9W0VxlooBCeyEBjpwNYqeO9QtmPzcA=&emci=f49a3d99-b8f0-ee11-aaf0-002248223197&emdi=2a5b9fc3-25f1-ee11-aaf2-002248223353&ceid=19445147)_
[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/82235194/464744801/182639047?refcode=em20240402pm-nd&amounts=5%2C10%2C25%2C35%2C50%2C100%2C250&refcode2=2a5b9fc3-25f1-ee11-aaf2-002248223353&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzMvMS85NjIxNiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIyYTViOWZjMy0yNWYxLWVlMTEtYWFmMi0wMDIyNDgyMjMzNTMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=pBHUwRiUrCSjw9W0VxlooBCeyEBjpwNYqeO9QtmPzcA=)
Hey, it's Harry Dunn – former Capitol police officer and current Democrat for Congress.
I've done a lot of tough things in my life, like most of us have. I played college football, tried to make it in the NFL and CFL. That was pretty tough mentally, physically, emotionally.
There were many tough days in my 15 years of being a Capitol police officer.
But the aftermath of the January 6 insurrection was one of the toughest things I've been through. My pain, my trauma, it didn't end on January 7.
The tough days continued, even when I testified in front of Congress. That's when that picture above is from. But I did it, despite the death threats and constant barrage of attacks, because it was my duty not just as an officer but as an American.
Tough things build character, and I credit the tough days that I've experienced for getting me to where I am today – mentally healthy and an outspoken advocate for our democracy, running to serve Maryland. **[Will you chip in to my campaign and Adam Frisch's to join my team of grassroots supporters who want to protect our democracy?](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/82235195/464744802/182639047?refcode=em20240402pm-nd&amounts=5%2C10%2C25%2C35%2C50%2C100%2C250&refcode2=2a5b9fc3-25f1-ee11-aaf2-002248223353&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzMvMS85NjIxNiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIyYTViOWZjMy0yNWYxLWVlMTEtYWFmMi0wMDIyNDgyMjMzNTMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=pBHUwRiUrCSjw9W0VxlooBCeyEBjpwNYqeO9QtmPzcA=)**

body:
Take a moment to pat yourself on the back |
#
[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/82235710/464746612/-1107229543?contactdata=3Rq2WyFdaEbC48vmRZPlPGnooUFCVa4Ta08nSS6eriAX8O/4rzpcDi/KxZOEWIYiF/UyP7PaqvoDCF7GfQE+nVVhLjSdfiInJUoZ4f/0IcOxikdT1wuJa8DdYU5mskeq1BEmRqpXRYKs9drO3ePdb0ZhJ6k2JmFwe4W6w3vWmHc=&refcode=AU_MKH_EG_GEN_SUR_AC_20240402_PM1_V1_S1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDUvMS83MTU3NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIwNzBmMGVjYy0yN2YxLWVlMTEtYWFmMi0wMDIyNDgyMjMzNTMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=ORL-Yq0x95JcHaGQAjz3PaSmI5DVqy23WYpcNpHT64E=&emci=b6b8b659-fbf0-ee11-aaf2-002248223353&emdi=070f0ecc-27f1-ee11-aaf2-002248223353&ceid=23190490) Aloha Peter, I want to thank you for stepping up ahead of our first end-of-quarter deadline of the election year. From Hawaii to Ohio, Montana to Wisconsin, and Pennsylvania to Nevada, MAGA Republicans have already begun pouring _tens of millions of dollars_ to defeat Democratic incumbents, claim the Senate majority, and ram through their unpopular, extremist agenda. They’re backed up by billionaire-backed, McConnell-aligned super PACs who will spend endlessly to stop our fight for our working families, our planet, and our future, so we needed to make a bold statement about our grassroots momentum — **and we did, thanks to folks like you.** Take a moment to pat yourself on the back, but then, it’s on to the next one. We must continue growing our people-powered, grassroots movement — and we can’t do that without hearing directly from **you, Peter.** **[So, will you take a moment to complete my April Priorities Survey and let us know what issues you’d like us to prioritize in the coming weeks and months?](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/82235711/464746613/-1107229543?contactdata=3Rq2WyFdaEbC48vmRZPlPGnooUFCVa4Ta08nSS6eriAX8O/4rzpcDi/KxZOEWIYiF/UyP7PaqvoDCF7GfQE+nVVhLjSdfiInJUoZ4f/0IcOxikdT1wuJa8DdYU5mskeq1BEmRqpXRYKs9drO3ePdb0ZhJ6k2JmFwe4W6w3vWmHc=&refcode=AU_MKH_EG_GEN_SUR_AC_20240402_PM1_V1_S1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDUvMS83MTU3NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIwNzBmMGVjYy0yN2YxLWVlMTEtYWFmMi0wMDIyNDgyMjMzNTMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=ORL-Yq0x95JcHaGQAjz3PaSmI5DVqy23WYpcNpHT64E=&emci=b6b8b659-fbf0-ee11-aaf2-002248223353&emdi=070f0ecc-27f1-ee11-aaf2-002248223353&ceid=23190490)** | | [TAKE THE SURVEY](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/82235712/464746614/-1107229543?contactdata=3Rq2WyFdaEbC48vmRZPlPGnooUFCVa4Ta08nSS6eriAX8O/4rzpcDi/KxZOEWIYiF/UyP7PaqvoDCF7GfQE+nVVhLjSdfiInJUoZ4f/0IcOxikdT1wuJa8DdYU5mskeq1BEmRqpXRYKs9drO3ePdb0ZhJ6k2JmFwe4W6w3vWmHc=&refcode=AU_MKH_EG_GEN_SUR_AC_20240402_PM1_V1_S1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDUvMS83MTU3NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIwNzBmMGVjYy0yN2YxLWVlMTEtYWFmMi0wMDIyNDgyMjMzNTMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=ORL-Yq0x95JcHaGQAjz3PaSmI5DVqy23WYpcNpHT64E=&emci=b6b8b659-fbf0-ee11-aaf2-002248223353&emdi=070f0ecc-27f1-ee11-aaf2-002248223353&ceid=23190490)

Take a moment to pat yourself on the back, but then, it’s on to the next one. We must continue growing our people-powered, grassroots movement — and we can’t do that without hearing directly from you, Peter. | | Whether you chipped in to my campaign, signed on to one of my petitions, or even just opened this email, I’m grateful for your support. Thank you. — Mazie Friends of Mazie Hirono Friends of Mazie Hirono 335 Merchant Street #677 Honolulu, HI 96809 United States

name: Jacky Rosen
subject: I just took a MAJOR risk, and I need you to know
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Fight for Progress PAC and not authorized by any candidate or any candidate's committee
body:
It was a difficult decision

| Peter, I just made a bit of a risky decision:

**I authorized our new TV ads to launch _a week early,_** even though the money wasn’t in our budget. My finance director wasn’t exactly _thrilled_ with the idea at first, but she came around once I explained why. Let me fill you in:

I'm officially the most vulnerable woman in the Senate, and dark money groups like the Koch network are pouring _millions_ into Nevada to flip my seat red.

Right now, it’s critical we get our ads live ASAP – because having these ads up and running is the best way to counter the GOP's attacks.

**But now, we’re facing a $500,000 budget gap that we have to make up to get these new ads live.** We absolutely can’t afford to fall further behind right now, but I told my finance director that I trust top supporters like you to have my back.

[_**So please, can you chip in $5 or whatever you can spare to my campaign and Fight for Progress right now to help us get these new ads on the air and reach voters?**_](https://click.everyaction.com/k/82235791/464746836/1736145590?refcode=BLU_EM_FFP_2024-04-02_1&amount=5&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAwNS8xLzc3NDA2IiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogIjI4NzdlNmUyLTI3ZjEtZWUxMS1hYWYyLTAwMjI0ODIyMzM1MyIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=qr_3sKYBBqjvcyvWCCMsnExf1o3pCj0YpHfatre3e3I=)

name: Jameson Ellis
subject: You may not know this about me, Peter...
body:
Here it is.

| | | | Peter,
Many of my friends and colleagues will be at the State Convention in San Antonio during **Texas Flynn Fest** , but as you may have realized, I will be at the event back home.
Let's talk about that for a second...
It might surprise you to learn that **I hate politics**. I think it sucks.
Politics can divide families and destroy friendships.
Let me be a little clearer about what I mean by saying "politics..."
What I really mean is the political spirit.
The back-biting, the back-stabbing, the manipulation, and the willingness to say or do anything to get what one wants.
It's immoral. It's unethical. It's evil.
And it's this political spirit that turns people off to performing their civic duty... that, or they perform their civic duty in an uninformed manner.
What are we to do, Peter?
Should we complain and shame people into getting involved?
Of course not - that only worsens the problem and pushes people further away.
And yet, out of desperation for the state of our union, many patriots do precisely this.
Here's reality...
**Most people** are overworked, underpaid, and stressed out... then they go home to a spouse who is also overworked, underpaid, and stressed out.
They want an escape from the stress, to avoid stepping into more of it voluntarily!
A mentor of mine, Jim Rohn, once said:
_"Don't wish it was easier, wish you were better. Don't wish for less problems, wish for more skills. Don't wish for less challenge, wish for more wisdom."_
So let's review...
People are overworked, underpaid, stressed, tired, and just want relief.
Many of us who _are_ involved are war-torn and disenfranchised on many fronts by our parties and absolutely our government.
We may not like it, but that's how it is.
And so, instead of complaining about it, I wanted to bring a solution to the table.
That's when Project Defiant was born.
I won't be at the State Convention because my heart is on engaging the disengaged and activating the deactivated.
If we're going to save this country, it's up to us!
There's no party or politician on the planet who can do it—not even President Trump.
It's the average, everyday American patriots willing to step up to the plate and get involved in some way that, God willing, will save this country.
But how do we get there and what does Project Defiant have to do with it?
The **mission** of **Project Defiant** is simple:
We host events that inspire patriotism, support veterans, and support locally-owned businesses.
Our mission stems from the belief that the cause of liberty goes hand in hand with supporting the backbone of America and the Lone Star State – our veterans and local businesses.
People _come_ to our events for the escape... but they _leave_ our events engaged.
And some of them don't even know it!
How do we do it?
An example is one of our strategic partnerships with Concerned Veterans for America. At every event we've held, they have garnered countless signatures from attendees who support efforts to protect and expand veterans' healthcare options, rethink America's foreign policy, and secure the economic foundations of our strength.
Event attendees are helping by effortlessly showing support for legislation that protects veterans' constitutional liberties—and it was painless!
Another example is our strategic partnership with organizations like the Patriot Academy and Battle2BE.
**The point is this:** when things become more complicated, we must think strategically and outside the box.
And that's what **Texas Flynn Fest****on May 23rd** is all about.
Many Patriots coming to **Texas Flynn Fest** have been sitting on the sidelines because they're overworked, underpaid, stressed out, or just don't know what to do.
So even though we're going to have food, drinks, vendors, axe throwing, live music, activities, and a whole lot of fun...
This night will be a spark that sets us all on fire and sends a flame across America from coast to coast.
**I _believe_ that.**
And I'm asking you to lock arms with me and believe that, too.
If you haven't already done so, I encourage you to purchase your tickets today and join the movement.
Get your tickets here: [https://texasflynnfest.com](https://jamesonellis.lt.acemlna.com/Prod/link-tracker?redirectUrl=aHR0cHMlM0ElMkYlMkZ0ZXhhc2ZseW5uZmVzdC5jb20=&sig=8b5Px2bX6KTLRiU347vQHTsSUNSYGKQVwuzvFpTSxCoG&iat=1712104870&a=%7C%7C611311006%7C%7C&account=jamesonellis%2Eactivehosted%2Ecom&email=xptwLdd4IqRUN26FABpo%2FWxFSQyjDHT4EQi1ZGy%2BTAdEFdph%3A4wUBgk4I%2FbYjAY73bFt4VXiB3xWAnje%2B&s=cabcbe31a720242486b887158a77876f&i=246A288A1A2211)
---
[](https://jamesonellis.lt.acemlna.com/Prod/link-tracker?redirectUrl=aHR0cHMlM0ElMkYlMkZ0ZXhhc2ZseW5uZmVzdC5jb20=&sig=8b5Px2bX6KTLRiU347vQHTsSUNSYGKQVwuzvFpTSxCoG&iat=1712104870&a=%7C%7C611311006%7C%7C&account=jamesonellis%2Eactivehosted%2Ecom&email=xptwLdd4IqRUN26FABpo%2FWxFSQyjDHT4EQi1ZGy%2BTAdEFdph%3A4wUBgk4I%2FbYjAY73bFt4VXiB3xWAnje%2B&s=cabcbe31a720242486b887158a77876f&i=246A288A1A2211)
_For Liberty,_
| | |

name: Marco Rubio
subject: A roll of aluminum foil
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Rubio Victory Committee
body:
I can’t explain how grateful I am that you chose to read this email. Only about 30-40% of folks open these messages, and look I get it – there are a lot of political emails being sent these days.

| |
---
| | | Friend,

I can't explain how grateful I am that you chose to read this email. Only about 30-40% of folks open these messages, and look I get it - there are a lot of political emails being sent these days.

Unfortunately, I rely on emails, texts, mail, and phone calls to stay in touch with conservatives like you.

**With that being said, could you do me the simple favor of just reading this all the way through to the end?** If you get to the end and still don't think you have the power to make a difference, then I just want to thank you for your time.

While roughly 35% of supporters open these messages, only an average of 1% of supporters will step up to donate, which makes it difficult since I rely on Americans like you receiving this message to hit my fundraising goals.

I refuse to rely on billionaires and Wall Street executives for money. I want our conservative values fueled by the people who believe in them most - you and me.

**And you know what?** If everyone who opened this email gave just $1 - __one single dollar__ - we'd be able to hit all of our goals.

Growing up, my mom worked at a factory that made aluminum chairs and my father was a bartender. Their wages combined with their hard work allowed for them to buy a home and live in a good community.

With that being said, could you do me the simple favor of just reading this all the way through to the end? If you get to the end and still don't think you have the power to make a difference, then I just want to thank you for your time. While roughly 35% of supporters open these messages, only an average of 1% of supporters will step up to donate, which makes it difficult since I rely on Americans like you receiving this message to hit my fundraising goals. I refuse to rely on billionaires and Wall Street executives for money. I want our conservative values fueled by the people who believe in them most - you and me. And you know what? name: Lucas Kunce
subject: A quick update re: our Q1 fundraising goal
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Lucas Kunce for Missouri
body:
#
Hi Peter, it’s Lucas with a quick update about our Q1 fundraising goal.
**We’re still counting all the numbers, but it’s safe to say we exceeded our goal of raising 50,000 individual donations and had our best quarter yet.** We’ll share more about that soon, but for now I just wanted to reach out to say thank you.
Insiders thought I was crazy when I decided to run this campaign the right way — without any money from corporate PACs or Big Oil + Big Pharma execs. But real people like you have stepped up to prove them wrong by helping us hit our goals every single time, no matter how ambitious they are.
That record-breaking grassroots support has allowed us to hold Josh Hawley accountable for crusading against reproductive rights and embarrassing our state. It’s helped us earn major in-state and national endorsements from groups like the Missouri AFL-CIO, Missouri Fire Fighters, League of Conservation Voters, and End Citizens United. And it’s made this race our best chance to flip a U.S. Senate seat this November.
We’ve got some serious MO-mentum — all thanks to your support. **But now, with the first three months of 2024 behind us, we still have so much work to do.**
From continuing to staff up our campaign to reserving TV ad time and getting organizers on the ground, we’ve got to make sure our campaign has the resources to keep scaling up and getting our message in front of voters. And your continued support is what makes that possible for our movement.
I can’t tell you how much it means to me that you’re part of this team, Peter. And I can’t wait to see what else we’ll accomplish together this year.
Now, let’s keep moving and flip this seat,
— Lucas Kunce
**[DONATE](https://act.lucaskunce.com/go/45059?refcode=em20240402-5183&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=1&akid=5183%2E614464%2Etvc1-c)**

[](https://www.facebook.com/lucaskuncemo/) | [](https://twitter.com/lucaskuncemo) | [](https://www.instagram.com/lucaskuncemo/)
---|---|---
Paid for by Lucas Kunce for Missouri
This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is the most important way we keep in touch with people like you. But, if you'd like to receive fewer emails, [you can do so here](https://act.lucaskunce.com/signup/receive-fewer-emails/). If you need to remove yourself from our email list, [click here to unsubscribe](https://act.lucaskunce.com/unsubscribe/unsubscribe/?t=2&akid=5183%2E614464%2Etvc1-c). Mail us: PO BOX 1240 Independence, MO 64050.

Use of military rank, job titles, and photographs in uniform do not imply endorsement by the Department of the Navy or the Department of Defense.

Hey co-pilot, They say March comes in like a lamb and leaves like a lion. And that was CERTAINLY true for our campaign! It was a bit quiet on the fundraising front without much news at the start of the month. But **we ended by CRUSHING our grassroots fundraising goal (thank you to everyone who pitched in!) AND celebrating the opening of our official campaign headquarters.** Here are a few photos I just had to share from our office warming party. It was a full house... | [ ](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/82236522/464749515/1694846221?refcode=EM_FL_EHA_20240402_na_EOQty_cand_mf_30da_xx_img1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzEvMS85MzM5OSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI3N2E1MjYwZC0yYmYxLWVlMTEtYWFmMi0wMDIyNDgyMjMzNTMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=Wgy4D6Hr0xTlTv6m324P7NnLHC_myplkbX3mFno9Eko=)

... Newly re-elected Bucks County Commissioner Bob Harvie spoke...
[ ](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/82236523/464749516/1694846221?refcode=EM_FL_EHA_20240402_na_EOQty_cand_mf_30da_xx_img2&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzEvMS85MzM5OSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI3N2E1MjYwZC0yYmYxLWVlMTEtYWFmMi0wMDIyNDgyMjMzNTMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=Wgy4D6Hr0xTlTv6m324P7NnLHC_myplkbX3mFno9Eko=)
---
... And I enjoyed speaking with so many familiar and new faces!
[ ](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/82236524/464749517/1694846221?refcode=EM_FL_EHA_20240402_na_EOQty_cand_mf_30da_xx_img3&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzEvMS85MzM5OSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI3N2E1MjYwZC0yYmYxLWVlMTEtYWFmMi0wMDIyNDgyMjMzNTMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=Wgy4D6Hr0xTlTv6m324P7NnLHC_myplkbX3mFno9Eko=)
---
There's so much unglamorous work on a campaign – call time to ask for money, approving endless streams of content, miles and miles on the road traveling the district. **Events like our office warming refill my cup because they always remind me what the grind is really about: people.**
I got into this race because I saw too many people I care about under attack: Women, LGBTQ+ kids, teachers, seniors who rely on social security, families like mine just struggling to stay above the poverty line. And our congressman was doing nothing about it.
**In the Army, when my people were under attack from enemy fire, I would race to my Apache helicopter and fly off to protect them. As a citizen, I'm doing the same thing – but instead of jumping into a cockpit, I jumped into this race.**
I'm beyond grateful to have you in this fight with me as my co-pilot,
Ashley 🚁
P.S. Didn't have a chance to pitch in before end-of-quarter? I still need your help! Our primary election is on April 23rd – which means our team will be out in the field instead of at HQ fundraising. _**[We need grassroots support to keep us on track. Pitch in $10 or more now to help.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/82236525/464749518/1694846221?refcode=EM_FL_EHA_20240402_na_EOQty_cand_mf_30da_xx_l1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzEvMS85MzM5OSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI3N2E1MjYwZC0yYmYxLWVlMTEtYWFmMi0wMDIyNDgyMjMzNTMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=Wgy4D6Hr0xTlTv6m324P7NnLHC_myplkbX3mFno9Eko=)**_

clean_body: Here's what the campaign grind is really about... | = Hey co-pilot, They say March comes in like a lamb and leaves like a lion. And that was CERTAINLY true for our campaign! It was a bit quiet on the fundraising front without much news at the start of the month. But we ended by CRUSHING our grassroots fundraising goal (thank you to everyone who pitched in!) AND celebrating the opening of our official campaign headquarters. Here are a few photos I just had to share from our office warming party. It was a full house... | = ... Newly re-elected Bucks County Commissioner Bob Harvie spoke... = ... And I enjoyed speaking with so many familiar and new faces! = There's so much unglamorous work on a campaign – call time to ask for money, approving endless streams of content, miles and miles on the road traveling the district. Events like our office warming refill my cup because they always remind me what the grind is really about: people. I got into this race because I saw too many people I care about under attack: Women, LGBTQ+ kids, teachers, seniors who rely on social security, families like mine just struggling to stay above the poverty line. And our congressman was doing nothing about it. In the Army, when my people were under attack from enemy fire, I would race to my Apache helicopter and fly off to protect them. As a citizen, I'm doing the same thing – but instead of jumping into a cockpit, I jumped into this race. I'm beyond grateful to have you in this fight with me as my co-pilot, Ashley 🚁 P.S. Didn't have a chance to pitch in before end-of-quarter? I still need your help! Our primary election is on April 23rd – which means our team will be out in the field instead of at HQ fundraising. = If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: | = | = | = ---|---|--- = | = | = | Ashley Ehasz is a U.S. Army veteran, Apache helicopter pilot, and proudly pro-choice Democrat running to unseat Republican Brian Fitzpatrick and represent Pennsylvania’s 1st Congressional District to defend our democracy, restore reproductive rights, tackle corporate greed, advocate for bold gun safety measures, and fight for working families across southeast PA. | = | Paid for by Ehasz for Congress Ehasz for Congress 1800 Byberry Road #1336 Bensalem, PA 19020 United States Ashley Ehasz is a former member of the U.S. Army. Hi Peter, I hope you had a great weekend and a wonderful Easter. For our campaign against AOC, this weekend was more than just a holiday, it was our first FEC filing deadline, marking the *first time* our fundraising numbers would be made public. As one of the biggest elections in the nation, everyone was watching closely to see if we have what it takes to defeat AOC. **Well, I'm proud to announce thanks to supporters like you, we not only reached our fundraising goal, but surpassed it — sending a powerful message to the media, AOC, and the far-left!**
Regardless of if you donated, reading our emails means you’re a member of this team, and I am beyond grateful to have you standing with us.
While it was a huge victory for us, our work is just getting started. **We have fewer than three months until Election Day and AOC and the far-left are doing everything they can to slow us down.** **[Will you consider making a donation of whatever you can spare so that we can hit the ground running as we head into one of the most politically significant elections of our lifetimes? clean_body: For our campaign against AOC, this weekend was more than just a holiday, it was our first FEC filing deadline. This is the first time our fundraising numbers would be made public. | | Hi Peter, I hope you had a great weekend and a wonderful Easter. For our campaign against AOC, this weekend was more than just a holiday, it was our first FEC filing deadline, marking the first time our fundraising numbers would be made public. As one of the biggest elections in the nation, everyone was watching closely to see if we have what it takes to defeat AOC. Well, I'm proud to announce thanks to supporters like you, we not only reached our fundraising goal, but surpassed it — sending a powerful message to the media, AOC, and the far-left! Regardless of if you donated, reading our emails means you’re a member of this team, and I am beyond grateful to have you standing with us. While it was a huge victory for us, our work is just getting started. We have fewer than three months until Election Day and AOC and the far-left are doing everything they can to slow us down. Together we can turn the tide against extremism and usher in a new era of responsible governance. Marty Dolan Common-Sense Candidate for Congress New York’s 14th Congressional District | Paid for by Marty Dolan For Congress 292 City Island Avenue Bronx, NY 10464 | | Sent via . name: Tammy Baldwin
subject: Re: Trump’s visit
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY TAMMY BALDWIN FOR SENATE
body:
| I wish I had better news...
# [](https://act.tammybaldwin.com/go/67?t=1&akid=2346%2E35263%2Egx--qz)
Hi Peter — I wish I were reaching out with better news... Former President Donald Trump is in Wisconsin today to host a MAGA rally with my megamillionaire opponent — just as a recent poll shows our Senate race statistically tied. We know what tonight’s rally is going to entail: fearmongering, lies and misinformation, and dangerous rhetoric threatening our democracy. It’s also going to give Wisconsin Republicans like my opponent one of the biggest boosts he’s seen this year — with Trump promoting his campaign to defeat me while the rest of the country tunes in. We have to be ready to fight back against the inevitable flood of attacks that will come after Trump’s rally in Green Bay tonight. Can I count on you to help us out? Here’s a link you can use to chip in: **[secure.actblue.com/donate/tbe-em-apr24](https://act.tammybaldwin.com/go/2155?c0=tbe-em-apr24.2z_qm-&refcode=AU_STB_FR_GEN_GEN_AC_20240402_PM2_V1_S1&t=4&akid=2346%2E35263%2Egx--qz)** Thanks, Tammy

body:
The Federal Election Commission (FEC) requires us to file our fundraising numbers one last time before the primary election.
[ ](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/82237518/464752628/1790176412?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDUvMS83MzgyNyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJiOTg1OGU4Zi0yY2YxLWVlMTEtYWFmMi0wMDIyNDgyMjMzNTMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=qpWYt-XiE9-sJD4jBsiplGFagFpHGPr-hiDa656SSls=&emci=885bd863-12f1-ee11-aaf2-002248223353&emdi=b9858e8f-2cf1-ee11-aaf2-002248223353&ceid=23311593) | Peter,

We know we just cleared our end-of-quarter deadline, but as we gear up for the general election, we have **one more** crucial hurdle we need to clear: our final fundraising deadline before the primary.

**The Federal Election Commission (FEC) requires us to file our fundraising numbers one last time, on Wednesday, April 3rd, before the primary election.** This means that if you missed our end-of-quarter deadline, you have one more opportunity to help us out before our final public filing deadline before we officially begin the general election!

These numbers are more than just figures on a spreadsheet — they're a testament to our readiness to take on the challenges ahead. Right now, we’re facing an extremist GOP opponent who is threatening all of our progress and pouring in hundreds of thousands of his own money in an attempt to buy this race. **That’s why we need your help to show that we have what it takes to beat him.**

Whether it's $5, $10, or whatever amount you can afford, your contribution will make a real difference in our campaign. Every dollar we raise brings us one step closer to victory in November.

clean_body: The Federal Election Commission (FEC) requires us to file our fundraising numbers one last time before the primary election. | Peter, We know we just cleared our end-of-quarter deadline, but as we gear up for the general election, we have one more crucial hurdle we need to clear: our final fundraising deadline before the primary. The Federal Election Commission (FEC) requires us to file our fundraising numbers one last time, on Wednesday, April 3rd, before the primary election. This means that if you missed our end-of-quarter deadline, you have one more opportunity to help us out before our final public filing deadline before we officially begin the general election! These numbers are more than just figures on a spreadsheet — they're a testament to our readiness to take on the challenges ahead. Right now, we’re facing an extremist GOP opponent who is threatening all of our progress and pouring in hundreds of thousands of his own money in an attempt to buy this race. That’s why we need your help to show that we have what it takes to beat him. Whether it's $5, $10, or whatever amount you can afford, your contribution will make a real difference in our campaign. Every dollar we raise brings us one step closer to victory in November. = If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: | = | | = | | = ---|---|---|---|--- = | | = | | = ---|---|---|---|--- Thank you, Team Cartwright In 2022, Matt Cartwright was one of only 5 Democrats to win a House race in a district that Donald Trump carried in 2020. He's gearing up for another tough re-election, and he needs your support to keep PA-08 blue. Rush a donation right away to help Matt protect his seat. | = = | "Facebook" "Twitter" "Twitter" | Paid for by Cartwright for Congress | Cartwright For Congress PO Box 414 Scranton, PA 18501 United States Click here to from the Cartwright for Congress.

| | Dear Fellow American, If you opened this email because you remember my playing days with the Dodgers and the Padres, thank you.
---
| | Having you and all of America's baseball fans cheering for me and Davey Lopes, Bill Russell, Ron Cey and the rest of the guys as we battled Reggie Jackson, Thurman Munson and the Yankees... ...well, as they say, "Those were the days." But this email isn't about baseball. In fact, it's a email I never thought I'd be writing to you.
---
| [](http://links.primaryupdate.com/u/click?_t=e3c9a4cac7f248a39c2a3d920479a441&_m=9fd95253df4443d2b88ef4da3e68e8de&_e=E7celuEmFVBjv0Ski7_6Cpz_d943wblBCFP2blH_XxeC6VR_cOUflQtXOuLAatDz3_NnQDpXrkZy9XlpBhrx_hDm3ug6HwzwmGzIN4hXFBd_Wz3xgjvPwtnbxFlb-O8nbdL5HCRuMyXc_-E4i4_x-fN8LFXeOKo18WcGNGHBwk5dhdYQ5EWRVfNp2vc03TwS8ga9RSmVzJHi9GFg4YSE9T9E_zXIdfuLBY0tdICWTbf7ENAnf9Mt_hAtEZ-1IeykgH7EF1M5XKKmtEzTVG-10zTAQRFzRUHB2Xw-hA_z3UUWq5UXBqVehYf3DyVNQttwSGv5xRAQMqhpQB6mszqYIpnX-NEC9bRl3OyKIWBC66KkBzd38X7f-PZbkJw1vJEBR6dKTx_rKZx-dO9veNj0Pg%3D%3D)

| | **[Today, I'm asking you to help me defeat the radical Adam Schiff for a seat in the United States Senate.](http://links.primaryupdate.com/u/click?_t=e3c9a4cac7f248a39c2a3d920479a441&_m=9fd95253df4443d2b88ef4da3e68e8de&_e=E7celuEmFVBjv0Ski7_6Cpz_d943wblBCFP2blH_XxeC6VR_cOUflQtXOuLAatDz3_NnQDpXrkZy9XlpBhrx_hDm3ug6HwzwmGzIN4hXFBd_Wz3xgjvPwtnbxFlb-O8nbdL5HCRuMyXc_-E4i4_x-fN8LFXeOKo18WcGNGHBwk5dhdYQ5EWRVfNp2vc03TwS8ga9RSmVzJHi9GFg4YSE9T9E_zXIdfuLBY0tdICWTbfOcnfDD0ko0H1sha6pErp_hynuH_PVHqoeR0Io3iLqTZcVL9mCg0_tUsnL7oDVEC120DQrPkfh1UkxSFqvl8uI3UUXDsd9WHcBlYxBsEOpDhAgppnupZ5gEV0Gx1taEbilTUxsL99WNZeJVBVYwX89LTEhAjvzCzpRfoo_T-MVCw%3D%3D)** As of March 5th, it's official. I'm going head-to-head with Adam Schiff in November. Democrat policies have brought America to its knees. There's fear of walking down the street because of rampant crime, homelessness, and drug addiction. The cost of living is exploding and for the first time causing more people to leave California. Joe Biden, Adam Schiff and the rest of the Democrats don't care one bit that Americans are having a hard time. I'd go even further to say they welcome the misery so they can keep folks down and dependent. And that's why I'm running for Senate. **_We Republicans_ pulled our country out of the 1970's Democratic malaise by electing Ronald Reagan.** And I believe we can do it again by putting classic conservative values at the heart of everything we do. But there is no way I can pull it off without you. **[**Will you rush a contribution to my campaign of $35 or more today?**](http://links.primaryupdate.com/u/click?_t=e3c9a4cac7f248a39c2a3d920479a441&_m=9fd95253df4443d2b88ef4da3e68e8de&_e=E7celuEmFVBjv0Ski7_6Cpz_d943wblBCFP2blH_XxeC6VR_cOUflQtXOuLAatDz3_NnQDpXrkZy9XlpBhrx_hDm3ug6HwzwmGzIN4hXFBd_Wz3xgjvPwtnbxFlb-O8nbdL5HCRuMyXc_-E4i4_x-fN8LFXeOKo18WcGNGHBwk5dhdYQ5EWRVfNp2vc03TwS8ga9RSmVzJHi9GFg4YSE9T9E_zXIdfuLBY0tdICWTbfdcl-NZeBTKd8Mp67kqQ6KqIqkPnzHB7lxyMg9_LmjTn5KnSfFJPcU6UFVwDFpuVZVVup0qNsuBJtt0Y0wq4aMl6AQe8J_mRGP2hn41ecaqvpuKS6zVEORds5sx2RfKFqPJc3wxWWikiitehTYkub_iJ7wyiyYlvz6j0_ZStQ85g%3D%3D)** I've lived and worked in California for over 50 years, and I can tell you -\- voters here have had it with the Democrats like I've never seen before. They are hungry for change, and if you and I work together to reach voters in every neighborhood, on every beach, in every corner of California... I know we can turn this historic opportunity into a _**Republican win**_. I'm fighting for the soul of the state I love -- but make no mistake -- I'm not just taking the field for Californians. When we win here... when we rip this seat out the hands of the radical Adam Schiff... **...we start the nationwide Republican Comeback Rally our country desperately needs.** Thank you and God Bless,

Remember how you felt the day after Donald Trump was elected president in 2016? | | |
---
Peter -- We want you to remember something. _Really remember._ Remember how you felt the day after Donald Trump was elected president in 2016. Remember walking around in disbelief and fear of what was to come. And remember time and time again how those fears were realized over the next four years. Now remember how you felt after Joe Biden was elected President in 2020. Remember that relief you felt that we didn’t have to deal with Trump in office any longer, and the hope you felt that we could get America back on track. We can’t go back. We can’t go back to the way we all felt when Trump was elected. It may be wild to think, but you have a role in making sure we win. The work we need to do is quite literally funded by people like you making the decision that we can’t go back...we can only go forward. Now we don’t expect you to donate every day, but with President Biden facing millions in attack ads, he needs you to make today the day you donate. clean_body: Remember how you felt the day after Donald Trump was elected president in 2016? | | | Peter -- We want you to remember something. Really remember. Remember how you felt the day after Donald Trump was elected president in 2016. Remember walking around in disbelief and fear of what was to come. And remember time and time again how those fears were realized over the next four years. Now remember how you felt after Joe Biden was elected President in 2020. Remember that relief you felt that we didn’t have to deal with Trump in office any longer, and the hope you felt that we could get America back on track. We can’t go back. We can’t go back to the way we all felt when Trump was elected. It may be wild to think, but you have a role in making sure we win. The work we need to do is quite literally funded by people like you making the decision that we can’t go back...we can only go forward. Now we don’t expect you to donate every day, but with President Biden facing millions in attack ads, he needs you to make today the day you donate. So, please: | If you've saved payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: | | | | | | | Thank you. You are securing the future of our country with your support. That’s the truth. Team Biden-Harris

body:
I believe we can’t keep sending the same corrupt politicians to Washington and expecting different results. I believe New Jersey and Americans deserve better than the political machine that has ruled for far too long. | [](http://links.standingstrongamerica.com/u/click?_t=29c3b6e742c849fabbcc130432510e66&_m=367638bdff6449e2a614b377c12e0bd1&_e=8ugICz7VthmgyAd2SfAkKS1-l3cko5jgQ1sXeat6YrXCmLu0AJIrVJdwjpr-AfpvyG292pEsLfP8d3QDa8Uy1q88JkL0-PesQWNN_VNX9r1_F616CtkZj9wIQ8RncUqOliWAIhLwuiRRKGLrXFub0-LaS5KeYuWwuGOjm7egsJ8ALay5sll_SxdZpyWNFKQHDBa0cCXG2IU1vcxMZk7KVgltQoGJDe_JtgvruojhA2Z4Rbs_24r6GUQrk_nOILMnsUBi4Fd6MyCODzBGLroMsNRmiT0pxbu6f5Gq5TVAfwTPrwBKsKUuKUBhggSsXJx9Mkbkj5ibkPsNdJA9oVGfiVmOkEy89Ak8TLEB2ay-hLlzUkk-0xEHNMPkp060kSZw-NVK-pozicMGJbpHs6J2F9aGQSZdOGdLF3K0qU5qgdk%3D)

Peter, my name is Curtis Bashaw.

I’m a lifelong New Jersey resident. In high school, I started working as a bellhop and waiting tables at Congress Hall in Cape May. And I’ve been working nonstop since then.

I started a business and I’m a proud job creator, employing more than 1,000 hard-working people. It’s never been easy, but it’s always been worth it.

As an entrepreneur, I have the responsibility of making a payroll every two weeks and know that people’s car payments, rent, and mortgages depend on me effectively doing my job. And I’ve been successfully doing that for 35 years.

But the pandemic changed our business and our American way of life, Peter. Working in the tourism and hospitality industry, I saw firsthand how quickly the government can take away our freedoms - our livelihoods.

The entire industry was shut down. We lost most of our income and there was no end in sight. Hundreds of small businesses and families stood on the brink of financial disaster. When the business community and government leaders in the county wrote a plan and demanded the Governor to let us reopen, _**we were ignored.**_

**As a business owner and a product of the American dream, I’m a lifelong Republican.** [**But now I’ve decided to stand up and do something about it. I’m proudly running for the United States Senate because I believe more government equals less freedom.**](http://links.standingstrongamerica.com/u/click?_t=29c3b6e742c849fabbcc130432510e66&_m=367638bdff6449e2a614b377c12e0bd1&_e=8ugICz7VthmgyAd2SfAkKS1-l3cko5jgQ1sXeat6YrXCmLu0AJIrVJdwjpr-AfpvyG292pEsLfP8d3QDa8Uy1q88JkL0-PesQWNN_VNX9r1_F616CtkZj9wIQ8RncUqOliWAIhLwuiRRKGLrXFub0-LaS5KeYuWwuGOjm7egsJ8ALay5sll_SxdZpyWNFKQHDBa0cCXG2IU1vcxMZk7KVgltQoGJDe_JtgvruojhA2Z4Rbs_24r6GUQrk_nOILMnsUBi4Fd6MyCODzBGLroMsHkXr-Oz4kYojpmDBCZf99CY5qgs2-wlEBTAy15sRChOWmZuq3NGbA1dh4pNQDACuqbTKwBMYDlsm1fcJg1Rbt7bYIgAWht2ZFUfCrEqgJE6A7fC4H1vmHxsHnxq7Xdtu_8kkwIF1F9PfPr1Kxa-mlM%3D)

[**I believe we can’t keep sending the same corrupt politicians to Washington and expecting different results. I believe New Jersey and Americans deserve better than the political machine that has ruled for far too long.**](http://links.standingstrongamerica.com/u/click?_t=29c3b6e742c849fabbcc130432510e66&_m=367638bdff6449e2a614b377c12e0bd1&_e=8ugICz7VthmgyAd2SfAkKS1-l3cko5jgQ1sXeat6YrXCmLu0AJIrVJdwjpr-AfpvyG292pEsLfP8d3QDa8Uy1q88JkL0-PesQWNN_VNX9r1_F616CtkZj9wIQ8RncUqOliWAIhLwuiRRKGLrXFub0-LaS5KeYuWwuGOjm7egsJ8ALay5sll_SxdZpyWNFKQHDBa0cCXG2IU1vcxMZk7KVgltQoGJDe_JtgvruojhA2Z4Rbs_24r6GUQrk_nOILMnsUBi4Fd6MyCODzBGLroMsAmJdrlplQ8FofyYPEJKGzdMiYoHgpLaaEpBAQ1oUD1Nwpm7xjErh0LK6q1GxyZW_kbZTKc-RLHVPNtopN0ctLQOls1meN9QmSP4zOSNzh_7SH3_0UmBguuyHynl7YmwdMEqxfY_E3lMexET4DdYAkI%3D)

[** ****SEND CURTIS BASHAW TO WASHINGTON » **](http://links.standingstrongamerica.com/u/click?_t=29c3b6e742c849fabbcc130432510e66&_m=367638bdff6449e2a614b377c12e0bd1&_e=8ugICz7VthmgyAd2SfAkKS1-l3cko5jgQ1sXeat6YrXCmLu0AJIrVJdwjpr-AfpvyG292pEsLfP8d3QDa8Uy1q88JkL0-PesQWNN_VNX9r1_F616CtkZj9wIQ8RncUqOliWAIhLwuiRRKGLrXFub0-LaS5KeYuWwuGOjm7egsJ8ALay5sll_SxdZpyWNFKQHDBa0cCXG2IU1vcxMZk7KVgltQoGJDe_JtgvruojhA2Z4Rbs_24r6GUQrk_nOILMnsUBi4Fd6MyCODzBGLroMsJUDpw5hGJWrXE4PNo-qpSNrzdSh_W7nkx6oiP2TQf6lJ1VZ27iAlntQO_HRBM13OEKcJNmB0-oQHNE_-XjxxYV7_0LP96iXusTcNvg0jvMlHrj-YhzzeveOOYjyt45GEQLMg6-K9TJC-BSa8viA5mI%3D)

Peter, like you, I’m fed up with Washington's dysfunction. [**I’m a political outsider on a mission to fix it.**](http://links.standingstrongamerica.com/u/click?_t=29c3b6e742c849fabbcc130432510e66&_m=367638bdff6449e2a614b377c12e0bd1&_e=8ugICz7VthmgyAd2SfAkKS1-l3cko5jgQ1sXeat6YrXCmLu0AJIrVJdwjpr-AfpvyG292pEsLfP8d3QDa8Uy1q88JkL0-PesQWNN_VNX9r1_F616CtkZj9wIQ8RncUqOliWAIhLwuiRRKGLrXFub0-LaS5KeYuWwuGOjm7egsJ8ALay5sll_SxdZpyWNFKQHDBa0cCXG2IU1vcxMZk7KVgltQoGJDe_JtgvruojhA2Z4Rbs_24r6GUQrk_nOILMnsUBi4Fd6MyCODzBGLroMsIxcWduyDgSdFM05xPIdCK2YpKD1aiQ9PwRVDe7Gq0J5CdxvlMTxObDrdzWQZl_C8L32U1embIA-feNaPOnE0cmdjYbMk3tkchfKLupUfrcUCRpWQOBYplsr2MoRi-sQMFNsShNzPzTCJuYO6xRj1rM%3D)

America is the land of opportunity, and that starts with a strong economy. The best social program is a job.

Yet too many families are struggling to pay their mortgages, buy groceries, and put gas in their cars. In New Jersey, we pay the highest taxes in the nation yet receive only 75 cents back on the dollar from the federal government.

Our families cannot afford to elect another selfish, so-called _"leader"_ who cares more about their own political ambitions than coming up with sensible solutions that actually help law-abiding American citizens. **_We deserve better than this._**

I am running for the United States Senate because I believe we need to restore freedom, security, and opportunity for all Americans. I am running to restore the American dream. [**Are you ready to hop off the sidelines and join this fight?**](http://links.standingstrongamerica.com/u/click?_t=29c3b6e742c849fabbcc130432510e66&_m=367638bdff6449e2a614b377c12e0bd1&_e=8ugICz7VthmgyAd2SfAkKS1-l3cko5jgQ1sXeat6YrXCmLu0AJIrVJdwjpr-AfpvyG292pEsLfP8d3QDa8Uy1q88JkL0-PesQWNN_VNX9r1_F616CtkZj9wIQ8RncUqOliWAIhLwuiRRKGLrXFub0-LaS5KeYuWwuGOjm7egsJ8ALay5sll_SxdZpyWNFKQHDBa0cCXG2IU1vcxMZk7KVgltQoGJDe_JtgvruojhA2Z4Rbs_24r6GUQrk_nOILMnsUBi4Fd6MyCODzBGLroMsFarS2k4a-6U_cVe-y41PnGBxkmCrv2irkex-5qzkjWOgHjcL77-h5HhKdTfHoraKgs_OsVYCATmZmt5GrrCWdYTUELWKnqwUsd311gZ4FE5lueggwGyX6nQ24QIvuOjj1X7a0CK0HpsETAdds4puNU%3D)

| **_GET TO KNOW CURTIS_**

**Curtis Bashaw is a hotel entrepreneur, job creator, and preservationist. He’s running for United States Senate to provide greater freedom and opportunities for all New Jerseyans.**

A lifelong New Jersey resident, Curtis grew up in Camden County and spent his summers at the Jersey Shore working as a bellhop and waiting tables at Congress Hall in Cape May. He has spent his life in the real estate and hospitality industries, and is the Founder and Managing Partner of Cape Resorts, a hotel company focusing on the restoration and operation of classic American resort properties in New Jersey and New York.

Throughout his career, Curtis has worked to build communities and bring people together. He is widely recognized for leading the landmark restorations of Congress Hall and the Virginia Hotel in Cape May, and for launching creative programming to dramatically extend Cape May’s season, a catalyst for the economic rebirth of one of the Jersey Shore’s most beautiful communities.

Curtis is a successful businessman and job creator, employing more than 1,000 people in New Jersey and New York. Curtis’ company owns and operates eight hotels, ten cottages, six restaurants, four retail outlets and a working farm, all on the Jersey Shore and Long Island’s East End. Curtis lives in Cape May with his husband, Will.

| [** Stand with Curtis Bashaw! **](http://links.standingstrongamerica.com/u/click?_t=29c3b6e742c849fabbcc130432510e66&_m=367638bdff6449e2a614b377c12e0bd1&_e=8ugICz7VthmgyAd2SfAkKS1-l3cko5jgQ1sXeat6YrXCmLu0AJIrVJdwjpr-AfpvyG292pEsLfP8d3QDa8Uy1q88JkL0-PesQWNN_VNX9r1_F616CtkZj9wIQ8RncUqOliWAIhLwuiRRKGLrXFub0-LaS5KeYuWwuGOjm7egsJ8ALay5sll_SxdZpyWNFKQHDBa0cCXG2IU1vcxMZk7KVgltQoGJDe_JtgvruojhA2Z4Rbs_24r6GUQrk_nOILMnsUBi4Fd6MyCODzBGLroMsNlew2OkJ1huqzhYOfE8Cjykrr9XAYlcPejkhsO-nA-Mp4PI3lHLRc5jtwXPfJn-PvJeZC-jyINu5ixEHOd1NNeclPT_BpoNX6WR0kzH08B9GXzRmTP7yPPKWrwxgldIwM98lKa35MyNWowGuXwet1w%3D)

clean_body: I believe we can’t keep sending the same corrupt politicians to Washington and expecting different results. I believe New Jersey and Americans deserve better than the political machine that has ruled for far too long. | Peter, my name is Curtis Bashaw. I’m a lifelong New Jersey resident. In high school, I started working as a bellhop and waiting tables at Congress Hall in Cape May. And I’ve been working nonstop since then. I started a business and I’m a proud job creator, employing more than 1,000 hard-working people. It’s never been easy, but it’s always been worth it. As an entrepreneur, I have the responsibility of making a payroll every two weeks and know that people’s car payments, rent, and mortgages depend on me effectively doing my job. And I’ve been successfully doing that for 35 years. But the pandemic changed our business and our American way of life, Peter. Working in the tourism and hospitality industry, I saw firsthand how quickly the government can take away our freedoms - our livelihoods. The entire industry was shut down. We lost most of our income and there was no end in sight. Hundreds of small businesses and families stood on the brink of financial disaster. When the business community and government leaders in the county wrote a plan and demanded the Governor to let us reopen, we were ignored. As a business owner and a product of the American dream, I’m a lifelong Republican. Peter, like you, I’m fed up with Washington's dysfunction. America is the land of opportunity, and that starts with a strong economy. The best social program is a job. Yet too many families are struggling to pay their mortgages, buy groceries, and put gas in their cars. In New Jersey, we pay the highest taxes in the nation yet receive only 75 cents back on the dollar from the federal government. Our families cannot afford to elect another selfish, so-called "leader" who cares more about their own political ambitions than coming up with sensible solutions that actually help law-abiding American citizens. We deserve better than this. I am running for the United States Senate because I believe we need to restore freedom, security, and opportunity for all Americans. I am running to restore the American dream. For America, Curtis Bashaw Entrepreneur. Husband. Preservationist. PS - We are looking to build a movement full of individuals who believe in common sense solutions to real problems that Americans are facing. Your contribution as a founding member of our campaign will make all the difference. | GET TO KNOW CURTIS Curtis Bashaw is a hotel entrepreneur, job creator, and preservationist. He’s running for United States Senate to provide greater freedom and opportunities for all New Jerseyans. A lifelong New Jersey resident, Curtis grew up in Camden County and spent his summers at the Jersey Shore working as a bellhop and waiting tables at Congress Hall in Cape May. He has spent his life in the real estate and hospitality industries, and is the Founder and Managing Partner of Cape Resorts, a hotel company focusing on the restoration and operation of classic American resort properties in New Jersey and New York. Throughout his career, Curtis has worked to build communities and bring people together. He is widely recognized for leading the landmark restorations of Congress Hall and the Virginia Hotel in Cape May, and for launching creative programming to dramatically extend Cape May’s season, a catalyst for the economic rebirth of one of the Jersey Shore’s most beautiful communities. Curtis is a successful businessman and job creator, employing more than 1,000 people in New Jersey and New York. Curtis’ company owns and operates eight hotels, ten cottages, six restaurants, four retail outlets and a working farm, all on the Jersey Shore and Long Island’s East End. Curtis lives in Cape May with his husband, Will. | If you'd like to unsubscribe, please . | PAID FOR BY CURTIS BASHAW FOR US SENATE, INC.

body:
This is how we hold Biden accountable.
| | [ ](http://links.conservativesfordjt.com/u/click?_t=05b03ef2209247bcbdad7fd5099cd670&_m=808fdabaae074326889eac74e82cdf1e&_e=Qkx-EABRNBvCFURo3dR6Yt3T6HqtQnebQ_UklFg-w66kqVWmERaNQwk-mK2erDruD9HiGurfinedz5IBenwGrf9px2S2swrqf-_xIrivdmw0Urk6WMRDzATw65eNq11TB9TIaok6DaTKqSCxK7YM8VHJXpXCaGLFSDWLRe0JfMRSeGqsdA5YbC9PS4ELbQCaEBAOGpA0sEGahyFJaLV4FW0QJAIMk6qHV6tSo_n4M4ufrGGDFN_4zc9R_ggatH7cTCCD-G48fi5BzJUnR5LxG7I3uf920bilhNtxduc7-HdfCvapZNfPcMEijxJdQHBI4qO6dwJPUF3eGi2skYgET_i2hUBYrL3njOHzTxffTHhkUUvRDtTnzvkARhpTa_wJNSuyOtbsD3cEohfuZP-A2_4Pztjcj4vLTcmyil24qjs%3D)
---
Fellow Conservative, I'm writing to you today with a big update on my investigation, and I ask you to take the time to read this email in its entirety. I spent a lot of time writing it and did my best to make every word count. If you don't read it, nobody will. **First, there is no question in my mind that Joe Biden and his family are guilty of corruption.** I've presented mountains of evidence confirming Joe Biden's involvement in his family's influence peddling scheme, and I just had a group of the Biden family's business confidants publicly testify about the first family's criminal activity. _**At any other time in history, that would have been the final nail in the coffin of the Biden Crime Family's reign of corruption.**_
| [ **STAND WITH COMER** ](http://links.conservativesfordjt.com/u/click?_t=05b03ef2209247bcbdad7fd5099cd670&_m=808fdabaae074326889eac74e82cdf1e&_e=Qkx-EABRNBvCFURo3dR6Yt3T6HqtQnebQ_UklFg-w66kqVWmERaNQwk-mK2erDruD9HiGurfinedz5IBenwGrf9px2S2swrqf-_xIrivdmw0Urk6WMRDzATw65eNq11TB9TIaok6DaTKqSCxK7YM8VHJXpXCaGLFSDWLRe0JfMRSeGqsdA5YbC9PS4ELbQCaEBAOGpA0sEGahyFJaLV4FW0QJAIMk6qHV6tSo_n4M4ufrGGDFN_4zc9R_ggatH7c9fGcrYO508CwVOahmXHq0-RIZKt93u4rKtFTMmFQaHITy1RD8vkO-8QsuZ04YmEmXu64WC8-8qR5LOJqhUs9p4T_V9GvUlMo5v0fXlto-duX0R7lxWC39wB03zGd_yni6NG8FSVaiHA9LlVbbZLRznousHfK9Pgclc_mupGycaY%3D)
---
But we are not in a normal time in history, we are in a defining moment where our country will either return to the rule of law being applied equally to everyone, or we will continue down this Orwellian path and the destruction of the American ideal. As it stands right now, the deranged Democrats are refusing to take up the Impeachment Trial of Alejandro Mayorkas and threatening to dismiss it within minutes when it finally is brought up. **Even "centrist" Democrats called the Mayorkas Impeachment Trial "ridiculous" just days after a criminal illegal brutally murdered Laken Riley in cold blood.** _What do you think they would do if we Impeached Biden?_ It's clear that Democrats will choose their party over their country and the truth at every turn. They should be ashamed of themselves. **That's why I am preparing criminal referrals of Biden Family members as a part of my Impeachment Inquiry.** **When President Trump returns to the White House, it's critical the new leadership at the DOJ have everything they need to prosecute the Biden Crime Family and deliver swift justice.**
| [ **STAND WITH COMER** ](http://links.conservativesfordjt.com/u/click?_t=05b03ef2209247bcbdad7fd5099cd670&_m=808fdabaae074326889eac74e82cdf1e&_e=Qkx-EABRNBvCFURo3dR6Yt3T6HqtQnebQ_UklFg-w66kqVWmERaNQwk-mK2erDruD9HiGurfinedz5IBenwGrf9px2S2swrqf-_xIrivdmw0Urk6WMRDzATw65eNq11TB9TIaok6DaTKqSCxK7YM8VHJXpXCaGLFSDWLRe0JfMRSeGqsdA5YbC9PS4ELbQCaEBAOGpA0sEGahyFJaLV4FW0QJAIMk6qHV6tSo_n4M4ufrGGDFN_4zc9R_ggatH7c7M7eWUXvLC6VtzuG5gb0FFP6SZmonjC8YxK1JpdrgkTZFtX05pNA8avY4udVquFKxr1VQANtc0ALXMbS0oiUCFNN6DUVHJIrsiW-nkvje0RrDBMsWpC70S9gk4OrxqpgH5SDWiAk3NzshyiQfdQ7XkvyeT4czIl5nlzqaq1qN-k%3D)
---
This is the best way to hold the Biden's accountable for their crimes, as it's now clear the Democrats will do anything to hold onto power. I am dead serious when I tell you that the Democrats in D.C. only care about one thing. They don't care about the Constitution, the Rule of Law, or even their sacred oaths of office. They only care about POWER. And we must make sure that no matter what hijinks they try to pull before the election that they are removed from power in every branch of government. [**That's why I am in dire need of your support.**](http://links.conservativesfordjt.com/u/click?_t=05b03ef2209247bcbdad7fd5099cd670&_m=808fdabaae074326889eac74e82cdf1e&_e=Qkx-EABRNBvCFURo3dR6Yt3T6HqtQnebQ_UklFg-w66kqVWmERaNQwk-mK2erDruD9HiGurfinedz5IBenwGrf9px2S2swrqf-_xIrivdmw0Urk6WMRDzATw65eNq11TB9TIaok6DaTKqSCxK7YM8VHJXpXCaGLFSDWLRe0JfMRSeGqsdA5YbC9PS4ELbQCaEBAOGpA0sEGahyFJaLV4FW0QJAIMk6qHV6tSo_n4M4ufrGGDFN_4zc9R_ggatH7cnMTDq6VogxG8B9imxJPlsLWlWsykrFb-cYFQRJcOacruK7ha4UmetG42f2NVx-j46HjHgEeoUC-GYAMa5G1kqROgG2xME0FDXBp5cU9M65wmj4hlMIiLdtxvESfs1DoWmAbAhcrVDb_g8mH0xswo67blVr_zG-QpXtDyuc92AjI%3D) I'm on the frontlines here in D.C. fighting to uphold the constitution and rid our government of corruption, but as the old adage goes, no good deed goes unpunished. **It's a damn shame that me and my family are being put through this just because I have the courage to speak truth to power.** There was a time not long ago when every American knew that having courage in the face of power was virtuous, and I still do. [**If you do too, then I'd be honored to have your support as I defend myself and my good name from the disgusting attacks I continue to face.**](http://links.conservativesfordjt.com/u/click?_t=05b03ef2209247bcbdad7fd5099cd670&_m=808fdabaae074326889eac74e82cdf1e&_e=Qkx-EABRNBvCFURo3dR6Yt3T6HqtQnebQ_UklFg-w66kqVWmERaNQwk-mK2erDruD9HiGurfinedz5IBenwGrf9px2S2swrqf-_xIrivdmw0Urk6WMRDzATw65eNq11TB9TIaok6DaTKqSCxK7YM8VHJXpXCaGLFSDWLRe0JfMRSeGqsdA5YbC9PS4ELbQCaEBAOGpA0sEGahyFJaLV4FW0QJAIMk6qHV6tSo_n4M4ufrGGDFN_4zc9R_ggatH7cHMST4KtZWRRfDlxk_l5BCALxUDxO264GQuA7XPg6PSXmkj-zmX6TJz8UNxc60wJT7fvUpYnju5HuUaad92kjgDo5eDUURC3WAIsT_jHtLVV057XMBL3m8s3AVYy9wr4MhEPLZ-kTOveiivXdtSh4XkFZbMQ-wO3k1V9i8G2inF0%3D) I'd love nothing more than to go back to my farm in Kentucky and raise my family in peace, but this moment calls for men and women of courage and conviction to fight for our country. I believe with every fiber of my being that America is worth saving and I'm ready to fight with everything I have to save her. [**Fellow Conservative, I'm calling on you to fight with me.**](http://links.conservativesfordjt.com/u/click?_t=05b03ef2209247bcbdad7fd5099cd670&_m=808fdabaae074326889eac74e82cdf1e&_e=Qkx-EABRNBvCFURo3dR6Yt3T6HqtQnebQ_UklFg-w66kqVWmERaNQwk-mK2erDruD9HiGurfinedz5IBenwGrf9px2S2swrqf-_xIrivdmw0Urk6WMRDzATw65eNq11TB9TIaok6DaTKqSCxK7YM8VHJXpXCaGLFSDWLRe0JfMRSeGqsdA5YbC9PS4ELbQCaEBAOGpA0sEGahyFJaLV4FW0QJAIMk6qHV6tSo_n4M4ufrGGDFN_4zc9R_ggatH7cP0piVrIXbLOreFoPIrepEpdO1bH-APQd_1QUSYkOqLYLMluJprVJMQUYnHSUidX35LzJyoTorgqzrvQ4admrRbR7P4vyCHNI6DqzvuzA1LiwAAWhSaNhPfTGKYz2QNloYDkxov9oRuZmA2zN26JWum2_P8FfVkCbUdIWRaN8h3Q%3D)
_With Courage,_
James Comer Chairman, House Oversight Committee

name: Greg Stanton
subject: Do you know a high school or college student looking to get involved?
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Stanton for Congress
body:
https://www.everyaction.com/ [https://www.everyaction.com/]
Dear friend:
I am proud to announce that my campaign will be participating as a partner in the 2024 National Democracy Summer School ! This one-of-a-kind Democratic Fellowship—founded by Congressman Jamie Raskin and expanded across the country in an historic partnership with the DCCC—is dedicated to recruiting thousands of high school and college-age students and training them as the next generation of Democratic political activists and leaders.
As part of this educational and political initiative, I am looking for 5 dedicated high school and college students to join me here in AZ-04 as Team Stanton Democracy Summer Fellows!
This six-week program will take place from Monday , June 24th to Friday , August 9th and requires a commitment of 10-15 hours per week. Fellows will participate in exciting online seminars and a powerful curriculum designed by Congressman Raskin, while also organizing on-the-ground with my reelection campaign here in AZ-04. Fellows will receive a stipend of $500 for their hard work.
Throughout the academic portion, Fellows will learn from academic luminaries, inspiring political leaders, policy experts, issue advocates and top community organizers from all across the country.
Not to mention, Fellows will also learn state-of-the-art skills in phone-banking, text-banking, canvassing, on-line organizing, low-dollar fundraising and voter registration—all the necessary ingredients for a thriving field operation!
You can click the link HERE [https://democracy-summer.breezy.hr/p/9cfb9e8963c7-rep-greg-stanton-az-04-democracy-summer-fellow] and scroll down to find the application for our campaign. The priority deadline to apply is April 12th, 2024 . If you know a student who may be interested in this life-changing and America-changing program, please forward them this email—they won’t want to miss out!
APPLY HERE! [https://democracy-summer.breezy.hr/p/9cfb9e8963c7-rep-greg-stanton-az-04-democracy-summer-fellow]
Thank you for your support and solidarity,
Rep. Greg Stanton
P.S. If you’re not a student, but still excited about Democracy Summer, you can support our participation in this program by joining the senior corps and donating to our campaign here [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/dsemail] !
https://www.facebook.com/ [https://www.facebook.com/] https://twitter.com/ [https://twitter.com/] https://instagram.com/ [https://instagram.com/] https://www.linkedin.com/ [https://www.linkedin.com/]

clean_body: [] Dear friend: I am proud to announce that my campaign will be participating as a partner in the 2024 National Democracy Summer School ! This one-of-a-kind Democratic Fellowship—founded by Congressman Jamie Raskin and expanded across the country in an historic partnership with the DCCC—is dedicated to recruiting thousands of high school and college-age students and training them as the next generation of Democratic political activists and leaders. As part of this educational and political initiative, I am looking for 5 dedicated high school and college students to join me here in AZ-04 as Team Stanton Democracy Summer Fellows! This six-week program will take place from Monday , June 24th to Friday , August 9th and requires a commitment of 10-15 hours per week. Fellows will participate in exciting online seminars and a powerful curriculum designed by Congressman Raskin, while also organizing on-the-ground with my reelection campaign here in AZ-04. Fellows will receive a stipend of $500 for their hard work. Throughout the academic portion, Fellows will learn from academic luminaries, inspiring political leaders, policy experts, issue advocates and top community organizers from all across the country. Not to mention, Fellows will also learn state-of-the-art skills in phone-banking, text-banking, canvassing, on-line organizing, low-dollar fundraising and voter registration—all the necessary ingredients for a thriving field operation! You can click the link HERE [] and scroll down to find the application for our campaign. The priority deadline to apply is April 12th, 2024 . If you know a student who may be interested in this life-changing and America-changing program, please forward them this email—they won’t want to miss out! APPLY HERE! [] Thank you for your support and solidarity, Rep. Greg Stanton P.S. If you’re not a student, but still excited about Democracy Summer, you can support our participation in this program by joining the senior corps and donating to our campaign here [] ! [] [] [] [] Paid for by Stanton for Congress Stanton for Congress 4340 E Indian School Rd. Suite 21-518 Phoenix, AZ 85018 United States If you believe you received this message in error or wish to no longer receive email from us, please unsubscribe: .

subject: Add your name: World Central Kitchen aid workers killed by Israeli military. We need a Ceasefire NOW!
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Our Revolution click here to unsubscribe
body:
[ stdin# ][IMG]

Peter Willis, the Biden
administration just sent more bombs and warplanes to Israel amidst the
horrific war against the Palestinian people. Today, some of those bombs
killed aid workers with World Food Kitchen and American bombs have been
used to kill thousands of civilians over the course of this horrible war.

Like Bernie, we think Biden's weapons transfer is downright obscene.

[ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/16521?t=1011&akid=5712%2E5885482%2EYX3VId ][IMG]

President Biden shows no willingness to slow down America’s shipments of
weapons to Israel — he’s already sent more than $570 million worth of
bombs to Netanyahu since the start of this war. The only way forward right
now is peace, diplomacy, and an immediate, permanent Ceasefire.

[ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/16522?source=email-20240402&t=1012&akid=5712%2E5885482%2EYX3VId ]Add your name: President Biden must choose Peace in Gaza. Demand that
he do everything in his power to help broker a permanent Ceasefire NOW!

[ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/16522?source=email-20240402&t=1013&akid=5712%2E5885482%2EYX3VId ]ADD YOUR NAME

As Bernie has said for months, “Not another nickel for Netanyahu’s immoral
war against the Palestinian people.”

[ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/16521?t=1014&akid=5712%2E5885482%2EYX3VId ][IMG]

Bernie’s courageous advocacy alongside other pro-Peace progressives like
Rashida Tlaib, Barbara Lee, Ilhan Omar, Summer Lee, and Pramila Jayapal
cannot stop and will not stop until there’s peace in Gaza. They won’t stop
advocating for an end to financial support for Netanyahu’s war. And they
won’t stop calling for an end to arming Israel with the weapons used to
kill Palestinian civilians.

But it appears President Biden won’t stop arming Israel, even as
Netanyahu’s war is killing civilians and Israeli forces are blocking food,
water, and medical aid to the people of Gaza. The way forward is PEACE NOW
so Netanyahu ends his bombing campaigns against the Palestinian people.

[ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/16522?source=email-20240402&t=1015&akid=5712%2E5885482%2EYX3VId ]Add your name: Ceasefire NOW! No more atrocities against the
Palestinian people. Peace and diplomacy are the only way to save Gaza.

When we organize, we win.

Our Revolution

clean_body: | | | During his time in office, former President Trump repeatedly proposed huge cuts to Social Security and Medicare in his annual budget. Republicans agree - they just laid out their plan to gut Social Security and privatize Medicare. Even though in the US has been declining, Donald Trump and Republicans are looking to cut the programs including increasing the retirement age to 69 for younger workers, eliminating spousal and children’s benefits, and decreasing payment amounts. President Biden and the Democrats have vowed to STOP cuts to the program and ensure that the wealthy contribute their fair share. Cedar Key Progress is dedicated to elect Democrats across the South who will defend the hardworking people of America by supporting Social Security and Medicare! | Republicans propose cutting Social Security and Medicare by over the next decade! This would disproportionately harm seniors, veterans, and low and middle-income workers. Medicare cuts would include stripping the program of its ability to negotiate lower drug prices, benefitting Big Pharma, and pushing for privatization through Medicare Advantage. The ultra-wealthy don’t need tax cuts, yet the Republican Party wants to cut vital and popular programs that millions of Americans rely on so the rich don’t have to pay their fair share.** Thanks for your support. -Cedar Key Progress Cedar Key Progress support Democrats in competitive Southern districts who are building a diverse, inclusive, and just future. subject: Red State Supreme Court Orders Abortion Amendment Be Placed On Ballot In November
body:
And Imposing Draconian Regulation On The Internet To Protect It From ‘Boogeyman’ Threats

https://click.americanupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=01%7c698440%7c210334%7c805%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=iYZkeay3SMn6O9JDj%2bqxLg&sysid=1 Red State Supreme Court Orders Abortion Amendment Be Placed On Ballot In November

The Florida Supreme Court ruled Monday that an abortion amendment can be placed on the ballot in November. The amendment states that “no law shall prohibit, penalize, delay, or restrict abortion before viability or when necessary to protect the patient’s health, as determined by the patient’s healthcare provider,” and was submitted by Floridians Protecting Freedom (FPF).

In case you missed it, friend, I'll start with the good news:
**The Florida Supreme Court ruled IN FAVOR of the ballot initiative to let the people** — _and**not** extremist politicians _— **decide the future of abortion rights in Florida this November!**
But there's bad news, too:** T****he court just triggered Ron DeSantis’ 6-week ban — which means we have 29 days until it goes into effect****.**
This decision could spell life or death for millions of Floridians and untold pain for their families.
**But friend, please believe me when I say all hope is not lost.**
It's now on us to fight harder than ever to restore the rights we _never_ should have lost in the first place. [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/82240045/464761540/-1747597063?nd&amount=10&refcode=em_fr_2024.04.02_b1_es_all&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzEvMS85NTEyNSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJlNDJiMmYwZi0zNmYxLWVlMTEtYWFmMi0wMDIyNDgyMjMzNTMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=BQeRNUHrRWFf5TNoyprLz11i2eIiHUj70O3WmLvgThQ=) Peter, I wanted to reach out to say thank you. **Thank you for believing in me and Northeast Ohio. **With your help, every day we are working to improve the lives of Northeast Ohioans and make the government work for our community **Thank you for being an essential part of my grassroots team.** You are the reason we have made it this far, past the Primary, and headed to the General Election. Because of you, I am able to keep championing the issues most important to our OH-13 community in Congress. **Thank you for your continuous support as we head into one of the most competitive elections this year.** OH-13 is the path to House Majority. National Republicans know this, and have labeled me a top target for 2024. This re-election campaign won’t be easy, but your support does not go unnoticed—together I know we will win in November. With you and the rest of the team I know that not only will we keep this seat blue, but more importantly we will be able to continue working on the issues important to the people of this district. When we take back the House Majority, we will continue fighting to expand opportunity for everyone in Ohio’s 13th Congressional District and Northeast Ohio. You are the reason we have made it this far, past the Primary, and headed to the General Election. Because of you, I am able to keep championing the issues most important to our OH-13 community in Congress. Thank you for your continuous support as we head into one of the most competitive elections this year. OH-13 is the path to House Majority. National Republicans know this, and have labeled me a top target for 2024. This re-election campaign won’t be easy, but your support does not go unnoticed—together I know we will win in November. With you and the rest of the team I know that not only will we keep this seat blue, but more importantly we will be able to continue working on the issues important to the people of this district. When we take back the House Majority, we will continue fighting to expand opportunity for everyone in Ohio’s 13th Congressional District and Northeast Ohio. Peter, to keep us on the right path, = If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: | = | = ---|--- = | = = | = = Thank you for all that you do, Emilia Sykes A native of Akron, Ohio, Emilia Sykes has deep roots fighting for Ohioans. She learned from a young age how to use her voice and the power of the people to create change. In 2022, Congresswoman Sykes was elected to represent Ohio’s newly redrawn 13th Congressional District, winning one of the toughest races in the country.Emilia has cut through the divisiveness to deliver results. = | = | Emilia Sykes is running for re-election in Ohio's 13th Congressional District. To learn more, please visit | Paid for by Emilia Sykes for Congress Emilia Sykes for Congress PO Box 1347 Akron, OH 44309 United States If you believe you received this message in error or wish to no longer receive email from us, please .

name: Britney VanCitters
subject: FWD: Will you help us fight for Oregon’s future?
body:
| | Hi Peter, In case you missed it, I wanted to remind you how important this upcoming election is for Oregon. It's crucial that we have all the support we can to get our OLCV-endorsed candidates elected so that Oregon can continue making progress towards a just and equitable climate future. [**Will you help us get there?**](https://click.everyaction.com/k/82240226/464761877/1053267318?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9BVi9BVkxDVi8xLzcwODc3IiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogImJjOGMxNDc1LTM2ZjEtZWUxMS1hYWYyLTAwMjI0ODIyMzM1MyIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=Kw3QfmxnRjv2BccfOpppuWHOJSzo-v44l7l0TKZ58X8=&emci=2bcabc19-1ff1-ee11-aaf2-002248223353&emdi=bc8c1475-36f1-ee11-aaf2-002248223353&ceid=2107230) Right now, your donation is more than a gift, it is an investment in Oregon's future. **[And with Oregon's Political Tax Credit, your donation can be reimbursed when you file your taxes, making your gift essentially a _free_ donation.](https://click.everyaction.com/k/82240227/464761878/1053267318?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9BVi9BVkxDVi8xLzcwODc3IiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogImJjOGMxNDc1LTM2ZjEtZWUxMS1hYWYyLTAwMjI0ODIyMzM1MyIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=Kw3QfmxnRjv2BccfOpppuWHOJSzo-v44l7l0TKZ58X8=&emci=2bcabc19-1ff1-ee11-aaf2-002248223353&emdi=bc8c1475-36f1-ee11-aaf2-002248223353&ceid=2107230)** Here at OLCV, we are already hard at work making sure that our endorsed candidates in the 2024 Primary Election advance on to the general. **[Will you donate to the OLCV PAC using your Political Tax Credit and help us elect candidates who will take bold action on climate and fight to protect the Oregon we love?](https://click.everyaction.com/k/82240228/464761879/913998683?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9BVi9BVkxDVi8xLzcwODc3IiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogImJjOGMxNDc1LTM2ZjEtZWUxMS1hYWYyLTAwMjI0ODIyMzM1MyIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=Kw3QfmxnRjv2BccfOpppuWHOJSzo-v44l7l0TKZ58X8=&emci=2bcabc19-1ff1-ee11-aaf2-002248223353&emdi=bc8c1475-36f1-ee11-aaf2-002248223353&ceid=2107230) ** Thank you for your support! Sincerely, Britney VanCitters, OLCV Political & Organizing Director | [](https://click.everyaction.com/k/82240229/464761880/913998683?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9BVi9BVkxDVi8xLzcwODc3IiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogImJjOGMxNDc1LTM2ZjEtZWUxMS1hYWYyLTAwMjI0ODIyMzM1MyIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=Kw3QfmxnRjv2BccfOpppuWHOJSzo-v44l7l0TKZ58X8=&emci=2bcabc19-1ff1-ee11-aaf2-002248223353&emdi=bc8c1475-36f1-ee11-aaf2-002248223353&ceid=2107230) Peter, As the political voice for Oregon’s environment, one of the key parts of our work is electing pro-climate and pro-environment candidates to office. This year is a critical election year with a lot at stake. We need to elect the right candidates to ensure that we continue making progress toward a just and equitable climate future. _You can help us get there!_ **[Will you help us elect pro-climate and pro-environment candidates to office by donating to the OLCV PAC today?](https://click.everyaction.com/k/82240230/464761881/913998683?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9BVi9BVkxDVi8xLzcwODc3IiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogImJjOGMxNDc1LTM2ZjEtZWUxMS1hYWYyLTAwMjI0ODIyMzM1MyIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=Kw3QfmxnRjv2BccfOpppuWHOJSzo-v44l7l0TKZ58X8=&emci=2bcabc19-1ff1-ee11-aaf2-002248223353&emdi=bc8c1475-36f1-ee11-aaf2-002248223353&ceid=2107230)** I’ll be frank—when I see what’s happening at the national level, I get nervous about the outcome of this year’s general election. But regardless of what happens, we can continue making critical progress on climate in Oregon. That’s why it’s so important that we elect lawmakers who aren’t afraid to take bold action. Do you know about Oregon’s Political Tax Credit? **[If you’re eligible, you can give $50 or $100 to the OLCV PAC and get your donation back when you file your taxes.](https://click.everyaction.com/k/82240231/464761882/913998683?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9BVi9BVkxDVi8xLzcwODc3IiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogImJjOGMxNDc1LTM2ZjEtZWUxMS1hYWYyLTAwMjI0ODIyMzM1MyIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=Kw3QfmxnRjv2BccfOpppuWHOJSzo-v44l7l0TKZ58X8=&emci=2bcabc19-1ff1-ee11-aaf2-002248223353&emdi=bc8c1475-36f1-ee11-aaf2-002248223353&ceid=2107230)** It’s basically a _free_ donation that you can use to help us elect the pro-climate and pro-environment candidates that Oregon needs. You're eligible if: **✔ **You are an Oregon resident
**✔ **You will submit an Oregon tax return for 2024
**✔ **You will make less than $75,000 in 2024 (or $150,000 for joint-filing couples) | [](https://click.everyaction.com/k/82240232/464761883/913998683?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9BVi9BVkxDVi8xLzcwODc3IiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogImJjOGMxNDc1LTM2ZjEtZWUxMS1hYWYyLTAwMjI0ODIyMzM1MyIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=Kw3QfmxnRjv2BccfOpppuWHOJSzo-v44l7l0TKZ58X8=&emci=2bcabc19-1ff1-ee11-aaf2-002248223353&emdi=bc8c1475-36f1-ee11-aaf2-002248223353&ceid=2107230)
---
We are already hard at work making sure that OLCV-endorsed candidates in the 2024 Primary Election advance on to the general. We’ve got important races, including Attorney General and State Treasurer. There are also important legislative races that we need to win to flip key seats and hold lawmakers who participated in the walkouts accountable.
**[Will you donate to the OLCV PAC using your Political Tax Credit and help us elect candidates who will take bold action on climate and fight to protect the Oregon we love?](https://click.everyaction.com/k/82240233/464761884/913998683?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9BVi9BVkxDVi8xLzcwODc3IiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogImJjOGMxNDc1LTM2ZjEtZWUxMS1hYWYyLTAwMjI0ODIyMzM1MyIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=Kw3QfmxnRjv2BccfOpppuWHOJSzo-v44l7l0TKZ58X8=&emci=2bcabc19-1ff1-ee11-aaf2-002248223353&emdi=bc8c1475-36f1-ee11-aaf2-002248223353&ceid=2107230) **
Thanks for all you do,
Lindsey Scholten, OLCV Executive Director
**[PS: Our endorsements for the 2024 Primary Election are out! See a complete list of OLCV-endorsed candidates on our website.](https://click.everyaction.com/k/82240234/464761885/485473690?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9BVi9BVkxDVi8xLzcwODc3IiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogImJjOGMxNDc1LTM2ZjEtZWUxMS1hYWYyLTAwMjI0ODIyMzM1MyIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=Kw3QfmxnRjv2BccfOpppuWHOJSzo-v44l7l0TKZ58X8=&emci=2bcabc19-1ff1-ee11-aaf2-002248223353&emdi=bc8c1475-36f1-ee11-aaf2-002248223353&ceid=2107230)**
