clean_body: | | Hi Peter, In case you missed it, I wanted to remind you how important this upcoming election is for Oregon. It's crucial that we have all the support we can to get our OLCV-endorsed candidates elected so that Oregon can continue making progress towards a just and equitable climate future. Right now, your donation is more than a gift, it is an investment in Oregon's future. Here at OLCV, we are already hard at work making sure that our endorsed candidates in the 2024 Primary Election advance on to the general. Thank you for your support! Sincerely, Britney VanCitters, OLCV Political & Organizing Director | Peter, As the political voice for Oregon’s environment, one of the key parts of our work is electing pro-climate and pro-environment candidates to office. This year is a critical election year with a lot at stake. We need to elect the right candidates to ensure that we continue making progress toward a just and equitable climate future. You can help us get there! I’ll be frank—when I see what’s happening at the national level, I get nervous about the outcome of this year’s general election. But regardless of what happens, we can continue making critical progress on climate in Oregon. That’s why it’s so important that we elect lawmakers who aren’t afraid to take bold action. Do you know about Oregon’s Political Tax Credit? It’s basically a free donation that you can use to help us elect the pro-climate and pro-environment candidates that Oregon needs. You're eligible if: ✔ You are an Oregon resident ✔ You will submit an Oregon tax return for 2024 ✔ You will make less than $75,000 in 2024 (or $150,000 for joint-filing couples) | We are already hard at work making sure that OLCV-endorsed candidates in the 2024 Primary Election advance on to the general. We’ve got important races, including Attorney General and State Treasurer. There are also important legislative races that we need to win to flip key seats and hold lawmakers who participated in the walkouts accountable. Thanks for all you do, Lindsey Scholten, OLCV Executive Director | | Connect With Us: | | Contact Info: Oregon League of Conservation Voters 1110 SE Alder Suite 220 Portland, OR 97214 United States | ---|--- | If you believe you received this message in error or wish to no longer receive email from us, please. | ---|---

name: Elissa Slotkin
subject: Donald Trump just tore into me
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY ELISSA SLOTKIN FOR MICHIGAN
body:
# [](https://act.elissaslotkin.org/go/188?t=1&akid=1304%2E135344%2EXOMkgN)
Friends,
Donald Trump just visited Michigan to rally his supporters -- and he called me out. He knows that our campaign is the only thing stopping Republicans from flipping the Senate, and this is unfortunately just the start of his attacks.
I would deeply appreciate your help to fight back and keep Michigan blue in November. Please, use this link to donate now:
**[https://act.elissaslotkin.org/go/Trump_Visit](https://act.elissaslotkin.org/go/9?c0=ebs-em-apr24.UpsRlZ&refcode=em240402-2-30&t=2&akid=1304%2E135344%2EXOMkgN)**
At his event today, Trump stood with Mike Rogers directly behind him and emphasized how important this Senate race will be to him taking back the White House in November. In between a fountain of misleading and downright falsehoods, Trump also said that, with his support, Mike Rogers will have “tremendous success” against me in this race.
I’m counting on you to help prove him wrong.
Today’s event is an indication that Republicans are gearing up to throw everything they can at Michigan, and that Michigan Democrats can’t take anything for granted.
No matter what anyone may tell you, Michigan is a swing state -- full stop. And just as we have swung toward Democrats, Michigan is known for swinging right on back.
We can't let that happen. Want to help? [**Chip in what you can and help send a message that Michigan is sure as hell not ready to swing back to Trump.](https://act.elissaslotkin.org/go/9?c0=ebs-em-apr24.UpsRlZ&refcode=em240402-2-30&t=3&akid=1304%2E135344%2EXOMkgN)**

name: DNC War Room
subject: Republicans have really lost it…
disclaimer_text: Paid for by the Democratic National Committee, **[www
body:
Let’s address the obvious: They’re determined to reelect Donald Trump. | |
---

Derek -- Let’s address the obvious: **Republicans have really lost it.** We know this because they’re determined to reelect Donald Trump -- a proven sore loser -- who wants to ban abortion nationwide, rip away health care coverage from millions, rig the economy for the ultra-wealthy, and threaten our democracy by pledging to be a “dictator on day one.” We know this because over and over again, Americans have _clearly opposed_ the radical measures that Trump plans to implement. **⚠️ Here are the signals that Trump and MAGA Republicans blatantly choose to ignore. ⚠️** 👉 Americans -- including a majority of Republicans and independents -- overwhelmingly oppose enacting a federal law banning abortion nationwide. 👉 More than eight in ten Americans either agree or strongly agree that all Americans have a basic right to health care coverage. 👉 Nearly nine in ten Americans say they oppose reducing spending on Social Security or Medicare. 👉 Most Americans say they would support stricter gun control laws, all while Trump cozies up to the NRA. **Yet, somehow, MAGA Republicans are convinced that Americans want Trump’s extreme agenda. And that’s what they’re fighting to enact.** We’re going to be direct: If we have the resources to reelect President Biden and Vice President Harris and elect Democrats across the country, _we can and will win in November_. If we don’t, then our democracy could be in HUGE trouble. This means we need your help to reach our fundraising goals, which will strengthen Democratic campaigns as November approaches. [Can we count on you to make a $7 donation to the DNC to help elect Democrats nationwide?](https://click.act.democrats.org/ss/c/u001.iIBo0N5fSFzEFL40Tn-vtbMETCUYClkOrOh9-SNJfqvpOShxPWr9mFhJMw1S-wTtsWJ4oHmyX6l1dZXrMu59XkqaLmdnimuDefwh5_O-3pRqDSp6KxT0Ll5X8KlCJnUjEZaJ1m-pGXil86fPOaXHab_qho3760kbmraSklkwJXBRT-YeV9OAGtyk2JvxiBpfLqctW7TSPPOXGKFuLO9ktF_ZIgKnoEhWnMfbtyytXKaptHBSMAR6LqnKaPzmJdqU17FV9-BKyLdxnZzQPJ2peyiPipjvpKwZOnbEDJbhAegqu6hzIjBnNC5kvjbqQQPYQqIodWivJ1PQBF9T0RJYEa8VFWiYmTL44UR0tItnIwV-AtW8c9TLCCa8EsIPpjaK6lubIoTiPWgzVpyzn8WqhmY48BJ_TeQEKETe0ksm3SRFnldnVe2eE6Y8pmI0_g4H/456/vDZ_l3dvST6V3N6krB2yJQ/h0/h001.K5QierwnqQrDNxN6NrisAXiEMqdhrvH6kWu2xm8qbzY) We appreciate your support, The Democrats

name: Sam Eppler
subject: Thanks again!
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Sam Eppler for Congress
body:
March was our busiest month yet! Now that we’ve won the primary and made it through our first FEC fundraising quarter, we need your help to keep this momentum going and close the gap between us and our MAGA opponent, Beth Van Duyne.

| [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/82240625/464763465/-1919350451?refcode=BLU_EM_SEC_2024-04-02_1&amount=25&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNTkvMS8xMDYxNTEiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiMjQzMmNiMjctMzhmMS1lZTExLWFhZjItMDAyMjQ4MjIzMzUzIiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=owHo6iSp5tUoLDnSQaintI9aVrzFx6a7naNVurBd1a8=)

| Hi, it’s Sam Eppler.

name: Katie Porter
subject: A quick explainer on money in politics
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Truth to Power PAC
body:
there are two main ways money influences elections
# [](https://act.katieporter.com/go/9?t=1&akid=38807%2E3422442%2E4kNvFe)
Derek,
Money in politics is a huge and fundamental problem, and there are two main ways money influences elections.
1. Corporate PACs: Corporate PACs can give $5,000 to a candidate each election cycle. Now, individually that may not sound like a lot. But taken together, companies are able to team up and sway policy. For example, every Big Pharma company can give to a lawmaker, along with their trade group. Taken altogether, **it’s a system that results in legalized corruption and special privileges for corporate interests** —which stand in the way of higher wages, environmental protections, and even government oversight.
2. Super PACs: Super PACs can accept unlimited sums of money from just about anyone. In our own Senate race last month, super PACs spent more than $10M against us, and voters only learned which group was truly funding those ads after the election. **Super PACs, whether funded by conservative billionaires who are ideologically motivated, or by a corporate interest hoping to shore up a tax break or favorable regulations, threaten to undermine the fairness of our elections.** Each election cycle since the _Citizens United_ Supreme Court decision, they dump more and more money into races, eroding the faith Americans have in our political process.

Since getting to Congress in 2019, I’ve been leading the fight for campaign finance reform. But I’ll be honest, right now we don’t have the votes to pass the serious overhaul bill we need.
_**But right now, without passing a single bill, we can encourage Members of Congress to lead by example and reject corporate PAC money.**_ Every single Member has that choice, and while I’m proud that around 70 of my colleagues have joined me in rejecting it, that leaves over 460 people to go!
That’s where Truth to Power comes in: **I started this organization in 2020 to help elect Democrats who reject corporate PAC money**. By supporting these candidates—whether in competitive primaries or in purple districts, we can change this norm and create a Democratic party that isn’t beholden to corporate cash.
Truth to Power is grassroots funded, and so I can only continue this work with your support. **[Can you give a gift of $5 today that will power our fight?](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/ttp-em-20240402?refcode=em20240402-38807&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&refcode2=38807_3422442_4kNvFe&akid=38807%2E3422442%2E4kNvFe)**
[Donate ›››](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/ttp-em-20240402?refcode=em20240402-38807&refcode2=38807_3422442_4kNvFe&akid=38807%2E3422442%2E4kNvFe)
Many thanks for considering,
Katie

**[Donate ›››](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/truth-to-power-1?refcode=em&t=2&refcode2=38807_3422442_4kNvFe&akid=38807%2E3422442%2E4kNvFe)**
---

But, if you'd like to receive fewer emails, [**you can do so here**](https://act.katieporter.com/signup/receive-fewer-ttp-emails/). If you need to remove yourself from our email list, [click here to unsubscribe](https://act.katieporter.com/signup/ttp-unsubscribe/?t=3&akid=38807%2E3422442%2E4kNvFe).

To contribute via check, please address to: Truth to Power PAC, PO Box 5176, Irvine, CA 92616

name: Carmen Goers
subject: Celebrate National Pickleball Month with Carmen Goers
body:
Join the Team

| | | | | | | |
---
| | | |
---
| | | **Celebrate National Pickleball Month with Carmen Goers!**
---

Dear Peter,
This April, as we celebrate National Pickleball Month, let’s embrace the spirit of community and friendly competition that pickleball brings to our neighborhoods and parks in Washington's 8th congressional district. It’s more than just a game; it’s a growing community tradition that unites us all. Did you know that Pickleball was founded here in Washington? We have many Pickleball players and supporters on Team Goers!

I am a fervent supporter of community sports and recreation, understanding their vital role in fostering health, happiness, and unity among us. In recognition of National Pickleball Month, I am committed to promoting and expanding access to recreational sports like Pickleball, ensuring everyone in our district can enjoy these community-building activities.

Join us in serving up support for our campaign this Pickleball Month. A donation of $20, $50, or even $100 will help us advocate for public spaces where families and friends can come together to play, laugh, and build lasting memories.

---
| | | |
---
|
Your contribution today will not only support my campaign but also champion the cause of community engagement through sports.
Let’s rally and show our commitment to a vibrant, active, and united community in Washington's 8th.

---
| [ DONATE TODAY! ](https://vgq.soundestlink.com/link/660c7c77b9c84da0d5a192e3/660c3e7a9db65decd45b0eec/652845d9aa222127cf458b43?signature=ac8ac7a7d719a2de0af68e677d4dd0e4f5517e5b19f7638f0b0d764300624dec)
---
| | | Thank you for being part of our team and for your generous support!

With gratitude,

Carmen Goers

name: Debbie Mucarsel-Powell
subject: A small victory for reproductive freedom
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Fetterman for PA
body:
#
Derek, I've got some great news for you: The Florida Supreme Court just ruled to keep abortion rights on the ballot this November!
But we can’t celebrate just yet — **the court also UPHELD Ron DeSantis' unconstitutional 15-week abortion ban, which means his even more extreme six-week ban will take effect in 30 days.**
_**Now, we finally have the chance to overturn Ron DeSantis' extreme ban and restore our reproductive freedom at the polls.**_
The tides are changing in Florida. And this ballot initiative has a very good chance of passing. Recent polling shows that 62% of voters, including a majority of Republicans, support passing it. And a massive 75% of voters oppose the extreme six-week ban that could take effect in a matter of weeks.
This is what a powerful grassroots movement can accomplish. _And that's exactly what we need to defeat Rick Scott and stop him from passing a nationwide ban on abortions._
Listen, Rick Scott wants you to believe that our home is a red state. But that couldn't be further from the truth. More and more of us are rejecting his far-right agenda every day. And polling data shows that this race is neck and neck.
But now, he’s spending millions to lie about his record and launch baseless attacks against me — and I can’t overcome his self-funded ads without the crucial resources to fight back. [**So please, will you chip in $5 or more — split between my campaign and John Fetterman’s — before 11:59 p.m. tonight to help me reach my rapid- response goal? With all eyes on Florida, we can’t stumble now.**](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/jf-email-20240402-1?refcode=em20240402-1&amount=5&refcode2=8889_434096_EOHemQ&akid=8889%2E434096%2EEOHemQ)
**[Donate $5 »](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/jf-email-20240402-1?refcode=em20240402-1&amount=5&refcode2=8889_434096_EOHemQ&akid=8889%2E434096%2EEOHemQ)**
**[Donate another amount »](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/jf-email-20240402-1?amount=5&refcode=em20240402-1-8889&refcode2=8889_434096_EOHemQ&akid=8889%2E434096%2EEOHemQ)**
Together, we will win a better future for our state and our families.
Thank you for all that you do,
Debbie Mucarsel-Powell

**[Donate](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/jf-emails?refcode=em20240402-8889-footer&t=1&refcode2=8889_434096_EOHemQ&akid=8889%2E434096%2EEOHemQ)**

subject: big announcement
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Rosen for Nevada
body:
| | |
---
As soon as I got this update, I knew I needed to share it with you immediately, friend:
**FIRST:** With polls showing me locked neck and neck with my GOP opponent, I was officially named the most vulnerable woman in the Senate.
**THEN:** Republicans zeroed in on my seat in Nevada as the one they need to flip to retake Senate control – and dark money groups like the Koch network began spending MILLIONS to defeat me.
**NOW:** **We just launched brand new TV ads to fight back against the GOP** and reach voters in every corner of Nevada with our message!

But getting these ads in front of voters is expensive. If we fall short of our fundraising goals, these ads will go dark and we'll cede the airwaves to the GOP.
Friend, the only way that I can take on the GOP and their megadonor allies is with the grassroots support of people like you.** So, I'm counting on you to chip in whatever you can spare today to keep our new ads on the air. **

_“Governor Gretchen Whitmer, a real beauty she is...**And she's a terrible governor,** by the way. Your streets are bad. Your everything's bad.”_
Today, Donald Trump launched personal attacks, commented on my looks, and spread lies about me because he fears what I have done — _and will do_ — as Governor to stand up to him and his allies.
He’s openly pushing for a national abortion ban — **_while I’ve strengthened protections for women, IVF, surrogacy, and repealed Michigan’s extreme anti-abortion laws._**
He’s planning to use the levers of government to go after his political opponents — **_while I’ve signed bipartisan bills to support all Michiganders, regardless of who they put on their ballot._**
He’s attacking me because he’s terrified of the grassroots movement we’ve built together — **and we’re not even close to finished.**
I’ll continue traveling across Michigan, listening to voters, and doing everything in my power to make sure we re-elect President Biden and Vice President Harris, but it’s clear that the attacks are only going to ramp up.

body:
# [](https://go.bobcasey.com/go/181?t=1&akid=2549%2E552475%2Eq_twOb)
Peter, I’m sure you’re probably getting a lot of emails like this one — but can I explain why, in a battleground race like ours, your donation matters the most?
Pennsylvania has some of the most expensive media markets in the country.
**This means we have to**** _raise more and spend more_****than other campaigns just to keep our ads on the air.**
What’s more, my mega-millionaire opponent is already spending big to blanket the airwaves and mislead Pennsylvanians. If we don’t have the resources to keep up, we could miss the chance to reach crucial swing voters, costing us this race and our Senate majority.
**[That’s why I’m cutting to the chase. Will you rush $5 or more today to help us fight back and keep our own ads on the air? Whatever you can give will make a real difference in this battleground race.](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/casey-em-20240402-2?refcode=em20240402-2&refcode2=2549_552475_q_twOb&akid=2549%2E552475%2Eq_twOb)**

body:
| | | [](http://links.hungcaoforva.com/u/click?_t=c514f30bd6cd4b1bb0e09a0456675c53&_m=b492b146b892424ea7f45eb80767584d&_e=xpGoVfu3v1eQcYPir2yJkhu8OrFkOwp-N11wLHSbThLQMOKYXjJ0S7NymAitnRsOvdSFXYjIAiX5iRYYaftXnyRiyv3qD3NRF0_ZR5BG_xWt9Q5aNEeX79qPAjqTM5ClZyuOCU6v1zYNFIFrLEuWTjnrA-tOWD6FxvzlzHkdPI4_dOxEcEX8rVM5lBA6K6E3rUepn8XARdwZ23QQJFV8mNc1w63uLuEXgS3tkkyG0W_XV_5Yuj2niDWvMRYH0IF2UxXCM2F2c1hexHOOCf-UmRBoI0x2UEXtOaxAykQQ88-k3sbk1LlQWTPQg6URSLL9evugxSdINQnLx_OLbGzCjHp7OKRjJLD50cYvmLhovpkPkwWSh4zkMqAAQJzC5PQV)

| | Peter, I want to take a minute to introduce myself.
My name is Hung Cao. I’m a 25-year Navy combat veteran, and I love America so much that I put my life on the line for her time and time again.

I fought on the front lines in some of the most dangerous war zones in the world, from Iraq to Afghanistan to Somalia. I’ve seen the world many times over, and trust me when I tell you - if America falls, there is nowhere else to go.

I saw too many of my fellow servicemen and women fall to the enemy. But their sacrifices were never in vain, because they fought for the greatest country on Earth.

My team and I dedicated our lives to taking on our enemies abroad. But now, our greatest enemy lies within our borders.

The radical Biden Administration and socialists in Congress are bending the knee to the same enemies my fellow soldiers put their lives on the line to defeat. They’re trampling on the rights men and women in uniform made the ultimate sacrifice to defend.

**I’m not the kind of person to stand by idly when our country needs help - and that’s why I’m running for Senate.**

I’m going to be honest with you - Joe Biden, Tim Kaine, and the DC establishment desperately want me to call it quits.

They know I won’t give into their games and cater to the establishment elites, and that makes them absolutely FURIOUS.

**_But I’m not a politician, I’m a fighter._**

**The same values I fought for in the Navy are under attack by politicians like Joe Biden, Chuck Schumer, and Tim Kaine, and I want YOU to stand with me in my fight to save our country before it’s too late.**

**[Can you pitch in just a few bucks today to help out with our mission, take back the Senate, and get our country back on track?](http://links.hungcaoforva.com/u/click?_t=c514f30bd6cd4b1bb0e09a0456675c53&_m=b492b146b892424ea7f45eb80767584d&_e=xpGoVfu3v1eQcYPir2yJkhu8OrFkOwp-N11wLHSbThLQMOKYXjJ0S7NymAitnRsOvdSFXYjIAiX5iRYYaftXnyRiyv3qD3NRF0_ZR5BG_xWt9Q5aNEeX79qPAjqTM5ClZyuOCU6v1zYNFIFrLEuWTjnrA-tOWD6FxvzlzHkdPI4_dOxEcEX8rVM5lBA6K6E3rUepn8XARdwZ23QQJFV8mNc1w63uLuEXgS3tkkyG0W-s4zOiW_Qx0Zmnvnr-VkjNfFWFQHo65g6tILOR2FBB04drcE43DbVP4OQD4K5keOdCVAq88B7Aj5JubGV9EkyornKzTH5RVOZFVL1MmOTl_uVC9SXULv0WRIYew2CR750quk-TOTpSkCD6FTMD-QKg)

name: Mondaire Jones
subject: Humbled and grateful
disclaimer_text:
PAID FOR BY
MONDAIRE FOR CONGRESS
body:
Our first quarter of the election year is officially in the books, and I couldn't be more thrilled to share the incredible news with you.
Team,

Our first quarter of the election year is officially in the books, and I couldn't be more thrilled to share some incredible news with you.

**Thanks to your unwavering support and dedication, we not only hit our ambitious fundraising goal—we surpassed it.** In just three months, thousands of incredible supporters like you have stepped up to propel forward our grassroots movement to flip NY-17 blue.

When our fundraising numbers are revealed, it will be crystal clear to everyone that we have what it takes to defeat Mike Lawler and his MAGA Republican allies in Congress.

I want to express my deepest gratitude to each and every one of you. Your commitment to this campaign is truly inspiring. **While Lawler relies on corporate PACs to fuel his campaign, we are powered by the people—and that's what sets us apart.**

Dear Peter,
The political machine is trying to keep Team Kennedy off the ballot in Nevada, and now we're ready to go to court!
Team Kennedy believes we have collected sufficient signatures to ensure Robert F. Kennedy, Jr. and Nicole Shanahan are on the Nevada ballot.
However, Nevada invented a rule to disqualify the ballots! Corrupt DNC bosses conspired with the Nevada Secretary of State to claim the petitions needed to include a field for Vice President.
The Nevada Secretary of State confirmed with our campaign that the petition didn't need a field for VP, and is now changing their story!
Friends, this is how the political establishment protects itself. It doesn't matter if Nevada officials spin this rule change as an "accident," as their actions speak louder than words. They know signatures are incredibly expensive to collect, and party bosses are determined to keep Robert F. Kennedy, Jr. off the ballot.
Just like how the political establishment has tried using the courts to keep Donald J. Trump off the ballot, they are giving Kennedy/Shanahan the same treatment. These actions are undemocratic and are something you would expect in a banana republic, not in the United States of America.
Apparently, the old political guard doesn't care that a majority of voters under 35 and a majority of independents support Robert F. Kennedy, Jr.'s campaign.
With this disgusting behavior in Nevada, it is no surprise why 52% of American voters now consider themselves independent!
RFK Jr. isn't running for President to "spoil" the election. He is running to win the White House and heal America. But Kennedy needs to be on the ballot in every state, including Nevada!
As it stands now, we already plan to spend $15 million on ballot access. Now, the Nevada political establishment is forcing our hand and dragging us through costly court battles.
We need your support now more than ever! | [](https://click.everyaction.com/k/82242230/464769146/-247205437?refcode=BLU_EM_EMRG_2024-04-02_1&amount=25&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9BVi9BVkVNUi8xLzgxMzIxIiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogImE3ODQ2MTQ2LTNlZjEtZWUxMS1hYWYyLTAwMjI0ODIyMzM1MyIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=kvjop8WL1iZKcI33Q6m4CZJtfz6f7iDU45z6LiTcC50=)

| Peter,

We’re just one day away from the biggest event of the year – our 2024 Annual Luncheon! We want to take a moment to highlight our three notable congressional alums speaking at the event _**on Wednesday, April 3 at 12 PM PT/3 PM ET, in-person in San Francisco and live-streamed across the country! If you’d like to join these three trailblazers and more virtually tomorrow,[_you can RSVP here._](https://click.everyaction.com/k/82242231/464769147/1591837872?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9BVi9BVkVNUi8xLzgxMzIxIiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogImE3ODQ2MTQ2LTNlZjEtZWUxMS1hYWYyLTAwMjI0ODIyMzM1MyIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=kvjop8WL1iZKcI33Q6m4CZJtfz6f7iDU45z6LiTcC50=&emci=0c1a6240-3ef1-ee11-aaf2-002248223353&emdi=a7846146-3ef1-ee11-aaf2-002248223353&ceid=920818)**_
---
[](https://click.everyaction.com/k/82242232/464769148/1591837872?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9BVi9BVkVNUi8xLzgxMzIxIiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogImE3ODQ2MTQ2LTNlZjEtZWUxMS1hYWYyLTAwMjI0ODIyMzM1MyIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=kvjop8WL1iZKcI33Q6m4CZJtfz6f7iDU45z6LiTcC50=&emci=0c1a6240-3ef1-ee11-aaf2-002248223353&emdi=a7846146-3ef1-ee11-aaf2-002248223353&ceid=920818)
**Congresswoman Becca Balint is the _first woman_ and _openly LGBTQ+_ person to represent her home state of Vermont in Congress.** Vermont was the last state to not have ever had a woman Congressmember until Becca changed that.

While Majority Leader of the Vermont State Senate, she led the passage of the first gun safety laws in the state’s history, aimed at keeping Vermont children, communities, and survivors of abuse safe. She also secured the largest housing investment in Vermont in decades to rebuild housing stock and expand middle-income housing. In Congress, Balint serves as Congressional Progressive Caucus Vice Chair for New Members and as a Co-Chair of the Congressional Equality Caucus.
[](https://click.everyaction.com/k/82242233/464769149/1591837872?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9BVi9BVkVNUi8xLzgxMzIxIiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogImE3ODQ2MTQ2LTNlZjEtZWUxMS1hYWYyLTAwMjI0ODIyMzM1MyIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=kvjop8WL1iZKcI33Q6m4CZJtfz6f7iDU45z6LiTcC50=&emci=0c1a6240-3ef1-ee11-aaf2-002248223353&emdi=a7846146-3ef1-ee11-aaf2-002248223353&ceid=920818)
**Congresswoman Andrea Salinas is the proud daughter of a Mexican immigrant,_a first-generation American, and dedicated public servant_ working for the people of Oregon’s sixth district.**

A first-generation college student, Andrea decided to pursue a path of public service after graduation and worked as a US congressional aide and policy advisor to Senator Harry Reid and Congressman Pete Stark. Later, Andrea fell in love with the communities of the Willamette Valley while serving as a district aide for Congresswoman Darlene Hooley. Andrea stayed in Oregon and went on to serve as an advocate for labor unions, environmental groups, and reproductive rights organizations. In 2017, she was appointed to the Oregon House of Representatives and served through the end of her term in 2022.
[](https://click.everyaction.com/k/82242234/464769150/1591837872?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9BVi9BVkVNUi8xLzgxMzIxIiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogImE3ODQ2MTQ2LTNlZjEtZWUxMS1hYWYyLTAwMjI0ODIyMzM1MyIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=kvjop8WL1iZKcI33Q6m4CZJtfz6f7iDU45z6LiTcC50=&emci=0c1a6240-3ef1-ee11-aaf2-002248223353&emdi=a7846146-3ef1-ee11-aaf2-002248223353&ceid=920818)
**Congresswoman Emilia Sykes became the _first Black person_ elected to represent Ohio’s 13th Congressional District.**

Born and raised in Akron, Ohio, Congresswoman Emilia Sykes grew up on the city’s west side and has dedicated her career to strengthening her community. For 8 years, Emilia served as the State Representative for Ohio House District 34, otherwise known as the “Birthplace of Champions.” In Congress, she has committed to fighting for economic opportunity, safer communities, and affordable healthcare for Northeast Ohioans.

In 2024, we’re committed to recruiting and training more bold Democratic women to expand our Congressional Caucus and join these three trailblazers in Congress, but we need your support to ensure we have the resources. If you’d like to join these three trailblazers and more virtually tomorrow, [_**you can RSVP here.**_](https://click.everyaction.com/k/82242235/464769151/1591837872?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9BVi9BVkVNUi8xLzgxMzIxIiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogImE3ODQ2MTQ2LTNlZjEtZWUxMS1hYWYyLTAwMjI0ODIyMzM1MyIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=kvjop8WL1iZKcI33Q6m4CZJtfz6f7iDU45z6LiTcC50=&emci=0c1a6240-3ef1-ee11-aaf2-002248223353&emdi=a7846146-3ef1-ee11-aaf2-002248223353&ceid=920818)

clean_body: We’re just one day away from the biggest event of the year – our 2024 Annual Luncheon! | = | Peter, We’re just one day away from the biggest event of the year – our 2024 Annual Luncheon! We want to take a moment to highlight our three notable congressional alums speaking at the event on Wednesday, April 3 at 12 PM PT/3 PM ET, in-person in San Francisco and live-streamed across the country! If you’d like to join these three trailblazers and more virtually tomorrow, Congresswoman Becca Balint is the first woman and openly LGBTQ+ person to represent her home state of Vermont in Congress. Vermont was the last state to not have ever had a woman Congressmember until Becca changed that. While Majority Leader of the Vermont State Senate, she led the passage of the first gun safety laws in the state’s history, aimed at keeping Vermont children, communities, and survivors of abuse safe. She also secured the largest housing investment in Vermont in decades to rebuild housing stock and expand middle-income housing. In Congress, Balint serves as Congressional Progressive Caucus Vice Chair for New Members and as a Co-Chair of the Congressional Equality Caucus. Congresswoman Andrea Salinas is the proud daughter of a Mexican immigrant,a first-generation American, and dedicated public servant working for the people of Oregon’s sixth district. A first-generation college student, Andrea decided to pursue a path of public service after graduation and worked as a US congressional aide and policy advisor to Senator Harry Reid and Congressman Pete Stark. Later, Andrea fell in love with the communities of the Willamette Valley while serving as a district aide for Congresswoman Darlene Hooley. Andrea stayed in Oregon and went on to serve as an advocate for labor unions, environmental groups, and reproductive rights organizations. In 2017, she was appointed to the Oregon House of Representatives and served through the end of her term in 2022. Congresswoman Emilia Sykes became the first Black person elected to represent Ohio’s 13th Congressional District. Born and raised in Akron, Ohio, Congresswoman Emilia Sykes grew up on the city’s west side and has dedicated her career to strengthening her community. For 8 years, Emilia served as the State Representative for Ohio House District 34, otherwise known as the “Birthplace of Champions.” In Congress, she has committed to fighting for economic opportunity, safer communities, and affordable healthcare for Northeast Ohioans. In 2024, we’re committed to recruiting and training more bold Democratic women to expand our Congressional Caucus and join these three trailblazers in Congress, but we need your support to ensure we have the resources. subject: Here’s the latest

body:
I just wanted to take a moment to reach out with a quick update on where we’re at with the Francis Scott Key Bridge operations and provide some resources you can use to help those impacted.

| [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/82242409/464769727/1470334642?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDcvMS8xMDU4MjciLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiZjRhMWIwOGItM2VmMS1lZTExLWFhZjItMDAyMjQ4MjIzMzUzIiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=UAQANPIysFoybUnvt-krxK25oyZNPMZLZE9n5EWx6F8=&emci=04b74eb3-00f1-ee11-aaf2-002248223353&emdi=f4a1b08b-3ef1-ee11-aaf2-002248223353&ceid=6967550)
---
| This past week has been incredibly challenging in so many ways, and I just wanted to take a moment to reach out with a quick update on where we’re at with the Francis Scott Key Bridge operations and provide some resources you can use to help those impacted.

Operations remain underway to clear wreckage from the channel and disassemble the remaining parts of the bridge so that we can open up the shipping channels to the Port of Baltimore and work towards rebuilding the bridge.

You can stay up-to-date on these operations from Unified Command at: [_**keybridgeresponse2024.com**_](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/82242410/464769728/999356445?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDcvMS8xMDU4MjciLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiZjRhMWIwOGItM2VmMS1lZTExLWFhZjItMDAyMjQ4MjIzMzUzIiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=UAQANPIysFoybUnvt-krxK25oyZNPMZLZE9n5EWx6F8=&emci=04b74eb3-00f1-ee11-aaf2-002248223353&emdi=f4a1b08b-3ef1-ee11-aaf2-002248223353&ceid=6967550)

The Biden-Harris administration has also announced $60 million in emergency relief funds to aid in recovery and rebuilding efforts to help reopen the Port of Baltimore.

Throughout all of this, our main priority has remained focused on supporting those who have been impacted by this accident and continuing to provide solace and grace during this unimaginable time.

Those interested in helping support those impacted may make a donation to one of the following funds:
* [_**Baltimore Community Foundation Key Bridge Emergency Fund**_](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/82242411/464769729/1585331961?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDcvMS8xMDU4MjciLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiZjRhMWIwOGItM2VmMS1lZTExLWFhZjItMDAyMjQ4MjIzMzUzIiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=UAQANPIysFoybUnvt-krxK25oyZNPMZLZE9n5EWx6F8=&emci=04b74eb3-00f1-ee11-aaf2-002248223353&emdi=f4a1b08b-3ef1-ee11-aaf2-002248223353&ceid=6967550)
* [_**Mayor’s Office of Immigrant Affairs**_](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/82242412/464769730/-2064136091?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDcvMS8xMDU4MjciLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiZjRhMWIwOGItM2VmMS1lZTExLWFhZjItMDAyMjQ4MjIzMzUzIiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=UAQANPIysFoybUnvt-krxK25oyZNPMZLZE9n5EWx6F8=&emci=04b74eb3-00f1-ee11-aaf2-002248223353&emdi=f4a1b08b-3ef1-ee11-aaf2-002248223353&ceid=6967550)
* [_**United Way of Central Maryland**_](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/82242413/464769731/1569534300?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDcvMS8xMDU4MjciLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiZjRhMWIwOGItM2VmMS1lZTExLWFhZjItMDAyMjQ4MjIzMzUzIiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=UAQANPIysFoybUnvt-krxK25oyZNPMZLZE9n5EWx6F8=&emci=04b74eb3-00f1-ee11-aaf2-002248223353&emdi=f4a1b08b-3ef1-ee11-aaf2-002248223353&ceid=6967550)

In addition, you can continue to find more information and resources on [_**Baltimore County’s website here.**_](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/82242414/464769732/-1959822891?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDcvMS8xMDU4MjciLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiZjRhMWIwOGItM2VmMS1lZTExLWFhZjItMDAyMjQ4MjIzMzUzIiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=UAQANPIysFoybUnvt-krxK25oyZNPMZLZE9n5EWx6F8=&emci=04b74eb3-00f1-ee11-aaf2-002248223353&emdi=f4a1b08b-3ef1-ee11-aaf2-002248223353&ceid=6967550)

We will not let this tragedy define us, and we will not let this collapse divide us.

We know that we have a long way to go, but we’re a resilient community.

We always show up and we always take care of each other.

In service,

Johnny O
---

name: The team at VoteVets
subject: Steps away from a dictatorship
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY VOTEVETS, VOTEVETS
body:
VoteVets is ringing the alarm.
#
We’re Veterans. A lot of the people reading this are Veterans, too. Many more of you are members of Military Families. And even if you’re not in either of those groups, you’re a part of this team.
When you join the Military you swear an oath to defend the Constitution of the United States. We took that oath seriously.
And that's why we’re writing to you today. To put it very simply, our Constitution and our democracy are under greater threat today than at any point in our lifetimes.
Trump is doing everything he can to march back into the White House. If he takes back the presidency, he has stated openly that he would use the Military and the Department of Justice to crack down on his political opponents. He will gut the federal government and fill it with MAGA fanatics and loyalists. And that’s just what he and his team have said publicly. There is no telling how far he will go to turn the United States into a dictatorship.
We are steps away.
But we are not powerless. VoteVets is ringing the alarm. And we are going to fight tooth and nail for the next 8 months to stop Trump.
If we’re going to be successful, we need a big team behind us. Thousands of patriotic Americans who are willing to do the work necessary to protect our democracy. Are you with us?
**[Endorse the VoteVets Mission and add your name to say that you will fight back alongside us. We need you.**](https://act.votevets.org/signup/240402_vv_mission/?source=em240402-1-30?refcode2=25019.3013755.xpGesr&akid=25019%2E3013755%2ExpGesr)
| [ENDORSE THE VOTEVETS MISSION](https://act.votevets.org/signup/240402_vv_mission/?source=em240402-1-30?refcode2=25019.3013755.xpGesr&akid=25019%2E3013755%2ExpGesr)
---
Please, add your name.
Thank you.
The team at VoteVets

PAID FOR BY VOTEVETS, VOTEVETS.ORG, NOT AUTHORIZED BY ANY CANDIDATE OR CANDIDATE’S COMMITTEE
Use of military rank, job titles or photographs in uniform does not imply the endorsement of the Department of Defense, Departments of the Army, Navy, Air Force, or the Marines or Space Force.

name: Colorado Update
subject: Endorse Jason >>
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Jason Crow for Congress
body:
Jason Crow For Congress [https://nvlupin.blob.core.windows.net/images/van/NGP/NGP21/1/88523/images/logoJC%20(1).png]
Team —
In just 9 weeks, ballots will be sent out across Colorado for the June primary!
Jason is fighting to earn every vote, and we want you officially on the team. Will you endorse Jason’s campaign for CO-06? [https://act.jasoncrowforcongress.com/a/2024-04-endorsement]
ENDORSE JASON >> [https://act.jasoncrowforcongress.com/a/2024-04-endorsement]
Now more than ever, we need leaders who are committed to leveling the playing field for hardworking families. Nobody knows that better than Jason.
Jason didn’t come from money. He started working at an early age — doing paper routes, Arby’s, and construction jobs. After high school, he enlisted in the National Guard to help pay himself for college, and later served as an Army Ranger.
Now, Jason is in Congress fighting to bring change and deliver real results. He needs all of us in the fight with him.
Add your name to endorse Jason’s campaign for CO-06 >> [https://act.jasoncrowforcongress.com/a/2024-04-endorsement]
ENDORSE JASON >> [https://act.jasoncrowforcongress.com/a/2024-04-endorsement]
Thank you,
— Team Crow

**_AND WE TOLD YOU_** that Democrats like Pete Buttigieg, Jamie Raskin, and Adam Schiff are warning us that the Electoral College hurts our democracy!
---

But, you must have missed our messages, because you didn’t step up and **we MISSED our goal to relaunch our Abolish the Electoral College Ads.**
[BUT OUR FINANCE TEAM IS EXTENDING OUR DEADLINE ONE LAST TIME – UNTIL MIDNIGHT TONIGHT. WITH JUST $2,047 LEFT TO RAISE, WE’RE COUNTING ON YOUR $7 (_3X-MATCHED_) DONATION BEFORE MIDNIGHT »](https://act.fightforreform.org/go/41147?t=7&akid=21150%2E4449941%2E9ycFlZ)

name: Janelle Bynum
subject: I owe you a sincere thank you
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY JANELLE BYNUM FOR CONGRESS
body:
Hi there – it’s Janelle. I just wanted to reach out quickly and say thank you. Because of this incredible grassroots team, we hit our first end-of-quarter fundraising goal.

[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/82242519/464770131/476240567?nd&amount=10&refcode=em_fr_2024.04.02_b1_jb_all&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNTkvMS8xMDY3MjEiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiNGJhMGJlYjQtM2ZmMS1lZTExLWFhZjItMDAyMjQ4MjIzMzUzIiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=6IoDH3oh2nSoTEnBKA_FpaMrsSrgQJZJ_nmp6eJ95Ss=)
Hi there – it’s Janelle. I just wanted to reach out quickly and say _thank you_. **Because of this incredible grassroots team, we hit our first end-of-quarter fundraising goal.** And in a toss-up race like this, hitting each and every benchmark is critical for putting our campaign in a position to win. **You really came through when it mattered.** So much is on the line in this next election — our reproductive freedoms, our environment, and our democracy itself. Sometimes it can be hard to remember how large the stakes truly are. But when my team and I laid out the fundraising challenge we were facing, and the importance of overcoming it, this grassroots team delivered. I couldn’t be more grateful for the incredible people like you who helped me get where I am today, and I know that together, we’re going to win and deliver meaningful change for Oregon families. With gratitude, _Janelle_ P.S. It’s hard to believe, but we’re only just 7 weeks away from the Oregon primary election. name: Jim Banks
subject: My Heart Is In My Throat.....
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Banks for Senate
body:
|
---
Friend, I'm afraid I have _BAD news_. Before I reach out to Trump and J.D. Vance can you step in?

**Here's the situation:** Yesterday was my first major fundraising deadline, and my finance team just broke the news to me: **we were 19 donations short.**

This would have been a huge blow, but we've found a way to [**extend the deadline by 24 hours through this special donation link.**](http://links.banksforsenate.com/u/click?_t=588630feb05642bf856633600a62821b&_m=1e9f2f4c3aa9434d9fb504d3a58ab5fc&_e=2EP0fzHsrgtQR7r7NGfmc5MeX2Pjfe_tS5YL7Of5w1XgBdLh7xjGMhzIE5tpZFSZr6b1wrd2LL6wnCvG9SFF_tlAU3Xt3IfHtCQ87y1HernCOXzlLKQEBBmQJbPgUR7dYkKl-owabuRI-klL-Ih35OqOKw2pNAKEDjuoJeD8ohwKj-w22oL_1LjbrAL3VKAADDJWyNer4_CV5xfAwo8Lp-IJww3sjh2-61TdkvZqnfIrVrbahweQgolLLBPn3w9qdMpJ51P0RS7OtRnCOPMnqEgwDgiVxXWh4Bxx0ywgUCDxeB5ndq4dY-G6CkbjUZNR)

While it's impossible to add anything more to my federally mandated report...we have one more chance to make our internal goal and get back on track.

So, as a personal favor to me — [**will you stop what you're doing and make a special, one-time donation?**](http://links.banksforsenate.com/u/click?_t=588630feb05642bf856633600a62821b&_m=1e9f2f4c3aa9434d9fb504d3a58ab5fc&_e=2EP0fzHsrgtQR7r7NGfmc5MeX2Pjfe_tS5YL7Of5w1XgBdLh7xjGMhzIE5tpZFSZr6b1wrd2LL6wnCvG9SFF_tlAU3Xt3IfHtCQ87y1HernCOXzlLKQEBBmQJbPgUR7dYkKl-owabuRI-klL-Ih35OqOKw2pNAKEDjuoJeD8ohzXvwWAQi7yzaoynY8uGF-LSRLfJ2qSyhnxgmfmz3PckCh-hEgZOiiUVPQ1j6UFbQsotSbAFHbKZz5xQ9VEXqeb8UCLIj9_SR5SbwMXQm2hjrxBA6TMERKlwNJmtXz5H47yBRzgdFfbdnZxeq0G2tZa) Even it it's only $5...it will be the difference between completing our mission and surrendering.

I know firsthand from my time on the ground in Afghanistan: **getting the seemingly little things right matters when you're up against a determined enemy.**

My campaign, though under most people's radar right now, will be pivotal in determining who has the Senate majority, and our country is depending on your help to deliver us a victory. The Democrats know this and are already preparing to spend millions to defeat me.

[**Please, stand with me before 11:59PM.**](http://links.banksforsenate.com/u/click?_t=588630feb05642bf856633600a62821b&_m=1e9f2f4c3aa9434d9fb504d3a58ab5fc&_e=2EP0fzHsrgtQR7r7NGfmc5MeX2Pjfe_tS5YL7Of5w1XgBdLh7xjGMhzIE5tpZFSZr6b1wrd2LL6wnCvG9SFF_tlAU3Xt3IfHtCQ87y1HernCOXzlLKQEBBmQJbPgUR7dYkKl-owabuRI-klL-Ih35OqOKw2pNAKEDjuoJeD8ohwWg3lHylqsAuX8Ww0vXGjuFBRbpfyndwet3GTUtKftZDo-_qiJhJSjw9hRAZS8_nnC6Ob4T9ypiMiHYcQx7YfNki6ww_VE4m_tSgitBad4lsDferMkfsvy7xa-OAsqmt9E0jC-3cJ7Uxp028YcJWGU)

-Jim Banks

name: Jeff Merkley
subject: The Price Gouging Prevention Act of 2024
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Jeff Merkley for Oregon
body:
The New York Times recently reported that the Federal Trade Commission (FTC) found that large national grocery chains took advantage of pandemic supply chain disruptions to hike prices for consumers and increase profits for shareholders and billionaire CEOs.
| | [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/82242802/464771329/150430950?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDEvMS84OTMyNSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIxYWQ1ZGY4YS00MGYxLWVlMTEtYWFmMi0wMDIyNDgyMjMzNTMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=LC70ps5fT-gX4oEH6_GUhsozf-EMOlFR2TMYAoVktaI=&emci=179653d2-16f1-ee11-aaf2-002248223353&emdi=1ad5df8a-40f1-ee11-aaf2-002248223353&ceid=7731215)
---

| | We need to build an economy that works for families instead of enabling corporate greed. The New York Times recently reported that the Federal Trade Commission (FTC) found that large national grocery chains took advantage of pandemic supply chain disruptions to hike prices for consumers and increase profits for shareholders and billionaire CEOs. [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/82242804/464771330/1309610211?partner=slack&smid=sl-share&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDEvMS84OTMyNSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIxYWQ1ZGY4YS00MGYxLWVlMTEtYWFmMi0wMDIyNDgyMjMzNTMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=LC70ps5fT-gX4oEH6_GUhsozf-EMOlFR2TMYAoVktaI=&emci=179653d2-16f1-ee11-aaf2-002248223353&emdi=1ad5df8a-40f1-ee11-aaf2-002248223353&ceid=7731215) **This practice of price gouging is unacceptable, and it is especially unconscionable during times of crisis.** That's why I joined Senate colleagues to reintroduce the Price Gouging Prevention Act of 2024 to combat price gouging. The bill would empower the FTC and state attorneys general to enforce a federal ban against outrageous price increases, cracking down on companies that jack up prices and exploit Americans' pocketbooks during major shocks to the market. Americans are sick and tired of being taken advantage of. Whether it's outrageous prices for prescription medications, the high cost of gas, or the rising costs of everyday necessities, big corporations are raking in profits while families are struggling. In the Senate, we work for the American people, not for Big Pharma, Big Oil, or Big Money. These price-gouging profiteers can't be allowed to manipulate a deadly pandemic, a war, or any other abnormal market disruptor as just one more opportunity to rip off Americans—we have to put the interests of the American people above the interests of lining executives' pockets and stockholder portfolios. clean_body: The New York Times recently reported that the Federal Trade Commission (FTC) found that large national grocery chains took advantage of pandemic supply chain disruptions to hike prices for consumers and increase profits for shareholders and billionaire CEOs. | | | | We need to build an economy that works for families instead of enabling corporate greed. The New York Times recently reported that the Federal Trade Commission (FTC) found that large national grocery chains took advantage of pandemic supply chain disruptions to hike prices for consumers and increase profits for shareholders and billionaire CEOs. This practice of price gouging is unacceptable, and it is especially unconscionable during times of crisis. That's why I joined Senate colleagues to reintroduce the Price Gouging Prevention Act of 2024 to combat price gouging. The bill would empower the FTC and state attorneys general to enforce a federal ban against outrageous price increases, cracking down on companies that jack up prices and exploit Americans' pocketbooks during major shocks to the market. Americans are sick and tired of being taken advantage of. Whether it's outrageous prices for prescription medications, the high cost of gas, or the rising costs of everyday necessities, big corporations are raking in profits while families are struggling. In the Senate, we work for the American people, not for Big Pharma, Big Oil, or Big Money. These price-gouging profiteers can't be allowed to manipulate a deadly pandemic, a war, or any other abnormal market disruptor as just one more opportunity to rip off Americans—we have to put the interests of the American people above the interests of lining executives' pockets and stockholder portfolios. It's time to end the practice of price gouging once and for all. Onward! This is how we hold Biden accountable.
| | [ ](http://links.g4yamerica.com/u/click?_t=cc7dda5c2cc64061900678c88bd3a18a&_m=37af78d2cc264adc82e1d34eabc4dca4&_e=d3BIbDoFMhfPknwZE-Gfacjfzr9Gmf73jkBzW8VNicEXtibldaVVnE8VDzavE2F_A9GMtCTsqaDdrcz2n8bkKllo7utcAZWREbIBH8zSAZZ3zlwxkFLqn3Boq6uBmYs9KAZr7vAOI9CKw2fsMY_ppYgFp7uzVUZDvlpRYnEWXRVcewKZVbqIdEegN_oL_uZo9JCq__eWZdRfkJ9oLBdwoUQMIoS5MKi5oIhWhz_MFFgRwSgiKWrOYJgR_fKNaXDIwAfiRB808MASVsIkP7arOkcKgI1-1MdMb7ii9q-TjbJC45IVxXBbhcFdslsmyhud9iCY5fb2JVa0wQCKq6-EU1ZQSgTk3eHYnRd5CLgvhIv2bm6d2gb-ymfHiYMOK6ATunL6CP9IOmY5nzWRvRNB4rzSwIWW579cdDYAq5uUg3w%3D)
---
Fellow Conservative, I'm writing to you today with a big update on my investigation, and I ask you to take the time to read this email in its entirety. I spent a lot of time writing it and did my best to make every word count. If you don't read it, nobody will. **First, there is no question in my mind that Joe Biden and his family are guilty of corruption.** I've presented mountains of evidence confirming Joe Biden's involvement in his family's influence peddling scheme, and I just had a group of the Biden family's business confidants publicly testify about the first family's criminal activity. _**At any other time in history, that would have been the final nail in the coffin of the Biden Crime Family's reign of corruption.**_
| [ **STAND WITH COMER** ](http://links.g4yamerica.com/u/click?_t=cc7dda5c2cc64061900678c88bd3a18a&_m=37af78d2cc264adc82e1d34eabc4dca4&_e=d3BIbDoFMhfPknwZE-Gfacjfzr9Gmf73jkBzW8VNicEXtibldaVVnE8VDzavE2F_A9GMtCTsqaDdrcz2n8bkKllo7utcAZWREbIBH8zSAZZ3zlwxkFLqn3Boq6uBmYs9KAZr7vAOI9CKw2fsMY_ppYgFp7uzVUZDvlpRYnEWXRVcewKZVbqIdEegN_oL_uZo9JCq__eWZdRfkJ9oLBdwoUQMIoS5MKi5oIhWhz_MFFgRwSgiKWrOYJgR_fKNaXDIwAfiRB808MASVsIkP7arOoQtKWafYWmlN6ikLjczQvIE1kFWUg4gSJI9Fkm-GgJgsNsr7MRqPeJlTKbTcKUEsc4DDDG90p9_7x3_0_izsalxL52a-aqZGh427zWH1gVY-N1kfc9cEfT29B5W_Gf4p00Cjh7P9-Onc9GPnM5ncMQ%3D)
---
But we are not in a normal time in history, we are in a defining moment where our country will either return to the rule of law being applied equally to everyone, or we will continue down this Orwellian path and the destruction of the American ideal. As it stands right now, the deranged Democrats are refusing to take up the Impeachment Trial of Alejandro Mayorkas and threatening to dismiss it within minutes when it finally is brought up. **Even "centrist" Democrats called the Mayorkas Impeachment Trial "ridiculous" just days after a criminal illegal brutally murdered Laken Riley in cold blood.** _What do you think they would do if we Impeached Biden?_ It's clear that Democrats will choose their party over their country and the truth at every turn. They should be ashamed of themselves. **That's why I am preparing criminal referrals of Biden Family members as a part of my Impeachment Inquiry.** **When President Trump returns to the White House, it's critical the new leadership at the DOJ have everything they need to prosecute the Biden Crime Family and deliver swift justice.**
| [ **STAND WITH COMER** ](http://links.g4yamerica.com/u/click?_t=cc7dda5c2cc64061900678c88bd3a18a&_m=37af78d2cc264adc82e1d34eabc4dca4&_e=d3BIbDoFMhfPknwZE-Gfacjfzr9Gmf73jkBzW8VNicEXtibldaVVnE8VDzavE2F_A9GMtCTsqaDdrcz2n8bkKllo7utcAZWREbIBH8zSAZZ3zlwxkFLqn3Boq6uBmYs9KAZr7vAOI9CKw2fsMY_ppYgFp7uzVUZDvlpRYnEWXRVcewKZVbqIdEegN_oL_uZo9JCq__eWZdRfkJ9oLBdwoUQMIoS5MKi5oIhWhz_MFFgRwSgiKWrOYJgR_fKNaXDIwAfiRB808MASVsIkP7arOsci07DBiI1dg7-b9CGAq_6GOwAx6hkzYOm52baTuwdChKrtjks3VHW5384TCLIqWmuAiNLTyO_Vdr3Iv-T3Lo2hkhfOAl0a6EOPu-ufAabWxIXuOz73pN5lROJOX08-mXqqp-Z7lPKb955QIxwBL_M%3D)
---
This is the best way to hold the Biden's accountable for their crimes, as it's now clear the Democrats will do anything to hold onto power. I am dead serious when I tell you that the Democrats in D.C. only care about one thing. They don't care about the Constitution, the Rule of Law, or even their sacred oaths of office. They only care about POWER. And we must make sure that no matter what hijinks they try to pull before the election that they are removed from power in every branch of government. [**That's why I am in dire need of your support.**](http://links.g4yamerica.com/u/click?_t=cc7dda5c2cc64061900678c88bd3a18a&_m=37af78d2cc264adc82e1d34eabc4dca4&_e=d3BIbDoFMhfPknwZE-Gfacjfzr9Gmf73jkBzW8VNicEXtibldaVVnE8VDzavE2F_A9GMtCTsqaDdrcz2n8bkKllo7utcAZWREbIBH8zSAZZ3zlwxkFLqn3Boq6uBmYs9KAZr7vAOI9CKw2fsMY_ppYgFp7uzVUZDvlpRYnEWXRVcewKZVbqIdEegN_oL_uZo9JCq__eWZdRfkJ9oLBdwoUQMIoS5MKi5oIhWhz_MFFgRwSgiKWrOYJgR_fKNaXDIwAfiRB808MASVsIkP7arOjoV_w9mSTDrIO9krqkfD0xLQm-ygcfrfv6VxF6-Dj4xZhWNKSrzkagYwHrRTsl6zQ3cGmgDYRAN6cv9F96hN1MQV5i55r7EPWXDTMIPIfE_b0KFodGhfx1Y0rdTdo61OdySWGdVWX9wzDCX39pbprc%3D) I'm on the frontlines here in D.C. fighting to uphold the constitution and rid our government of corruption, but as the old adage goes, no good deed goes unpunished. **It's a damn shame that me and my family are being put through this just because I have the courage to speak truth to power.** There was a time not long ago when every American knew that having courage in the face of power was virtuous, and I still do. [**If you do too, then I'd be honored to have your support as I defend myself and my good name from the disgusting attacks I continue to face.**](http://links.g4yamerica.com/u/click?_t=cc7dda5c2cc64061900678c88bd3a18a&_m=37af78d2cc264adc82e1d34eabc4dca4&_e=d3BIbDoFMhfPknwZE-Gfacjfzr9Gmf73jkBzW8VNicEXtibldaVVnE8VDzavE2F_A9GMtCTsqaDdrcz2n8bkKllo7utcAZWREbIBH8zSAZZ3zlwxkFLqn3Boq6uBmYs9KAZr7vAOI9CKw2fsMY_ppYgFp7uzVUZDvlpRYnEWXRVcewKZVbqIdEegN_oL_uZo9JCq__eWZdRfkJ9oLBdwoUQMIoS5MKi5oIhWhz_MFFgRwSgiKWrOYJgR_fKNaXDIwAfiRB808MASVsIkP7arOr8EqWTP0rey024UIS3K4CGcYUpAF-k_yMFxPTvDCOtO0GaXvuOU8h3dVSPCRohMC6Wc23SLUMVPAd_4rh1jYJ3VQZNPx0_Uay3mbfl6k-VsPQodk1FQa8moMi_tSd-CDfq1BW0xMjGhslwXprdcNWU%3D) I'd love nothing more than to go back to my farm in Kentucky and raise my family in peace, but this moment calls for men and women of courage and conviction to fight for our country. I believe with every fiber of my being that America is worth saving and I'm ready to fight with everything I have to save her. [**Fellow Conservative, I'm calling on you to fight with me.**](http://links.g4yamerica.com/u/click?_t=cc7dda5c2cc64061900678c88bd3a18a&_m=37af78d2cc264adc82e1d34eabc4dca4&_e=d3BIbDoFMhfPknwZE-Gfacjfzr9Gmf73jkBzW8VNicEXtibldaVVnE8VDzavE2F_A9GMtCTsqaDdrcz2n8bkKllo7utcAZWREbIBH8zSAZZ3zlwxkFLqn3Boq6uBmYs9KAZr7vAOI9CKw2fsMY_ppYgFp7uzVUZDvlpRYnEWXRVcewKZVbqIdEegN_oL_uZo9JCq__eWZdRfkJ9oLBdwoUQMIoS5MKi5oIhWhz_MFFgRwSgiKWrOYJgR_fKNaXDIwAfiRB808MASVsIkP7arOj5F8EvUqABB5Wwbn2jl6FMqOwUBt0088EneZrU9Yd_UvwLhisJgpmyRxnPEYwWzD3HvU_s9GrBgsjXPD3rQREx2_btUBCRbhTgF_fMgFXkikiH3R5fef0gwxFxCasrgknTulrRYhCLOCTYDW1Dx7AM%3D)
_With Courage,_
James Comer Chairman, House Oversight Committee

subject: A small victory for reproductive freedom

Peter, I've got some great news for you: The Florida Supreme Court just ruled to keep abortion rights on the ballot this November!

But we can’t celebrate just yet — **the court also UPHELD Ron DeSantis' unconstitutional 15-week abortion ban, which means his even more extreme six-week ban will take effect in 30 days.**

_[Now, we finally have the chance to overturn Ron DeSantis' extreme ban and restore our reproductive freedom at the polls.](https://click.everyaction.com/k/82243048/464772075/1286624713?refcode=DR_SPLIT_FR_90DO_240229_1_1&amount=15&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAwNi8xLzg1ODM1IiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogImM5M2ZmMzNhLTQxZjEtZWUxMS1hYWYyLTAwMjI0ODIyMzM1MyIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=JvaE6EKsW28D1F46Wnxi0K6vkKtBorj-CPg8OvWh4kQ=)_

The tides are changing in Florida. And this ballot initiative has a very good chance of passing. Recent polling shows that 62% of voters, including a majority of Republicans, support passing it. And a massive 75% of voters oppose the extreme six-week ban that could take effect in a matter of weeks.

This is what a powerful grassroots movement can accomplish._And that's exactly what we need to defeat Rick Scott and stop him from passing a nationwide ban on abortions._

Listen, Rick Scott wants you to believe that our home is a red state. But that couldn't be further from the truth. More and more of us are rejecting his far-right agenda every day. And polling data shows that this race is neck and neck.

But now, he’s spending millions to lie about his record and launch baseless attacks against me — and I can’t overcome his self-funded ads without the crucial resources to fight back. [So please, will you please chip in $15 or more — split between my campaign and Defeat Republicans — before 11:59 p.m. tonight to help me reach my rapid- response goal? And this ballot initiative has a very good chance of passing. Recent polling shows that 62% of voters, including a majority of Republicans, support passing it. And a massive 75% of voters oppose the extreme six-week ban that could take effect in a matter of weeks. name: Mike Johnson [Speaker of the House]
subject: You've never seen fire and brimstone until you've gone head-to-head with Trump-hating socialists.
disclaimer_text: Paid for by TEAM SCALISE, a joint fundraising committee authorized by and to benefit SCALISE FOR CONGRESS and EYE OF THE TIGER PAC
body:
Democrat Super PACs... Joe Biden’s army of megadonors... They are fully committed to destroying our movement and replacing EVERY LAST ONE OF US with a Liberal Democrat.

| |

---
| | [Unsubscribe](http://links.conservativesfordjt.com/e/encryptedUnsubscribe?_r=05b03ef2209247bcbdad7fd5099cd670&_s=0e4ab72fc22146688af6efefcb3f972c&_t=yhu_8y8QTY5PiKeWVJ7WzkpzqQL6etry8k7EGcgs24vh8cUkoQnGKHIkYLCZINcbTyWzWbQvdZq7GKlJ2a8KRerd0FzCp13iELtpyxs7YIU%3D) | [Mark as Junk](http://links.conservativesfordjt.com/e/encryptedUnsubscribe?_r=05b03ef2209247bcbdad7fd5099cd670&_s=0e4ab72fc22146688af6efefcb3f972c&_t=yhu_8y8QTY5PiKeWVJ7WzkpzqQL6etry8k7EGcgs24vh8cUkoQnGKHIkYLCZINcbTyWzWbQvdZq7GKlJ2a8KRerd0FzCp13iELtpyxs7YIU%3D)

| My fellow Americans - this is Speaker Mike Johnson.

_You've never seen fire and brimstone until you've gone head-to-head with Trump-hating socialists. _

So you can imagine the immediate wrath I faced when I went on record supporting Donald J. Trump for President. I was just talking to my friend, Steve Scalise - he faced the same thing when he endorsed Trump too.

_**[He and I agree: as strong Pro-Trump Conservatives, we've got to stick together.](http://links.conservativesfordjt.com/u/click?_t=05b03ef2209247bcbdad7fd5099cd670&_m=0e4ab72fc22146688af6efefcb3f972c&_e=_-_PU_F48I9gV9EHrkUndYr2bz_gZdG0wjemg4ODeA8RzOzfTFjuYgUWKQzJ5AnBkCY9rRLdhPc3dWO6rDfyGLsNsXmLJzMfte7oBIdOCu5Af1Nq_utntmClYfwRp9azwg2sj3dJsM9PnKdC4nIQMMgeGW8bVbQajWboDmaodydRpBOVZsAlcq88N_Gfj6owU0q4_i0FGaa9uD4z12KRl0_p2xi5cJacoCImaQ-fNQUhsrIjeIsK2jGOZ0N2q23H2HDx9QzOVw50UBv6O9OPMOyObygF0CJRPGi1vwx4CajMAix7l0cWmxrW4uLYDlGlWkIBGr2Vw8DCAbiKWLfwQt9uh3sMktuEDKkM8c6tz_AJz5tepYVlX43B2IUPWDamxEyArNqbsyJDzb4NyfXLS7kazGIwsoivj_m1bicmf5E%3D "He and I agree: as strong Pro-Trump Conservatives, we’ve got to stick together.")**_

That's because the anti-Trump Media... Young radicals on college campuses... the holier-than-thou elites in Hollywood... Democrat Super PACs... Joe Biden's army of megadonors... They are fully committed to destroying our movement and replacing EVERY LAST ONE OF US with a Liberal Democrat.

But wait, that's not even the half of it. It gets worse:
** Problem #1: ** We have TWO imminent Special Elections and Democrats committed more than five million dollars to install more Liberals.

** Problem #2: ** House Democrats have forty million bucks stashed away to attack pro-Trump Conservatives like us.

** Problem #3: ** Joe Biden just bragged about raising a million bucks in a SINGLE DAY attacking President Trump.
I cannot stress the urgency of the situation enough. Early voting is about to start in the first Special Election AND the Left's fundraising advantage grows by the minute...

_**[So as one of my first moves of the election year, I'm teaming up with my fellow Louisianian, Steve Scalise, to set a goal of raising one million dollars between now and the end of the month.](http://links.conservativesfordjt.com/u/click?_t=05b03ef2209247bcbdad7fd5099cd670&_m=0e4ab72fc22146688af6efefcb3f972c&_e=_-_PU_F48I9gV9EHrkUndYr2bz_gZdG0wjemg4ODeA8RzOzfTFjuYgUWKQzJ5AnBkCY9rRLdhPc3dWO6rDfyGLsNsXmLJzMfte7oBIdOCu5Af1Nq_utntmClYfwRp9azwg2sj3dJsM9PnKdC4nIQMMgeGW8bVbQajWboDmaodydRpBOVZsAlcq88N_Gfj6owU0q4_i0FGaa9uD4z12KRl0_p2xi5cJacoCImaQ-fNQUhsrIjeIsK2jGOZ0N2q23HduySKMu6bQpe7XU6annQ0V4sJsG2t42XWdlEkhNEQ83M-l3SE_5cVgFeVgCMk0vso5h4AF-wksIY7hX8EW4kJprNBfm70ITdpE86k8WotpPOocX48p2s2T2sHmEGOiwMbH1YVkJIeM2S9PLUjQ2N6BZ4xJPKvCIBYmXUs3m-cww%3D "So as one of my first moves of the election year, I’m teaming up with my fellow Louisianian, Steve Scalise, to set a goal of raising one million dollars between now and the end of the month.")**_

I know, I know - that's a big goal. I get that. But that's as low as I could possibly make it to fully fund our campaign operations in every must-win swing state.

If we fail to hit it, the consequences would be unthinkable. We'd have no choice but to: **1) ** SCRAP our get-out-the-vote operations, **2) ** SLASH the budget for our ad campaigns, and **3) ** Throw our digital outreach plans IN THE TRASH CAN.

Nothing - and I mean NOTHING - would be worse for our plans to defend our razor-thin House Majority. **That 's why I'm calling for reinforcements. **

_I know the economy is in bad shape under Joe Biden. So if that 's preventing you from pitching in $100 or $50 - I completely understand. But if you can afford JUST $10 or even $5, I would be grateful beyond measure. _

_**[I only ask everyone reading this to pitch for a few bucks or whatever you can afford.](http://links.conservativesfordjt.com/u/click?_t=05b03ef2209247bcbdad7fd5099cd670&_m=0e4ab72fc22146688af6efefcb3f972c&_e=_-_PU_F48I9gV9EHrkUndYr2bz_gZdG0wjemg4ODeA8RzOzfTFjuYgUWKQzJ5AnBkCY9rRLdhPc3dWO6rDfyGLsNsXmLJzMfte7oBIdOCu5Af1Nq_utntmClYfwRp9azwg2sj3dJsM9PnKdC4nIQMMgeGW8bVbQajWboDmaodydRpBOVZsAlcq88N_Gfj6owU0q4_i0FGaa9uD4z12KRl0_p2xi5cJacoCImaQ-fNQUhsrIjeIsK2jGOZ0N2q23HXFEzmQu28BMLegQSiIBzkGywK2r3MwG5187jGIqnGqYAcSkE2DV0huAbpDuhsWNQ2mRjXIZwRVRjyn4AFn5j5OSNL-mjdcufFyPZ3RvqNB1sStBRJwJWK4ghUg276U1MWeYMDd7jjOL01c1BFOMSN316wAs5h6eE_g6LQvcVfiQ%3D "I only ask everyone reading this to pitch for a few bucks or whatever you can afford.")**_

When the stakes are this high, that's what will be the difference between saving our Republican Majority and losing to the Trump-hating Democrats. So can I count on you to pitch in SOMETHING?

subject: Ensure Dr. West is on the ballot in all 50States—5 Ways to Act Today
body:
Take these five actions today to ensure TRUTH, LOVE, & JUSTICE are on the ballot in every state this election.

| | | [ ](https://www.cornelwest2024.com/donate?e=2c4ab4fbefc09c0d9c12f8df438b31c5&utm_source=cornelwest&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=fundraising_5_ways_to_magnify&n=1&v=14)
---
## **5 Ways to Build Democracy Today**
---
In a political landscape dominated by a corporate-owned duopoly that brazenly places profits over people and the planet, many of us are feeling faced with the absurd "choice" between civil war and genocide. When greed-fueled violence and hate are the only choices on offer, it is clearly time for the power of independent voices and unified communities to take voice on behalf of the universal human interests of TRUTH, JUSTICE, and LOVE. **Take these actions now to help fuel the quickly growing momentum nationwide for Dr. Cornel West for President 2024**
---
| [](http://www.cornelwest2024.com/donate?e=2c4ab4fbefc09c0d9c12f8df438b31c5&utm_source=cornelwest&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=fundraising_5_ways_to_magnify&n=2&v=14 "STEP 1: DONATE TO ENSURE BALLOT ACCESS") [STEP 1: DONATE TO ENSURE BALLOT ACCESS](http://www.cornelwest2024.com/donate?e=2c4ab4fbefc09c0d9c12f8df438b31c5&utm_source=cornelwest&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=fundraising_5_ways_to_magnify&n=2&v=14)
---
## **Where Does My Donation Go?**
### **Your donation directly supports Dr. West's Ballot Access efforts as we work to ensure voters in all 50 states have an independent, people-powered option alongside the corporate duopoly candidates.**

| _Dr. West does not accept corporate donations, relying on the heartfelt support of individual supporters like you to keep the momentum of this people-powered movement._ _Consider a[monthly recurring donation](https://www.cornelwest2024.com/r?u=810mQJoaZrS9jX-sfil2xKn_0S533rDw8Yl57tUtCfgdqsgpFUcn48vjT6fYEhBi&e=2c4ab4fbefc09c0d9c12f8df438b31c5&utm_source=cornelwest&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=fundraising_5_ways_to_magnify&n=3&v=14) toward this important effort if you have means to give voice to the silenced and help us uplift our fellow siblings everywhere. _

The groundswell of support has been surging in recent months, reflecting a cross-cultural revolution not being televised as our siblings from all walks of life are courageously setting aside false narratives to share Brother West's message of TRUTH, LOVE & JUSTICE—**join with our historical movement as a volunteer today!**

---
**Every state requires independents to meet unique rules** to be allowed alongside corporate duopoly party candidates on state election ballots As a result, Dr. West will either stand as the candidate of likeminded independent parties, as the candidate of his newly-formed _**Justice for All Party**_ , or as an independent candidate via required petition signatures or pay-to-play fees—depending on each state's regulations. **We are committed to securing Ballot Access for Dr. West in all 50 states to ensure every voter has an independent choice for TRUTH, JUSTICE & LOVE in 2024.**

Equip yourself with the information that can help your community understand the foundations of this historical, long-term movement. Our vision is not rooted simply in an election cycle, but in a fundamental, love-oriented shift in the way we allow ourselves to be governed.

## **Strengthen this Historic Movement!**
---
Your support can help propel this historic "moment in a movement" even further. By donating to the Cornel West campaign, you become part of a collective endeavor to transform our political landscape into one that truly serves the people. If you have the means, please consider a recurring donation to keep this momentum going in the months to come.** In gratitude and solidarity, **Team Cornel West for President 2024** _P.S. This is more than a campaign; it's a movement for truth, justice, and love. Join us in making history. Your support is crucial to our success.[Please act today](CornelWest2024.com/donate) with a generous donation to this critical movement. _

When greed-fueled violence and hate are the only choices on offer, it is clearly time for the power of independent voices and unified communities to take voice on behalf of the universal human interests of TRUTH, JUSTICE, and LOVE. Take these actions now to help fuel the quickly growing momentum nationwide for Dr. Cornel West for President 2024 | "STEP 1: DONATE TO ENSURE BALLOT ACCESS" Where Does My Donation Go? Your donation directly supports Dr. West's Ballot Access efforts as we work to ensure voters in all 50 states have an independent, people-powered option alongside the corporate duopoly candidates. | ---|--- | | Dr. West does not accept corporate donations, relying on the heartfelt support of individual supporters like you to keep the momentum of this people-powered movement. Consider a toward this important effort if you have means to give voice to the silenced and help us uplift our fellow siblings everywhere. | "STEP 2: VOLUNTEER NOW" The groundswell of support has been surging in recent months, reflecting a cross-cultural revolution not being televised as our siblings from all walks of life are courageously setting aside false narratives to share Brother West's message of TRUTH, LOVE & JUSTICE—join with our historical movement as a volunteer today! | "STEP 3: ENSURE BALLOT ACCESS IN YOUR STATE" Every state requires independents to meet unique rules to be allowed alongside corporate duopoly party candidates on state election ballots As a result, Dr. West will either stand as the candidate of likeminded independent parties, as the candidate of his newly-formed Justice for All Party , or as an independent candidate via required petition signatures or pay-to-play fees—depending on each state's regulations. We are committed to securing Ballot Access for Dr. West in all 50 states to ensure every voter has an independent choice for TRUTH, JUSTICE & LOVE in 2024. | "STEP 4: SHOP MERCH & SHOW YOUR SUPPORT" | ---|--- | | Visit the to spread the good world and fly your merch. Show your community you stand in solidarity with humanity and have the courage to work toward an uplifted vision for our future. Plus, check back often to see the latest limited-run prints and artwork. | "STEP 5: LEARN & SHARE THE PLATFORM" Read up on what Dr. Cornel West stands for and the he champions in solidarity with poor, marginalized, and working class people everywhere. Equip yourself with the information that can help your community understand the foundations of this historical, long-term movement. Our vision is not rooted simply in an election cycle, but in a fundamental, love-oriented shift in the way we allow ourselves to be governed. Strengthen this Historic Movement! Your support can help propel this historic "moment in a movement" even further. By donating to the Cornel West campaign, you become part of a collective endeavor to transform our political landscape into one that truly serves the people. Together, we are demonstrating what a working-class revolution truly looks like! Please visit and chip in $24 now. If you have the means, please consider a recurring donation to keep this momentum going in the months to come. In gratitude and solidarity, Team Cornel West for President 2024 P.S. This is more than a campaign; it's a movement for truth, justice, and love. Join us in making history. Your support is crucial to our success.CornelWest2024.com/donate with a generous donation to this critical movement. name: Ruben Gallego
subject: I wanted to thank you, Peter
disclaimer_text: Paid For By Gallego for Arizona
body:
The vast majority of donations we receive come from those emails and texts, and I’m really proud of that.
#

Peter, we made a big push ahead of our FEC deadline on Sunday.
We sent quite a few emails and texts. I appreciate you wading through all those, because they’re really important to this campaign.
The vast majority of donations we receive come from those emails and texts, and I’m really proud of that. Because it means that the people who are powering this campaign aren’t billionaires or CEOs or hedge fund managers, the wealthy folks that can afford to write huge checks.
It’s you, Peter. And before we get any further, I just wanted to reach out and thank you, personally, for your support.
We’re going to put out an FEC report this month that will make you proud and show everyone — friend or foe, pollsters, pundits, party elites, everybody — that we’ve got what it takes to win this race.
So really, thank you.
It means a whole lot to me.
Ruben

name: Mark Warner
subject: Tim Kaine just loves the spotlight
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Friends of Mark Warner
body:
did you see he officially kicked off his re-election campaign?

|
---

| | [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/82243341/464773019/-1280949340?refcode=mw_em_240402_1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDAvMS84ODY1NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI0YTkyMjI3YS00M2YxLWVlMTEtYWFmMi0wMDIyNDgyMjMzNTMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=2WBEfrwmn8aRZp_z_iphGaD4_RdDX7mXnQt6qSU8cug=) Derek, If you haven’t seen the news by now, **I’m excited to be the one to tell you that Tim Kaine officially kicked off his re-election campaign today.** **__[Split a $5 donation now to help Tim kick off his campaign strong>>>](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/82243342/464773020/-1280949340?refcode=mw_em_240402_1&amount=5&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=&firstname=Derek&lastname=Willis&addr1=&city=Manassas&state=&phone=&employer=&occupation=&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDAvMS84ODY1NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI0YTkyMjI3YS00M2YxLWVlMTEtYWFmMi0wMDIyNDgyMjMzNTMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=2WBEfrwmn8aRZp_z_iphGaD4_RdDX7mXnQt6qSU8cug=)__** Now, he’s going on tour! And no, not the type of tour you’re thinking of. It’s not like he’s heading to concert arenas around the country to perform. But honestly, I wouldn’t put it past him to do something like that. That’s how good he thinks he is at the harmonica. (He is actually incredibly talented, but I could never say that to his face). But I’m getting off topic. I’m not writing to you to make fun of Tim, as much as I might like to. On this tour, Senator Kaine is hitting the road to talk about all the work he’s done to help Virginians in every corner of the Commonwealth. He kicked off the tour today in Richmond, then he’ll make stops in Leesburg, Dumfries, Norfolk, and more, where he’ll share his record of standing up for good jobs, standing up for equality, standing up for lower health care and education costs, standing up for reproductive freedom, and standing up for voting rights. **Today and every day, I couldn’t be more proud to stand with my friend Tim. That’s what his campaign is all about – standing up together. This November, we have a chance to stand up against the Republican Party that wants to tear us and our progress down.** **__[Will you split a contribution between my campaign and Tim Kaine’s so we can re-elect him in November and stand on the right side of progress together?](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/82243343/464773021/-1280949340?refcode=mw_em_240402_1&amount=5&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=&firstname=Derek&lastname=Willis&addr1=&city=Manassas&state=&phone=&employer=&occupation=&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDAvMS84ODY1NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI0YTkyMjI3YS00M2YxLWVlMTEtYWFmMi0wMDIyNDgyMjMzNTMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=2WBEfrwmn8aRZp_z_iphGaD4_RdDX7mXnQt6qSU8cug=)__** clean_body: did you see he officially kicked off his re-election campaign? | | | = Derek, If you haven’t seen the news by now, I’m excited to be the one to tell you that Tim Kaine officially kicked off his re-election campaign today. = Now, he’s going on tour! And no, not the type of tour you’re thinking of. It’s not like he’s heading to concert arenas around the country to perform. But honestly, I wouldn’t put it past him to do something like that. That’s how good he thinks he is at the harmonica. (He is actually incredibly talented, but I could never say that to his face). But I’m getting off topic. I’m not writing to you to make fun of Tim, as much as I might like to. On this tour, Senator Kaine is hitting the road to talk about all the work he’s done to help Virginians in every corner of the Commonwealth. He kicked off the tour today in Richmond, then he’ll make stops in Leesburg, Dumfries, Norfolk, and more, where he’ll share his record of standing up for good jobs, standing up for equality, standing up for lower health care and education costs, standing up for reproductive freedom, and standing up for voting rights. Today and every day, I couldn’t be more proud to stand with my friend Tim. That’s what his campaign is all about – standing up together. This November, we have a chance to stand up against the Republican Party that wants to tear us and our progress down. = If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will be automatically split between Tim Kaine and Mark Warner: = = = = = = Thank you, Mark Warner P.S. Please don’t tell Tim I said he was an incredibly talented harmonica player. ******=**** | | Friends of Mark Warner 1490-5A Quarterpath Road #213 Williamsburg, VA 23185 United States | Click here to . | Paid for by Friends of Mark Warner

name: Team WisGOP
subject: It’s Election Day!
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY THE REPUBLICAN PARTY OF WISCONSIN NOT AUTHORIZED BY ANY CANDIDATE OR CANDIDATE'S COMMITTEE
body:
Go vote NOW
No images? [Click here](https://republicanpartyofwisconsin.cmail20.com/t/y-e-xhhklky-didthutlhu-x/) [](https://republicanpartyofwisconsin.cmail20.com/t/y-l-xhhklky-didthutlhu-r/)
### Patriot,
### **Happy Election Day! If you haven 't already, now is the time to go VOTE!**
### If you think the election in your community isn't a big deal, we assure you it is. Local races are the lifeblood of our efforts, however, also on the ballot today is President Donald J. Trump!
[FIND YOUR POLLING PLACE](https://republicanpartyofwisconsin.cmail20.com/t/y-l-xhhklky-didthutlhu-y/) [REPORT A PROBLEM AT THE POLLS](https://republicanpartyofwisconsin.cmail20.com/t/y-l-xhhklky-didthutlhu-j/)
### The mainstream media is keeping watch on Wisconsin today, and are hoping to see enthusiasm and motivation for President Trump to be down BIGLY. Don't give them a win! Get out and vote for conservative candidates in your community, and for President Donald Trump to be the Republican nominee.
### It's not enough to simply cast your vote today. We need **YOU** to immediately **FORWARD** this email to at least five people in order to ensure victory. Text your friends. Call your family. Make sure they get out and **VOTE**.
### We only win with your help, Patriot. Be champion for conservatism and America by casting your vote today. Head to [myvote.wi.gov](https://republicanpartyofwisconsin.cmail20.com/t/y-l-xhhklky-didthutlhu-t/) for more information, and be sure to head to the polls **before they close at 8:00 PM TONIGHT!**

Local races are the lifeblood of our efforts, however, also on the ballot today is President Donald J. Trump! The mainstream media is keeping watch on Wisconsin today, and are hoping to see enthusiasm and motivation for President Trump to be down BIGLY. Don't give them a win! Get out and vote for conservative candidates in your community, and for President Donald Trump to be the Republican nominee. It's not enough to simply cast your vote today. We need YOU to immediately FORWARD this email to at least five people in order to ensure victory. Text your friends. Call your family. Make sure they get out and VOTE. We only win with your help, Patriot. Be champion for conservatism and America by casting your vote today. Head to for more information, and be sure to head to the polls before they close at 8:00 PM TONIGHT!
