name: Sharice Davids
subject: Thank you
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY SHARICE FOR CONGRESS
body:
[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/82243952/464775075/-240735101?refcode=email-header&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDIvMS82NTc1OCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI5OTc0M2E0Yi00NWYxLWVlMTEtYWFmMi0wMDIyNDgyMjMzNTMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=swwNO5EGjDs4e4goaZKckpcnCx-ghQEc8iTI0b-Sk24=) I’m getting in touch just to say thank you. My team and I just finished tallying up the numbers, and thanks to an INCREDIBLE push from our grassroots supporters over the weekend, we hit our quarterly fundraising goal before the deadline. Between the emails from my campaign staff and me, we’ve probably covered in more detail than you would like why hitting this goal was such a big deal for our campaign. So I’ll just leave it at this: We’re thrilled, we’re optimistic, and we’re ready to work hard every single day between now and November to win this race. And we are all so grateful for you, and for every single person who has helped this campaign. I never take for granted what a privilege it is to serve the people of Kansas in Congress. And it’s only possible because of the trust and support people like you have shown me — through the three extremely competitive elections that we won, and today as we work so hard to win a fourth. There is so much progress we can unlock if we succeed — defending abortion rights and IVF, standing up for our democracy, and making life better for families across Kansas. I’m more motivated than ever to keep up the fight, and I’m so thankful to have you with me. Thank you. -Sharice

---

name: Kirsten Engel
subject: Thank you
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Engel for Arizona
body:
https://www.engelforarizona.com/ [https://www.engelforarizona.com/]
Official numbers are still being finalized, Peter, but I wanted to share some exciting news.
Our campaign wrapped up our strongest quarter yet — and it wouldn’t have been possible without your incredible grassroots support.
We knew we needed a strong start in 2024 to take on my opponent and his dark money PACs. Last cycle, they poured millions of dollars into defeating our campaign. We had to start laying the groundwork to win early, which meant hitting a really ambitious Q1 fundraising goal.
We didn’t just hit our goal — we exceeded it.
That’s because of you, Peter. Every bit makes a difference, from chipping in when you can to reading this email. THANK YOU for being part of this team.
We still have a tough road to November. But we have incredible momentum built up, and I know that together, we can win.
Thank you again.
Onwards,
Kirsten

name: Kevin Olasanoye
subject: You haven't heard THIS in the media
disclaimer_text: Paid for by the Democratic Party of Georgia
body:
about what’s happening in GA

|
---

[ ](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/82244861/464778080/227139380?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTAvMS83OTA4MSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJlNWFiM2JkOC00YmYxLWVlMTEtYWFmMi0wMDIyNDgyMjMzNTMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=7KZ5AIlge3FVY5WQnxuRf3QsSaU7kfI5TUvL0p2PuT8=&emci=93ce1f95-f7f0-ee11-aaf2-002248223353&emdi=e5ab3bd8-4bf1-ee11-aaf2-002248223353&ceid=43566853)

| | Peter, as the Executive Director of the Democratic Party of Georgia, I read a whole lot of news and commentary about what’s happening in Georgia and who’s going to win in November. [**_If you know you’re with us already and want to contribute to all our hard work, click here instead._**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/82244862/464778081/710125701?refcode=20240402.2_KO_4C&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTAvMS83OTA4MSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJlNWFiM2JkOC00YmYxLWVlMTEtYWFmMi0wMDIyNDgyMjMzNTMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=7KZ5AIlge3FVY5WQnxuRf3QsSaU7kfI5TUvL0p2PuT8=)

A lot of the media is trying to portray Georgia as a lock for Donald Trump. They say that Joe Biden will have to work hard if he wants to compete in Georgia – **_and that much is true. We DO need to work hard to win Georgia._**

**But what you won’t hear a lot of in the media is:_Georgia is a 50-50 tossup._**

Look at Georgia’s history.

In 2020, Georgia was the closest state in the country. Joe Biden won by just 0.23% of the votes cast. Both Senators Jon Ossoff and Rev. Warnock’s races went to runoffs, and _**both**_ won in January of 2021.

In 2021, Democrats followed up our January success with down-ballot victories across the state.

Then, in 2022, we re-elected Rev. Warnock in one of the most challenging races across the country.

And now, one of the most reliable pollsters of Georgia political opinion, the _Atlanta Journal-Constitution,_ is showing a **_one point race._**

**But that isn’t what the media wants you to think. They’ve created a narrative that Georgia is swinging back for Republicans.** [**_I’ll give it to you straight:_don’t believe them._**_Georgia is again the closest state in the country, and we’re going to need to fight like hell to win. Please, rush a donation right now and help us win._**_**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/82244863/464778082/710125701?refcode=20240402.2_KO_4C&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTAvMS83OTA4MSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJlNWFiM2JkOC00YmYxLWVlMTEtYWFmMi0wMDIyNDgyMjMzNTMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=7KZ5AIlge3FVY5WQnxuRf3QsSaU7kfI5TUvL0p2PuT8=)

– Kevin
---
|
---

However, If you wish to unsubscribe you can do so [here](https://secure.ngpvan.com/p/502xl98alkm3J5MS-c04xA2?unsubscribedata=xQpnrzdn%2FMkMPCkfmb%2Bh%2BK7wobUyLewQktFySadqDLKhcliGDLnM9OVSJcpI3fkiLHm09SBkU%2BuHJSpl0BZBKEsDIr2XoDQaZqu4BlJcahPraYiUkBGanxTsH6V59NHOTe1bWlUhNLZFj%2F63zmXONkj7eIV4dlBpWIQGvZ1MgO6ynibcS9gxr5LB8gpjJDSuh56PTTaN9%2FmSTUi0iKCTwRuFZv5A58RzmHhIxj03Y0JrWPjkDKL6dsHPBUmXI7uhpm63e8VSLO33WQ7bRgtypiMEwTVtGGG5mPVEo%2FtwxVV9QJfBtD7vk6uftXVGdYlpQG4GB6CUNdeiu%2BwqS2s%2B8ebMVls5iqkHwbIwtyf2EZHwEO6kSZv4SrZyLlS8YCHzaGqOJqecEONCOBm8m1xyVzu5ZGEIOVCu48bjbxlayVbcbS6kSWfwhSMpywAwBSRF).
